Friend,

**We are less than a year away from election day.**

Democrats surpassed every fundraising goal this past year. We are up against a well-oiled machine.

Interest rates are sky-high, grocery prices are still outrageous, the border is still wide open, and our so-called leaders are still taking no action on the issues that matter to We The People.

**2024 IS THE MOST IMPORTANT ELECTION OF OUR LIVES!**
**There 's never been a better time to [join the fight](http://links.davisforin.com/u/click?_t=3e9e6097e33749f890adf7e8c9b24a4e&_m=86fca44eb8a843e69a8c7fc1ac26af8a&_e=K9iW6gYhS5OG9RBrNjVVakYazLOSlokMGcIflmrsT3pkKjtCF7nivwdHmrYai_F4uodptjdDSHtMO4Dt9sYau15Q3L3ZjIIYrnNTco_t7kYNexw7lxoNg4cG2LMxduCfIU1bQYTwdDQn89Sn4oSG3y2ly3Sxhgj-zzYFQzIDLNfy1DiBtaa_lOiVZZZnOFpazQOr9fm-OOL2LfB1NgHYoA1dBZ3cy2mpt710kYStkRzETW0iNwRlVA0gXL6Cg_U0G8lGiWS0m9Bn210ggp49_UYySpu6n4NNSlqACMp-B5eNmQ6TZrBmvZ0fzWl6vxwLDHGdrkbRzqQtskr021JEqw%3D%3D) and [contribute!](http://links.davisforin.com/u/click?_t=3e9e6097e33749f890adf7e8c9b24a4e&_m=86fca44eb8a843e69a8c7fc1ac26af8a&_e=K9iW6gYhS5OG9RBrNjVVakYazLOSlokMGcIflmrsT3pkKjtCF7nivwdHmrYai_F4uodptjdDSHtMO4Dt9sYau15Q3L3ZjIIYrnNTco_t7kYNexw7lxoNg4cG2LMxduCfIU1bQYTwdDQn89Sn4oSG3y2ly3Sxhgj-zzYFQzIDLNdheXpitBrBdD108bwf3plBfqzWJyg-jvLGBhbxECturNlnKGljyP8hncNji3tZ0GamcQixtVrsBfnBSLZYMb265IMgCvMcASiZW5vJ7DWnt5TRM2lTCfzIz4W4sifa5j5SlrwKrHrkDpFJq2JFDMvu1AZXjXEutI-_fNdQDeqBjg%3D%3D)**

clean_body: This is mind blowing | | | | | Well, friend— The New Jersey Globe just reported a mind blowing stat: New Jersey Democrats hold a Republicans. As you well know by now, NJ-07 is one of, if not THE most important race in the country this year and we CANNOT start off the year with this kind of disadvantage... especially when the results of this year’s national election could come down to US! The future of our party and our country may very well end up resting on our shoulders. There’s ONE thing that matters right now: getting voters registered and headed to the polls in 2024. We are starting from a deficit, but there is still time to catch up...if we get going NOW. We can NOT get complacent. We need to be fighting each and every day to close the gap. Thank you and LET’S GO!! **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: amplifying the voices of mothers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
By amplifying the voice of mothers in Congress, we enhance the representation of every family, ensuring that our legislative efforts are not just effective but also empathetic and comprehensive.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77199224/449682232/591366051?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2024-01-16_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTQ4NDA5MS1jYmI0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ANdR-Aq2p_boZ_dWGKZ9tsMjUsCVT-4jO6BbGPtoKeQ=)
---
| _**As we embrace the dawn of this critical year, I'm reaching out to share something that has been proven time and again: moms get it done at home and in Congress.**_

There's an undeniable power in the presence of mothers within our legislative halls. Mothers serving in government bring unparalleled efficiency and invaluable perspective to the table when it comes to governance.

_**Moms are experts at multitasking, organizing chaos, and finding pragmatic solutions to complex issues.**_ These skills are not just confined to our homes; they translate seamlessly into effective governance. In Congress, where diverse challenges demand swift and efficient responses, the unique abilities of mothers are an invaluable asset.

Moreover, moms possess a perspective that enriches the decision-making process. They understand intimately the day-to-day struggles, aspirations, and concerns of families across our nation. This firsthand experience grounds their decisions in the reality of what Americans truly need.

By amplifying the voice of mothers in Congress, we enhance the representation of every family, ensuring that our legislative efforts are not just effective but also empathetic and comprehensive.

clean_body: I know we just had our big end-of-month deadline, but now that we’re in 2024, we can’t lose sight of our goals and deadlines. | = | Did you see my team’s message on Saturday? We’re falling behind on fundraising, so we need your help to get back on track. I know we just had our big end-of-month deadline, but now that we’re in 2024, we can’t lose sight of our goals and deadlines. = | = \- Sam \---------- Forwarded message --------- We’re almost halfway through January, but our fundraising is slowing down. With 2024 here – and our primary now less than 2 months away – we can’t afford to fall behind anytime soon. = | = If we want to prioritize issues like education, reproductive healthcare, climate change, and so much more, we can no longer put up with the inaction from MAGA Republicans like Beth Van Duyne. body:
I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 - here's the gist:

| |

---
| | | Hey - I'm Byron Donalds.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.

_**[I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024- here's the gist:](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1b122c445f4749a9b62cbefb22f158a9&_e=4pt0c4_zSF4JWLHw5Hd9QEb_lpVHhNgsxSnqxHV1LMfgmUGNOZ0jEGXC99iyh1nVRIyYHWDTBT5j79fj72VOhh0ZlltOy9nkOpidLtGq1oHS9OjYUbJR5bwZ2N8fl6mwlYN31LUkGyBkTCCEu_SwkAF-4fnv9op5uqM8vx7gmJnIh2x166j9lNtseQNxsTTInl2RswYTRDMibbx_Jc8GDnMGGKPZ7cTs9HVqVufRl4fpkGnMUtSPpNZLIT0R1H0kwIVGNElj7Tr7MGhgp2XBtZdYegXyog4Tq8MKH3GAUpaAbqhh4lwztQYsbx7PFmxg6lQ3XJJXYu8vFtlXBZFy6OdUt3sH9EWvvkYAAjj8XUtOTlN5AAlFuNGACNPqUa03xsRhdsjvNUmXXcQ8U8brGtwGZXsk7eQUY8pvPYRRAdw%3D "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:")**_
* If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too
* If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
* Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected
* Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact
* Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives
* **Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat**

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

_**[That's why I'm coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1b122c445f4749a9b62cbefb22f158a9&_e=4pt0c4_zSF4JWLHw5Hd9QEb_lpVHhNgsxSnqxHV1LMfgmUGNOZ0jEGXC99iyh1nVRIyYHWDTBT5j79fj72VOhh0ZlltOy9nkOpidLtGq1oHS9OjYUbJR5bwZ2N8fl6mwlYN31LUkGyBkTCCEu_SwkAF-4fnv9op5uqM8vx7gmJnIh2x166j9lNtseQNxsTTInl2RswYTRDMibbx_Jc8GDnMGGKPZ7cTs9HVqVufRl4fpkGnMUtSPpNZLIT0R1H0kwIVGNElj7Tr7MGhgp2XBtR3M201xpJwWMYdz2jyXxHJukIbJvlfIuW-v8SJtufNmOBkljgAo2qq6yCu7xXxW0gHQuk6TiXYZPMcdSTTE5QM8Yhv6vAcbZfW-jQkpo9g7Sf06djhgO_j1woPPYNr01R9YTI3ugaVTiFL_947v9i8%3D "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?")**_ I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have **1)** a Conservative House Majority, **2)** a Conservative Senate, and **3)** a Conservative in the White House.

_If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in?_

This is a non-negotiable if we want to win.

Democrats are early voting in record numbers. Democrats have a sophisticated ballot harvesting operation in deep blue cities. And Democrats are all over social media platforms getting young Liberal voters to register.

**If we don 't do it too, we will lose.**

But make no mistake: We will ONLY be successful with the support of our grassroots team. No matter where you live in the country, this is your chance to directly impact whether Conservative WIN or LOSE the next election.

Will you do your part?

I look forward to seeing your name.

Thank you,

Byron Donalds
Co-Chairman of "Bank Your Vote"

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The CFPB, student debt cancelation, and what’s to come
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
These things can happen, when people choose to fight for them.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1899%2E4032634%2EWXMJPE)
---
I never in a zillion years thought I'd be a U.S. senator. But my life has had a lot of twists and turns, just like a lot of people's. I grew up on the ragged edge of the middle class. After my daddy’s heart attack, my family came within an inch from losing our house, but my mother got a minimum wage job at Sears that saved our family. I dropped out of college at 19 to get married, but got a second chance at a public college that cost $50 a semester and got to live my dream of becoming a public school teacher. I’ve dedicated my career to studying why families go broke and fighting to rebuild the middle class. After Wall Street crashed our economy in 2008, I fought to create the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau to protect people from getting scammed by big banks and corporations. The CFPB has already returned more than $16 billion to American consumers who’ve been cheated. After Senate Republicans vowed to block my nomination to serve as the CFPB’s first director, I went back home to Massachusetts and ran against one of them — and I beat him. **Since then, we’ve gotten a lot done. Like putting a new tax on massive corporate profits to help fund the fight against climate change. Lowering the cost of hearing aids. Getting student loan cancelation to the president’s desk — and even though an extremist Supreme Court has stood in his way, President Biden has still been able to cancel around $127 billion in student debt so far for nearly 3.6 million borrowers.** [**I’m running for re-election this year because there are still things we need to do to make our government work for working people — not billionaires and big corporations. Like a wealth tax. Universal child care. A solution to the housing affordability crisis. And I’m fighting like hell for these policies. But I can’t do this without your support. Will you make a contribution of $28 or whatever you can today so I can keep fighting for working families in Congress?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1144?amount=28&t=8&akid=1899%2E4032634%2EWXMJPE)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1144?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=1899%2E4032634%2EWXMJPE)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1144?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=1899%2E4032634%2EWXMJPE)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1144?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=1899%2E4032634%2EWXMJPE)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1144?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1899%2E4032634%2EWXMJPE)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1144?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=1899%2E4032634%2EWXMJPE)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1144?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=1899%2E4032634%2EWXMJPE)
---

---
Throughout my career, I’ve learned that when you start talking about policies that help working people — like canceling student debt or passing universal child care for example — plenty of people share the same feedback over and over and over: _“Great idea, but that will never happen.”_ Meanwhile when big banks need a big bailout after gambling with people’s livelihoods to boost their profits, or when corporate lobbyists beg for a tax break — those same people respond with: _“We’ll get that done ASAP.”_ It’s maddening, and I’m fighting to fix this imbalance in our government. We’re already making huge progress with the CFPB and student debt cancelation — despite everyone saying that these things would “never happen.” But we need to keep fighting. We can keep proving the naysayers wrong and making real change for working people. We can keep showing what it looks like to make our government work for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected. It doesn’t all happen overnight, but it gets done because we fought side by side as a grassroots movement. [**When we ignore the critics, aren’t afraid to take on the righteous fights, and invest in the change we truly believe in, we win. There’s much more progress to make together, and that’s why I’m running for reelection, and why I’m asking for your support. So, will you pitch in $28 or anything you can to help grow our campaign and help make big, structural change?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1144?amount=28&t=14&akid=1899%2E4032634%2EWXMJPE) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1144?t=12&akid=1899%2E4032634%2EWXMJPE)
---
| [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/365?t=4&akid=1899%2E4032634%2EWXMJPE) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/367?t=5&akid=1899%2E4032634%2EWXMJPE) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/368?t=6&akid=1899%2E4032634%2EWXMJPE) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/369?t=7&akid=1899%2E4032634%2EWXMJPE)

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Last weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Peter, we’ve hit the ground running in 2024.
I’m in this race to fight for Southern Arizona and our working families — but I know it will take a lot of hard work to unseat my Republican opponent. We spent this weekend on the campaign trail, and I wanted to give you a look into what it’s like.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011624_busy_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011624_busy_act]
First, I stopped by to see my friends and supporters in Tanque Verde.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011624_busy_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011624_busy_act]
Afterward, we attended an impressive meeting of citizen groups across LD-17. I spoke about my campaign to give voice to all parts of CD-6.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011624_busy_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011624_busy_act]
I was proud to sit in on an incredibly productive conversation regarding racial healing hosted by the League of Women Voters at the YWCA.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011624_busy_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011624_busy_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011624_busy_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011624_busy_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011624_busy_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011624_busy_act]
We celebrated the life and legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. by marching with friends and supporters in Tucson. His tireless pursuit of justice, equality, and civil rights inspires us to fight for a more compassionate, inclusive society.
I’m running so I can work on the issues that matter most to Arizonans. Every voter we reach makes a difference — and every dollar we raise helps us get our message out.
Peter, your grassroots support is the lifeblood of this campaign. Will you help us keep up our fight so we can win in November by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011624_busy_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011624_busy_act]
Thank you so much.
Kirsten
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011624_busy_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011624_busy_act] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_011624_busy_act]

name: =?utf-8?Q?Gordon=20Ackley?=
subject: Coming into focus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands
body:
The Virgin Islands is on the map. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4d2e14298ffe/re-hey-9340893?e=d30db4cde8)
---
| | Fellow Republican,

Twenty-four hours after Iowa, the Virgin Islands is coming into focus.

[Our caucus on February 8](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=c5292b4746&e=d30db4cde8) is poised to decide the narrative of the 2024 Republican campaign.
_**[Skip the line at the polls by pre-registering to vote](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=88ae3dcc5b&e=d30db4cde8).**_
If former President Donald Trump wins New Hampshire and wins the Virgin Islands, he's the presumptive nominee. Period. Conversely, if former Ambassador Nikki Haley or Governor Ron DeSantis wins New Hampshire, then the campaign in our islands is poised to be an epic contest unlike anything we have ever seen before.

Earlier today, I was on the phone with the Haley and Trump campaigns. We are working to confirm both campaigns for receptions on both St. Croix and St. Thomas. It looks like the date will be January 26 or 27. I hope to have confirmations in the next 36 hours.

For the first time ever, the Virgin Islands is playing a significant and critical role in the nomination of the Republican standard-bearer.

Please mark your calendar for February 8. There will be no absentee voting. You need to show up at one of our three convenient voting locations to cast a ballot.

I need you to vote in the caucus. I also need you to bring family, friends and neighbors to the polls.

Together, we can make a big difference and ensure that the voice of the Virgin Islands is heard.

Forward in 2024,

Republican Chairman Gordon Ackley
---
| | **FEBRUARY 8 CAUCUS VOTING INFORMATION**
In-person voting. No absentee ballots.
St. Croix: 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. at La Reine Chicken Shack, Christiansted
St. John: 10 a.m. to 4 p.m. at Lovango Rum Bar, Cruz Bay
St. Thomas: 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. at Bluebeard's Castle, Estate Taarneberg

[Pre-register to skip the registration line on caucus day](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=2870dee7b9&e=d30db4cde8)
---
| | **_Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
www.republicanpartyinthevirginislands.com_**

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=4a1e7eb3fa&e=d30db4cde8&c=daea067791) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=4a1e7eb3fa&e=d30db4cde8&c=daea067791).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&afl=1)
---

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d9d362284ef147df837c0c1783d92e26&_e=urF8so8Y7CeT7pYen4mxt90QoLioteIUp9TXm8SUT5OY4ltKoCJavInU7wbsR1jkiHsf_Hv_c56AalZyMYxSGD5bRVPSVxzE6JYteL305wvNZis6DGy-X4e8G3Fd0mF1TvMYPBr0w74R5qJFn_xn-AAy2sQtqZx042trnkzaaGuqaULPNbS8KXh0JR6SvFWq9fZpMRERl_HHLilN-KQoHMz7cEvprZwstVuXdENiislgp5Z6FfqvalkvVOdSxiQFVUdw3rAmeO7vy4ALDA_PkeyGf29137Hlt9bG4j4QJr3zqZ2MvCJmE2MD4qQUCB6-9UgGqyWxPyv6XabXZXeOZrOFBbIL7aEc6YgsgsW_S_Kf-fXf0sh-p9ShoSBmR_vNSsvpO4gzv9fLfvXMh_EQyg%3D%3D)

Fellow patriot,

There’s an old adage in politics: “As goes Ohio, so goes the nation.” That statement has never been truer than in 2024.

Yes, we’ve had important elections in the past, but I think you will agree that we are at a point we’ve never seen in American history. So, let me cut to the chase: _I believe the outcome of Ohio’s US Senate race will determine the future of our country._

That’s why I just announced that **I am all-in for conservative outsider Bernie Moreno** for Ohio’s U.S. Senate seat. He has my full support – [**and he needs yours as well if we’re going to win.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d9d362284ef147df837c0c1783d92e26&_e=urF8so8Y7CeT7pYen4mxt90QoLioteIUp9TXm8SUT5OY4ltKoCJavInU7wbsR1jkiHsf_Hv_c56AalZyMYxSGD5bRVPSVxzE6JYteL305wvNZis6DGy-X4e8G3Fd0mF1TvMYPBr0w74R5qJFn_xn-AAy2sQtqZx042trnkzaaGuqaULPNbS8KXh0JR6SvFWq9fZpMRERl_HHLilN-KQoHMz7cEvprZwstVuXdENiiskyJ8bNSkYghlBdfqJSUCpLYy38sCyY64GAW1fayqfJf-S8udFYGvpRWL_XRgaWuDLJWof1Z1cCMK_q2for4HCM7sr0i-fvYxxl6WOau0dMJKUzbJbf8toPJe9Ytr7VQgPj4KNXJcl_mDFGjatheex_OdmHPkH8HEmlINy8tyXs3Q%3D%3D)

**This will be THE TOP U.S. SENATE RACE in America in 2024** – one that we simply cannot afford to lose if we’re going to save our great country.

[**Will you step up now with a donation to support Bernie’s campaign in this highly competitive and critical race?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d9d362284ef147df837c0c1783d92e26&_e=urF8so8Y7CeT7pYen4mxt90QoLioteIUp9TXm8SUT5OY4ltKoCJavInU7wbsR1jkiHsf_Hv_c56AalZyMYxSGD5bRVPSVxzE6JYteL305wvNZis6DGy-X4e8G3Fd0mF1TvMYPBr0w74R5qJFn_xn-AAy2sQtqZx042trnkzaaGuqaULPNbS8KXh0JR6SvFWq9fZpMRERl_HHLilN-KQoHMz7cEvprZwstVuXdENiisljRxblnGUoTO7kLp-DD2sljec3xO_YfC6tqohcIfbPc9hjSqFPsJlEbc063-ag7u44TRwXkoKATjtXpTmZhprxInwpdbCJ6cwFICgZ8DROq6076H3s0mYcHjOtsxEGkKrzjdQ0kP3OIx1ePx9YzdMh8fN1L-Dyr-89yno9vPjQDg%3D%3D)

[ ** Support Bernie Moreno for U.S. Senate **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d9d362284ef147df837c0c1783d92e26&_e=urF8so8Y7CeT7pYen4mxt90QoLioteIUp9TXm8SUT5OY4ltKoCJavInU7wbsR1jkiHsf_Hv_c56AalZyMYxSGD5bRVPSVxzE6JYteL305wvNZis6DGy-X4e8G3Fd0mF1TvMYPBr0w74R5qJFn_xn-AAy2sQtqZx042trnkzaaGuqaULPNbS8KXh0JR6SvFWq9fZpMRERl_HHLilN-KQoHMz7cEvprZwstVuXdENiismslEQYTpQPmKzJR2m_XFF4odmVkraO_CvA0TtryCGMpbaq-Jed-x_WF3orPhX3pQvj_eOYGl-fZOplo9LB6zCsChX70a_BlglmUQanbmnaV5qvxmXAnw5Jg9qTSlne81mPt78eDbPRSVrpr4iG3Mb2ipGEq_nvbXbniROSKLs5JA%3D%3D)
Bernie is a businessman and political outsider with a record of success in the face of adversity. He is an optimist, and a fierce supporter of our America First principles. He is the type of leader we need to end the Left’s corrupt crusade against President Trump once and for all.

**I’m joining President Trump and other conservative leaders in announcing my endorsement of Bernie Moreno for the U.S. Senate.** [**I’m asking you to join us and rush your critical support for Bernie Moreno’s campaign by chipping in $15, $25, $35, or even more today.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d9d362284ef147df837c0c1783d92e26&_e=urF8so8Y7CeT7pYen4mxt90QoLioteIUp9TXm8SUT5OY4ltKoCJavInU7wbsR1jkiHsf_Hv_c56AalZyMYxSGD5bRVPSVxzE6JYteL305wvNZis6DGy-X4e8G3Fd0mF1TvMYPBr0w74R5qJFn_xn-AAy2sQtqZx042trnkzaaGuqaULPNbS8KXh0JR6SvFWq9fZpMRERl_HHLilN-KQoHMz7cEvprZwstVuXdENiiskzgAJj740lgEIoVs9JzjTMJ2LvA6As6lTWAANtWfisQ_nlJyLMTPupQAALvgXuoIMfVqNzEvF27PMfphBaBc9qraEcCaFlFJv8r3EtQ_FpxtcnSWs4MGlUnSavleew0FNU9Nhv1INNSmrQ44gvFYCX1pPCAcTfMlvl4q1W1iaO6A%3D%3D)

[ ** Support Bernie Moreno for U.S. Senate **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d9d362284ef147df837c0c1783d92e26&_e=urF8so8Y7CeT7pYen4mxt90QoLioteIUp9TXm8SUT5OY4ltKoCJavInU7wbsR1jkiHsf_Hv_c56AalZyMYxSGD5bRVPSVxzE6JYteL305wvNZis6DGy-X4e8G3Fd0mF1TvMYPBr0w74R5qJFn_xn-AAy2sQtqZx042trnkzaaGuqaULPNbS8KXh0JR6SvFWq9fZpMRERl_HHLilN-KQoHMz7cEvprZwstVuXdENiismnEhMd7yzBHU8UJ6Ew2OdGCjRfrTGwdlxhYCbjlVyvCENnTFg5GuDuZkB5fmAhxendoIkTAuOUwuAw7gQMSFqZ2o9dF25nG55kLXjIIpX30xei6Yrhl2e_rez3JxQfL98V1CY1qa0wN5lxHq4NRl4uut9wgRZlGmrbijAy4rEGkg%3D%3D)
Thank you,

**Jim Jordan**
U.S. Congressman [OH-04]

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

clean_body: This will be THE TOP US SENATE RACE in America in 2024 – one that we simply cannot afford to lose if we’re going to save our great country. | | Fellow patriot, There’s an old adage in politics: “As goes Ohio, so goes the nation.” That statement has never been truer than in 2024. Yes, we’ve had important elections in the past, but I think you will agree that we are at a point we’ve never seen in American history. So, let me cut to the chase: I believe the outcome of Ohio’s US Senate race will determine the future of our country. That’s why I just announced that I am all-in for conservative outsider Bernie Moreno for Ohio’s U.S. Senate seat. He has my full support – This will be THE TOP U.S. SENATE RACE in America in 2024 – one that we simply cannot afford to lose if we’re going to save our great country. Bernie is a businessman and political outsider with a record of success in the face of adversity. He is an optimist, and a fierce supporter of our America First principles. He is the type of leader we need to end the Left’s corrupt crusade against President Trump once and for all. I’m joining President Trump and other conservative leaders in announcing my endorsement of Bernie Moreno for the U.S. Senate. I’m dropping my personal link below, and would be so grateful to see your donation come in. = TY! \- Camille \-- Camille Alcala (she/her/hers) Finance Director California Democratic Party \----- Forwarded message ----- From: rapid-response@cadem.org Date: Mon, Jan 8, 2023 at 5:07PM Subject: Will you help prep for this unexpected election? | Woah! Did you hear? Governor Gavin Newsom just set the special election date for Kevin McCarthy’s U.S. House seat (CA-20) on March 19th, 2024. If Democrats could flip this seat from red to blue, that would bring us just INCHES away from taking back the U.S. House. = = = = = = = Flipping Kevin McCarthy’s old seat won’t be easy, but if we start organizing RIGHT NOW we can get an early head start. But because nobody knew Kevin McCarthy was going to resign last month, we don’t have a budget set aside for a special election campaign in CA-20. That’s why we are asking:= = Thanks for partnering with us to jumpstart this effort! \- The rapid response team at the California Democratic Party P.S. Can you imagine the look on Kevin McCarthy’s face when the seat he held for so many years is flipped blue by a Democrat thanks to grassroots support from donors like you? Let’s make it happen — =. | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: Taking the TX-32 debate stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | In two days, I'll take the TX-32 debate stage for the first time, Peter.

I’m very excited about this opportunity, not because I get to debate my opponents, but because I get to **share my vision for District 32 with you.**

TX-32 is special to me. My wife put her artistic touch on our East Dallas home – inside and out. My daughter’s school is a haven that keeps us rooted in the community. And my dogs, Disco and Moe, are an ever-present duo walking the streets of my neighborhood or along White Rock Lake. To represent my neighbors, friends, and voters I’ve met along the campaign trail would be an honor and a privilege. **It is a responsibility I do not take lightly.**

So with my first debate two days away, and the primary on March 5, I am asking for help to keep our campaign on the path to victory. [**That’s why I hope you’ll chip in $5 to help my campaign hit our $24,000 mid-month goal before midnight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77201568/449716778/-1417367329?refcode=em24_240116_MM3_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240116_MM3_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=&refcode2=550319a0-d5b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTUwMzE5YTAtZDViNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=U5dir-QN7OiGFICAF2Ov2xu9AddtSwGyYRntHN1lNZE=) clean_body: | | In two days, I'll take the TX-32 debate stage for the first time, Peter. I’m very excited about this opportunity, not because I get to debate my opponents, but because I get to share my vision for District 32 with you. TX-32 is special to me. My wife put her artistic touch on our East Dallas home – inside and out. My daughter’s school is a haven that keeps us rooted in the community. And my dogs, Disco and Moe, are an ever-present duo walking the streets of my neighborhood or along White Rock Lake. To represent my neighbors, friends, and voters I’ve met along the campaign trail would be an honor and a privilege. It is a responsibility I do not take lightly. name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: How your $5 donation impacts our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Your support allows us to directly reach undecided Missouri voters with Lucas’ message.
#
$5, Peter.
That’s what I’m asking you to chip in today to help us elect Lucas Kunce, defeat Josh Hawley, and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat this November.
**[CHIP IN $5 →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42646?refcode=em20240116-4623&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4623%2E614464%2EBOnOBQ)**
$5 gives us the ability to reach 25 new Missouri voters with persuasive digital ads — or it allows us to send a piece of mail with more information about Lucas and our campaign to an undecided voter’s home.
**In a neck-and-neck race like this one, every single vote counts.**
And the best part? Every $1 spent here in Missouri can go nearly five times as far as it will in states like Texas and Florida. Our media markets are smaller and less expensive, and our organizers will have less ground to cover than in those big states.
**Investing in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race — our best shot to flip a GOP-held Senate seat this year — could be your chance to make a real impact in this election.**
**[So what do you say, Peter? name: South Bay CRA
subject: New Speaker Jan 22nd meeting
body:
Jan 22nd Meeting News Friends, As we stand on the threshold of the 2024 election cycle, the pivotal moment we find ourselves in demands our attenti
| |
---
|
---
# Jan 22nd Meeting
---
---
|
---
# News
Friends,
As we stand on the threshold of the 2024 election cycle, the pivotal moment we find ourselves in demands our attention and active participation. The forthcoming weeks mark the commencement of a journey that will shape the course of our community's future.
In just a matter of weeks, ballots will be distributed, empowering each of us to exercise our fundamental democratic right. To enhance your decision-making process, we invite you to a critical event on the 22nd of this month, where local and state-wide candidates will gather to share their visions, values, and commitments.
This is not just an event; it is an opportunity for you to engage directly with those who aspire to lead and represent us. Your presence at this candidate event is paramount. Don't miss this chance to become an informed and active participant in the democratic process that defines our shared future.
Let us unite in the pursuit of a community strengthened by the collective voice of its constituents. Your attendance on the 22nd will play a crucial role in shaping the narrative of the upcoming election.
We look forward to your participation and the vibrant exchange of ideas that will undoubtedly ensue.
Sincerely,
**Nena Gates**
President
nenarenae2@gmail.com
We meet currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
Door opens at 6:30pm Meeting starts at 6:45
In addition please see the press release statement from my husband Derrick Gates below.
## These Candidates and More! If you are a Candidate you can come and meet and greet the people. Also email us if you want on the schedule for Feb. meeting. People from all over the South Bay attend this meeting.
---
|
---
## We meet currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA Door opens at 6:30pm Meeting starts at 6:45
---
## A message from Derrick Gates
---
Dear friends and fellow Conservatives, I am thrilled to announce that I am running for an official seat on the 66th Assembly District Central Committee. As some of you may know, I have been serving as an alternate on the committee for some time now. Over the past two years, I have also been actively involved in multiple posts within the party. I am proud to have been elected to the California Republican Assembly state board of directors as the Senate director for the 24th District, chaired the Faith Outreach committee for the CRA, and served as a delegate for the California State Party. These experiences have given me a deep understanding of the values and principles that are important to our party and have prepared me to effectively represent our district on the central committee. As a member of the central committee, I will work tirelessly to ensure that conservative values remain at the forefront of our party's agenda. I believe that my position on the LAGOP, which is the largest Republican party office in the nation, will allow me to have a greater impact on decisions that affect our party and our community. I have already been able to influence many decisions as an alternate, and I am confident that I can make an even greater impact as an elected member. While some have urged me to run for the congressional seat of the 36th district, I believe that my calling is to bring balance to the party for the next few years. This will not only benefit the party but also other candidates and myself in the long run. Federal races can be expensive to operate, and I have learned from my previous run for Congress that it takes time to build relationships and secure the support needed to win. My goal is to help fix the foundation of the party while building relationships with those who can help me in the future. I am asking for your prayers and support as I take this important step on my journey. Please look for me on the primary ballot on March 5, 2024. Early voting begins on February 24, 2024. Your vote for me, Derrick R. Gates, for the 66th Assembly Central Committee, will help ensure that our conservative values continue to be represented in our district and beyond. Thank you for your support and dedication to our party. Sincerely,
Derrick R. Gates
[Click for officialderrickgates.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/4872?id=64361.113.1.1408b2dac1aa7c0dd18148ef58f92713)
---
|
---
|
---

If you want to Join the fight, you can get started at this link!
[CLICK TO JOIN THE SOUTH BAY CRA](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/4872?id=64361.114.1.c4d64ad1ea2c605c99a9c1cea66ba6d2)

Tonight proved just how much we can accomplish when we work together. With even more special elections in the next few weeks – including tiebreaking specials in Michigan and Pennsylvania – we need continued support and resources. Abortion rights, our democracy, LGBTQ+ rights and more are on the line, and we can’t miss a single opportunity to build Democratic power.
**Together, we just secured the first legislative seat flip of the year. Now, we have to do everything in our power to make sure we can keep our momentum going.**

But here’s the deal: over the next few weeks, Democrats are facing more special elections where we need your help. | | | | | ---|--- Time to celebrate – Democrat Tom Keen just FLIPPED a key seat in the Florida House! 🎉 Tonight made it clear: Democrats are chipping away at Republican power in special elections nationwide. This win is a reflection of our team’s hard work day in and day out and an important victory to kick off 2024. Your support plays a huge role in making sure our candidates in states like Florida and nationwide have the resources they need to win. So, thank you. State Democrats across the country are building power and making an impact in the lives of workers and families. The odds were against Keen in this race, but voters stepped up and rejected the GOP’s harmful, hate-filled agenda – delivering a blow to DeSantis's right-wing legislature. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Tonight proved just how much we can accomplish when we work together. To protect our reproductive freedoms, defend our rights, and safeguard our democracy from Trump and his cronies, we all need to do our part to re-elect Joe Biden. |
#
Folks — Yesterday, I had the great privilege of visiting Minnesota’s southern neighbor, Iowa, to campaign for President Biden! It was a cold day in Des Moines, but I was happy to be there to support President Biden, Vice-President Harris, and Democrats up and down the ballot in this year’s elections. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77202145/449722699/-42549352?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20240116_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGU2YTA1MC1kZWI0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ur1TBOV007UMlZKmlQiwflsaJPS-nRn_PlawLld3jew=) Folks, the stakes could not be higher in 2024. clean_body: To protect our reproductive freedoms, defend our rights, and safeguard our democracy from Trump and his cronies, we all need to do our part to re-elect Joe Biden. | Folks — Yesterday, I had the great privilege of visiting Minnesota’s southern neighbor, Iowa, to campaign for President Biden! It was a cold day in Des Moines, but I was happy to be there to support President Biden, Vice-President Harris, and Democrats up and down the ballot in this year’s elections. = Folks, the stakes could not be higher in 2024. Donald Trump resoundingly won the GOP Iowa Caucus yesterday, and it seems like he’s on track to secure the GOP nomination for the White House — despite him facing 91 criminal indictments. To protect our reproductive freedoms, defend our rights, and safeguard our democracy from Trump and his cronies, we all need to do our part to re-elect Joe Biden. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tina Smith and Joe Biden will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for supporting our important work. I’m excited to continue traveling in support of President Biden and Vice-President Harris! — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

Fellow Conservative,

This is former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy with a serious, yet sad message about the state of the Democratic Party.

If you’re like me, then it might surprise you to learn that the families of **_dead Hamas terrorists and some Palestinian terrorist prisoners are eligible to receive up to $3,300 PER month - close to the maximum benefit an American may receive from the Social Security Administration_** – for killing innocent Israelis and other terrorism-related activities. Can you guess who is ultimately funding these pensions?

**[The American taxpayer](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f538a58983ac481c83c75dd56c24638e&_e=b8Bvf1wiRUWn0pleng9UZ1RKaFq-HpavWK22ugBNFAZNo1c9SqEWRJm3lVNfwJWea1kR9r2Kw85Bog697XHCl-do1M6fG_Y-9NiGWIzBuz6GRcyHWld6xHOfXRf8ybvxJnKNOmtsd9eqC54NWTe3ua0Mzwcs_LVOg-spLzQtZRrEhCheFJ4uuh3hH7vQfpDp3CZKqpmdtK67sTbrAYhrgXBI9QIDwIu0J-9BxTvOjW35s8zWodlraXwaeo-5yxJ55FX8ogc848p8FFZs1RV5LAoTPYZDh4B8b6-c6L4M20AmqUTuVSS0SAvpvnsX86s1jYEty_zs8FnWJkqsYzp-Gpu0IiJ9SZKANaDC4pjMqAgOo46vxSxXrm-vDNG-jBTjpljXN1YTm6W7-XTtkMeSAw%3D%3D). Let me tell you how.**
The “ _**moderate**_ ” Palestinian Authority, which runs the West Bank, is “showered” with nearly $1 billion in “aid” every year from the European Union and the United States. _**President Trump slashed America’s annual $200 million contribution, but Joe Biden reversed this decision in one of his first acts as president**_.

My Democrat opponent, Jon Tester, was in the middle of his third term in the U.S. Senate when President Joe Biden reinstated our annual $200 million contribution to Palestine. **He said nothing.**

[**STOP BENEFITS FOR TERRORISTS
SEND IN THE SEAL->** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f538a58983ac481c83c75dd56c24638e&_e=b8Bvf1wiRUWn0pleng9UZ1RKaFq-HpavWK22ugBNFAZNo1c9SqEWRJm3lVNfwJWea1kR9r2Kw85Bog697XHCl-do1M6fG_Y-9NiGWIzBuz6GRcyHWld6xHOfXRf8ybvxJnKNOmtsd9eqC54NWTe3ua0Mzwcs_LVOg-spLzQtZRrEhCheFJ4uuh3hH7vQfpDp3CZKqpmdtK67sTbrAYhrgXBI9QIDwIu0J-9BxTvOjW1N4pzjIYr3CAfD4LUKA-ODf30SEx6Ez8BJ_R3jOzVyNqYlZVD_qNBBUGGCYPmO_T1E6jeCqQ4y298bWe3gBvbBSAGJTSY3V7gheuIWm2Ch-wpKLRHdtZJRYM-XCEl7MobCLrmhQkqDwWEytPMio8cMsdlIwQcddEKLJCKM4EFFLw%3D%3D)

As an American, this disgusts me. As a former Navy SEAL who deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific region, it makes my blood boil. I didn’t fight to defend our freedoms and keep America safe only to have our hard-earned **tax dollars sent to the families of Hamas terrorists who raped and murdered 1,200 innocent Israeli citizens**.

The only way we can stop American dollars from flowing into the hands of terrorists and their families is to flip the Senate and put an end to these deranged Democrat priorities. **[Will you join my team and help me defeat Democrat Jon Tester? Chip in $5, or even $10 to send a Seal to the U.S. Senate.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f538a58983ac481c83c75dd56c24638e&_e=b8Bvf1wiRUWn0pleng9UZ1RKaFq-HpavWK22ugBNFAZNo1c9SqEWRJm3lVNfwJWea1kR9r2Kw85Bog697XHCl-do1M6fG_Y-9NiGWIzBuz6GRcyHWld6xHOfXRf8ybvxJnKNOmtsd9eqC54NWTe3ua0Mzwcs_LVOg-spLzQtZRrEhCheFJ4uuh3hH7vQfpDp3CZKqpmdtK67sTbrAYhrgXBI9QIDwIu0J-9BxTvOjW19KccSQYS7R87OnhcKmkj5Bm5YSdGM5Md9985rGNl_mIc-MvRGDEdxZ53GFZm8VEaumhs_fDj4Kg2q5q1SesG9iAzSYpuNbiDiGNYXpBmluQmTBVXe46wwqrRfR-6xai1GI2p2dlERyYIvDN6mHHWsEsih2SqYw9vqkI9VRYMiaw%3D%3D)**

[**STOP BENEFITS FOR TERRORISTS
SEND IN THE SEAL->** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f538a58983ac481c83c75dd56c24638e&_e=b8Bvf1wiRUWn0pleng9UZ1RKaFq-HpavWK22ugBNFAZNo1c9SqEWRJm3lVNfwJWea1kR9r2Kw85Bog697XHCl-do1M6fG_Y-9NiGWIzBuz6GRcyHWld6xHOfXRf8ybvxJnKNOmtsd9eqC54NWTe3ua0Mzwcs_LVOg-spLzQtZRrEhCheFJ4uuh3hH7vQfpDp3CZKqpmdtK67sTbrAYhrgXBI9QIDwIu0J-9BxTvOjW2bVAa6jnL4AR9VssuXy1CjflXY20Lrxikd_JP3DyCyvQWeSSii4z9qwU7vGmpTLJvGTgCZ6gHWIIpHJArbKwOLcCEt6D03bhK0dTQnfEDklwbAimXkXYank7DhwJricZgsPkkyDgGxSqhOAGkH86dHRXFnH0xsh5MZ7-M-N1VZkg%3D%3D)

President Biden is once again giving those who hate America hundreds of millions of dollars, this time freeing up money for The Palestinian Authority to pay murderers, rapists, and those who support wiping Israel off the map.

**President Biden has been on the wrong side of every major foreign policy decision of his day - and Jon Tester has been right by his side.**

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican for U.S. Senate

| Peter —

This morning, I woke from a terrible nightmare - that Donald Trump was back in the White House. Unfortunately, it wasn’t a nightmare.

He's now one step closer to the White House.

With the Iowa caucus behind us, it’s official: Donald Trump, who said he wants to govern like a dictator in his second term and celebrated his role in overturning Roe v. Wade, is on track to become the Republican nominee.

He’s made the stakes clear: if elected, he and his MAGA Republican allies in Congress will enact a national abortion ban, repeal the Affordable Care Act, and roll back protections that keep our air and water clean. body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5094%2E5257348%2E9FC9VX)
Derek, the Senate should have convicted Donald Trump when it had the chance. He dominated Iowa and is now on track to become the Republican nominee. _Again._
Our election here in California is the same day as the GOP presidential primary. A _lot_ of Trump voters will be flooding the polls. In fact, he’ll be on the same exact ballot as me.
The only thing MAGA Republicans across California may like more than voting for Trump? Voting against me. **They’re _all eligible to vote_ in our all-parties primary race, with celebrity Republican Steve Garvey surging in the polls.**
**[Can you chip in $10 to help us fight back and finish first on March 5?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2024_abs_em.sN9m5T&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240116_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=5094%2E5257348%2E9FC9VX)**

---
**DeSantis and Haley lit millions of dollars on fire with ads attacking _each other_ while they floundered dozens of points behind Trump.**
They vowed to pardon Trump if he were convicted of crimes. No matter how strong the evidence or how great the number of his convictions.
It’s not just them. **20 Republican Senators have endorsed Trump’s campaign, including many who voted to overturn the 2020 election.** After last night’s victory, more will join them.
**[We need to respond — _today_. Derek, make a contribution of $10 or any amount to our campaign.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2024_abs_em.sN9m5T&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240116_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=5094%2E5257348%2E9FC9VX)**

clean_body: Upon placing my hand upon the Bible... | | | | | Patriot, On January 20, 2025, I will place my hand upon the Bible and take the Oath of Office as I am inaugurated as your 47th President of the United States. I will thank God for granting us the strength to prevail against the most vicious witch hunts ever conceived. But I will also remember to thank a very special group of patriots... ...You see, as I make my way through the crowd and wave to our many, many supporters, I will quickly be able to identify who has been with me since this pivotal moment right now when they show me their | | I’ll know that YOU peacefully defended our movement as Democrats tried to remove my name from the ballot and disenfranchise a majority of American voters before the 2024 election even began. Our victory will be thanks to YOU. In fact, it will be thanks to you that my name could even appear on the ballot. With you peacefully standing by my side, we will cast off the political ruling class that hates our country, we will DISMANTLE the Deep State, we will rout the warmongers and globalists from our government, and above all else, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN by firing the most corrupt and incompetent president to ever occupy the White House – Crooked Joe Biden! But, as of the most recent report my team pulled for me this morning, I didn’t see your name on the roster of early renewals: | | 2024 MEMBERSHIP RENEWAL Member: dpwillis67@gmail.com OFFER:Early Renewal STATUS: PENDING | | | Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. name: Team Alsobrooks
subject: Your Team Alsobrooks Newsletter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf)

| | Happy New Year! We hope your holidays were filled with joy and relaxation! We are so grateful for all you have done to support our efforts over the last year. These past few months on the campaign trail have been phenomenal and the support we have received across Maryland has been truly inspiring! This year has been off to a busy start, and this is the first of two newsletters coming to your inbox this week, recapping the amazing time we’ve had on the campaign so far in 2024! Last week, we had huge turnouts at our office openings in Upper Marlboro and Silver Spring. It was amazing to see so many faces that have been on #TeamAlsobrooks since Angela’s first race, in addition to so many new ones. In celebration of MLK weekend we collected blankets and canned goods that were delivered to families in need! If you weren’t able to join us and would like to join us to volunteer, [**you can sign up here**](https://alsobrooks.actionkit.com/signup/volunteer-form?t=7&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf)! And if you haven't already RSVP for our Baltimore Office opening this Friday from 6:00pm to 8:00pm, **[please sign up here](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9524?t=8&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf)**! [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2571?t=9&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf) [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2571?t=10&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf) We spent the evening at the ATU Local 1300 Winter Celebration where we had the pleasure of speaking with so many incredible folks. Thank you to President Michael McMillan and the entire Local 1300 for allowing us to join in on the fun and discuss the future of Maryland. [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2571?t=11&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf) Angela was honored to attend the Howard County Kappa Phi Lambda Chapter of the Alpha Phi Alpha Fraternity, Inc. annual MLK Memorial Breakfast where we had the opportunity to speak with so many wonderful Marylanders about the issues that matter most to them. Thank you to the Alphas for inviting us to such a stellar event filled with fellowship and friends! [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2571?t=12&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf) Last weekend, Angela spent time in Chevy Chase with supporters, including Governor Wes Moore. Thank you to Dede and Dallas Lea for opening their home to us and to Governor Moore, Dawn Moore, and our many other friends for joining us and supporting the campaign! [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2571?t=13&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf) We had a powerful conversation with Baltimore County Executive Johnny Olszewski on Fox45 Baltimore. Thank you to Tom Rogers for having us on the show. Big thanks to County Executive Olszewski for joining us and getting coffee afterwards at Good Neighbor in Hampden after a great morning! Watch the interview [**here**](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9528?t=14&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf). [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2571?t=15&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf) [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2571?t=16&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf) Over the weekend, Angela had a blast celebrating Delta Founders Day with her Sorors across the state. The women of Delta Sigma Theta Sorority, Inc. have done so much for the state of Maryland, the nation and the world, and it was great to participate in service and fellowship with them. [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2571?t=17&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf) [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2571?t=18&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf) Watch Angela’s Founders Day video [**here**](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9529?t=19&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf). Here on Team Alsobrooks, we’re proud to be a campaign powered by grassroots donors. We believe in Angela's ability to go farther and do better for our communities, and we know you do too! It’s going to take all of us working together to get Angela over the finish line on May 14. | | | [Volunteer](https://alsobrooks.actionkit.com/signup/volunteer-form?t=20&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf)
---
| | [Donate](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9527?t=26&amount=25&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf)
---
**Socials**
While we'll keep sending emails keeping you updated, the best way to keep up with Angela is on our social media channels. Follow us on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram to follow along with us on the campaign trail!
| | [Facebook](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8814?t=21&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf)
---
| | [Twitter](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8815?t=22&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf)
---
| | [Instagram](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8816?t=23&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf)
---
Sincerely,
Team Alsobrooks

| | [ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/89?t=2&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf)
---

| | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [click here.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf)
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/115?t=4&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf)
| | [ Chip in a one-time donation ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4693?t=5&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf)
---
| | [ Chip in a monthly recurring donation! ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4694?t=6&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf)
---

| If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please click [here to unsubscribe](https://alsobrooks.actionkit.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=24&akid=943%2E52803%2Eedulhf).
| Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
---
Alsobrooks for Senate
PO Box 6058
Largo, MD 20792

body:
Donald Trump thinks Presidents can order hits on their opponents — and not be prosecuted.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77202319/449723341/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTEyNzhmOC1lNWI0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=unGH9c5PJEgd_4Ipv3qropsEXKfGqpXdXPbXXE3jy5w=&emci=1c87a0d0-c2b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=251278f8-e5b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Donald Trump's legal team made a desperate effort last week before the D.C. Circuit Court of Appeals, arguing that he is immune from having to face any legal consequences for blatantly illegal actions. And just how far did they go? **They said that even if Trump as President had ordered the assassination of a political rival, he could not be prosecuted.** We knew Donald Trump thought he was above the law, but to hear his lawyers argue the case in such horrific terms really puts things into perspective. And now, in the wake of Trump winning the Iowa caucuses last night, we must reckon with the growing reality that he is _very_ likely to be the Republican nominee for president once again. Trump's grip on his party has never been tighter, and it's downright alarming to realize that so many of my colleagues in Congress are fine with (or too afraid to speak out against) a leader who believes in zero accountability for the executive branch of government. Whether he wins or loses the 2024 election, Trump's ideology isn't leaving our political discourse any time soon. A core pillar of the MAGA agenda is to chip away at the separation of powers within our democratic system. **And as a champion of civil liberties, individual freedoms, and transparency throughout my whole career, I will fight against the MAGA agenda every step of the way.** [**If you're with me, please make a grassroots donation of $3 to help me organize and rally supporters to ensure that we prevail in 2024 and beyond.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77202320/449723342/-2044921950?refcode=2024-01-16-trump&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=251278f8-e5b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTEyNzhmOC1lNWI0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=unGH9c5PJEgd_4Ipv3qropsEXKfGqpXdXPbXXE3jy5w=) [Donate Today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77202321/449723343/-2044921950?refcode=2024-01-16-trump&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=251278f8-e5b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTEyNzhmOC1lNWI0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=unGH9c5PJEgd_4Ipv3qropsEXKfGqpXdXPbXXE3jy5w=) By the skin of our teeth, we managed to contain the worst of Trump's authoritarian desires between 2017 and 2021. But serious damage was done — and the door has been opened for the next Republican president to take us even further to the edge. We need champions for democracy to win big this year. We need to be able to call out MAGA Republicans clearly and repeatedly. And we need to keep our folks engaged and make sure they do not lose hope in the face of the severe threats we face. All the work we are doing today matters. So I'm asking you to stand with me. [**Please chip in $3 — or whatever you can — now to join us in the fight for our democracy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77202322/449723344/-2044921950?refcode=2024-01-16-trump&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=251278f8-e5b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTEyNzhmOC1lNWI0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=unGH9c5PJEgd_4Ipv3qropsEXKfGqpXdXPbXXE3jy5w=) More soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: Donald Trump thinks Presidents can order hits on their opponents — and not be prosecuted. | | | | Donald Trump's legal team made a desperate effort last week before the D.C. Circuit Court of Appeals, arguing that he is immune from having to face any legal consequences for blatantly illegal actions. And just how far did they go? They said that even if Trump as President had ordered the assassination of a political rival, he could not be prosecuted. We knew Donald Trump thought he was above the law, but to hear his lawyers argue the case in such horrific terms really puts things into perspective. And now, in the wake of Trump winning the Iowa caucuses last night, we must reckon with the growing reality that he is very likely to be the Republican nominee for president once again. Trump's grip on his party has never been tighter, and it's downright alarming to realize that so many of my colleagues in Congress are fine with (or too afraid to speak out against) a leader who believes in zero accountability for the executive branch of government. Whether he wins or loses the 2024 election, Trump's ideology isn't leaving our political discourse any time soon. A core pillar of the MAGA agenda is to chip away at the separation of powers within our democratic system. And as a champion of civil liberties, individual freedoms, and transparency throughout my whole career, I will fight against the MAGA agenda every step of the way. = = By the skin of our teeth, we managed to contain the worst of Trump's authoritarian desires between 2017 and 2021. But serious damage was done — and the door has been opened for the next Republican president to take us even further to the edge. We need champions for democracy to win big this year. We need to be able to call out MAGA Republicans clearly and repeatedly. And we need to keep our folks engaged and make sure they do not lose hope in the face of the severe threats we face. All the work we are doing today matters. So I'm asking you to stand with me. = More soon, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. This is former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy with a serious, yet sad message about the state of the Democratic Party.

Last week, I introduced the******Protect Medicaid Act,** a bill designed to prevent federal tax dollars from funding Medicaid for illegal immigrants.
This critical piece of legislation is a direct response to liberal states like California, which have chosen to prioritize illegal immigrants over the American people.
_**Friend**_**, I cannot sit by while middle-class Americans are forced to subsidize the healthcare of individuals who chose to illegally enter our country.**
Our compassion means NOTHING if we don’t even have the resources to care for our most vulnerable Americans.

Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility.
As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act.
Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild.

clean_body: | | | | Last week, I filed a bill the country needs right now. Friend, Last week, I introduced the****Protect Medicaid Act, a bill designed to prevent federal tax dollars from funding Medicaid for illegal immigrants. This critical piece of legislation is a direct response to liberal states like California, which have chosen to prioritize illegal immigrants over the American people. Friend, I cannot sit by while middle-class Americans are forced to subsidize the healthcare of individuals who chose to illegally enter our country. Our compassion means NOTHING if we don’t even have the resources to care for our most vulnerable Americans. Will you sign my petition to STOP FUNDING healthcare for illegal immigrants on the taxpayer’s dime?** | Thank you for your support, Bill Cassidy, M.D. U.S. Senator - Louisiana | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" | "LinkedIn" ---|---|---|--- Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility. As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act. Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild. Bill is working for all of Louisiana | DONATE BY MAIL Bill Cassidy for US Senate PO BOX 80505 Baton Rouge, LA 70898 Can’t donate?** Don’t worry - There are other ways you can help! | From The Desk of Bill Cassidy PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA 70898 = \- =

body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=36556%2E3422442%2E77HL3p)
Derek, we won't BS you: this is urgent:
Ballots are going out to California voters in less than a month, and we need the resources to reach as many voters as possible over these next few weeks.
→**If Katie falls into third place, she won’t advance to the general election, and we’ll lose her voice in Washington for good**. Imagine Congress without Katie’s Whiteboard, or without her holding corporate CEOs and Big Pharma lobbyists accountable. We can’t let that happen.
**Katie is the only candidate in this race who doesn’t accept contributions from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. We’re relying on supporters like you pitching in what you can.**
**So what do you say****, Derek?**
**[With just 7 weeks until the critical Primary Election on March 5, will you make your first $5 contribution to ensure we keep Katie in Congress, fighting for all of us?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240116-3?refcode=em20240117-36556&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36556_3422442_77HL3p&akid=36556%2E3422442%2E77HL3p)**
**Thank you for considering making a contribution, and thanks for being a part of Team Porter.**
-KPHQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. name: Hillsdale College via Pro Life Update
subject: Our course on the American Founding—Now on DVD
body:
I'd like to invite you to join me in Hillsdale College's newest free course studying the greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century, C.S. Lewis.

| | |
---
| | | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbmvdr54ga32ut1qe95sghrje2vjiovoo4ebbseg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ge9oj2c3h2bs) [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsiq3mvgaleu22v3mhjh180ijvspbk15ejpcd448_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ge9oj2c3h2bs) | Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding. | **
### What students are saying
** “I appreciate the brevity of explanation and new information in a way I hadn't known or realized myself. The quizzes are helpful. Having two teachers converse brings an interesting perspective.” **- Darlena** “It helps put into context the thinking of our founders at that time. That’s very important and misunderstood by so many people today!” **- Robert**
---|---

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **" The Real American Founding: A Conversation,"** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9hmise8jhrhc0luei76p91o9ulcgk99jt6v93m0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ge9oj2c3h2bs)

I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Pro Life Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztfopkibg9slvadv1cnmrkkanim1ms5m6o87r1f0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni64oj4spjmeoh1k8gn48n24hjm0pb1c3ie4oj0s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z034g29ofms76tr24nqfv5lba0c0jv4odb5on82g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ge9oj2c3h2bs)_

name: Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: FBI arrests Babylon Bee actor, terrifies his pregnant wife
body:
Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3q98sllkunsec3u2bq0matrl0pv0uqv5boki2ig_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ge9oj2c3h2bs)
---
| |
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbrndu9t6dmep77qb0feu779ctkg51l45v9njpd8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ge9oj2c3h2bs)Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100 or more right now to help Babylon Bee actor and patriot, Siaka Massaquoi, fight back against Joe Biden's FBI.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmc8e5sbrvu4vc4c502e9lumeugcsv11t9u4l2cg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ge9oj2c3h2bs)**

Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

He was traveling home with his wife, Charlotte, and their unborn baby, after they attended an event hosted by the conservative news site, Daily Wire.

The FBI refused to show Charlotte the arrest warrant.

**Siaka was arrested because he 's a black patriot who can persuade many Democrat voters to vote against Joe Biden on Election Day. **

You see, not only is Siaka a gifted actor (he's starred in Babylon Bee's funny series, "Californians Adjust to New Life In Texas") ...

... He's also the Vice Chair of the Los Angeles County GOP and a peaceful patriot who briefly appeared at the peaceful protest the stolen presidential election at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021.

Siaka is also bold as a lion about his faith in Jesus Christ, his love for his family, and his deep concern for our country.

Of course, all that makes him an enemy of Joe Biden's lawless administration.

**So the FBI arrested Siaka for spending 76 seconds inside the U.S. Capitol. And charged him with four misdemeanors! That 's right, MISDEMEANORS!**

What's more, this isn't the first time the FBI has stomped on Siaka's rights, either.

**Over twenty FBI agents raided Siaka 's home with drawn guns on June 10, 2021 at 5:45 AM, and handcuffed him, his best friend, and two other roommates. **

As you can imagine, his best friend's two little children, just three and seven years old, were _terrified._

And here's what happened next:

* The FBI agents refused to let Siaka speak to his lawyer
* The FBI agents refused to show him the arrest warrant
* The FBI agents grilled him and his friends for FIVE HOURS with no lawyers present!
* The FBI confiscated his cell phone, computer and his MAGA hat and has refused ever since to give them back!
* And we have reason to believe that Siaka and the other peaceful J-6 protesters were illegally and unconstitutionally surveilled!

**And because the FBI didn 't arrest or charge Siaka, he had no legal grounds to find out why they raided his home...terrorized him, his friends, his friend's little children... abused his Constitutionally protected rights...and stole his property.**

Can you imagine being abused like this... _as an American citizen in your own country?_

What the FBI did to my peaceful, innocent client in 2021 and just a short time ago is a CRIME.

**That 's why I've filed a crucial lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I'm Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 46 years.

You've seen me on Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

I'm proud to say I won a court ruling that President Bill Clinton committed a crime when he illegally the White House files of Kathleen Willey. (I'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime)

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers during the impeachment of criminal Bill Clinton.

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Siaka wants to use this critically important lawsuit to speak up for other patriots, too, because he's alarmed at what Joe Biden and his friends are doing to our country.

He's deeply concerned that our country is going down a very dark road...and I agree.

I want to fix this horrifying situation peacefully and legally in the courts...before it's too late.

**[Patriot, I beg you to help me fight back for Siaka and ALL other January 6 peaceful protesters with your very best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right now.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr4dv9vt6d8rf2vdp27a76qsn5pokqd0vfb9p108_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ge9oj2c3h2bs)**

**If Joe Biden 's FBI and DOJ get away with crushing the rights and freedoms of Siaka and all the other peaceful patriots of January 6, they WILL come for you, me, our families, and our friends.**

**[So please don't delay - give your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb5p0ivhad7u7sd638dmbfht10oei43pa36vaavg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ge9oj2c3h2bs)**

Thank you so much!

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, the FBI arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, because he 's a political threat to Joe Biden's reelection. **They shamelessly arrested him in front of his pregnant wife, Charlotte. They terrified her and refused to show her the arrest warrant.

If the FBI gets away with this, they WILL be turned on you and me our families next.

**[Please support this critical lawsuit with your best gift of $25, $50, $100 or more immediately.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrots1dg1e6cgel6pb1mab5inkpp6b301datg2io_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ge9oj2c3h2bs)**

GOP Presidential
