name: Hillsdale College via American Briefing
subject: I hope you’ll join us
body:
I'd like to invite you to join me in Hillsdale College's newest free course studying the greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century, C.S. Lewis.

| | |
---
| | | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zctaf5ovhq75mr3jvuv2ds7tj71qdih70ddpgbb0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ge9pj4shh2bs) [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8mmsb5k7ra5n9acid6keq2thicdvdj4ksr696b0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ge9pj4shh2bs) | Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding. | **
### What students are saying
** “I appreciate the brevity of explanation and new information in a way I hadn't known or realized myself. The quizzes are helpful. Having two teachers converse brings an interesting perspective.” **- Darlena** “It helps put into context the thinking of our founders at that time. That’s very important and misunderstood by so many people today!” **- Robert**
---|---

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **" The Real American Founding: A Conversation,"** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zg6sbuvj0vqj5uau8hqhb9k72jagb23skgn2qpq0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ge9pj4shh2bs)

I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

American Briefing

name: Hillsdale College via Trump Train News
subject: I hope you’ll join us
body:
I'd like to invite you to join me in Hillsdale College's newest free course studying the greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century, C.S. Lewis.

| | |
---
| | | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2ggtn982oo839un13aqhkm4goqtmb3r4f0uph28_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ge9pj2c5h2bs) [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlhh63nvm4pg1fibjqv2e10tfq8iloj7jku9p3j8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ge9pj2c5h2bs) | Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding. | **
### What students are saying
** “I appreciate the brevity of explanation and new information in a way I hadn't known or realized myself. The quizzes are helpful. Having two teachers converse brings an interesting perspective.” **- Darlena** “It helps put into context the thinking of our founders at that time. That’s very important and misunderstood by so many people today!” **- Robert**
---|---

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **" The Real American Founding: A Conversation,"** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf0a5aaj8lu6nf3fu89eap5emirlkuedp9e0sl3g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ge9pj2c5h2bs)

I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Our course on the American Founding—Now on DVD
body:
I'd like to invite you to join me in Hillsdale College's newest free course studying the greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century, C.S. Lewis.

| | |
---
| | | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zan23r4c7uvf54pr1817jdum93q9a3ovfeq2oel0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ge9pj3cth2bs) [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmb9mbq9qevkq48e86q64lfpt80g123o2mfr66n0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ge9pj3cth2bs) | Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding. | **
### What students are saying
** “I appreciate the brevity of explanation and new information in a way I hadn't known or realized myself. The quizzes are helpful. Having two teachers converse brings an interesting perspective.” **- Darlena** “It helps put into context the thinking of our founders at that time. That’s very important and misunderstood by so many people today!” **- Robert**
---|---

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **" The Real American Founding: A Conversation,"** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0jbtfad8d37oel2a4kr57aljlctft6tip67kbe8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ge9pj3cth2bs)

I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: I hope you’ll join us
body:
I'd like to invite you to join me in Hillsdale College's newest free course studying the greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century, C.S. Lewis.

| | |
---
| | | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zul81touv4jbtstkrmhg5i2lkedofj1cut927p8o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ie4o74c5h2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z50lhiq73qsj8diphcveaq47s8890r1louugilt8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ie4o74c5h2bs) | Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding. | **
### What students are saying
** “I appreciate the brevity of explanation and new information in a way I hadn't known or realized myself. The quizzes are helpful. Having two teachers converse brings an interesting perspective.” **- Darlena** “It helps put into context the thinking of our founders at that time. That’s very important and misunderstood by so many people today!” **- Robert**
---|---

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **" The Real American Founding: A Conversation,"** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze5agkbc38die3q9rbsoandglqnk10a69s0gl01g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ie4o74c5h2bs)

I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: www.officialderrickgates.com
subject: News and Jan 22nd
body:
News and CRA Endorsment I hope this message finds you well. Building on the recent triumph of our amazing President Donald Trump in the Iowa Caucus,
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=127441.137.1.7b4f7b0eafed3c25c069b82e487a6524)
---
[](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=127441.138.1.b8a5b0355e0ab489040afd15dfc05da0) |
---
## News and CRA Endorsment
---
|
---
I hope this message finds you well. Building on the recent triumph of our amazing President Donald Trump in the Iowa Caucus, I am thrilled to share the news of securing the highly esteemed endorsement from the California Republican Assembly.
It is indeed an honor to be aligned with like-minded conservative Republicans who share our mission to Save the Nation. Our commitment extends to restoring the nucleus family, preserving parental rights, safeguarding the right to life, and securing our borders for a stronger future.
Amidst the overwhelming support, I am delighted to announce the upcoming release of my own Voter Guide. As individuals from all corners of the nation seek guidance on their voting decisions, this guide aims to provide clarity and insight into the candidates who resonate with our shared values.
For a more interactive engagement, I invite you to connect with me on social media through the links below. Your active participation and support are crucial as we work together to preserve the principles that define our beautiful nation.
Additionally, if you are in the South Bay, I extend a warm invitation to a candidate event on January 22nd. This gathering will provide an opportunity for meaningful dialogue and collaboration. Further details are outlined below.
Thank you for your continued support. Together, let us actively participate and contribute to the betterment of our great nation.
Best regards,
Instagram: [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=127441.139.1.1e07bd166728f06c06db61fce397a287)
X (Twitter): [X (Twitter)](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=127441.140.1.0ab0877e611236bae51ae4e904bd0639)
Facebook: [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=127441.141.1.9988b4e6a6a27130e367e50e1ed38bbc)
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/officialderrickgates/
X (Twitter): https://twitter.com/iamderrickgates
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/derrickgatesforcongress
## Jan 22nd CRA Event
---
|
---
I trust this message finds you well. I am excited to announce my participation, alongside numerous local and state candidates, in an upcoming event at the El Segundo Library on January 22nd.
As we stand on the brink of the 2024 election, the urgency of the times cannot be overstated. In just a matter of weeks, the primary election ballots will be distributed, marking the commencement of a crucial chapter in our democratic journey.
This event serves as a unique opportunity for you to engage directly with the candidates who seek to represent you at various levels of government. Your presence is not merely requested; it is imperative. Don't miss this chance to witness firsthand the perspectives and visions that will shape our community's trajectory.
Join us at the El Segundo Library on January 22nd as we collectively embark on a journey towards a future defined by informed and active civic participation. Together, let us contribute to the vitality of our democratic process.
I am looking forward to your attendance at this significant event.
We are currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
The door opens at 6:30 pm Meeting starts at 6:45
To sow into this please pick one of the below
Paypal www.paypal.me/derrickgates
Cash App $derrickgatesmin
Venmo @Derrick-Gates-4
Zelle 424-244-5206 (Nena Gates)
|
---
## 66th Assembly Central Committee
---
|
---
Dear friends and fellow Conservatives,
I am thrilled to announce that I am running for an official seat on the 66th Assembly District Central Committee. As some of you may know, I have been serving as an alternate on the committee for some time now. Over the past two years, I have also been actively involved in multiple posts within the party. I am proud to have been elected to the California Republican Assembly state board of directors as the Senate director for the 24th District, chaired the Faith Outreach committee for the CRA, and served as a delegate for the California State party. These experiences have given me a deep understanding of the values and principles that are important to our party and have prepared me to effectively represent our district on the central committee.
As a member of the central committee, I will work tirelessly to ensure that conservative values remain at the forefront of our party's agenda. I believe that my position on the LAGOP, which is the largest Republican party office in the nation, will allow me to have a greater impact on decisions that affect our party and our community. I have already been able to influence many decisions as an alternate, and I am confident that I can make an even greater impact as an elected member.
While some have urged me to run for the congressional seat of the 36th district, I believe that my calling is to bring balance to the party for the next few years. This will not only benefit the party but also other candidates and myself in the long run. Federal races can be expensive to operate, and I have learned from my previous run for Congress that it takes time to build relationships and secure the support needed to win. My goal is to help fix the foundation of the party while building relationships with those who can help me in the future.
I am asking for your prayers and support as I take this important step on my journey. Please look for me on the primary ballot on March 5, 2024. Early voting begins on February 24, 2024. Your vote for me, Derrick R. Gates, for the 66th Assembly Central Committee, will help ensure that our conservative values continue to be represented in our district and beyond.
Thank you for your support and dedication to our party.
Sincerely,
Derrick R. Gates

clean_body: News and CRA Endorsment I hope this message finds you well. Building on the recent triumph of our amazing President Donald Trump in the Iowa Caucus, | | | News and CRA Endorsment | I hope this message finds you well. Building on the recent triumph of our amazing President Donald Trump in the Iowa Caucus, I am thrilled to share the news of securing the highly esteemed endorsement from the California Republican Assembly. It is indeed an honor to be aligned with like-minded conservative Republicans who share our mission to Save the Nation. Our commitment extends to restoring the nucleus family, preserving parental rights, safeguarding the right to life, and securing our borders for a stronger future. Amidst the overwhelming support, I am delighted to announce the upcoming release of my own Voter Guide. As individuals from all corners of the nation seek guidance on their voting decisions, this guide aims to provide clarity and insight into the candidates who resonate with our shared values. For a more interactive engagement, I invite you to connect with me on social media through the links below. Your active participation and support are crucial as we work together to preserve the principles that define our beautiful nation. Additionally, if you are in the South Bay, I extend a warm invitation to a candidate event on January 22nd. This gathering will provide an opportunity for meaningful dialogue and collaboration. Further details are outlined below. Thank you for your continued support. Together, let us actively participate and contribute to the betterment of our great nation. Best regards, Instagram: X (Twitter): Facebook: Instagram: X (Twitter): Facebook: Jan 22nd CRA Event | I trust this message finds you well. I am excited to announce my participation, alongside numerous local and state candidates, in an upcoming event at the El Segundo Library on January 22nd. As we stand on the brink of the 2024 election, the urgency of the times cannot be overstated. In just a matter of weeks, the primary election ballots will be distributed, marking the commencement of a crucial chapter in our democratic journey. This event serves as a unique opportunity for you to engage directly with the candidates who seek to represent you at various levels of government. Your presence is not merely requested; it is imperative. Don't miss this chance to witness firsthand the perspectives and visions that will shape our community's trajectory. Join us at the El Segundo Library on January 22nd as we collectively embark on a journey towards a future defined by informed and active civic participation. Together, let us contribute to the vitality of our democratic process. I am looking forward to your attendance at this significant event. We are currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA The door opens at 6:30 pm Meeting starts at 6:45 To sow into this please pick one of the below Paypal www.paypal.me/derrickgates Cash App $derrickgatesmin Venmo @Derrick-Gates-4 Zelle 424-244-5206 (Nena Gates) | 66th Assembly Central Committee | Dear friends and fellow Conservatives, I am thrilled to announce that I am running for an official seat on the 66th Assembly District Central Committee. As some of you may know, I have been serving as an alternate on the committee for some time now. Over the past two years, I have also been actively involved in multiple posts within the party. I am proud to have been elected to the California Republican Assembly state board of directors as the Senate director for the 24th District, chaired the Faith Outreach committee for the CRA, and served as a delegate for the California State party. These experiences have given me a deep understanding of the values and principles that are important to our party and have prepared me to effectively represent our district on the central committee. As a member of the central committee, I will work tirelessly to ensure that conservative values remain at the forefront of our party's agenda. I believe that my position on the LAGOP, which is the largest Republican party office in the nation, will allow me to have a greater impact on decisions that affect our party and our community. I have already been able to influence many decisions as an alternate, and I am confident that I can make an even greater impact as an elected member. While some have urged me to run for the congressional seat of the 36th district, I believe that my calling is to bring balance to the party for the next few years. This will not only benefit the party but also other candidates and myself in the long run. Federal races can be expensive to operate, and I have learned from my previous run for Congress that it takes time to build relationships and secure the support needed to win. My goal is to help fix the foundation of the party while building relationships with those who can help me in the future. I am asking for your prayers and support as I take this important step on my journey. Please look for me on the primary ballot on March 5, 2024. Early voting begins on February 24, 2024. Your vote for me, Derrick R. Gates, for the 66th Assembly Central Committee, will help ensure that our conservative values continue to be represented in our district and beyond. Thank you for your support and dedication to our party. Sincerely, Derrick R. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: A hope-filled study of the book of Revelation
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vshf4iGiNr

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oshf4iGiNr

Hello
Friend,
Do you
ever despair that Jesus will never return?
When we
all get to Heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be!
When we
all see Jesus, we'll sing and shout the victory!
The words
of this old hymn say it perfectly ... Christ's return is going to
be glorious!
But
between now and then, how should we live? What does God's Word
say about end times? As the world grows increasingly sinful ...
what should our response be?

When I
have those kinds of questions, I turn to the book of Revelation,
which I've found helps provide answers and strength in these dark
days.
And
today, I'm pleased to offer you my verse-by-verse study of the
book of Revelation entitled Final Conquest.
Final
Conquest is my first commentary on the book of Revelation. It's
all about the return of Jesus Christ, the most hope-filled event
in human history.
This book
will help you face the future with confidence! God doesn't want
you to live in fear. Final Conquest will unpack God's plan as
never before - you'll be encouraged!

With your
generous donation to Pathway to Victory-- to help keep our
ministry strong, for you and your family, and for listeners and
viewers across the country--I will send you a copy of Final
Conquest for free!
You can
make your most generous donation here:
https://secure.ptv.org/final-conquest-generous-gift-kit-1
One day
soon the darkness will pass...and our long-awaited King of kings
and Lord of lords will return and make His final conquest.
Until
that moment, we are focusing our hope on Christ and working
together to proclaim the gospel and expand His coming kingdom.

Dr.
Robert Jeffress
Senior
Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

name: Your America
subject: Biden's Silent War On Retirees
body:
While Biden gladly used a tax loophole to avoid $500,000+ in payroll taxes.

Blackrock warns "Prepare for a recession unlike any other." Central banks igniting a global recession with their fight to stop inflation.

Biden's Silent War On Retirees [ACT NOW]

While Biden gladly used a tax loophole to avoid $500,000+ in payroll taxes.

He's thrown $80 billion at the IRS to build an army of 87,000 new auditors. and shake down millions of Americans struggling to save up for retirement.

This is not the first time "Fair Share" Biden has targeted retirees.

In 1983, he voted to slap a 50% tax on Social Security.

Then he voted to increase it to 85% in 1994.

And now he's determined to ram through Congress a $4.7 TRILLION tax hike.

That includes punishing taxes on retirement investments and even Medicare.

As you can see, "Middle Class" Joe has been waging a silent war on retirees for decades.

But in a move that went largely unnoticed.

President Trump deliberately left open an IRS Loophole that could shield your nest egg from Biden's relentless attack on hard-working Americans. https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38259%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lI2GP1ikUlTthnudfFhVGw&sysid=1{transaction_id}&aff_sub3=010124&aff_sub4=RM-YAN-20240117&aff_sub5=biden_taxes_2024_a

Few people reported on it.

But thanks to this genius IRS Loophole, you can take your IRA, 401(k), Pension, and cash out of stocks, bonds and bank accounts.

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: Why is Senator Bryce Reeves so Obsessed with Amanda Chase?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
From the Desk of Amanda Chase
| | | | Why is Senator Bryce Reeves So Obsessed with Amanda Chase?
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rY1_ysmCiN8XS65VzyHqyzKFmM3oDdEOKFe8oPadt20J0Dr2IlSr2cjNXm_xBoV5uc-QczeLJiDXNGpIu0N53QSMhNiw-Bzc-E61cUVeZmuaWS2aBB75n6STsuAEHA0kguvufd3CzV6GppWft9qAsdRzCrK_WnJIUdFVh4OJXzbFjYnemEExiQ==&c=-PobJT3ce0XudNFtyvUaxpeg8iB_pnswZbHKIzqvODNLjgS8bJ_ycQ==&ch=qVGgOkbN95dgAiuMD2vzGNSz6vZc7fbgeTM8Rs3_3bQJKDhbN4yWFg==)
---
---
| Senator Bryce Reeves Doesn't Want You Voting for Snoopy
---
| Dear Friends,
If you joined me today in watching the Senate Privileges and Elections Committee, you may have seen what I saw.
Even though I was not present, my name was mentioned, a private citizen and a former Republican State Senator.
The underlying message was, we must pass this bill or God forbid Amanda Chase will run a write in campaign.
Seriously?
What is Senator Reeves afraid of?
Republican State Senator Bryce Reeves was going after your First Amendment free speech rights, and the ability to "write in" whatever name you deem appropriate, even Snoopy.
Republican State Senator Bryce Reeves patroned and presented a bill, [SB167](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rY1_ysmCiN8XS65VzyHqyzKFmM3oDdEOKFe8oPadt20J0Dr2IlSr2cjNXm_xBoV5tjUD66n1XKWouR7OSNozMroA4glRk5YLJ6Q7i2xB8X_G9rmSmN4oeUvDn3nVpvAi5MEXPdiWPVJTWQACvoG9hhUwbW3VYqOqROTMqeDIBVcmlLYc70RVleebUDmudbJGq8qIQSPjoyE=&c=-PobJT3ce0XudNFtyvUaxpeg8iB_pnswZbHKIzqvODNLjgS8bJ_ycQ==&ch=qVGgOkbN95dgAiuMD2vzGNSz6vZc7fbgeTM8Rs3_3bQJKDhbN4yWFg==) to put an end to"write in" campaigns, so you must vote for the party's nominee, or else.
This of course is outrageous. We should be able to vote for whoever we so chose, even if it's to express displeasure over the party nominee by writing in someone we feel is more qualified. This is America.
What we also found interesting is that online public comment was not allowed today in the Senate Privilege and Elections Committee as "directed by Senate leadership."
We all know there are no coincidences in politics.
Thankfully, the Senate Privileges & Elections Committee rightly killed Senator Reeves' bill and voters can continue to vote for Snoopy.

---
|
---
| GET REGULAR UPDATES
---
| After serving you for 8 years in the Virginia Senate, I know how things really work in Richmond and want to keep you informed.
Please consider donating $25, $50, $100 so that I can continue to communicate with you and help you to engage and interact with your representatives to ensure accountability and transparency.

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama's Revolution
body:
And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1oq7ok9uf74n2ougj3uvj6pck0j6iom6541a280_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ie6ob1clh2bs)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcvnd62dpauqa4gqkpne53fvhvdmtga4c0vum9q8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ie6ob1clh2bs)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpmba3qfal8g56ipr09ga95d17as7cf8jgq276f0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c5ie6ob1clh2bs)**

The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. That’s why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. Asked whether we’re on the cusp of a US Dollar crash, Dave Ramsey made a stunning miscalculation while live on air:

Because what’s happening to the US Dollar is not something you should “keep an eye on”...

But instead, is an imminent threat you should get ahead of right NOW.

See, China, Brazil, India, and Russia have finally teamed up to create 1 common currency...

And they’re now joined by the oil-producing giants of the Middle East, and dozens of other countries.

body:

| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-Jrw53IZw)

| | **Can you pass the U.S. citizenship exam?**
Every year, the United States welcomes nearly 1 million new citizens through naturalization ceremonies, all of whom must pass the U.S. citizenship test by answering 6 out of 10 questions correctly. While 90% of legal immigrant applicants pass the exam, only 30% of U.S. adults and just 3% of public high school students in America can pass it! 😱 Can you? **[Find out now by taking this quick 10-question quiz from the U.S. citizenship test.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-I3QV-I5w)** Good luck!

name: Shift WA
subject: An update out of Olympia
body:
The Secretary of State has certified the income tax initiative and the reasonable police pursuit initiative. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62698852:siqF7GiiN:m:1:2610672541:6C9FC8C3D4A1B1C655A1B1BCD3A44B9E:r "Shift
Washington")
---
|
Friends,

Last week, we asked readers like you to participate in our pre-2024 legislative session survey, asking which issue you most wanted to see lawmakers prioritize. Thousands responded and an overwhelming 66% of participants said they want lawmakers to take up the initiatives submitted by Let's Go Washington and then send them to the people.

Recently, the Secretary of State certified the income tax initiative and tha reasonable police pursuit initiative. These initiatives represent the will of the people, and Democrats have a constitutional responsibility to debate them. However, despite their responsibility, House Democrats voted to table the first of these initiatives on Monday.

Now, more than ever, it is up to people like us to put pressure on Democrats and hold them accountable. The mainstream media outlets may be turning a blind eye, but we know the importance of staying informed and taking action by [calling your legislators and demanding they take up the initiatives](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62698853:siqF7GiiN:m:1:2610672541:6C9FC8C3D4A1B1C655A1B1BCD3A44B9E:r).

To ensure you stay updated on the latest developments from the 2024 legislative session, and to support our ongoing efforts, please consider contributing today. [**Whether it's $25, $15, or even just $5, every dollar helps us reach readers across our state to keep them informed on what 's really happening in Olympia.**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62698854:siqF7GiiN:m:1:2610672541:6C9FC8C3D4A1B1C655A1B1BCD3A44B9E:r)

Thank you for your continued support,

The Shift WA Team
| [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62698855:siqF7GiiN:m:1:2610672541:6C9FC8C3D4A1B1C655A1B1BCD3A44B9E:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14395519&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osiqF7GiiN).
---

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Our course on the American Founding—Now on DVD
body:
I'd like to invite you to join me in Hillsdale College's newest free course studying the greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century, C.S. Lewis.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | |
---
| | | | This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Op3AyAZ0sxTErON5i9_igQ~~/AARclAA~~~) [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Op3AyAZ0sxTErON5i9_igQ~~/AARclAA~~~) | Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding. | **
### What students are saying
** “I appreciate the brevity of explanation and new information in a way I hadn't known or realized myself. The quizzes are helpful. Having two teachers converse brings an interesting perspective.” **- Darlena** “It helps put into context the thinking of our founders at that time. That’s very important and misunderstood by so many people today!” **- Robert**
---|---

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **" The Real American Founding: A Conversation,"** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Op3AyAZ0sxTErON5i9_igQ~~/AARclAA~~~)

I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Restore Our Nation
---

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Learn about the real American Founding
body:
I'd like to invite you to join me in Hillsdale College's newest free course studying the greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century, C.S. Lewis.

| | |
---
| | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dbaf3223fd9a488a8608a25f47b13514&_e=Q_r6QjAr3uTb2inpWneIywp5hAz5m5CkNnsG9UC_mcUa_YGiUERTlscCeB-Z2tDufDPHIFyBAFdQ16rMylO4Qky1uyWxrUS8CeEE42BjbUfreHZn4dmGdqfFD1DQtHDNlvBLm2p7W6PDrBwOmHpZHiTD41yMuIa9MpzvJooglf_BmbehOxriWvWcoStr0coJqs-v1c54nWlCN8UFQtRE1eFfp1i_3iE_esqopU32RlK6Zbb2ij0MMLO_gk3PvThslBZgsPRbImnK80s-Y0uo7nqEjLvxlsPELEWjdWit3H0GtPyX5K1vEG7E9lXpP4iMEnED0-SMGRatLjdtGzH8LNHRgFKeofCH7Og4Sa4WiPZDK9BlAsvGVSyC0ePT6csG2TYbYdatIzv_uXVVr6RfH5c0Vy-ZvcUpelPS1EvVviKtfsyeHyqveslxE0xu60u4) [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dbaf3223fd9a488a8608a25f47b13514&_e=Q_r6QjAr3uTb2inpWneIywp5hAz5m5CkNnsG9UC_mcUa_YGiUERTlscCeB-Z2tDufDPHIFyBAFdQ16rMylO4Qky1uyWxrUS8CeEE42BjbUfreHZn4dmGdqfFD1DQtHDNlvBLm2p7W6PDrBwOmHpZHiTD41yMuIa9MpzvJooglf_BmbehOxriWvWcoStr0coJqs-v1c54nWlCN8UFQtRE1eFfp1i_3iE_esqopU32RlK6Zbb2ij0MMLO_gk3PvThslBZgsPRbImnK80s-Y0uo7owbdZnk1LBVFFvQiJQhqNDkulcxlei61-FjaJr0VJFMBuGJqIpWqtotTk_ZK9nJbCUIPfO8nrn-OCx42ZovfU_IOrbyCoHFtc3do1bgAIdr4dXkfrMNn01T3wgoLZT4swb2lCzEdnXtnVrYReklR0ih-rD7NRDE8tWQdvXUtvUh) | Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That’s why we’re so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale’s Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding. | **
### What students are saying
** “I appreciate the brevity of explanation and new information in a way I hadn’t known or realized myself. The quizzes are helpful. Having two teachers converse brings an interesting perspective.” **- Darlena** “It helps put into context the thinking of our founders at that time. That’s very important and misunderstood by so many people today!” **- Robert**
---|---

As Dr. West explains, the Founders’ political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a “deep and long-forgotten pit.”

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That’s why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **“The Real American Founding: A Conversation,”** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dbaf3223fd9a488a8608a25f47b13514&_e=Q_r6QjAr3uTb2inpWneIywp5hAz5m5CkNnsG9UC_mcUa_YGiUERTlscCeB-Z2tDufDPHIFyBAFdQ16rMylO4Qky1uyWxrUS8CeEE42BjbUfreHZn4dmGdqfFD1DQtHDNlvBLm2p7W6PDrBwOmHpZHiTD41yMuIa9MpzvJooglf_BmbehOxriWvWcoStr0coJqs-v1c54nWlCN8UFQtRE1eFfp1i_3iE_esqopU32RlK6Zbb2ij0MMLO_gk3PvThslBZgsPRbImnK80s-Y0uo7mQrgqKYR7ry7RaFTaTGCQLYU6Glp19H11X1ELV7nQFViUVr-ckJtOC6MFRnjEicdUVCDQkPtK_NI0LWcIcNZjy2Cnkn9CJqIyLaenwY1Wj-aggZSpu0i1wyQ_9odjQg2Dx_vUMxPD9OPWwQRbiWK0DZLRGcaPkTLvXtkazx6sal)

I hope you’ll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Every single one of these Democrat organizations is bankrolled by deep-pocketed liberals and have been mobilizing non-stop to remove SCOTUS Justices Thomas, Kavanaugh, and Barret.

body:
I'd like to invite you to join me in Hillsdale College's newest free course studying the greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century, C.S. Lewis.

| | |
---
| | | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4c3fe5ffde4440c8ab78d0c2757098da&_e=9IuHsrXJzuT2v_HAtd5vcC1MZ_EG8M7EsO38EBLevHsD2pdwa2ObUjuQzcMSFfBrgrMsujtwuCKtkYud88Cb8URt2B64p4wVYJhVDZQf7Q0Tk0VIzJXOUkOQCVTIW0eh1ZD8c1FANMU4kDyUkLSXRkpBQG51GAwbKWLw6qLYI_dBQSAPzmv6M1JWxrRdPtVNosivtoSjRWPhUIPEJlaztVLxFZSLXf-qHuDnGWgBNo7ynIFc3ktdGCB_WL_cBH5K2LkcFSyDtFSfew67XoOf2PyHXZfn0Yg26xe1wJArVOZB5jGSAJPUjg7wZIyZQkh1Ugq_PwO5f_NnYE7eaDXTFrrM7dOKdt3QmRJJHpRxBCSOwEW-TrhymvQO7ClLEcpnO__R7evhNDq37pm98s-JB9ZlLbGW_5aLiZ_Ebk8FuSsO2umJMdqWDZpxX7LwRyL-) [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4c3fe5ffde4440c8ab78d0c2757098da&_e=9IuHsrXJzuT2v_HAtd5vcC1MZ_EG8M7EsO38EBLevHsD2pdwa2ObUjuQzcMSFfBrgrMsujtwuCKtkYud88Cb8URt2B64p4wVYJhVDZQf7Q0Tk0VIzJXOUkOQCVTIW0eh1ZD8c1FANMU4kDyUkLSXRkpBQG51GAwbKWLw6qLYI_dBQSAPzmv6M1JWxrRdPtVNosivtoSjRWPhUIPEJlaztVLxFZSLXf-qHuDnGWgBNo7ynIFc3ktdGCB_WL_cBH5K2LkcFSyDtFSfew67XoOf2EAn5WePY9ub8h7ZsiOeHxbCYyNMIO5l_fzgNG-4X49k5JDSqMsdZbTDhnfVeGnxLRC0dwb-szXmLAiSXx1VlKqsukktsfQAb3iyIDwdZPnXpRYpIfgUrDP4ZwNDQPE4tgIR4Ds1yIzwIuuD_97bHCCO_ALHFu15ekt2XYiOLuf-) | Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding. | **
### What students are saying
** “I appreciate the brevity of explanation and new information in a way I hadn't known or realized myself. The quizzes are helpful. Having two teachers converse brings an interesting perspective.” **- Darlena** “It helps put into context the thinking of our founders at that time. That’s very important and misunderstood by so many people today!” **- Robert**
---|---

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **" The Real American Founding: A Conversation,"** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4c3fe5ffde4440c8ab78d0c2757098da&_e=9IuHsrXJzuT2v_HAtd5vcC1MZ_EG8M7EsO38EBLevHsD2pdwa2ObUjuQzcMSFfBrgrMsujtwuCKtkYud88Cb8URt2B64p4wVYJhVDZQf7Q0Tk0VIzJXOUkOQCVTIW0eh1ZD8c1FANMU4kDyUkLSXRkpBQG51GAwbKWLw6qLYI_dBQSAPzmv6M1JWxrRdPtVNosivtoSjRWPhUIPEJlaztVLxFZSLXf-qHuDnGWgBNo7ynIFc3ktdGCB_WL_cBH5K2LkcFSyDtFSfew67XoOf2AlNKRAHkPNREjLvtD0bjY8tHfQVM5Ogry4L_tXKlLmkwJwSv9Eo8AQYQK1YfP10vfBeUHsj2CjzNmE6be41c_LP9HQb1YTrLRB4IYQx3Q3Upo-RT3sLP-LUEPoRyZHai-SmfU2u12Erj7rKpVXxZWBSScduWVk5NbL1VlEOVahk)

I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: FBI arrests Babylon Bee actor, terrifies his pregnant wife
body:
Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

| [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681549%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GoDoljggh6qOSIFSebcY3Q&sysid=1)
---
| |
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681540%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2feuyg0satDzSECSdh6U%2bVg&sysid=1)Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100 or more right now to help Babylon Bee actor and patriot, Siaka Massaquoi, fight back against Joe Biden’s FBI.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681541%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ikg%2bnwVkn1%2fV5ArKwH8A2A&sysid=1)**

Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

He was traveling home with his wife, Charlotte, and their unborn baby, after they attended an event hosted by the conservative news site, Daily Wire.

The FBI refused to show Charlotte the arrest warrant.

**Siaka was arrested because he’s a black patriot who can persuade many Democrat voters to vote against Joe Biden on Election Day.**

You see, not only is Siaka a gifted actor (he’s starred in Babylon Bee’s funny series, “Californians Adjust to New Life In Texas”) ...

... He’s also the Vice Chair of the Los Angeles County GOP and a peaceful patriot who briefly appeared at the peaceful protest the stolen presidential election at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021.

Siaka is also bold as a lion about his faith in Jesus Christ, his love for his family, and his deep concern for our country.

Of course, all that makes him an enemy of Joe Biden’s lawless administration.

**So the FBI arrested Siaka for spending 76 seconds inside the U.S. Capitol. And charged him with four misdemeanors! That’s right, MISDEMEANORS!**

What’s more, this isn’t the first time the FBI has stomped on Siaka’s rights, either.

**Over twenty FBI agents raided Siaka’s home with drawn guns on June 10, 2021 at 5:45 AM, and handcuffed him, his best friend, and two other roommates.**

As you can imagine, his best friend’s two little children, just three and seven years old, were _terrified._

And here’s what happened next:

* The FBI agents refused to let Siaka speak to his lawyer
* The FBI agents refused to show him the arrest warrant
* The FBI agents grilled him and his friends for FIVE HOURS with no lawyers present!
* The FBI confiscated his cell phone, computer and his MAGA hat and has refused ever since to give them back!
* And we have reason to believe that Siaka and the other peaceful J-6 protesters were illegally and unconstitutionally surveilled!

**And because the FBI didn’t arrest or charge Siaka, he had no legal grounds to find out why they raided his home ...terrorized him, his friends, his friend’s little children... abused his Constitutionally protected rights...and stole his property.**

Can you imagine being abused like this... _as an American citizen in your own country?_

What the FBI did to my peaceful, innocent client in 2021 and just a short time ago is a CRIME.

**That’s why I’ve filed a crucial lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I’m Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 46 years.

You’ve seen me on Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

I’m proud to say I won a court ruling that President Bill Clinton committed a crime when he illegally the White House files of Kathleen Willey. (I’m the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime)

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers during the impeachment of criminal Bill Clinton.

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Siaka wants to use this critically important lawsuit to speak up for other patriots, too, because he’s alarmed at what Joe Biden and his friends are doing to our country.

He’s deeply concerned that our country is going down a very dark road...and I agree.

I want to fix this horrifying situation peacefully and legally in the courts...before it’s too late.

subject: Learn about the real American Founding
body:
I'd like to invite you to join me in Hillsdale College's newest free course studying the greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century, C.S. Lewis.

| | |
---
| | | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=736497a4448444eab2ed9804bc578c29&_e=QWWFltIWWLWhHs7mLKdDTnmSBOwTC0ZXjSMSUEEL3y-MNFQrrXIcNnkxDMX4oSAMHAXgj7M-iIpLQUxFBt3iv3edmHy7aCYnvsAoc4ujvnUAHvnAkcEgg49PgiR1CPjL6AqGYgu_oKsGPSpDU1KOW-RHajXx07oKPuW-A5qbqpilQx61sehrFf0zdqZ_nrEmP5pVX5wM1BdVIXeSSiDfWib_2_G3P4D_toQhuUGHJG_hAuGi1EzMtGI92y9ell9Td-HGG6gSr4HFtYuqbL0bOkBTB1Bnj8jGls3yD8WA_aAWjd6m0_uI1DQjyuw_gCXXnv26-_EkOXD6wC2CExctUrTK8GnfDCRySTqy3wqAmE3o_s70eLKyj6J6Z1U-pj5FFQ1Hfej8fUGjDG9wIzQKv1dwnzqCW7zohuP1HDrRD7HAKCN4PExBDJQWkfoWiyYz) [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=736497a4448444eab2ed9804bc578c29&_e=QWWFltIWWLWhHs7mLKdDTnmSBOwTC0ZXjSMSUEEL3y-MNFQrrXIcNnkxDMX4oSAMHAXgj7M-iIpLQUxFBt3iv3edmHy7aCYnvsAoc4ujvnUAHvnAkcEgg49PgiR1CPjL6AqGYgu_oKsGPSpDU1KOW-RHajXx07oKPuW-A5qbqpilQx61sehrFf0zdqZ_nrEmP5pVX5wM1BdVIXeSSiDfWib_2_G3P4D_toQhuUGHJG_hAuGi1EzMtGI92y9ell9Td-HGG6gSr4HFtYuqbL0bOoK27bYwcg0qHEoUhkK3pgUWZilHGairfpPI2WWK62wne0kddHyYxx7M9LcnzwV1GFypLrOH_yccnpLwISmw-1UC58fy1CD3D00sYjmxw0AZOxz2dPNXqY76iY3VYUHdLWIdIkYQsO5BBN-0NU_GbI8LrIzGfoYjkJjx4t0e2Yic) | Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding. | **
### What students are saying
** “I appreciate the brevity of explanation and new information in a way I hadn't known or realized myself. The quizzes are helpful. Having two teachers converse brings an interesting perspective.” **- Darlena** “It helps put into context the thinking of our founders at that time. That’s very important and misunderstood by so many people today!” **- Robert**
---|---

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **" The Real American Founding: A Conversation,"** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=736497a4448444eab2ed9804bc578c29&_e=QWWFltIWWLWhHs7mLKdDTnmSBOwTC0ZXjSMSUEEL3y-MNFQrrXIcNnkxDMX4oSAMHAXgj7M-iIpLQUxFBt3iv3edmHy7aCYnvsAoc4ujvnUAHvnAkcEgg49PgiR1CPjL6AqGYgu_oKsGPSpDU1KOW-RHajXx07oKPuW-A5qbqpilQx61sehrFf0zdqZ_nrEmP5pVX5wM1BdVIXeSSiDfWib_2_G3P4D_toQhuUGHJG_hAuGi1EzMtGI92y9ell9Td-HGG6gSr4HFtYuqbL0bOmvHq0mNujRwpbtnayw5d-rHNryJtfzpPp242Dzv0q4I8t_oIS-xwAHdNSwLv3KMZkVHohexdVKqhwT8GcRx4jCkgLwEBImVr0Z6GqHwfPERBIOrsePdXyzm0uOmeNMLEZVHQ520SvWfQJQi71C1zmvmAS3UsfCSBFfJX0qWWdkT)

I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9ak15omiegt7g0s56u0iheo8gen0545lbiu1eeo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cli64or6c9h2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbmb220nhijqa9tb3r01u4lkt0g5uplv5vo5vfpo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cli64or6c9h2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcc9uug66aai86d5nejjica74gqm7sjbugmc3lb0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cli64or6c9h2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

GOP Presidential
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0q41uobpsb27smrehignng60abp97o619lv3098_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp32c9ieao74s8gq48bi4bh28pr0clim8oj3cph649fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z18o9nm3ooueu9kthq1b2oi31i9pc96ofrscr4n8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cli64or6c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt5pp7ed5fllcstiegl55nc5l3juumfm14ifq2l0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cli64or6c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Full Mag News
subject: Learn about the real American Founding
body:
I'd like to invite you to join me in Hillsdale College's newest free course studying the greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century, C.S. Lewis.

| | |
---
| | | | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1e9d929322a4a798ae277da6c60277d&_e=O-f8Kx6VbOTcHn-794HWTBbGiPYmfo7k0wWVcwSzujw945X5N7BCv1xD74wDDxLxCE4owaSQcTldCYMuAz1ElG2xe_R116xnyhrcDLGC2tKk5WCddKVGJSksefhYa0MrYaePyj4OgSjZD1Z2YMfNhtMFPwUu_DuoMFZDfe8aIVj79Jh9iQXfyk3BZdsMBr7tADXUyr_gv-WOZbUwfUd3H6ky9oS5HAgYa2r-jUtNcGN8LVkwfbYV6rVuBEFbrWKnCgaDdeNAtcZvaGtxPu7tIbQ-wrdgJdGWZf_DAeEuR0N8XL_H15olFsXq7kP2MNDnbsb8IgLe7UjDkcLAlr_-L0MOjM4DAJBmUO3uQ52czDterYoSN_kfyb_mLSE0xhBMVwGNMkfEloACpn1lQOy3D75yX0cWSt_Pe00rrqWk0Ar0fz8seAVWfBvY5VV0xptT) [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1e9d929322a4a798ae277da6c60277d&_e=O-f8Kx6VbOTcHn-794HWTBbGiPYmfo7k0wWVcwSzujw945X5N7BCv1xD74wDDxLxCE4owaSQcTldCYMuAz1ElG2xe_R116xnyhrcDLGC2tKk5WCddKVGJSksefhYa0MrYaePyj4OgSjZD1Z2YMfNhtMFPwUu_DuoMFZDfe8aIVj79Jh9iQXfyk3BZdsMBr7tADXUyr_gv-WOZbUwfUd3H6ky9oS5HAgYa2r-jUtNcGN8LVkwfbYV6rVuBEFbrWKnCgaDdeNAtcZvaGtxPu7tIb1TmjYFH-Bmg53clL6yEv4U_JTRswi1PIwori88X9gZSUQXCv63PNm7yA807iGeKM6kgrbMqHCusJveEkK5BEDQKT9FYl1zd0cZmbjJOo-tVry93g7E6d1ibGZC4JFu2GIIZPwvWlB4UpYVrfoLvp-h8gXdTsepP2gYPuDMLAtM) | Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding. | **
### What students are saying
** “I appreciate the brevity of explanation and new information in a way I hadn't known or realized myself. The quizzes are helpful. Having two teachers converse brings an interesting perspective.” **- Darlena** “It helps put into context the thinking of our founders at that time. That’s very important and misunderstood by so many people today!” **- Robert**
---|---

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **" The Real American Founding: A Conversation,"** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1e9d929322a4a798ae277da6c60277d&_e=O-f8Kx6VbOTcHn-794HWTBbGiPYmfo7k0wWVcwSzujw945X5N7BCv1xD74wDDxLxCE4owaSQcTldCYMuAz1ElG2xe_R116xnyhrcDLGC2tKk5WCddKVGJSksefhYa0MrYaePyj4OgSjZD1Z2YMfNhtMFPwUu_DuoMFZDfe8aIVj79Jh9iQXfyk3BZdsMBr7tADXUyr_gv-WOZbUwfUd3H6ky9oS5HAgYa2r-jUtNcGN8LVkwfbYV6rVuBEFbrWKnCgaDdeNAtcZvaGtxPu7tIaNGKDHLnu_GsiPxkI3MrNagN-rlvcpIAVPytxIR9qGFkqcDmvIzU7eeVwCtI1pu51lButBLQxf2JlufasH2vSLMfQYX55HxX1DD7NtKFSQaYF3P4t-sw944MZeuSwtUrUF39nyO8ox8O381MWKGp6KiKIoul3FCz5qPPx4oHcrh)

I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Full Mag News

Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

He was traveling home with his wife, Charlotte, and their unborn baby, after they attended an event hosted by the conservative news site, Daily Wire.

Can you imagine being abused like this... _as an American citizen in your own country?_

**That 's why I've filed a crucial lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I'm Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 46 years.

You've seen me on Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

subject: ‘Never Seen Anything That Bad’: Former Trump Official Reacts To New York’s Massive Manufacturing Plunge
body:
And EXCLUSIVE: Testimony From Former Immigration Official Lays Out Point By Point How Biden Policies Ushered In Border Crisis

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681687%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2WPr3hz5aiWXq2C4262BUw&sysid=1 ‘Never Seen Anything That Bad’: Former Trump Official Reacts To New York’s Massive Manufacturing Plunge

Fox Business host Larry Kudlow reacted to New York’s plunge in general business conditions, saying that the state had “collapsed.” The Empire State Manufacturing Survey conducted from Jan. 3 to Jan. 10 showed a 29-point drop indicating a contraction in general business conditions, reaching the lowest level since the 2020 COVID pandemic.

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: The Stakes Couldn’t Be Any Higher
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
The potential ramifications of such a conflict are catastrophic.

|
---
| | | **The potential ramifications of such a conflict are catastrophic.
**
---
|
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nuclear_1_17_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=1)
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nuclear_1_17_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=2)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nuclear_1_17_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=3)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,
People are actually talking about using nuclear weapons now for the first time in my life since I was a kid.
There was a 13-Day period during the Cuban missile crisis when we were the closest in human history that we had ever come to global annihilation.
I remember the U.S. Marshalls coming to our house to take myself and my elder brother Joe to an underground city in the Blue Ridge Mountains in West Virginia — a place for the whole government to weather a thermonuclear cataclysm.
But my father called us and said we can’t go because it would send the nation into a panic. He told us to be good soldiers and show up at school. He also said that if there was a nuclear exchange, the ones that die would be better off than the people who are left.
Leaders like my father and uncle, John F. Kennedy, had a healthy fear of nuclear conflict during that period in American history. This is not so today.
What we are seeing from the anonymous men in lanyards, men and women in the White House, who are now making these calls is a reckless, cavalier approach to nuclear war.
**_In other words, the Biden administration’s lack of caution is putting our future at risk._**
Just as my uncle and father before me, I will bring a heightened sobriety to the White House when it comes to matters of nuclear war. The stakes couldn’t be any higher!
The potential ramifications of such a conflict are catastrophic, and it is our duty to pursue all avenues that promote peace, diplomacy, and strategic decision-making.
[Join me so we can ensure that our nation remains at the forefront of protecting humanity.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nuclear_1_17_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=4)
| |
---
---
Sincerely,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
---

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWTtkfGiNs

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWTtkfGiNs

Dear
Friend,

In the
annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been
attributed to a host of factors-material resources, manpower,
pre-war strategies, and tactical doctrine all play a part in
determining the victors and the vanquished.

However,
as we delve deeper into the past, we uncover a truth that
surpasses conventional wisdom-a truth of extraordinary
significance.

Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the
remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated
by the savior generals-visionary leaders displaying unparalleled
expertise.

Today,
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite
your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian
and Hoover Senior Fellow, Victor Davis Hanson, has authored a
groundbreaking eBook-Victory and the Savior Generals-a
captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional
leaders.

You can
secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Inside
its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the
defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity,
contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into
seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict,
rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment
with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is
your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most
influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate
even in the present day.

Claim
your complimentary copy of Victory and the Savior Generals now
through this secure link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Wishing
you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.
