name: Andy Kim
subject: A Personal Note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
This weekend, we celebrated Korean American Day, and I want to tell you my thoughts.
|
---
| | This weekend, we celebrated Korean American Day, and I took some time to reflect on what it means to be Korean American. When I look at my boys wearing traditional Hanbok, besides the fact that they are unbelievably cute, it raises a lot of complex emotions that I've struggled with over my life. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77212033/449735263/-1197072038?refcode=2024-01-17-kaday&recurring=&amount=7&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=87406691-3cb5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzQwNjY5MS0zY2I1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=InbLxQSmXWugi-M6ydOg-6PRDvzWPfXmvcvntU98n5c=) My parents moved here 50 years ago, and they didn't know anyone else in the entire western hemisphere of Earth. My sister and I were born here with no other relatives living within about 7000 miles of us. My parents struggled with how to raise us. They desperately wanted us to speak English with no accent. They didn't want us to be treated the way they had which built an insecurity that they always felt judged as foreigners. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77212034/449735264/-1197072038?refcode=2024-01-17-kaday&recurring=&amount=7&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=87406691-3cb5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzQwNjY5MS0zY2I1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=InbLxQSmXWugi-M6ydOg-6PRDvzWPfXmvcvntU98n5c=) They tried to raise us to speak English and Korean, but when I was slow to speak as a kid, they got scared and stopped teaching Korean. My heritage and my geography collided and felt more like a conflict and tension than a blend. I never lived in places that had large Korean American communities or even Asian American more broadly. I was often teased at school for looking different or eating different food for lunch, so at a young age I defensively minimized my Korean identity. We attended a Korean American church and that became, in many ways, my first touch point with being Korean. Sunday church was an all-day affair filled with service and Korean language classes. I felt like I was Korean for one day a week. But then I went back to school, back to telling my parents I didn't want Korean food in my lunch box. I later stopped taking Korean classes. By the time I got to high school when someone called me Korean American or Asian American, I would snap back saying I was just American. I went on to study foreign policy and had teachers immediately assume I wanted to study Asia. Perhaps that affected my decision to focus on the Middle East and Africa. I remember attending a talk about Darfur where someone said "I didn't realize you people were interested in Africa." Each of those comments brought my heritage into even greater conflict with my identity. The breaking point was when at the State Dept, where I worked on diplomacy, I was one day informed that I was banned from working on issues related to Korea because I'm Korean American. I was stunned. I wasn't even trying to work on Korea issues as I was a Middle East expert. Why was my employer banning me? What they basically told me is that they don't trust me. They don't think I would be 100% loyal to America if I was working on my ancestral homeland. I felt like no matter what I thought about my identity and being Korean American, I could never be seen as 100% American in the eyes of others. I was humiliated and felt like my career in foreign policy would never be successful if I was deemed a security risk. A few years later I stepped up to run for Congress. I'll be honest, I didn't realize when I started that there were zero Korean Americans in Congress at the time. That was not a barrier I set out initially to break. But when my opposition began to run ads on TV saying "Andy Kim, he's not one of us," I felt in my heart that there was something bigger at stake than just me. Pundits saying I can't win this district which was 85% white and less than 3% Asian American. But I did. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77212035/449735265/-1197072038?refcode=2024-01-17-kaday&recurring=&amount=7&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=87406691-3cb5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzQwNjY5MS0zY2I1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=InbLxQSmXWugi-M6ydOg-6PRDvzWPfXmvcvntU98n5c=) I had recently become a dad. Two beautiful Korean American little boys. I'm in the place of my parents now thinking about how to raise my kids between their family heritage and their nationality. What I said then is that I'm not going to let others determine what I am or am not capable of accomplishing because of my race and ethnicity. I have as much right to represent my community as anyone else. My story isn't just a Korean American story, it is an American story. I stood on the floor of the House of Representatives swearing the oath of office, and I looked up at my mom looking back down. I still don't know fully what it means to be Korean American, but I know who I am, and I know I am proud of both my Korean heritage and being American. clean_body: This weekend, we celebrated Korean American Day, and I want to tell you my thoughts. | | | This weekend, we celebrated Korean American Day, and I took some time to reflect on what it means to be Korean American. When I look at my boys wearing traditional Hanbok, besides the fact that they are unbelievably cute, it raises a lot of complex emotions that I've struggled with over my life. = My parents moved here 50 years ago, and they didn't know anyone else in the entire western hemisphere of Earth. My sister and I were born here with no other relatives living within about 7000 miles of us. My parents struggled with how to raise us. They desperately wanted us to speak English with no accent. They didn't want us to be treated the way they had which built an insecurity that they always felt judged as foreigners. = They tried to raise us to speak English and Korean, but when I was slow to speak as a kid, they got scared and stopped teaching Korean. My heritage and my geography collided and felt more like a conflict and tension than a blend. I never lived in places that had large Korean American communities or even Asian American more broadly. I was often teased at school for looking different or eating different food for lunch, so at a young age I defensively minimized my Korean identity. We attended a Korean American church and that became, in many ways, my first touch point with being Korean. Sunday church was an all-day affair filled with service and Korean language classes. I felt like I was Korean for one day a week. But then I went back to school, back to telling my parents I didn't want Korean food in my lunch box. I later stopped taking Korean classes. By the time I got to high school when someone called me Korean American or Asian American, I would snap back saying I was just American. I went on to study foreign policy and had teachers immediately assume I wanted to study Asia. Perhaps that affected my decision to focus on the Middle East and Africa. I remember attending a talk about Darfur where someone said "I didn't realize you people were interested in Africa." Each of those comments brought my heritage into even greater conflict with my identity. The breaking point was when at the State Dept, where I worked on diplomacy, I was one day informed that I was banned from working on issues related to Korea because I'm Korean American. I was stunned. I wasn't even trying to work on Korea issues as I was a Middle East expert. Why was my employer banning me? What they basically told me is that they don't trust me. They don't think I would be 100% loyal to America if I was working on my ancestral homeland. I felt like no matter what I thought about my identity and being Korean American, I could never be seen as 100% American in the eyes of others. I was humiliated and felt like my career in foreign policy would never be successful if I was deemed a security risk. A few years later I stepped up to run for Congress. I'll be honest, I didn't realize when I started that there were zero Korean Americans in Congress at the time. That was not a barrier I set out initially to break. But when my opposition began to run ads on TV saying "Andy Kim, he's not one of us," I felt in my heart that there was something bigger at stake than just me. Pundits saying I can't win this district which was 85% white and less than 3% Asian American. But I did. = I had recently become a dad. Two beautiful Korean American little boys. I'm in the place of my parents now thinking about how to raise my kids between their family heritage and their nationality. What I said then is that I'm not going to let others determine what I am or am not capable of accomplishing because of my race and ethnicity. I have as much right to represent my community as anyone else. My story isn't just a Korean American story, it is an American story. I stood on the floor of the House of Representatives swearing the oath of office, and I looked up at my mom looking back down. I still don't know fully what it means to be Korean American, but I know who I am, and I know I am proud of both my Korean heritage and being American. = More soon, Andy ** | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by ** Andy Kim for New Jersey P.O. Box 211 Marlton, NJ 08053 United States Email is an important way for Andy Kim to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. As First Lady, Michelle Obama championed education, health, and military families with unwavering dedication. Her "Let's Move!" campaign significantly reduced childhood obesity rates, and her "Joining Forces" initiative alongside Dr. Jill Biden provided vital support to service members, veterans, and their families.
But her impact extends far beyond these initiatives. She's inspired millions with her memoir, "Becoming," and continues to advocate for young people worldwide through the Obama Foundation's Girls Opportunity Alliance.
Michelle Obama embodies the spirit of what we stand for: perseverance, hope, and the belief that everyone deserves a fair chance.
_**[So, let’s celebrate her! Will you join us in wishing Michelle Obama a happy birthday and honoring her legacy?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77212257/449735411/-1086109561?contactdata=W7LLFH0gOc7OQb2QbG2pmhTLFazOxUAf7hlYrSRYWt2EQz94r+PKBCLCT0O6cNNzb7nSbYjrzDQs9mCXOMPWM/Mnv2dUHnT2h5USiGsjIV4V59Zz/OZHMYTf7y09shIEROp3ZrjfVuEmvnjAxXAmj0JNNeKrEO6Z8mejiKOs01Y=&refcode=UTS_EN_90DO_240117_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkZDE4NDFmLTNkYjUtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0x18Ojgm8nf9WlvZitZ_ev3zkqZeS12FTspDV_nbagI=&emci=c3e21595-e6b3-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=8dd1841f-3db5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=24268976)**_

As First Lady, Michelle Obama championed education, health, and military families with unwavering dedication. Her "Let's Move!" campaign significantly reduced childhood obesity rates, and her "Joining Forces" initiative alongside Dr. Jill Biden provided vital support to service members, veterans, and their families. But her impact extends far beyond these initiatives. She's inspired millions with her memoir, "Becoming," and continues to advocate for young people worldwide through the Obama Foundation's Girls Opportunity Alliance. Michelle Obama embodies the spirit of what we stand for: perseverance, hope, and the belief that everyone deserves a fair chance. Every message counts in showing our appreciation for a remarkable leader who has touched so many lives. name: Karen Crnkovich
subject: Team KC volunteer opportunities and KS GOP Convention
body:
Hello!

I hope your 2024 has started well!

I am excited, energized, and excited about the momentum that is building in my campaign for US Congress. Most importantly, _I humbly thank you for your support!_

ICYMI
The Kansas State GOP Convention is NEXT weekend in Overland Park at the Marriott Overland Park Hotel. We are still waiting on final details from the party, but we know...

**TeamKC will be there in force and ready to show everyone who is the best candidate to go head-to-head with Sharice Davids. #KC**

**Please respond via email if you have already purchased tickets for the convention**
**OR**
**If you haven 't purchased a ticket, but are interested in attending, we have a limited number of tickets available for volunteers.**
_There are a couple of opportunities to volunteer that don 't require a ticket as well. _

The schedule as we know it is:
Friday, January 26th
2 pm booth set up
6 pm (approximately) Kick-Off Reception at Bourgmont Winerty - there is a 'meet the candidate' forum where Karen will address the group

Saturday, January 27th
7:30 am start
Noon KFL luncheon *separate ticket*
2:00 pm Business meetings
6:00 pm Dinner *separate ticket*

We are ready to suit up and show up for this event and need some help. Please let us know if you can join us.

Best regards,
TEAM KC

Karen Crnkovich for Congress, KS03 ____
[www.kcforkansas.com](http://www.kcforkansas.com/) ____
913-414-4446
#teamkc

name: James Comer
subject: My investigation is a serious risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:
They want to shut it down in the blink of an eye
| | [ ](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=32bfcfa9604d495ea71926930af8058a&_e=CLxs7CaqEFFPPxOFPMFDC7vW0VUxf0uUp3pGlnr-Bf3KkNukF5cniJTFAJdeUWY1L_jZ-b1tR5POFvH7PHpH12Kf5SlOJrK1Ho5GuecFvv2BuJbpu-YPURKfUhH5HNl44JZTH4QGoQ7KGgwizjvwkDERBC1_XzVA3wi5MIpnag6sYF_TwZQ56zN9W-I2RcIfz7UusIYenMSDvZ26MGA6B4lXFhox2Vze8tC64WvhaDzINzns6ZmG6wGc7jDpYAb_Aiah9DxtBzdLxxok_56M34043zzRSrFdfT8-U9DFKRpiHIoHGADs-tHRNxaMSlcb)

Fellow American, I received some concerning news, and I'm asking you to read this entire memo about the state of my re-election campaign. My Democrat opponent just filed to run against me in Kentucky's first congressional district and it is alarming.
| [ **RE-ELECT COMER** ](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=32bfcfa9604d495ea71926930af8058a&_e=CLxs7CaqEFFPPxOFPMFDC7vW0VUxf0uUp3pGlnr-Bf3KkNukF5cniJTFAJdeUWY1L_jZ-b1tR5POFvH7PHpH12Kf5SlOJrK1Ho5GuecFvv2BuJbpu-YPURKfUhH5HNl44JZTH4QGoQ7KGgwizjvwkDERBC1_XzVA3wi5MIpnag5KXojoxLdJ_7IO-mdhMNN7k0p6tTgzorbL3cOexapaevnac1lhPSKC3YwgyHxNhJNidoETXXe_C3-9L6lO2-8lS2A3xSCQI8juDJ71u_05N9LQZARTBrvGMY42TnxpOAlifDtFbpCBFmYXH5HYzBmF)
---
My opponent is a Far-Left activist who worked for the Hillary Clinton campaign, and she's already raising tons of money on ActBlue from liberal online donors around the country. She is determined to defeat me and end my investigation once and for all. **You and I both know we can 't let that happen.** But it's not only that. She's hired Amy McGrath's campaign manager. You may not remember Amy McGrath, but I sure do. McGrath raised $88 Million dollars in her 2020 campaign for Kentucky Senate. **$88,000,000!**
| [ **RE-ELECT COMER** ](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=32bfcfa9604d495ea71926930af8058a&_e=CLxs7CaqEFFPPxOFPMFDC7vW0VUxf0uUp3pGlnr-Bf3KkNukF5cniJTFAJdeUWY1L_jZ-b1tR5POFvH7PHpH12Kf5SlOJrK1Ho5GuecFvv2BuJbpu-YPURKfUhH5HNl44JZTH4QGoQ7KGgwizjvwkDERBC1_XzVA3wi5MIpnag6DYLPTqsDuXiQhNYM7Aot5zxczqep0YnqZK0R0_SfM1zvCTYKPnGfsp3sXG9yb9YoGYc0eQkB9uYfqtyjh2A_KOu_T0IfsFVmww9ybP84UJI2ZjxovjFag9W1ZbzatzwQnl4-lBoIFMqTWdMmVBNc3)
---
That's an astounding amount of money, and her campaign manager's rolodex is stuffed to the brim with democrat mega-donors chomping at the bit to take me down. They know their investment in the Biden administration is at serious risk due to the findings of my investigation, and they will do whatever it takes to defeat me in November and end my inquiry into the Biden Family's corruption racket and cover-up. I'm asking everyone who reads this memo to stand with me today as my 2024 campaign kicks off in earnest. We must show national Democrats that our campaign is strong enough to weather anything... _or this campaign could get really rough for me in the fall._ If you're able, I'd love to have your renewed support. Thank you for everything, James Comer
| [ **RE-ELECT COMER** ](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=32bfcfa9604d495ea71926930af8058a&_e=CLxs7CaqEFFPPxOFPMFDC7vW0VUxf0uUp3pGlnr-Bf3KkNukF5cniJTFAJdeUWY1L_jZ-b1tR5POFvH7PHpH12Kf5SlOJrK1Ho5GuecFvv2BuJbpu-YPURKfUhH5HNl44JZTH4QGoQ7KGgwizjvwkDERBC1_XzVA3wi5MIpnag5fAmNP5IV8fj2uDzF8X2pJlkF58M3Ft0JUP4p1x9qNbvUU-t2ii7p4AyPijE31kT1KUlUQXsAAxqFmNCZp10ugSHTOkkEVixvFN74k9KFnSGgoAKVZo49_pKqziK6akF9pF7gDMFN3lrye7ojweVBa)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Here's what I believe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Each and every time I’ve been underestimated, written off, or dismissed, I have proven my opponents wrong. We shattered expectations at the Iowa caucuses and showed the nation that our team is ready to fight.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=04f072ed8d2c32793874c5a25872d7c6612bf105bf109fc1e753b027466a7a90c9c15168c037d8b703542afcb81c1d06aa094fa08b88d93b)
---
Friend, The media chose who they wanted to be the Republican nominee on the ballot long ago. Every chance they've gotten, they've done everything they could to take us down... but our team has fought back, and that's because we have a mission worth fighting for. I believe our Republican Party is ready for a leader who WILL rip up the radical leftist agenda from root to branch starting the first day in office. I am standing up for one voice only: t**he voice of the American people**. It's no secret that the DC elites, the legacy media, and the political class of America want our campaign to fail. They want to maintain the control they have over our lives. But the newsflash we have to give them is that this status quo cannot last any longer. It's time to usher in a reckoning, and I am ready to do it. But friend, I need your help now to get this done. ******[**Support my campaign by donating here.**](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=04f072ed8d2c32793874c5a25872d7c6612bf105bf109fc1e753b027466a7a90c9c15168c037d8b703542afcb81c1d06aa094fa08b88d93b)****** It's up to the American people to back a leader with a clear vision of where this country needs to go, and I will make my case to you every step of the way to earn your support. **This is my promise to you:**
* **I will lead our Great American Comeback. **

* **I will restore freedom across our country. **

* **I will stand up to the radical Left 's indoctrination of your children, imposition of a social credit score, hostile takeover of our military, and neglect of our southern border.**

* **I will reverse every one of Biden 's policies that have caused average American families to suffer.**

* **I will fight tooth and nail to get our country back on track. I know the potential this country has. Your children deserve to see it. **

---
| | | | | [PITCH IN $25](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=04f072ed8d2c3279c05b42af0620a27c92e5a9b9f3a0ccfb26db3b70214be3552e4d611b735442461345b9b85df5da7141fb17b27662b0c5)
---

---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=04f072ed8d2c32793874c5a25872d7c6612bf105bf109fc1e753b027466a7a90c9c15168c037d8b703542afcb81c1d06aa094fa08b88d93b)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|

name: =?utf-8?Q?Vikram=20Mansharamani?=
subject: My new book 📖 is out next week! 😁
body:
Dr. Mansharamani's new book is available for pre-order; please consider ordering your copy now!

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/mansharamani/my-new-book-is-out-next-week?e=93b2c2b824)
https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=abf8bb1882&e=93b2c2b824

** THE MAKING OF A
------------------------------------------------------------

** GENERALIST
An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional
------------------------------------------------------------

** Success in an Uncertain World
------------------------------------------------------------
Image of Vikram' book

Dear Friends,

As you may have heard, I have a new book coming out next week. The book is part memoir, part non-fiction, and part social / political commentary. It’s titled “The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World (https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=c28ed27af7&e=93b2c2b824) ” and is available for purchase on Amazon and Barnes & Noble, as well as other outlets.

After my unsuccessful campaign for the US Senate in 2022, I spent time reflecting on my life experiences and lessons learned. Writing (when not skiing or hiking at Loon Mountain) became my “therapy” and helped me better understand my first 50 years on this planet. The book is a deeply personal reflection on failures, challenges, and successes along the path to who I am today.

The book also takes lessons acquired from my entry into politics and puts them into the context of my prior work. My first book, Boombustology (https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=dbfc665a76&e=93b2c2b824) , suggested the use of multiple lenses offered a path to unique insights when it came to spotting financial bubbles. My next book, Think for Yourself (https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=a300b68284&e=93b2c2b824) , suggested every perspective was limited, biased, and incomplete and the best way to navigate uncertainty was to triangulate multiple views. When I entered the world of politics, however, I found most people were quick to label folks on a single dimension of Right to Left. The Making of a Generalist suggests we could all be better off by adding dimensions to our political discourse: what about open-minded versus closed-minded? or process-oriented versus outcome-oriented? I’m calling for more civil civic engagement.

At this point, I really need your help. While I would of course appreciate it if you could purchase a copy (Incidentally, the Kindle book is currently available for a short period of time for $2.99! (https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=d0fa9fc6a2&e=93b2c2b824) ), I’m also looking for assistance in getting the book noticed. I would really appreciate it if you might

1. Host a (virtual) book party.
(My team can assist with invitation design, setting up a virtual meeting, and setting a date. I’m of course happy to attend!)
2. Purchase books for your team, clients, children and/or friends.
(I have relationships with bulk book buying organizations who can send to individual addresses; they can even provide codes to give out at events if preferred.)
3. Mention the book on social media.
(Please consider posting something like “I’m looking forward to receiving my copy of @mansharamani’s new book, The Making of a Generalist. Can’t wait to read it!” with a link to the book’s Amazon page (https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=0f2e690126&e=93b2c2b824) on X/twitter). I’m also on Facebook, Instagram, Linkedin, and Threads.
4. Help me get the book mentioned or discussed in the media.
(I’m super passionate about getting the book’s main message — that we should all be broader when the world is getting narrower — to the widest audience possible. Any help would be appreciated!)
5. Suggest me as a potential speaker to discuss the book.
(Although I do a fair amount of professional keynote speaking, I’m eager to also share the message of the book with non-conference audiences, whether they are high schoolers, a retirement community book club, or mid-career networking organizations)

Please reach out to me directly at vikram@mansharamani.com (mailto:vikram@mansharamani.com) or via my cell 603-290-9595 if you think you might able to help.

Thank you in advance for your continued support and friendship.

Best,
CLICK HERE TO ORDER! ()
https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=8a5bbce3e3&e=93b2c2b824 https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=47339423e1&e=93b2c2b824 https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=6305995b4e&e=93b2c2b824 https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=ddeafb3bfb&e=93b2c2b824 https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=9f3f6a94e3&e=93b2c2b824 https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=0ad2d3a59f&e=93b2c2b824

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Learn about the real American Founding
body:
I'd like to invite you to join me in Hillsdale College's newest free course studying the greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century, C.S. Lewis.

| | |
---
| | | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dcd96c4aee154557a0b5862bc307cc20&_e=A9ZSCCm2pPXIDT8X_skAeja7WnK1bMw1NCRumQJQj63jaTnPZiOTp53vzNJ1AzlktO_0SnPM47EHjY79dEUp7YBNyrx3Kwe9pxNJNBej8YtarSFKhOVtBLW4Ef6Q9_xdpfBvHa8fRUEKfEx46GZOHlZsi6ujwf32r5o2W4VfcPosSpOZnt0cHttw237v_lMLNpSkufJN4bP1i7zQjbGWaPyr4aMPVcOY8pYl86Msn_X9qkWDzIsBdQ8cdPUQ4fE0uHwZTL0T0ETdk-84u5rhKtE4PkPXWWFWn6EIhv9rUsKDhHUFOCX5JFt2-gsROkuMiOscZuk1zkFZMQf8PlwY4ZYeq_wRfL9uEX1AsI8ppmSTRyJ_Qm9V2f6MYWm_FK67q7o7tH3ONGVheZ8IoQIJHHMQcixWHtvEqgwqQGhInUHK1MCPOxMl-k6YFLoLDwna) [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dcd96c4aee154557a0b5862bc307cc20&_e=A9ZSCCm2pPXIDT8X_skAeja7WnK1bMw1NCRumQJQj63jaTnPZiOTp53vzNJ1AzlktO_0SnPM47EHjY79dEUp7YBNyrx3Kwe9pxNJNBej8YtarSFKhOVtBLW4Ef6Q9_xdpfBvHa8fRUEKfEx46GZOHlZsi6ujwf32r5o2W4VfcPosSpOZnt0cHttw237v_lMLNpSkufJN4bP1i7zQjbGWaPyr4aMPVcOY8pYl86Msn_X9qkWDzIsBdQ8cdPUQ4fE0uHwZTL0T0ETdk-84u5rhKj3J1NAiFuMNti0sB0Exr97YFgz8xHS9vcSjVXtQkpHZVwdqWj_-zjgDe6LSWhWF7HztqZqpmNmFVmPAYE1oH82-2dXsLYo3vfhmrjUtoFzTBQ08vzI4cjXR5sJ29biMxOjC1Nwec1sxbVXANaLVzdsoNxwJ57rNvyukIcvMYuf-) | Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding. | **
### What students are saying
** “I appreciate the brevity of explanation and new information in a way I hadn't known or realized myself. The quizzes are helpful. Having two teachers converse brings an interesting perspective.” **- Darlena** “It helps put into context the thinking of our founders at that time. That’s very important and misunderstood by so many people today!” **- Robert**
---|---

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **" The Real American Founding: A Conversation,"** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dcd96c4aee154557a0b5862bc307cc20&_e=A9ZSCCm2pPXIDT8X_skAeja7WnK1bMw1NCRumQJQj63jaTnPZiOTp53vzNJ1AzlktO_0SnPM47EHjY79dEUp7YBNyrx3Kwe9pxNJNBej8YtarSFKhOVtBLW4Ef6Q9_xdpfBvHa8fRUEKfEx46GZOHlZsi6ujwf32r5o2W4VfcPosSpOZnt0cHttw237v_lMLNpSkufJN4bP1i7zQjbGWaPyr4aMPVcOY8pYl86Msn_X9qkWDzIsBdQ8cdPUQ4fE0uHwZTL0T0ETdk-84u5rhKg3gvq6Z9iS5GIYfvaHuC8vqCLf49gtKGPFPSWijSJ1r51T0zcVDFD4j0QLxk-dO4FShE4gBv-e6fe16gjuj4NLmT6ty83_at4RuUUQ2Zm0kZpjchm9MifIG1AHs04E3YrWZaHk9MB4pFgcoNhM89SKfSkroTlSDT02Wfxm4Knht)

I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

clean_body: I'd like to invite you to join me in Hillsdale College's newest free course studying the greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century, C.S. Lewis. | | | | | | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College - | Hello Friend, Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding. That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, which is now available on DVD. In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding. | What students are saying “I appreciate the brevity of explanation and new information in a way I hadn't known or realized myself. The quizzes are helpful. Having two teachers converse brings an interesting perspective.” - Darlena “It helps put into context the thinking of our founders at that time. That’s very important and misunderstood by so many people today!” - Robert ---|--- As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit." This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America. The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it. As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible. Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course? And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for " The Real American Founding: A Conversation," by clicking the link below. I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Because of your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
We faced more attacks than anyone going into Iowa, and still, our team showed up to fight for our Great American Comeback.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z27c75kf0ticmbcf40eevsohcogasln82m8a6mhg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cli61o34clh2bs)
---
Friend, If you saw what happened at the Iowa caucuses this week, you saw an egregious act of election interference. **They've been writing our obituary for months, and this week, they called the election before even 2% of the votes were in. Despite what they've tried to tell you, this election is YOUR CHOICE, not the media's.** Members of our team filed out when reports went out from media sources because they were told their voices and their votes would not matter. That is not the foundation of a democracy we were built on, Friend. Even though the media has continued to throw everything but the kitchen sink at us, and our opponents spent almost $50 million attacking us, **we shattered expectations and got our ticket punched out of Iowa.** All we have been able to achieve is thanks to your support. And now is the time for us to continue looking forward and keep working hard. **[Help my team get ready for the New Hampshire and South Carolina primaries by chipping in $15 today!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7rgslo5i5dm074qerahcn1injt3pirsbvmnqldo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cli61o34clh2bs)** I KNOW that this team is made up of hardworking, God-fearing, patriotic people. Our supporters are the ones showing up to FIGHT to reverse the madness that's spread across our country. Those are our marching orders. If we continue to work hard and keep the faith we have in restoring America's future, we will reverse this decline that the Left has rained down and bring back the sanity that our kids deserve. _But we are counting on our team to continue to drive us forward._ **_We have a lot of work to do, but I can tell you this: as the next President of the United States, I am going to get the job done for this country. I will not let you down._**
---
| | [Chip in what you can!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z57l0723gpqc59oaj5pdhbv0g863582nd2bupon0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cli61o34clh2bs)
---
We thank you for your support thus far, and know we have a long battle ahead. We are going to get this done. God bless you,
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs693n7geu4oq7s3chu1jbcfgbpa384olb3h21c8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cli61o34clh2bs)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjriaitsb7fcpurtp0nhonq2tbtd1o8ehei19qsg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cli61o34clh2bs)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh3u9eivjp4qei38hlbb92js30hlucb9ajtbi0d8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cli61o34clh2bs)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: First TV ad of this senate race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1032%2E135344%2EGwyE57)

Big news, team: One of our potential Republican opponents, businessman Sandy Pensler, just aired his first TV ad of the election.
Here’s why that matters, especially so early on in this race: Pensler is a wealthy venture capitalist with nearly unlimited personal cash to spend. He self-funded $5 million dollars in a failed bid for the Republican nomination for Senate in 2018, which he narrowly lost to John James, and could very well spend just as much—or more—in 2024.
Now, money alone can’t buy the GOP nomination, but it can buy name recognition. Public polling shows that Michiganders don’t know any of the main candidates for Senate. Just 45% of Michiganders have heard of Elissa, and she’s easily got the highest name recognition.
Once people have an idea about who a politician is, it can be hard to change their minds. A lot of voters will form opinions over the next several months, which is why this moment is crucial for introducing voters not only to Elissa, but also to all four of our Republican opponents as well.
With candidates like Pensler threatening to blanket the airwaves, it’s important that our team has the resources to tell the truth not just about Pensler’s extremism, but about the radical right-wing views of every candidate in the Republican field.
**Some of our opponents can count on an influx of cash, but Elissa has pledged from the very first day that she ran for office that she wouldn’t accept money from corporate PACs, and that’s never changing. We rely on grassroots supporters like you to fund our campaign, and the majority of our contributions come from emails like this.**
[**That’s why we’re asking: Will you chip in to ensure we have the resources to air our own ads and continue the work of introducing Elissa to voters across the state?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-jan24.--Kpen&refcode=em240117-1-30&t=2&akid=1032%2E135344%2EGwyE57)**

subject: Sykes Enters 2024 with over $1 million COH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/emiliasykesforcongress/advisory-emilia-sykes-to-hold-election-night-media-availability-17617352?e=7730fa895a)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release** : January 17, 2024
**Press Contact** : Damon Drew
damon@emiliasykesforcongress.com
---
| **Emilia Sykes Raises More Than $540,000 in Fourth Quarter**
## **Enters 2024 with more than $1 million COH**
---
| **AKRON, OH** **— **Today, Congresswoman Emilia Sykes announced that her campaign will report raising $540,761.30 in the fourth quarter of 2023. Emilia’s campaign heads into the 2024 election year with over $1 million cash on hand.

**“** _Our fight to protect our freedoms, keep our community safe and help families with rising costs is just beginning and I’m humbled by the encouragement our campaign has received across the district_ ,” **said Sykes**. “ _The night I was elected I promised we were all going to Congress together, and your continued support proves that this team is standing stronger than ever as we work to ensure middle class families in Ohio’s 13th congressional district can get ahead._**”
**
Sykes' support came from over 4,500 individual donors with the average online contribution just $29.92, displaying the real grassroots support behind Sykes’ campaign.

Sykes is serving the second year of her first two-year term representing Ohio’s 13th Congressional District. Her top priority is [making government work for her district](https://emiliasykesforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=83820386dcff6cbe03ccbaec8&id=35b684bb4d&e=7730fa895a). During her tenure, she has brought back $100 million in federal dollars to the district.
---
| ###

Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress

Friend,

This is the first and last email I'll send you.

I'm a little hesitant to reach out to you like this.

**However, my back is against the wall, and your response to this email will decide everything.**

My name is Rob Bresnahan. You may not know me well, but I'm a fifth-generation Northeastern Pennsylvanian who took over my family's electrical contracting business at the age of 19 years old. I graduated from the University of Scranton, and I've created life-supporting jobs for more than 150 Pennsylvanian families.

After that, I started a company with the goal to reinvest in my community by rehabilitating historic buildings, breathing life back into local downtown areas, and providing innovative spaces for the next generation of entrepreneurs.

I have dedicated my life to helping the community that raised me into the hard-working man that I am today.

**Now, I 'm also the Republican Candidate in a MUST WIN race in Northeast Pennsylvania, a district that will certainly decide who controls Washington, D.C.**

Nancy Pelosi, Joe Biden, and my opponent, Matt Cartwright, are going to flood MILLIONS of Democratic money into this race.

**[>> That's why I'm humbly asking you to chip in just a few bucks today <<](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6c82313b17d0409a95ce50270f01e9d5&_e=yK2Sru0nzREsxTspRp8pkPnQy2iXwvIij1cGC-pWJ2Oz2bh2NwKoRn5D4FI-KAUBV196VoMSNvd5ot6sS4OC7u-SnFqh02pQJj2qLQuE58F45Uq3HfWkdXQmURJjR5rYJtrrbRvEId_cVZ1IF4YkDz7gvjIOjZ74FITu2MhDkhGALvV4PBcbQZ8_HZP1GPsF8L7hOOR2auC4v9dZvjnjy2QJ7uDtLstLfrOrpTxcTG25Kne9Sa8QNqwJdwqUgdngpuuD1L6nXahGItrs_kQCCrST3PBcfY7ablbVaVLXW_w7_XQpxEHUhPhzPqyfDtp3co5AsIIDZAAeKwl_hskg9ax814gEpaKb9dhOMl2Nonw2yJ4HUHyFNHFCKd23Awyux3x47jT3Tceru9zSxmlxwg%3D%3D)**

clean_body: | Friend, This is the first and last email I'll send you. I'm a little hesitant to reach out to you like this. However, my back is against the wall, and your response to this email will decide everything. My name is Rob Bresnahan. You may not know me well, but I'm a fifth-generation Northeastern Pennsylvanian who took over my family's electrical contracting business at the age of 19 years old. I graduated from the University of Scranton, and I've created life-supporting jobs for more than 150 Pennsylvanian families. After that, I started a company with the goal to reinvest in my community by rehabilitating historic buildings, breathing life back into local downtown areas, and providing innovative spaces for the next generation of entrepreneurs. I have dedicated my life to helping the community that raised me into the hard-working man that I am today. Now, I 'm also the Republican Candidate in a MUST WIN race in Northeast Pennsylvania, a district that will certainly decide who controls Washington, D.C. Nancy Pelosi, Joe Biden, and my opponent, Matt Cartwright, are going to flood MILLIONS of Democratic money into this race. I'm the kind of guy who puts his head down and gets the work done without asking for help. Democrats won't stop doing everything in their power to stop us - regular hard-working Americans like you and me - from winning. Democrats don't like us at all. | Listen, I'm not a politician. I'm just an ordinary, hard-working guy who loves America and Northeastern Pennsylvanian. I want to see average Americans keep their lights on. I hope you'll consider helping my campaign. Rob Bresnahan Candidate for Congress (PA-08) PAID FOR BY ROB FOR PA PO Box 971, Pittston, PA 18640 Copyright (C) 2024 Rob Bresnahan for Congress, All rights reserved.

**That’s right - a coward reported a FAKE EMERGENCY at my home to try and intimidate me and scare my family because I’m a Republican Member of Congress.**

name: John Pierce
subject: J6: “Thousands more” to be arrested . . .
body:
So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), I’m currently representing 30 of these defendants.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38252%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iWiLsyMprlGL8%2fJKgXNCDQ&sysid=1)
Dear Patriot,

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38253%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=USqMm4kimzM5G%2f3JNF5zTA&sysid=1) The U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia recently stood behind a podium and announced the DOJ planned to charge “thousands” more Americans who were present during the January 6th protests.

So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), **I’m currently representing 30 of these defendants.**

My trial schedule is PACKED, and **[I need your continued support](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38254%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2zmKeHrmb6vdMa%2fVqn4IEA&sysid=1).**

My name is John Pierce. After my tour in the United States Army, I pursued a law degree at Harvard University. I was also one of the few conservative editors of the _Harvard Law Review_ (after Obama served in that role).

We need TOUGH and relentless warriors who defend the Constitution, and that's why I gave up my lucrative law practice to pursue Constitutional Law. I never expected this to happen.

In my wildest dreams, I could not have imagined our government rounding up and arresting Americans who attended a political protest.

**During the BLM riots, federal buildings were BURNED, police were assaulted _en masse,_ and God knows how many Americans were hurt. And what happened? The Department of Justice dropped all charges against anyone involved. **

But for the January 6th protesters, our government wants to send a clear message: **Stand up to your masters and pay the price!**

I just returned to D.C. for a hearing, and my funds are running low. The cost of airfare and hotels alone for myself, the defendants, and their families are burning through funds.

Criminal litigation is EXPENSIVE, and I’m pushing the limits of my Harvard Law degree to represent these Americans who need our help.

**[Will you help keep us going?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38265%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vk3fXJLpcAa6wOPcNx6ufA&sysid=1)**

I have spent countless hours with these defendants and their families. Jobs and homes have been lost. Families have been destroyed. **The DOJ's goal is to terrorize these people to set an example for us all.**

What we see today are the same tactics King George III used before the Revolutionary War started. The British Crown used "writs of assistance" to carry out wide-ranging searches and arrests of anyone for anything. The tactic inspired James Madison to write the Fourth Amendment to our Constitution to protect our privacy.

Today, our government uses high-tech methods to do the same, tracking down anyone who stepped foot on Capitol grounds on January 6th and then using "anonymous" tips to determine their crimes.

Just as King George III abused his power to quell a rebellion among the colonists, our government is abusing its power to do the same.

It's 1776 all over again, and the defendants I represent are the last, best hope that our nation can continue to trust in our Constitution to keep our government in check.

My fight for these men and women isn't just about keeping them out of jail; it's about preserving the framework of our Republic. **[Please help me keep fighting](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38266%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bVoy5GeSKSMGQft5uqIfew&sysid=1).**

Over the next three weeks, I must raise $58,000 to cover our expenses. Travel, hotels, paralegals, researchers, and assisting attorneys all need to be paid. My credit cards are MAXED out, and I'm relying on you and a handful of other patriots to help. **[Will you chip in today?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38267%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yXGjI1%2fTzf%2bSVyug2ryecw&sysid=1)**

Every dollar helps and is greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your time, support, and prayers.

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Chairman and Founder
National Constitutional Law Union

DONATIONS TO THE NCLU ARE NOT TAX-DEDUCTIBLE
THE NCLU IS A NON-PROFIT SOCIAL WELFARE ORGANIZATION THAT IS IN THE PROCESS OF APPLYING FOR 501(C)(4) TAX-EXEMPT STATUS. IT IS ANTICIPATED THAT A SUBSTANTIAL AMOUNT OF FUNDS RAISED BY THE NCLU WILL BE PAID TO A LAW FIRM OWNED AND/OR CONTROLLED BY THE FOUNDER, CHAIRMAN OF THE BOARD AND CEO OF THE NCLU FOR LEGAL SERVICES AND COSTS INCURRED BY CLIENTS OF THE FIRM IN CONNECTION WITH LITIGATIONS WITHIN THE FULL MISSION STATEMENT AS DETERMINED IN THE SOLE DISCRETION OF THE NCLU BOARD OF DIRECTORS AND AS APPROVED FOR PAYMENT BY THOSE CLIENTS.

---

10908 Courthouse Road, Suite 102164
Fredericksburg, VA 22408

When you think about our political leaders, teammate, do you ever feel like you're screaming into the void? **Well, I've got just the fix for that: Our Winter Priorities Survey.** See unlike some of our elected officials – *cough* Brian Fitzpatrick – Ashley actually WANTS to hear from you! Ashley knows she can't deliver for the people on the campaign trail or in Congress if she doesn't know what's on our hearts and minds. [That's why we're doing a short but important survey to everyone on Team Ehasz. Ashley wants to know what's at the top of your mind. [WHATEVER fills your thoughts the most these days, Ashley wants to know about it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77218677/449755455/2084408855?ms=EM_FL_EHA_20240117_su_survey_cm_mf_30da_xx_l2&refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240117_su_survey_cm_mf_30da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzQ0NmU3MC00NWI1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZZz4Erc2yoGVNN5OFvJTpEmQ42WEOK-n83NNy5ftObo=&emci=fc7a0449-8eb1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=97446e70-45b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=5643323)

Well, I've got just the fix for that: Our Winter Priorities Survey. See unlike some of our elected officials – cough Brian Fitzpatrick – Ashley actually WANTS to hear from you! Ashley knows she can't deliver for the people on the campaign trail or in Congress if she doesn't know what's on our hearts and minds. | Reproductive freedom... affordable health care... the cost of housing... keeping children safe from gun violence... I'll be sharing all of your responses directly with Ashley! Thanks for being in this fight, Rachel Berlowe Binder Campaign Manager, Ashley Ehasz for Congress 🚁 | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. name: Don Jr.
subject: Did you see who endorsed my father???
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Now it's time for YOU to submit YOUR endorsement!

|
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh3s6l7k2e84vj48ko65157ndorboq6rbjdg9hqo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cli69o71chh2bs)
---

Did you see this, Friend?

**All of House GOP leadership has ENDORSED my father, Donald J. Trump for President in 2024! Wow!**

**I 'm thrilled to see this level of support from our Majority.** Now I'm reaching out to my father's top supporters and asking them to join House Leadership in endorsing my father.

**Will you endorse Donald J. Trump for President right now? **

---
| | | [ENDORSE TRUMP HERE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi9qi6nib9jm7c4r0ntgq0r25b0dnpo5bbi747m0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cli69o71chh2bs "Generic Button")
---

Friend, you have a proven track record of support for my father and our very great House Republicans, but I need to know you support him as we kick off 2024.

President Trump needs to know that MILLIONS of American patriots are with him EVERY step of the way as he leads the charge against the Radical Left lunatics who hate our country and want to see us fail. **[Will you endorse him RIGHT NOW?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4b8bsarf05o3os71bnbnpd1igb3gb4bi0jsnt80_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cli69o71chh2bs "Will you endorse him RIGHT NOW?")**

---
| | | [SUBMIT YOUR ENDORSEMENT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z96h4j9pkggesrktklti29caj933j6dou7qrmdfo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cli69o71chh2bs "Generic Button")
---

Nothing is guaranteed in 2024, so we need EVERY supporter to be ACTIVE and ENGAGED this year.

**_And that means endorsing the one man who gave up everything to lead this country._**

You know what to do, Friend.

---
| | | [SUBMIT YOUR ENDORSEMENT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlunmvl6q3s8fhe0p63rn8c6qd82hasug2h4svvg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35cli69o71chh2bs "Generic Button")
---

Take care,

Don Jr.

---

name: Emily G.
subject: I need to hear from you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
you've been selected for our Daily Tracking Poll
| | |
---
Hi there, it's Emily, Kirsten's digital director. Now that 2024 has officially begun, it's all hands on deck over here.
Kirsten and our team are working around the clock to build a winning team so that we can defend her must-win seat, protect our Senate majority and help Democrats pick up critical House seats down ballot.
The stakes truly couldn't be higher. If GOP extremists retake power, they'll do everything they can to destroy reproductive rights, cut Social Security and Medicare, attack voting rights and undo all of the progress that we've fought so hard for.
The only way that we'll win this fall is if our grassroots team is 100% united behind our Senate majority. **That's why it's absolutely critical that we know what issue is top of mind for you as 2024 gets underway.**
**We've launched a #1 Issue Daily Tracking Poll to gather this critical data, and we're counting on your response to represent 43614.** **[Please, will you take a moment to respond before this survey closes at 11:59 p.m.?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77221000/449763246/-496332038?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4717-su-nd&refcode=jtk4717-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGY4NTA1Zi00OGI1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gOUQ4MKuLwNMNQNh5v4TzTXYfj5YTJp7LmsRp7ut9hA=&emci=28862681-87b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=f0f8505f-48b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=7659029)**
| | [DAILY TRACKING POLL >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77221001/449763247/-496332038?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4717-su-nd&refcode=jtk4717-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGY4NTA1Zi00OGI1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gOUQ4MKuLwNMNQNh5v4TzTXYfj5YTJp7LmsRp7ut9hA=&emci=28862681-87b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=f0f8505f-48b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=7659029)
---
Thanks so much for taking the time to respond. I'm looking forward to seeing your response and sharing this data with Kirsten.

— Emily
|

* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77221002/449763248/1575385346?code=jtk4717-su-nd&refcode=jtk4717-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGY4NTA1Zi00OGI1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gOUQ4MKuLwNMNQNh5v4TzTXYfj5YTJp7LmsRp7ut9hA=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77221003/449763249/1575385346?code=jtk4717-su-nd&refcode=jtk4717-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGY4NTA1Zi00OGI1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gOUQ4MKuLwNMNQNh5v4TzTXYfj5YTJp7LmsRp7ut9hA=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77221004/449763250/1575385346?code=jtk4717-su-nd&refcode=jtk4717-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGY4NTA1Zi00OGI1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gOUQ4MKuLwNMNQNh5v4TzTXYfj5YTJp7LmsRp7ut9hA=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand
---

name: Sen. Dianne Hesselbein
subject: Session started yesterday!
disclaimer_text: paid for by the State Senate Democratic Committee, Jeff Smith, Treasurer
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240116_em_fr_b1_DH_NGP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240116_em_fr_b1_DH_NGP]
Hi, this is Sen. Dianne Hesselbein, and yesterday was my first session day as Leader for the WI Senate Dems!
I’ve been working for years in our state legislature to combat far-right extremism, support our public schools and protect our environment. I’m grateful to be able to continue that work alongside my Democratic colleagues in our state senate.
This year, on top of advocating for Wisconsinites, Senate Dems have a real chance to win the majority thanks to the WI Supreme Court’s fair maps ruling.
It’s an exciting time in our state, and we’re looking forward to elections with fair maps. Will you chip in any amount to help us win the majority this year? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240116_em_fr_b1_DH_NGP]
It’s not enough to wait until the last few weeks leading up to election season— we have to lay the groundwork now to come out on top in November.
And supporting the WI Senate Dems is the best way to directly support candidates who are committed to defending democracy and winning a pro-choice majority.
The stakes in WI are higher than ever with new maps, and a donation of as little as $10 can go really far. Can you help WI Senate Dems support candidates across our state this year with a grassroots contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240116_em_fr_b1_DH_NGP]
GIVE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240116_em_fr_b1_DH_NGP]
In solidarity,
Sen. Dianne Hesselbein
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240116_em_fr_b1_DH_NGP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240116_em_fr_b1_DH_NGP]
The Wisconsin State Senate Democratic Committee (SSDC) is working around the clock to elect more Democrats to the Wisconsin State Senate. And with a fair, impartial State Supreme Court coupled with the prospect of fair legislative lines, we’re ready to Win Wisconsin and take back our Democratic majority, finally giving a voice to Wisconsin voters who for so long haven’t had one in our legislature.
2024 is going to be a crucial election year. But we need your help if we’re going to take back our majority.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Wisconsin SSDC
P.O. Box 164
Madison, WI 53701
SUPPORT SENATE DEMS [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ssdc-email?refcode=20240116_em_fr_b1_DH_NGP]
Authorized and paid for by the State Senate Democratic Committee, Jeff Smith, Treasurer.
Wisconsin State Senate Democratic Committee
P.O. Box 164
Madison, WI 53701
United States

Moments ago, a Republican multi-millionaire announced her campaign to defeat Martin in New Mexico’s U.S. Senate race. **Martin’s new challenger is a longtime hedge fund executive who has already poured half a million dollars into her own campaign.** As the daughter of New Mexico’s last Republican Senator, she is all but certain to have GOP mega-donors lining up to support her bid. She already has the full backing of the National Republican Senatorial Committee. **While Martin’s opponent may have a personal fortune and the GOP establishment behind her, what we have is far more valuable: a grassroots movement that comes together to fight for our shared values time and time again.** **[That’s why we’re reaching out today: We need to raise as much as possible in these first 48 hours to prepare for the spending Republicans are about to pour into New Mexico. We can’t afford to lose Martin’s voice in the Senate. The issues that matter most to our movement are at stake, from preserving our public lands and waters to protecting critical benefits like Medicare and Social Security.
But this race is officially competitive, and we need to build up our grassroots resources immediately to win. Between Martin’s new opponent jumping in and Donald Trump planning to ramp up his campaign in New Mexico, it’s clear Republicans are making the Land of Enchantment a top target this year.
**[We have our work cut out for us in the months ahead. Please help us defend Martin’s seat in New Mexico from his new challenger by rushing in a grassroots contribution of $10 or any amount now>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77222649/449766777/-1374307457?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20240117_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzQ5ODAzNS00OWI1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-QfMYDmmREhw-MlRD8Q8UKBlt_FAFS6SPfsKBf9wPtU=)**
Thank you for helping keep Martin where he belongs — in the U.S. Senate fighting for a brighter future for New Mexico.
— Heinrich HQ

clean_body: Moments ago, a wealthy, well-connected Republican just announced her campaign to defeat Martin in New Mexico’s U.S. Senate race. Moments ago, a Republican multi-millionaire announced her campaign to defeat Martin in New Mexico’s U.S. Senate race. Martin’s new challenger is a longtime hedge fund executive who has already poured half a million dollars into her own campaign. As the daughter of New Mexico’s last Republican Senator, she is all but certain to have GOP mega-donors lining up to support her bid. She already has the full backing of the National Republican Senatorial Committee. While Martin’s opponent may have a personal fortune and the GOP establishment behind her, what we have is far more valuable: a grassroots movement that comes together to fight for our shared values time and time again. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = We can’t afford to lose Martin’s voice in the Senate. The issues that matter most to our movement are at stake, from preserving our public lands and waters to protecting critical benefits like Medicare and Social Security. But this race is officially competitive, and we need to build up our grassroots resources immediately to win. Between Martin’s new opponent jumping in and Donald Trump planning to ramp up his campaign in New Mexico, it’s clear Republicans are making the Land of Enchantment a top target this year. = Thank you for helping keep Martin where he belongs — in the U.S. Senate fighting for a brighter future for New Mexico. — Heinrich HQ | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. body:
| |
---
| | We wanted to make sure our top supporters had seen Dr. Reddy’s latest video. **[**You can watch it here or below!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/777441e0b512a02e3947229f28c3afba/b96625dd405e5651c3d6b838967d376c/43823)**

|

---
|
---
The message of this video is simple: Dr. Prasanth Reddy has never backed down from a challenge, and he’s not about to start now. **Dr. Reddy is a cancer physician, a military officer, and a legal immigrant who’s spent his life taking action, confronting challenges, and delivering results. ** More than any point in our lifetimes, that’s the approach we need in Congress. And that’s what we’ll get if we help Dr. Reddy flip this seat. **[So, watch the video and chip in a few dollars if you can to help us share it far and wide with Kansas’ 3rd District.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/777441e0b512a02e3947229f28c3afba/cdd183de466675fec3d6b838967d376c/43823)** -Team Reddy
---
[**WATCH THE VIDEO**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/777441e0b512a02e3947229f28c3afba/23e2fa16dee84fddc3d6b838967d376c/43823)
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/777441e0b512a02e3947229f28c3afba/1f322fde3fa37946c3d6b838967d376c/43823)
---
__**Keep reading for a personal note from Dr. Reddy:**__ I’m no politician. I’m a businessman, military officer, and physician. I’m taking action because extreme ideas have taken hold in Washington. And to save America, we must act now. It starts here, in Kansas’ 3rd District. This race could decide who controls the House, and my opponent has a $400,000 advantage, thanks to special interests and liberal donors. I don’t take asking for money lightly. name: Matt Gaetz
subject: The Biden Administration had no idea this happened.
body:
These failures are inexcusable...
| | [ ](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=be393d0eb2784533b189a2c0bb9d0ce2&_e=dIrfvXa_T4OgH2ppVqvIPlymQlcT9Hstw8t04m7FW2uyAy77Rc9NwNiw4cD2jBfNxDr-UzInNAcQi-Vs_l_VoExQ1JXz1-s1scswztKJt-WZwkAQAW1E-R2Qce8OkkjDuA0JFd4jtsTMrij71wRiHVP7cY0Ygz0IyJoPVG2owLfaeYzL90G2wqqLZSPztHhWy-A-_w-V1zS5Y41of5_dEn4b8mW-5MqXv_TrWp6l3uttYVKInZBrBErUYb9wRcsZdu1jVEqBKSc2IIA7EHYhuTGHLcU7qaDlxMsgA8xB6aU%3D)
---
Fellow American, Americans are being put in danger. Thanks to the Biden Regime and his Leftist allies, there are waves of illegal immigrants coming across the border with no end in sight. In December alone, over 300,000 strolled into America across the Southern Border. **I know because I went to the border to see for myself, and it was worse than anyone could have imagined. **
We have no idea who or what is coming into our country, which is a criminal or terrorist's dream. Nevertheless, while the Biden Admin is putting our national security at risk at our border, this happens: _The person Biden handpicked to oversee the Department of Defense and America 's security, Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin, has confessed that on New Year's Day, he was in an intensive care unit for FOUR days._ _The Biden Administration had NO IDEA._ _Biden nor his staff knew that the key figurehead in charge of our national defense was not available to perform his duties._ _And it gets even worse because the person who was supposed to back up the Secretary of Defense, Deputy Defense Secretary Kathleen Hicks, supposedly was in Puerto Rico "filling in" while on vacation._ Let that sink in... **For FOUR DAYS, America did not have its top two defense leaders in a position to actively take charge of keeping our country safe.** Not to mention, Biden, the man who is supposed to be our commander-in-chief, was oblivious to the entire matter. While I wish Secretary Austin good health, it is inexcusable that our country had no one behind the wheel to ensure that Americans, both foreign and abroad, were safe. How is it possible that so much dysfunction surrounds America's national defense? I hate to even imagine what would have happened if our enemies had known this or had been bold enough to take action during that time. All I can say is thank goodness nothing did happen. But this lays out just how seriously the Biden Administration and his lackeys are putting our nation at risk. **That 's why I am calling on the House Armed Services Committee to launch a hearing into Secretary Lloyd Austin and his deputy's failures to do their job.**
| [ ](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=be393d0eb2784533b189a2c0bb9d0ce2&_e=dIrfvXa_T4OgH2ppVqvIPlymQlcT9Hstw8t04m7FW2uyAy77Rc9NwNiw4cD2jBfNxDr-UzInNAcQi-Vs_l_VoExQ1JXz1-s1scswztKJt-WZwkAQAW1E-R2Qce8OkkjDuA0JFd4jtsTMrij71wRiHQS9tt3Od-cmma8Xe9OzHavahpIfK7L_pDUCigV49HFH6zkSKCtk3YY_WRYXhqioWEyI4HwnYOP-lhAmsGte_oqlyHOwhihFd_FnD1mVr5yGAh9jkzLeelhPysnBS4BGooFHM_w1Aegs6tTfuBOFKjU%3D)
---
The people deserve to know how this happened.
More importantly, we deserve to know why no one told the President and why the person who was supposed to take over was too busy on vacation to return to Washington to ensure America was safe. And we can't stop there. We need to make sure that something like this never happens again. **In this year's elections, we have the opportunity to do just that.** By putting REAL America First conservatives in seats to grow our majority to make sure that those in charge of our national defense are doing their job. But I can't do this on my own. I need your help. **[I need folks like you to stand with me so I can continue fighting on Capitol Hill to expose the blunders caused by Democrats and their handpicked allies](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=be393d0eb2784533b189a2c0bb9d0ce2&_e=dIrfvXa_T4OgH2ppVqvIPlymQlcT9Hstw8t04m7FW2uyAy77Rc9NwNiw4cD2jBfNxDr-UzInNAcQi-Vs_l_VoExQ1JXz1-s1scswztKJt-WZwkAQAW1E-R2Qce8OkkjDuA0JFd4jtsTMrij71wRiHfLvq4-l1aswEEteiWJ48BuycqEALPYGzv9Tclx5hZkwOoJXiQlVMflg5kbWC6vFOzLAkUfXdMKFrL9fpCR_g6whsF9ZewthVAwAe92-2QQbEmGw1oiQ5eghOUtq62MlYgOFVrte369gOhwO2q1HobI%3D).**
| [ **STAND WITH MATT GAETZ** ](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=be393d0eb2784533b189a2c0bb9d0ce2&_e=dIrfvXa_T4OgH2ppVqvIPlymQlcT9Hstw8t04m7FW2uyAy77Rc9NwNiw4cD2jBfNxDr-UzInNAcQi-Vs_l_VoExQ1JXz1-s1scswztKJt-WZwkAQAW1E-R2Qce8OkkjDuA0JFd4jtsTMrij71wRiHV2J1V8mpRx38b0xR4sLD7GNsY1WAfAYGzEWQz115YuKNvv3muSiA9K8nlxCfHiDE-9CrCAm0iRCyp9HrS4O9tW6ZR-qwiYHjZbm_kYrscc0dRuXyFI8bMMV3UU5bfZuZJOhj657TnbSlBBOqHqr85M%3D)
---
Fellow American, I have shown that I am willing to expose the truth about what's going on in the Swamp.
**And I can do that because I am the only Republican in the entire United States Congress who takes NO Lobbyist money and NO PAC money.**
**My allegiance is to no one but YOU, the people.**
That's why the Deep State and their allies in the media ruthlessly attack and despise me the most. They hate that I have the freedom to do what's right.
But since I don't take the dirty money from the Swamp, I can only fight to put America First and defend my good name from their vicious attacks by relying on the generosity of folks like you.
**[Can I count on you to come through once again](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=be393d0eb2784533b189a2c0bb9d0ce2&_e=dIrfvXa_T4OgH2ppVqvIPlymQlcT9Hstw8t04m7FW2uyAy77Rc9NwNiw4cD2jBfNxDr-UzInNAcQi-Vs_l_VoExQ1JXz1-s1scswztKJt-WZwkAQAW1E-R2Qce8OkkjDuA0JFd4jtsTMrij71wRiHXyFMoym13YpJaNR8ZSgeuFz8M58OXP6NuPy25SKiuDiBMCuEK5yMK4Hm2kmpTgpTJ_6jmQ9UpvpGIN3iVMy6bYM6yeWmJ9ajjDiOvO8ZVOOZW143wMp_Nm6BFWGdCQNPMfBaHBtuLrayaUhIzTxmhw%3D)?**
With 2024 being a critical election year, I must be able to fend off the wave of smear campaigns being launched against me. Every dollar counts so if you can afford to give today, please do so as soon as you can.
**Let 's show the Swamp Dwellers that the American people make this country great, not its leaders who refuse to listen and fail to do their job.** _Thanks for standing strong,_
Matt Gaetz
| [ ](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=be393d0eb2784533b189a2c0bb9d0ce2&_e=dIrfvXa_T4OgH2ppVqvIPlymQlcT9Hstw8t04m7FW2uyAy77Rc9NwNiw4cD2jBfNxDr-UzInNAcQi-Vs_l_VoExQ1JXz1-s1scswztKJt-WZwkAQAW1E-R2Qce8OkkjDuA0JFd4jtsTMrij71wRiHbDLSpBq_wcpZCOu4ScqINxgHzq8q_ybmhgqTPUc2my62OPFKgUrotEGd86wojaxZqfQhsYm-1hag1spyeTS0LJe0T1vCztcWi4S9pdSm8W5Sd1ZXfM42Nq7QqMj7Q0Mcrb4EyRU0r_yDdnFTPig1FA%3D)
