name: Jerrad Christian
subject: Sherrod Brown leads strong action on rural childcare
body:
GOP Rep. Balderson is predictably absent...
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gpYapFYWqajso50x6sB5he95_pvnw1rFSiRiujw5Lvf0Mx96IdHl2am8Xii5lFjGIh9RjQBhUK7FMU1uD7FIKPsFIc89PVPa8eOsfbBixcbU2c6eFFBLMMfWWvKis5FqXGjIKnZbdXE6RMTsM0xy8xYHu1k00cfs8cVQWLd8bF4-X3w901XAxKZ2WQWLzCa1lrcF14yKyClQUSc1bTEvVQ==&c=gAojA6vxFvpOYmtHjZi81T39FWn26rdA9-3ulPH4J5qsUpdU5GjbQg==&ch=f0ZEMkj9kNobgz_fputUV2EVpQF0vdDEqefJeSPumA9R4JzAJtWXaA==)
---

Friend,
Let's cut to the chase. In Ohio's 12th District, the lack of accessible child care is a crisis that can't be ignored any longer.
Especially in our rural communities, parents are struggling. Quality child care? For too many, it's a pipe dream. And it's our kids that suffer, as usual. The fact is that three-quarters of farming families have trouble finding child care because of cost, distance, or scheduling incompatibility.
Enter the Expanding Childcare in Rural America Act, championed by Ohio's own Senator Sherrod Brown and Kansas Republican Senator Roger Marshall: This isn't about left or right; it's about right and wrong. This bill promises real change, offering a lifeline for child care in areas that have been overlooked for too long.
While bipartisan leaders, including some of the most conservative voices from the midwest have joined with Senator Brown to try and deliver for working families, wouldn't you know it that my opponent, MAGA culture warrior Troy Balderson, is not on the bill.
As the child of a single mom who worked, and as a parent myself, I know that safe, quality, affordable childcare means everything. It can be the difference between poverty and middle class security.
I'm throwing my full support behind this bill because our families can't wait for action. We need solutions, not more excuses.
That's where you come in. I need you to help me show Troy Balderson what real leadership looks like. [Your donation fuels the work my team is doing right now to build a future where every family has access to the child care they deserve.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gpYapFYWqajso50x6sB5he95_pvnw1rFSiRiujw5Lvf0Mx96IdHl2am8Xii5lFjGIh9RjQBhUK7FMU1uD7FIKPsFIc89PVPa8eOsfbBixcbU2c6eFFBLMMfWWvKis5FqXGjIKnZbdXE6RMTsM0xy8xYHu1k00cfs8cVQWLd8bF4-X3w901XAxKZ2WQWLzCa1lrcF14yKyClQUSc1bTEvVQ==&c=gAojA6vxFvpOYmtHjZi81T39FWn26rdA9-3ulPH4J5qsUpdU5GjbQg==&ch=f0ZEMkj9kNobgz_fputUV2EVpQF0vdDEqefJeSPumA9R4JzAJtWXaA==)

clean_body: GOP Rep. Balderson is predictably absent... | | | | == Friend, Let's cut to the chase. In Ohio's 12th District, the lack of accessible child care is a crisis that can't be ignored any longer. Especially in our rural communities, parents are struggling. Quality child care? For too many, it's a pipe dream. And it's our kids that suffer, as usual. The fact is that three-quarters of farming families have trouble finding child care because of cost, distance, or scheduling incompatibility. Enter the Expanding Childcare in Rural America Act, championed by Ohio's own Senator Sherrod Brown and Kansas Republican Senator Roger Marshall: This isn't about left or right; it's about right and wrong. This bill promises real change, offering a lifeline for child care in areas that have been overlooked for too long. While bipartisan leaders, including some of the most conservative voices from the midwest have joined with Senator Brown to try and deliver for working families, wouldn't you know it that my opponent, MAGA culture warrior Troy Balderson, is not on the bill. As the child of a single mom who worked, and as a parent myself, I know that safe, quality, affordable childcare means everything. It can be the difference between poverty and middle class security. I'm throwing my full support behind this bill because our families can't wait for action. We need solutions, not more excuses. That's where you come in. I need you to help me show Troy Balderson what real leadership looks like. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | Donate == | Thank you for standing up for families and for a better future. -Jerrad Christian | | | == | Jerrad Christian Candidate for Congress (OH-12) | | | | == | | | Mail checks to: Citizens for J Christian P.O. box 315 Galena, OH 43021 | | | | | | | | | | Citizens for J Christian | P.O. box 315, Galena, OH 43021 | Sent by mailto:jerrad@christianforohio.com powered by

subject: America needs this Green Beret

Fellow American,
Serving as a Black Hawk Helicopter pilot in the Middle East, I met soldiers from every corner of our armed forces. _Let me tell you: few Americans will ever push themselves to the limit for our country like our Green Berets. _ Green Berets represent the best of the best of America, and that’s why I’m supporting **Green Beret veteran Pat Harrigan for Congress.** Before I get into why I’m so passionate about sending Pat to Washington, **[**can you pitch in now and help this Green Beret continue his mission to keep America safe?**](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=8ff6678704f6488e8cdc1a72992a8691&_e=Jxelk0IE2IfkIZqUMsk9qdqkE-3SHVpp65mMpA857jou8MykzYGCE2moEX-76Y-64tOI5FjrVXWveeXZkxto6rPwudc95Kc00oNgX-MIU5avmf0ZyFjafXszZwTDPbZh4seaisyKrToKaBW1V67YGwg37h1Tk1e8bR-Bt8W1o3LrUMw7mxMFnu1xOh1JKmud5Gs5v7IbmBJXn2ds_GWn9vzu6do8EmtTUQw2px7uASBooW00nbsiRbn2XQaY1vUERs5ZS8SgL2dhBQq1rCzXefYztY3LiSm5Cuw88TxFwRMd0mhQM8KakbZQ06hETWVQbahm0cdLmDaH511e53p5v6I5fKcpKiQJhfAR9RSyfkfvurrNKN_0R6ELc541hxABhAI8GWyNSagEmCLYloSOxQ%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=8ff6678704f6488e8cdc1a72992a8691&_e=Jxelk0IE2IfkIZqUMsk9qdqkE-3SHVpp65mMpA857jou8MykzYGCE2moEX-76Y-64tOI5FjrVXWveeXZkxto6rPwudc95Kc00oNgX-MIU5avmf0ZyFjafXszZwTDPbZh4seaisyKrToKaBW1V67YGwg37h1Tk1e8bR-Bt8W1o3LrUMw7mxMFnu1xOh1JKmud5Gs5v7IbmBJXn2ds_GWn9vzu6do8EmtTUQw2px7uASD3dblTP1XRWWfTt1Ou6gz8QoZ6xZBi2w5fhpm_X5n7myHQxR357HuEwThBWNNUIndOe085kKfCnqRxwb1Fb7Wfyc3p0tJtEecIJFaFhBHm5K7puR9u5YYjSnq_7A-xZFLoSfQ8OmvyqYeHM4wXfDArWaIxPsZde1RcAqInrvohTQ%3D%3D)

[**PITCH IN NOW **](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=8ff6678704f6488e8cdc1a72992a8691&_e=Jxelk0IE2IfkIZqUMsk9qdqkE-3SHVpp65mMpA857jou8MykzYGCE2moEX-76Y-64tOI5FjrVXWveeXZkxto6rPwudc95Kc00oNgX-MIU5avmf0ZyFjafXszZwTDPbZh4seaisyKrToKaBW1V67YGwg37h1Tk1e8bR-Bt8W1o3LrUMw7mxMFnu1xOh1JKmud5Gs5v7IbmBJXn2ds_GWn9vzu6do8EmtTUQw2px7uASBHDTwwfjBJcJv5aMMFLaUW6Z5idPuBBmXDEvitbAsMvj9xZQyBpAyw49e-Hqkk3OFdh5DUkHg0lKsWAo60VoJeNcXi5Eu8_v1WNUAQIXOCrXcwlTUQCJHP9v-D8q3DAlv3-2SQynTNIiavu9XjGjTJD69V5lTpw2BsVOGHtauVCw%3D%3D)
---
Pat has never backed down from a fight, Fellow American. Just like he took down terrorists in hand to hand combat in some of the most dangerous war zones in the world, he’s ready to take down ANY socialist who comes after your God-given freedoms. And while Democrats are taking away our jobs and sending them overseas, Pat and his wife built a firearms business that employs hundreds of workers just as dedicated to freedom as he is. As a husband, a father, and an unapologetic conservative, he brings the same passion he brought to fighting as a Green Beret to defending his children’s futures. **[If we’re going to get our country back on track from the disastrous Biden Administration, we need fighters like Pat on our team. Pitch in NOW and help send this hero to Congress to WIN against the radical Left!](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=8ff6678704f6488e8cdc1a72992a8691&_e=Jxelk0IE2IfkIZqUMsk9qdqkE-3SHVpp65mMpA857jou8MykzYGCE2moEX-76Y-64tOI5FjrVXWveeXZkxto6rPwudc95Kc00oNgX-MIU5avmf0ZyFjafXszZwTDPbZh4seaisyKrToKaBW1V67YGwg37h1Tk1e8bR-Bt8W1o3LrUMw7mxMFnu1xOh1JKmud5Gs5v7IbmBJXn2ds_GWn9vzu6do8EmtTUQw2px7uASB22ftv_ulaACKys2TKjxZT54KjxbLlIpiA-hOwPzuQBKqNfPSgTYjEYkZwsrgUAqTpuEP7hl84Qy_Ty_xGxEWHMp1xjvwLUle0pQl-AVWN48t7fOpozTOTjCf4VFDZWtJ5_gDH-hmhfdwQhfvDUoemoC9jKs8eOUM31nmKtpY7YQ%3D%3D)**

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Bob Casey
subject: I'm writing to ask if you can make a donation to our campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hello,

I’m writing to ask if you will make a donation to our campaign. I hope you will give me a minute to explain why this request is important — **[but if you are ready to do your part right now, you can split a donation between my campaign and the DSCC at this link to defend our Senate majority.](https://go.dscc.org/go/17105?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240117-BobCasey-CaseyTandem2024-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240117-BobCasey-CaseyTandem2024-Pros-sl1&akid=13239%2E9716520%2E1CBxfA)**

The truth is, defending this Senate seat isn’t only about ensuring we can keep fighting for Pennsylvania families in Washington, as important as that is.

This is also the race that could decide if Democrats hold our Senate majority. We know that, and Mitch McConnell knows it, too.

It is hard to overstate the stakes: Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, women’s rights, LGBTQIA+ equality, the right to vote, and more are on the line if Republicans flip the Senate.

We need to be able to fight back against the millions that McConnell and the GOP are going to spend here, which will hinge on our ability to show the strength of this campaign.

**[Can I count on you to split $5 or more between our re-election campaign and the DSCC today? I need your help to build a winning campaign and defend our Senate majority.](https://go.dscc.org/go/17105?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240117-BobCasey-CaseyTandem2024-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240117-BobCasey-CaseyTandem2024-Pros-sl1&akid=13239%2E9716520%2E1CBxfA)**

| | [Donate Now >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/17105?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240117-BobCasey-CaseyTandem2024-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240117-BobCasey-CaseyTandem2024-Pros-sl1&akid=13239%2E9716520%2E1CBxfA)
---

Please, chip in whatever you can right now.

Thank you for your support,

Bob Casey
U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/17105?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240117-BobCasey-CaseyTandem2024-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240117-BobCasey-CaseyTandem2024-Pros-sl1&akid=13239%2E9716520%2E1CBxfA)

Bob Casey is running for re-election in Pennsylvania to take on powerful special interests and deliver real results for working families and communities.

**[Chip in now to help keep Pennsylvania's seat blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/17105?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240117-BobCasey-CaseyTandem2024-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240117-BobCasey-CaseyTandem2024-Pros-sl1&akid=13239%2E9716520%2E1CBxfA)**

| | [Donate](https://go.dscc.org/go/17105?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240117-BobCasey-CaseyTandem2024-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240117-BobCasey-CaseyTandem2024-Pros-sl1&akid=13239%2E9716520%2E1CBxfA)

The upcoming special elections over the next two months will make-or-break our state Democratic majorities, and we risk jeopardizing our hard-earned progress if extreme Republicans take back control. | | |

| |

[](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zWnFe1s15WAirB8DBvFeFhEPqmUwzkqS0qWgD64bsMBwMScbwnBg9o2YsZj-ry6_KQK0pgI2eClkhn_GkZK3F_PZE-zGydlivBcT92Rcmc16XDo3hiQ0RjKAHLwEuJ-65lU1ZabJe4x-otCvxm7n8uTfRM2d1frBNFS4JCVIpPuuArbEq95_w8QIv_i6b_F1QXbXgmBk81xoleVNYdtaoH_psnwnMFIZX6EDPq0ECrv6sLnVeZ1llNqfc7n2VZQS5pcSvyHeAjdVx14a1XrnteehDyfaMMKRsyIEFVLDKrNlbtQzaggA3eaWygFl8nMY0lCRgj9VOnaQlMJNmAQN-14VuRoeNXgqknwdMf6qXuUxMHnODMiURcIQQwV-cm0nE/432/ZD8RWQkJRSCdT5mQqwAuKA/h0/9mkmjbRXN9GIseYnaTyqDRLXJ-4fXiLkZL1_yFRMZTU) Hey, I’m going to cut right to the chase, but it’s important that you read every word in the email. **We're entering a critical period for state legislatures in Pennsylvania and across the country, and we need you to step up for the first time to support our Democratic candidates.** [Before I ask you to make a donation, let me explain how high the stakes are:](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zWnFe1s15WAirB8DBvFeFhEPqmUwzkqS0qWgD64bsMBwMScbwnBg9o2YsZj-ry6_KQK0pgI2eClkhn_GkZK3F_PZE-zGydlivBcT92Rcmc16XDo3hiQ0RjKAHLwEuJ-65lU1ZabJe4x-otCvxm7n8u4AEGfv7gYuZYmSSD6eEqbEOD7tZJa0fFZoCG5nlJWH-fi4uVXiFqx6jzMJCWUVJRK4PLebW_eaWJX-cO5F0IlO-4hGVI48tZtlxy2eVtChLLP14KfrVLUBRyfad2YKySbwh_rd6hGJBFnU5QpaMZEO0uL7nVLWs-Aat6GpgB-jgt7bikoz3YMVIPpVsffL4X5eX8OqagnGCftRSMJFVR7R2qqcBmPtK38FR4DyNZrFo/432/ZD8RWQkJRSCdT5mQqwAuKA/h1/AJZUPVQpR-3BY1MMQLtMpk1ongGc6zAFz0kpojbyzDk) The upcoming special elections over the next two months will _make-or-break_ our state Democratic majorities, and we risk jeopardizing our hard-earned progress if extreme Republicans take back control. And after last year’s losses, the GOP is itching to make a comeback. Back in 2022, we shattered the GOP's stronghold on our state legislature by flipping the state House **thanks to supporters like you.** Then, throughout 2023, **your support** helped defend our Democratic majority in _five_ critical special elections. **Now, I’m reaching out on behalf of the DLCC to ask you to help Democrats continue our winning streak as we head into one of the toughest election seasons I’ve seen.** [Rush a $7 donation today →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zWnFe1s15WAirB8DBvFeFhEPqmUwzkqS0qWgD64bsMBwMScbwnBg9o2YsZj-ry6_KQK0pgI2eClkhn_GkZK3F_PZE-zGydlivBcT92Rcmc16XDo3hiQ0RjKAHLwEuJ-65lU1ZabJe4x-otCvxm7n8u4AEGfv7gYuZYmSSD6eEqbH0syxK23bxDCOJTwjFWnpCjd04Jia1wx0pNkBz44qydXC8b3hi9SGFR2YjRTtSu8wiT_xvMlB00KbgILB9fayrFtUcNTS6xxSJ_LV18cgEVV2OwJ_DrMPlymvT9boIRFG3sl2Z6U0QbjbhiFPBDX8ib6qIryBFkweAIBOYitM4bgI5UOSDCRnVhwAPN3lJvGhhWsp137o2S0T7yF_3XXV8/432/ZD8RWQkJRSCdT5mQqwAuKA/h2/cF4XrXQ0jCTTPwtbrx5FKcKPn8nipITlQlrOFaI5PYk) Time and again, when Democrats come together, we’ve shown that we have the power to halt the GOP's extreme agenda. We've proven that we can defend our Democratic majorities, safeguard our fundamental rights, and secure victories in battleground states across the nation. But this only happens when we have the resources to fight back. **Heading into 2024, Republicans have made their agenda clear: they’ll continue opposing gun safety measures, access to abortion, and any progressive legislation that benefits working families in Pennsylvania. It’s up to everyone on this grassroots team to ensure the GOP doesn’t gain _any more_ power.** [Losing any special election could hand extreme Republicans more power. This is more than just policy disagreements; it's about protecting our fundamental freedoms that are now at _serious risk._ So, can you chip in $7? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zWnFe1s15WAirB8DBvFeFhEPqmUwzkqS0qWgD64bsMBwMScbwnBg9o2YsZj-ry6_KQK0pgI2eClkhn_GkZK3F_PZE-zGydlivBcT92Rcmc16XDo3hiQ0RjKAHLwEuJ-65lU1ZabJe4x-otCvxm7n8u4AEGfv7gYuZYmSSD6eEqbI8id6R001aZCEKZxO8RzNKXLTmqKnVbbQiaRdOGjUUrlO_b6whyIRlu2AbeA5dIv_OLoM7DXnerDhAoIP6mj-Tvts5mCm5elwGX_4L5V812rQRlyGYScpiepaFz0y3rufQtK5Dlkj4pn8v7LUkzwiR2Sg9kVNez7Bgqjuc7wpNw8s3UEibXNGL63wQTaTApbaq1SLlEmqIB65nvjt9TeUY/432/ZD8RWQkJRSCdT5mQqwAuKA/h3/1w6YDts1DZd50t3xCEe2AL32YezbsO-_5d-NyMeBo1c) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: The upcoming special elections over the next two months will make-or-break our state Democratic majorities, and we risk jeopardizing our hard-earned progress if extreme Republicans take back control. | | | | | ---|--- Hey, I’m going to cut right to the chase, but it’s important that you read every word in the email. We're entering a critical period for state legislatures in Pennsylvania and across the country, and we need you to step up for the first time to support our Democratic candidates. The upcoming special elections over the next two months will make-or-break our state Democratic majorities, and we risk jeopardizing our hard-earned progress if extreme Republicans take back control. And after last year’s losses, the GOP is itching to make a comeback. Back in 2022, we shattered the GOP's stronghold on our state legislature by flipping the state House thanks to supporters like you. Then, throughout 2023, your support helped defend our Democratic majority in five critical special elections. Now, I’m reaching out on behalf of the DLCC to ask you to help Democrats continue our winning streak as we head into one of the toughest election seasons I’ve seen. Time and again, when Democrats come together, we’ve shown that we have the power to halt the GOP's extreme agenda. We've proven that we can defend our Democratic majorities, safeguard our fundamental rights, and secure victories in battleground states across the nation. But this only happens when we have the resources to fight back. Heading into 2024, Republicans have made their agenda clear: they’ll continue opposing gun safety measures, access to abortion, and any progressive legislation that benefits working families in Pennsylvania. It’s up to everyone on this grassroots team to ensure the GOP doesn’t gain any more power. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Your donation today could be the difference between victory and defeat. Let's continue our winning streak and show the power of this grassroots movement. Together, we can continue to make history. I'm counting on you. Let me explain why this is urgent:

In 2024, we have the opportunity to restore sanity and order to the People’s House. The special election in New York's Third Congressional District (NY-03) will be on February 13 and **all eyes will be on us.**

Tom puts People Over Politics to get big things done for the people he represents. Tom works with both sides of the aisle to deliver common sense solutions for Long Island and Queens. That's who he is.

While extreme Republicans bring nothing but crisis, chaos and confusion to Congress, Tom will bring integrity, commitment and experience back to NY-03. It’s imperative that we help Tom win. We can’t do that without your help, Peter.

**Our path to victory in 2024 includes retaking New York's Third Congressional District. I know this is the team to help us defeat the odds and bring Tom Suozzi back to Congress.**

clean_body: It’s Dems first test for the 2024 cycle. | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | Let me explain why this is urgent: In 2024, we have the opportunity to restore sanity and order to the People’s House. The special election in New York's Third Congressional District (NY-03) will be on February 13 and all eyes will be on us. Tom puts People Over Politics to get big things done for the people he represents. Tom works with both sides of the aisle to deliver common sense solutions for Long Island and Queens. That's who he is. While extreme Republicans bring nothing but crisis, chaos and confusion to Congress, Tom will bring integrity, commitment and experience back to NY-03. It’s imperative that we help Tom win. We can’t do that without your help, Peter. Our path to victory in 2024 includes retaking New York's Third Congressional District. I know this is the team to help us defeat the odds and bring Tom Suozzi back to Congress. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Tom Suozzi and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Right now, Team Extreme is gearing up to flood the airwaves with attacks. That’s why I’m counting on your support to make sure Tom can fight back and retake NY-03. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. subject: I'm in absolute disbelief
body:
| | | [](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=50386e9b8ce748feb72faaeb50335742&_e=M_WFRfnB8Z0aIDOstbQvXVJP1BVAIJ2ScgGBx9SuzWRKHpVVt2UqU5g2-XQ5LEHuK__lmJLzwGPNPurjFSFuMWmpou5yKqy2imrCwVMZ0h9-SPRsaI4eR9JIXpc2rO2QjSmH4uEgLWPr4W4fxNVJF4iSTpfLheHGmVc_lCoI8TkPKVPYEuGdhcfTL7r2sTZyLgbvyHaPLrfcAiwvk_h5Nglee9ehM8iHbVakCm-o0r1rW59AmAqH4IZ46UO14cqXWKj46H3EV8qIdSNw85Rh7udo5hNOpfEsvCp_15mhVMyNMOJAMgFO73VGDbIBYZHO5hnAUG-MZilmSziv69Pbknt6CsEH6JW3Kcer3Zako_pOOy9NdgvwW6KwZVdfvZIOqJZFZdX5dEcwuDKZUv9Kww%3D%3D)

**_It’s absolutely reprehensible._**

**After Colorado and Maine ILLEGALLY took President Trump off of the ballot, now Pennsylvania is working to BAN a Republican Rep. from appearing on their ballot box.**

**The Left isn’t stopping at President Trump. They won’t rest until every single Republican is BANNED from the ballot.**

The Democrats are now judge, jury, and electorate. They’re silencing the American people every way they know how.

**This is an EMERGENCY, and our Democracy is in jeopardy.**

**[**Pitch in now to make sure President Trump and his allies STAY on the ballot!**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=50386e9b8ce748feb72faaeb50335742&_e=M_WFRfnB8Z0aIDOstbQvXVJP1BVAIJ2ScgGBx9SuzWRKHpVVt2UqU5g2-XQ5LEHuK__lmJLzwGPNPurjFSFuMWmpou5yKqy2imrCwVMZ0h9-SPRsaI4eR9JIXpc2rO2QjSmH4uEgLWPr4W4fxNVJF4iSTpfLheHGmVc_lCoI8TkPKVPYEuGdhcfTL7r2sTZyLgbvyHaPLrfcAiwvk_h5Nglee9ehM8iHbVakCm-o0r2HJa5EqDuYPv9CG2awA53EbvbIGUSJATlwxYkl_CGiQSu7zAe8QS9Pcd37JlrIpkrpdiP9THhjFbzQQzToRwGGk-n0b3HVtdVHTC25s8R9gFVfAJXV8hNLZiVOIX17dVaSKRsu2Tbu6Ph93KtBEMcmuCVWdJgWNvRIWgjn6yN4Gw%3D%3D)**[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=50386e9b8ce748feb72faaeb50335742&_e=M_WFRfnB8Z0aIDOstbQvXVJP1BVAIJ2ScgGBx9SuzWRKHpVVt2UqU5g2-XQ5LEHuK__lmJLzwGPNPurjFSFuMWmpou5yKqy2imrCwVMZ0h9-SPRsaI4eR9JIXpc2rO2QjSmH4uEgLWPr4W4fxNVJF4iSTpfLheHGmVc_lCoI8TkPKVPYEuGdhcfTL7r2sTZyLgbvyHaPLrfcAiwvk_h5Nglee9ehM8iHbVakCm-o0r37Ih2K5g2CDXZ6I3CaJMjKcs3zWL--wNQRqkwE4JqQJdgfOmkSdx_VYrn1aoJ50ICnNDGqMSNNjoAjCPTjX9etwcpIvvfXMC4Juj4Waamu6uGISv-PImnQIfgrEKEGHQsO2ujBqGoGRzc23vdHpKVt4IhMJq7EZnX8YqP8ipsqMQ%3D%3D)

[**SUPPORT PRESIDENT TRUMP**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=50386e9b8ce748feb72faaeb50335742&_e=M_WFRfnB8Z0aIDOstbQvXVJP1BVAIJ2ScgGBx9SuzWRKHpVVt2UqU5g2-XQ5LEHuK__lmJLzwGPNPurjFSFuMWmpou5yKqy2imrCwVMZ0h9-SPRsaI4eR9JIXpc2rO2QjSmH4uEgLWPr4W4fxNVJF4iSTpfLheHGmVc_lCoI8TkPKVPYEuGdhcfTL7r2sTZyLgbvyHaPLrfcAiwvk_h5Nglee9ehM8iHbVakCm-o0r3WJ-XYYeiA51dcHB7HlRVwnmtee8ScU2-U_0SZQhFjiHeuElKdAQEfRcmzCZMA0CanoOYD0oWEvlh6rRHZHeXUxfj9ykWrP5PbkzujpHbXh3JOEAbbEb2S4LWEuBGId8ACihL-wUGFdRsWGmbgPFkmX1kGDJhmuOqhntMi2Lz8Lw%3D%3D)

**As an unapologetic supporter of President Trump, I could be kept off of the ballot next.**

After I served my country as a Green Beret after I created hundreds of jobs in Florida as a business owner - none of it matters.

**Democrats don’t care about integrity, honesty, or fairness. All they care about is power, and they’re turning America into a dictatorship to hold onto it.**

EVERYTHING I fought for as a Green Beret. EVERY freedom you hold dear to your heart. It is ALL at risk.

name: Team Cruz
subject: Team Cruz Grassroots Newsletter >> January 17, 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
**IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ...** **[Sen. Ted Cruz Endorses Trump After ‘Dominating Victory’ In Iowa: ‘This Race Is Over’:](http://trk.tedcruz.)** "Sen. Ted Cruz (R-Texas) threw his support behind Donald Trump on Tuesday, endorsing the former president’s 2024 White House run and declaring the Republican primary race “over.” The Texas Republican’s endorsement comes after Trump’s landslide victory in the Iowa Caucus Monday, in which the 77-year-old received 51% of the vote and won 98 of the Hawkeye State’s 99 counties. “I believe this race is over, so I am proud to endorse Donald Trump for president of the United States,” Cruz told Fox News host Sean Hannity..." **[Cruz, Cuellar Celebrate Passage Of Construction Project Permit Reform For Border Bridges:](http://trk.tedcruz.)** "U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz and U.S. Rep. Henry Cuellar on Thursday celebrated the passage of their proposal to reform the presidential process for new and expanded border bridges at Laredo, Eagle Pass and Brownsville. The celebration was held during a press conference at the World Trade Bridge in Laredo, one of the ports of entry slated for expansion. A proposal would add 10 lanes to the bridge, bringing the total to 18, enabling more trade with Mexico. “Bridges serve as economic lifelines for our border communities..." **[EXCLUSIVE: Cruz Demands Answers From Mayorkas Over Closure of Since-Reopened Railroad Crossings:](http://trk.tedcruz.) **"Following a letter to Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas from Sen. Ted Cruz, Customs and Border Protection announced Friday that two railroad crossings in Texas border communities are reopening after temporarily being closed to allow personnel to help process illegal aliens. “Beginning December 22, 2023 at 2:00 p.m. Eastern, CBP’s Office of Field Operations will resume operations at the international railway crossing bridges in Eagle Pass and El Paso, Texas,” CBP announced Friday. The announcement..." **[After Teachers’ Union 'Teach-In' Celebrates Hamas Terrorism, Sen. Cruz Slams 'Blatant Anti-Israel Indoctrination':](http://trk.tedcruz.)** "U.S. Sens. Ted Cruz (R-Texas) sent a letter to U.S. Secretary of Education Miguel Cardona and State Superintendent of Public Instruction of California Tony Thurmond expressing deep concern following a “teach-in” conducted on December 6, 2023 by an activist faction within the Oakland Education Association Teachers’ Union. At least seventy K-12 public school teachers employed by the Oakland School District participated in this unauthorized effort to disseminate “educational resources on Palestine” that..." **[Cruz: ‘It’s Not That Mayorkas Is Bad at His Job — It’s That He Is Openly Defying Federal Law’:](http://trk.tedcruz.)** "On Wednesday on FNC’s “The Story,” Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) rejected any suggestion that President Joe Biden should be the target of impeachment and not Secretary of Homeland Security Alejandro Mayorkas for failing to secure the southern U.S. border. The Texas Republican laid out the consequences of the Biden administration’s failures at the border to bolster his case. “Look, I think the House is doing exactly the right thing,” he said. “I think Alejandro Mayorkas should be impeached. I think he should have been impeached two years ago..."

| | Fellow American, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=d47cafb712814c0591a9cfb4fc4b5700&_e=ZWQ2KLS7FwDrLCkII5ivcLCebABU227cqZ8oNES8q5Bf5bm8Ia8NXySG3bT-R5vkuPSTvr_ysqWmbc-C7pzm79m0bpVz_9hkpJ6Q23xsKTbOBfJlY-x-dMFgGg0aQM_-fni0d2vpCHIacSGbEkxH-hwMSxUVvv0pvEG94Qn3wpw7J3BygY-UEK2kJ7q3XDlNji7sy_Itn4vWUFRyfvfMh_9VXPrgwVydkTwuncGAPnyHnPEtZtNzQzhbUjt2fdDyhqRe9vdVa2OqTZyoZvX3vO3Wt0TyoXbWPTSbRPLssBUaoePTnAT4JwnWRTHeTW-qKNtkcKPCgygntqOH4bEQ3mD6U3b7ZgO-1RTFHXkY7PMnw09Lp7xtEEyqeZpKfX9MJQxQUAuuyCKnPFkXKKAYEQ%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=d47cafb712814c0591a9cfb4fc4b5700&_e=ZWQ2KLS7FwDrLCkII5ivcLCebABU227cqZ8oNES8q5Bf5bm8Ia8NXySG3bT-R5vkuPSTvr_ysqWmbc-C7pzm79m0bpVz_9hkpJ6Q23xsKTbOBfJlY-x-dMFgGg0aQM_-fni0d2vpCHIacSGbEkxH-hwMSxUVvv0pvEG94Qn3wpw7J3BygY-UEK2kJ7q3XDlNji7sy_Itn4vWUFRyfvfMh_9VXPrgwVydkTwuncGAPnz55QmijPe6Q_tuXkZXeu-NG_14TuomwyLTxMf9rARPeauwQafLcP1_GxWmkSQmvXklaygY0ZgpXsQbIThI07fbaDnUZeOAmTq2DYXZzELghcdsesoXn02abe5VNf4xjBqgUBMcaILfJZMQabv0AXLcpSnI6WaIZAOWCQ2BWj7utA%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=d47cafb712814c0591a9cfb4fc4b5700&_e=ZWQ2KLS7FwDrLCkII5ivcLCebABU227cqZ8oNES8q5Bf5bm8Ia8NXySG3bT-R5vkuPSTvr_ysqWmbc-C7pzm79m0bpVz_9hkpJ6Q23xsKTbOBfJlY-x-dMFgGg0aQM_-fni0d2vpCHIacSGbEkxH-hwMSxUVvv0pvEG94Qn3wpw7J3BygY-UEK2kJ7q3XDlNji7sy_Itn4vWUFRyfvfMh_9VXPrgwVydkTwuncGAPnxtOUn7Jw7BsvV6lqu3p-6_lRHdyLnnFJG2A6QI9Lr9tMHKk5hAKCER_HjvuzWuZL8adh_Q6_k25oKtax0ji3yVVQIgFL60RphminFf45PAvDsKCeVi7EFNT518EVRHjICUEFW3x3rxLfhvFl9ubqbUHanSAAnqaYeZtELw6RdMhQ%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. clean_body: | | | | | | Fellow American, That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of: • Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction. If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, Winning this election requires a one-two punch: 1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day. In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again. | | With deepest appreciation, Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | | | | | MY VISION My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=83f2a907299529fca554fd38a88b76928469f6288355439561a4a1f4382254a634df0e01cd44e9e7e5d3e4c89b17486889b3d5d845a0f6b661a6536bcb9dc37b

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=83f2a907299529fca554fd38a88b76928469f6288355439561a4a1f4382254a634df0e01cd44e9e7e5d3e4c89b17486889b3d5d845a0f6b661a6536bcb9dc37b

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contribution rules

body:
We must begin organizing and mobilizing to defeat Trump.
It's official, Peter:
**Donald Trump won the 2024 Iowa Caucuses, defeating every other Republican candidate by more than 30 points. **
Let me be clear: Donald Trump is a threat not only to our fundamental rights and freedoms, but also to _democracy itself_.
When Trump was elected in 2016, I told the _Austin Chronicle_ , “I won’t call for healing. I’m calling for resistance.” And today, I’m calling for the exact same thing—can you join me?

Peter, Donald Trump has already promised to be a dictator on “day one.”
If he’s elected again, he’ll do everything he can to see fundamental freedoms like abortion rights disappear completely. Big corporations will get tax breaks, while workers and unions will come under attack. He’ll use every lever of power to attack immigrants and border communities. And violence like we saw on January 6th will be not only sanctioned, but encouraged.
We cannot return to the chaos and extremism of the Trump years. We cannot let a far-right authoritarian subvert our democracy.
**That’s why Team Casar is doing everything we can to mobilize Texans and all Americans ahead of November.[Can you join us? Chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to support our work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77234768/449795874/-1752697853?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTQwZjU1My01NGI1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eMpMUhw8A02BgS7mL1QUk2Eff-MpG4oTSker8Rvt0Uw=)**

subject: Do you remember?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Do you remember how you felt after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016? | | |
---
Peter, We’re sorry to put this thought in your head, but we want you to remember something. Remember how you felt the day after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016. Remember walking around in disbelief and fear of what was to come. And remember time and time again how those fears were realized over the next four years. **We can't go back.** **And you, Peter, have a key role in making sure we never do.** The work it’ll take to win this race is quite literally funded by people like you making the decision that we can't go back -- we can only go forward. clean_body: Do you remember how you felt after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016? | | | Peter, We’re sorry to put this thought in your head, but we want you to remember something. Remember how you felt the day after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016. Remember walking around in disbelief and fear of what was to come. And remember time and time again how those fears were realized over the next four years. We can't go back. And you, Peter, have a key role in making sure we never do. The work it’ll take to win this race is quite literally funded by people like you making the decision that we can't go back -- we can only go forward. We don't expect you to donate every day, but with President Biden facing millions in attack ads, he needs you to make today the day you donate. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you for all you do for this team, Team Biden-Harris

subject: Sign: Demand Congress pass the expansion of the Child Tax Credit
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign your name: Tell Congress to expand the Child Tax Credit!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tada017dc-fd50-43de-8cef-09d273f43cf1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7b49fc37-2438-4854-a784-89493e5cf580/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The expanded Child Tax Credit was one of the most effective and cost-effective anti-poverty steps ever. It cut childhood poverty nearly in half in 2021, by providing families much needed funds to cover expenses and put food on the table. But at the end of that year, the expansion expired, and hasn't been reinstated since. This week, a bipartisan group of Congressional leaders reached a deal that would expand the Child Tax Credit – not to the full expansion of 2021, but still an important step forward that would lift 400,000 kids out of poverty. Passing this expansion of the Child Tax Credit should be a no-brainer! We have clear evidence that it works to fight poverty and food insecurity, and it makes up a small fraction of the budget. But it's not guaranteed to pass in Congress, so we need to turn up the pressure. [**Sign your name: Tell Congress to expand the Child Tax Credit to give families the support they need >> **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2c5213ea-7938-40e5-a7f1-85a07f8baae2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | The expanded Child Tax Credit was one of the most effective and cost-effective anti-poverty steps ever. It cut childhood poverty nearly in half in 2021, by providing families much needed funds to cover expenses and put food on the table. But at the end of that year, the expansion expired, and hasn't been reinstated since. This week, a bipartisan group of Congressional leaders reached a deal that would expand the Child Tax Credit – not to the full expansion of 2021, but still an important step forward that would lift 400,000 kids out of poverty. Passing this expansion of the Child Tax Credit should be a no-brainer! We have clear evidence that it works to fight poverty and food insecurity, and it makes up a small fraction of the budget. But it's not guaranteed to pass in Congress, so we need to turn up the pressure. | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action | | | | | | Other things you can do: Follow us on and * Follow Us | | | ---|---|--- | LeftAction Washington, District of Columbia info@leftaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | or

body:
We had a key win this week, but we need to keep fighting.

---
Friend,
---
Earlier this week, a Wisconsin judge ruled that an “absentee voting van” used to collect ballots for the Democrats in 2022 _**CANNOT**_ be used again during the 2024 election in our state.
---
[](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=6e030279566c44e8b5b41c8d265f1ea6&_e=kCpu3gNlUHWFe5UZDdhoAPIr_2UvepLDW-LZoeQr1g9vO-O_n-RYjM5L3huPk8jD5G_xNUpJO3HC6uxovOtwA2q9PXpf-RRVRita9KadGiC2ASnnwSgwI6cxU_oKTN0SBIqhO_yVt4juoMhcPMcChkiorPr1j_L7dUccLhedzPXxOWOiKpJsTmH9aQQlLcnMpahohmqoJZkQRh7uF3_GBmOMQIjp0HtlyHb1L-xKM8v6P7iZVTxtjGvMJTjSMA9x9vUWwIS2I-paFAPh2Dxiaoiw-LxdvohpGOqlq-CaBFANmVO3HeKz430-jHyoK6HyeXiwW0_PfYxtrW7ynOvH3AT1Kghxb2g_6FK0VpbCkRQgIvLL92lVQ8-RnyakI2A0mnLRZlGw_Sl_i1-leblPYxQhMK7JiWT2Z1Ts-1Ipno4BuV0P3sGZVLXw_Cl0_3HrR8EWXqPCvnJngr85ezjnbDw2kw0ewD-cJz5uP1G_OHw%3D)
---
During the 2022 election, the Racine mobile van was a blatant partisan attempt to increase Democratic voter turnout and weaponize election administration rules.
---
I fought to expose this issue in 2022. Now, I’m actively trying to pass the American Confidence in Elections Act to prevent any future instances of illegal election maneuvers.
---
This ruling is a substantial **victory** for election security.
---
But Democrats aren’t giving up. They’re already working to give themselves new and unfair advantages this November.
---
Friend, with the election _only ten months away_ , I’m asking for your support so I can continue fighting for election security.
---
**[If you’re in a position to do so, please make a contribution to support my push for election security in Wisconsin.](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=6e030279566c44e8b5b41c8d265f1ea6&_e=kCpu3gNlUHWFe5UZDdhoAPIr_2UvepLDW-LZoeQr1g9vO-O_n-RYjM5L3huPk8jD5G_xNUpJO3HC6uxovOtwA2q9PXpf-RRVRita9KadGiC2ASnnwSgwI6cxU_oKTN0SBIqhO_yVt4juoMhcPMcChkiorPr1j_L7dUccLhedzPXxOWOiKpJsTmH9aQQlLcnMpahohmqoJZkQRh7uF3_GBmOMQIjp0HtlyHb1L-xKM8v6P7iZVTxtjGvMJTjSMA9x9vUWwIS2I-paFAPh2Dxiaoiw-LxdvohpGOqlq-CaBFANmVO3HeKz430-jHyoK6HyeXiwW0_PfYxtrW7ynOvH3FihTc2fPr1V15RDHmD0hdN_kV8UqOnyH3wLJmLJMD1RTANTXhrYnnXT6aprSe9v9l57k6J9KNKsVrTKmAHaaB7fuuGbeknJtCxsCcsrt1rNGJOeja8o0CdOdaayPcZ7Qpcf56kRpOXE8U7sZSEfgg0%3D)**
---
Thank you,
---

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Michigan's take on Iowa?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
what are you thoughts on Iowa? Reply if you can, share with me, and let's discuss. Thanks. -Dr. Bob
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Is this the kind of democracy we want?
On Monday, Republicans spent a staggering $124 million on media advertising for the Iowa Caucus. This amounts to approximately $1,127 per vote in advertising alone.
Because I believe in campaign finance reform, that was the scariest part of the Iowa Caucus.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
In Michigan, I will face a PAC-funded Trump sycophant , Rep. Jack Bergman, someone who tried to undermine our votes and our democracy. Let's never forget that.
To defeat him, I first need to get through my primary. A contribution from you right now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] will help me secure my spot on the ballot this November.
RUSH A CONTRIBUTION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friend,
The 110,000 voters who participated in the Iowa Caucus represent only 15% of registered Republicans. Trump garnered the support of half of them, a mere 7.5% of the overall GOP vote.
There are over 2 million registered voters in Iowa. Democrats can't take anything for granted but Trump won Iowa with a mere 2.5% of all voters.
If you ask me, not impressive.
I hear the sensationalism on the news, too, but Iowa is not a bellwether anymore. Michigan, on the other hand, will stand tall for democracy, and if we mobilize, we will win.
To get it done, to fight for reproductive rights, universal healthcare, and to save Social Security, I need you in my corner.
Thank you for your support,
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
JOIN OUR FIGHT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Max=20Ukropina?=
subject: Mark your calendar! 🗓️
body:
Just a few weeks away. |
---
| | Peter, mark your calendar!

**_Orange County has an election coming up on March 5_ ... **this is Republicans' opportunity to go to the polls and vote to **_replace liberal Katie Porter with ___****real** America First conservative leadership!

That's why I'm running ... so I wanted to take a moment to re-introduce myself.
---
| [ ](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=3a8eea99fe&e=86e91e802d)
---
| **My name is Max Ukropina.** I'm a Republican. I'm an America First conservative. I'm a business owner. I was born and raised right here in Orange County.

**Most importantly, I'm not a career politician.** I'm a political outsider with a sense of real urgency running to fight for Orange County and bring real America First leadership to Washington.

I'm running for Congress because I'm sick and tired of career politicians from both parties destroying our country.

I'm tired of Washington doing nothing while _**millions of illegal immigrants trample over our country's immigration laws**._

I'm tired of Congress _**spending trillions of dollars each year**_ and cutting do-nothing "deals" while our debt continues to skyrocket and inflation makes life feel increasingly out-of-reach.

I'm tired of pro-crime policies _**exported from liberal cities like Los Angeles or San Francisco**_ putting criminals back onto the streets and threatening our communities.

I'm tired of politicians doing nothing while our _**schools are flooded with special-interest funding and Leftist ideological agendas**._

The list goes on!

I can't sit idly by while the Democrats try to elect another radical Leftist to represent Orange County who will rubber stamp more failed liberal policies into our communities.

I'm not planning to go to Washington to be a wallflower. I plan to fight for our country and be the kind of leader that sticks to his guns and makes Orange County proud.

We have a tough primary coming up on March 5 against well-funded opponents._We don't need to out raise them, but I can't win without conservative patriots like you on my side._

[**If I can count on your vote, will you please take a moment to submit your official endorsement of my campaign?**](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=65a2119854&e=86e91e802d)

Knowing I have your support will make a HUGE difference in these final weeks.

Thank you,

Max Ukropina
---
| [ENDORSE MAX FOR CONGRESS](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=23f1643de5&e=86e91e802d "ENDORSE MAX FOR CONGRESS")
---
| [ ](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=8fe2254eb5&e=86e91e802d)
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=d015d5240e&e=86e91e802d)
---

Max Ukropina for CongressPO Box 5780Newport Beach, CA 92662-5780
[Add us to your address book](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/vcard?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=77339c80b8)

You can [update your preferences](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=77339c80b8&e=86e91e802d&c=d4b5609354) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=77339c80b8&e=86e91e802d&c=d4b5609354).

name: Team Hill Harper
subject: 📎 Your participation needed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Your direct feedback today would mean the world to us.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20240117&t=1&akid=854%2E62735%2ErOagYX)
Peter, for many the month of January is a reset. “New year, new me!”
For our campaign we’re not going quite _that_ far, but we do want to take this time to check in with you.
We really want to hear your thoughts and feedback as we move forward into 2024.
[**Will you take just two minutes to take our official 2024 Campaign Priorities Survey right now to let us know what issues matter the most to you?**](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/hh-priorities-survey/?refcode=em20240117-854&t=2&akid=854%2E62735%2ErOagYX)
**[Take the survey »](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/hh-priorities-survey/?refcode=em20240117-854&t=3&akid=854%2E62735%2ErOagYX)**
**We want to know:**_What matters to you? Have your priorities changed since the start of this campaign? What should we focus more of our resources on? What do you want to hear us talk about?_
Any input you can share right now will go a long way as we move forward. We want to make sure that our 2024 plans are aligned with our supporters as we continue to fight for a better Michigan.
[**Will you take our short survey now to help shape our progressive campaign for Michigan?**](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/hh-priorities-survey/?refcode=em20240117-854&t=4&akid=854%2E62735%2ErOagYX)
**[Take the survey »](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/hh-priorities-survey/?refcode=em20240117-854&t=5&akid=854%2E62735%2ErOagYX)**
Thank you for participating and making our campaign stronger,
Team Hill Harper
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-footer?refcode=em20240117&t=6&refcode2=854_62735_rOagYX&akid=854%2E62735%2ErOagYX)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=7&akid=854%2E62735%2ErOagYX)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=854%2E62735%2ErOagYX)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)
PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

clean_body: | | | | Is this more important than education? Peter, New York just moved students from in-person learning to remote to house illegal migrants. I don’t think this is right, Peter... The education of American children is far more important than Biden’s border crisis. | | | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ ROGER WILLIAMS FOR U.S. CONGRESS 10 N. Peter, I want to explain why our upcoming Mid-Month Deadline is so important.

* **Our Primary is just 4 short months away - determining if Lori is on the ballot in November**

* **If we secure funding early, Lori can jump in and fight to Secure our Border**

* **Lori is fighting for Oregon, but your donation will give her the boost she needs to stop Radical Portland policies**

clean_body: | | | | We have less than 300 days| Peter, I want to explain why our upcoming Mid-Month Deadline is so important. Our Primary is just 4 short months away - determining if Lori is on the ballot in November If we secure funding early, Lori can jump in and fight to Secure our Border Lori is fighting for Oregon, but your donation will give her the boost she needs to stop Radical Portland policies If this is important to you, Peter - | | | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | LCD HQ 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \- =

name: John Pierce
subject: J6: “Thousands more” to be arrested . . .
body:
So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), I'm currently representing 30 of these defendants.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=04e18d60d8f2477aa94dd1a2f9017500&_e=HjgBKGCyhtdp-bHUi-5bxyJGqf7iiRr8-ZurLTmmF1ZujZ8iXcQQDD3oeke7TuVUs1Wzu6slRBK9ONrE9jkhj36dSq6kdvYs0WgmIK3GTw8AhOcSZRpOqmXnTwHktUv5PE4WSln2GoLSP46r6ifc4fJzv6nIOh_1TA1s2gkxlztUQNXUxjYNSg9YXzwto-BpscK5QegPYbPUIhgdfZnfdnt_B7APjP_qk3KMfuXjx6J-RlBJAUK1d5V1g5WxgD_vmAvuQ0FQiAhm-pcTyDv0yWjcw-2ynyV6Q-zdz3H5iaoPFBzL1zkSWVRm6SmBs9Zo-kGwduOcqkYID_uwijPffKd8bA_GwpalBW60d1q_HSbfQ7WpXuu4cstcsacVFkDHjFX3o7QV9yw4MsPRftRM6A%3D%3D)
Dear Patriot,

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=04e18d60d8f2477aa94dd1a2f9017500&_e=HjgBKGCyhtdp-bHUi-5bxyJGqf7iiRr8-ZurLTmmF1ZujZ8iXcQQDD3oeke7TuVUs1Wzu6slRBK9ONrE9jkhj36dSq6kdvYs0WgmIK3GTw8AhOcSZRpOqmXnTwHktUv5PE4WSln2GoLSP46r6ifc4fJzv6nIOh_1TA1s2gkxlztUQNXUxjYNSg9YXzwto-BpscK5QegPYbPUIhgdfZnfdnt_B7APjP_qk3KMfuXjx6J-RlBJAUK1d5V1g5WxgD_v0Hv0ikLicTd9GSo9r9oXZKeSn8Sd_HzXgdvcXUEa9gMG9SkiwvPA9U02U_FPuc4lCLUh3e77cvNEpfgFgIX8-_Oipyh9cbBbK_LqHcMJaYZxh35JyqFmcnCGaJeIZQRHIPbuqX8MDwr_WMV9JYDrZA%3D%3D) The U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia recently stood behind a podium and announced the DOJ planned to charge "thousands" more Americans who were present during the January 6th protests.

So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), **I 'm currently representing 30 of these defendants.**

My trial schedule is PACKED, and **[I need your continued support](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=04e18d60d8f2477aa94dd1a2f9017500&_e=HjgBKGCyhtdp-bHUi-5bxyJGqf7iiRr8-ZurLTmmF1ZujZ8iXcQQDD3oeke7TuVUs1Wzu6slRBK9ONrE9jkhj36dSq6kdvYs0WgmIK3GTw8AhOcSZRpOqmXnTwHktUv5PE4WSln2GoLSP46r6ifc4fJzv6nIOh_1TA1s2gkxlztUQNXUxjYNSg9YXzwto-BpscK5QegPYbPUIhgdfZnfdnt_B7APjP_qk3KMfuXjx6J-RlBJAUK1d5V1g5WxgD_vHd45xtLnWzSb00cmsHKHqWQAAZszWOY0t4wCZg_jkgFIXQkUaYYGeLMRm7WrmoA5RhjnA9CoJmuoV_5RaBHnn2POnyRzqm5b5Mc4Wp9HsodQdZwQUo5cqdJxcTbzSV5ig1U1RsZLVmrxKAE2bRb75g%3D%3D).**

My name is John Pierce. After my tour in the United States Army, I pursued a law degree at Harvard University. I was also one of the few conservative editors of the _Harvard Law Review_ (after Obama served in that role).

We need TOUGH and relentless warriors who defend the Constitution, and that's why I gave up my lucrative law practice to pursue Constitutional Law. I never expected this to happen.

In my wildest dreams, I could not have imagined our government rounding up and arresting Americans who attended a political protest.

**During the BLM riots, federal buildings were BURNED, police were assaulted _en masse,_ and God knows how many Americans were hurt. And what happened? The Department of Justice dropped all charges against anyone involved. **

But for the January 6th protesters, our government wants to send a clear message: **Stand up to your masters and pay the price!**

I just returned to D.C. for a hearing, and my funds are running low. The cost of airfare and hotels alone for myself, the defendants, and their families are burning through funds.

Criminal litigation is EXPENSIVE, and I'm pushing the limits of my Harvard Law degree to represent these Americans who need our help.

**[Will you help keep us going?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=04e18d60d8f2477aa94dd1a2f9017500&_e=HjgBKGCyhtdp-bHUi-5bxyJGqf7iiRr8-ZurLTmmF1ZujZ8iXcQQDD3oeke7TuVUs1Wzu6slRBK9ONrE9jkhj36dSq6kdvYs0WgmIK3GTw8AhOcSZRpOqmXnTwHktUv5PE4WSln2GoLSP46r6ifc4fJzv6nIOh_1TA1s2gkxlztUQNXUxjYNSg9YXzwto-BpscK5QegPYbPUIhgdfZnfdnt_B7APjP_qk3KMfuXjx6J-RlBJAUK1d5V1g5WxgD_vNVbmuVIkBxw2jJpMVGuRYzruOTW-M4hs3ocRxMMEbtEiSetZ1ByWa-drCOCfZprKK3LL1XSxOqLgXHaR2Wai9v8RzaPB6LE5Wxr8wEgmI76pixQFO9BCop6xxUGckKCWLjzGOZYQqjSf7rJ5oomzgA%3D%3D)**

I have spent countless hours with these defendants and their families. Jobs and homes have been lost. Families have been destroyed. **The DOJ's goal is to terrorize these people to set an example for us all.**

What we see today are the same tactics King George III used before the Revolutionary War started. The British Crown used "writs of assistance" to carry out wide-ranging searches and arrests of anyone for anything. The tactic inspired James Madison to write the Fourth Amendment to our Constitution to protect our privacy.

Today, our government uses high-tech methods to do the same, tracking down anyone who stepped foot on Capitol grounds on January 6th and then using "anonymous" tips to determine their crimes.

Just as King George III abused his power to quell a rebellion among the colonists, our government is abusing its power to do the same.

It's 1776 all over again, and the defendants I represent are the last, best hope that our nation can continue to trust in our Constitution to keep our government in check.

My fight for these men and women isn't just about keeping them out of jail; it's about preserving the framework of our Republic. **[Please help me keep fighting](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=04e18d60d8f2477aa94dd1a2f9017500&_e=HjgBKGCyhtdp-bHUi-5bxyJGqf7iiRr8-ZurLTmmF1ZujZ8iXcQQDD3oeke7TuVUs1Wzu6slRBK9ONrE9jkhj36dSq6kdvYs0WgmIK3GTw8AhOcSZRpOqmXnTwHktUv5PE4WSln2GoLSP46r6ifc4fJzv6nIOh_1TA1s2gkxlztUQNXUxjYNSg9YXzwto-BpscK5QegPYbPUIhgdfZnfdnt_B7APjP_qk3KMfuXjx6J-RlBJAUK1d5V1g5WxgD_vBQ_voHl1MJIiCNeKzVx-PnaFYTUc8Q7yj2g_qJr97d7vhTnI7ZYpQVVcC98zDUn8ALRjqWSMCDN_mwWYtFb-YDxRUR_4Qx4SGIwEBnwfrwTUGLR3UAupTCLLvrgUTG8cCiAuam7LapmBSisqNwwRCQ%3D%3D).**

Over the next three weeks, I must raise $58,000 to cover our expenses. Travel, hotels, paralegals, researchers, and assisting attorneys all need to be paid. My credit cards are MAXED out, and I'm relying on you and a handful of other patriots to help. **[Will you chip in today?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=04e18d60d8f2477aa94dd1a2f9017500&_e=HjgBKGCyhtdp-bHUi-5bxyJGqf7iiRr8-ZurLTmmF1ZujZ8iXcQQDD3oeke7TuVUs1Wzu6slRBK9ONrE9jkhj36dSq6kdvYs0WgmIK3GTw8AhOcSZRpOqmXnTwHktUv5PE4WSln2GoLSP46r6ifc4fJzv6nIOh_1TA1s2gkxlztUQNXUxjYNSg9YXzwto-BpscK5QegPYbPUIhgdfZnfdnt_B7APjP_qk3KMfuXjx6J-RlBJAUK1d5V1g5WxgD_vwQc6PJ8gzvTQvBXaF4cXMZz1AmhT4-IcSuFhIBJYNZjDhUTlNhi9EdWIAbC7DjicFWDy_tHkf7hM58bEnbZ3kf3Ah-sPdh_eChLEEKN3OI1pSNctJ7oAGtMrkoCRCjiXsUNRqu3a8PEhG8vo6u9n2w%3D%3D)**

Every dollar helps and is greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your time, support, and prayers.

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Chairman and Founder

The Department of Justice dropped all charges against anyone involved. But for the January 6th protesters, our government wants to send a clear message: Stand up to your masters and pay the price! I just returned to D.C. for a hearing, and my funds are running low. The cost of airfare and hotels alone for myself, the defendants, and their families are burning through funds. I have a confession: **I was living in Iowa during the 2008 caucus, and I didn 't go**. I couldn't find anyone to watch Luke, my oldest son who at the time was a toddler.
Child care is a huge issue for the Iowa caucuses, which historically happen late at night and last hours. Anyone who has been around kids knows an evening start for a baby is going to be bad news--you have kids sleeping on gym floors and others crying.
Now, you might be wondering how I, someone born and raised in Iowa, could skip the caucus. But every four years, the politicians came to our local diners and churches, shook hands, and promised big things and big changes. But time and time again I watched those politicians fail to deliver, or even come back to our small towns. While these men promised booming economies, I saw my rural town struggle amidst the Farm Crisis.
**My experience growing up in Iowa, a place where politicians seemed to deliver nothing but soggy yard signs, still shapes my work today.**
We can and must do better, and that's why I'm in this race--yard signs and all. I'm proud to be "doing Congress" differently, by not accepting money from corporate PACs, by being the only Democrat to oppose funding for politicians' wasteful pet projects, and by leading the fight to ban congressional stock trading.
_[If you'd like to join our team by making a contribution, I'd be so grateful!](https://substack.com/redirect/6ac92a53-a395-4fb9-89ec-48a35a26012c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
* * *
I haven't forgotten about the questions readers submitted last month! **Today I 'm addressing one that asked about my advice for other single parents out there. **
When it comes to parenting, I tell people you are probably not going to find perfect balance.
**The balance I go for is more "balanced like riding a bike.**" It might be a little wobbly at times. There will be hills, and it's okay to admit those are hard (parenting isn't easy!). There will also be areas you can cruise downhill. Enjoy and savor those moments. And when you can, take breaks. Those breaks will allow you to come back stronger, healthier, and ready to tackle the next challenge.
But I can't answer this question without reminding folks that our current system doesn't do enough to support families, whether you have two parents in the home or not. [Less than 25%](https://substack.com/redirect/83635399-858a-41a6-9d6a-0ec0d89c30c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of American workers have access to paid family leave. Reliable child care is difficult to secure, and expensive when you do. **In Orange County, where I live, the median cost of infant child care in a child care center is nearly $20,000 per year.** And on top of all that, housing, health care and education costs--all things that weigh heavy on families--continue to rise.
Being a parent in America today is rewarding but hard, and it's okay to admit that. If there's a magic answer out there, I haven't found it yet!
Thanks for reading,
Katie Porter

name: Rashida Tlaib via Justice Democrats
subject: In a clear example of ethnic cleansing, top Israeli officials are openly calling to push millions of Palestinians out of Gaza.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In a clear example of ethnic cleansing, top Israeli officials are openly
calling to push millions of Palestinians out of Gaza—and advocating for
replacing them with Israeli settlers.

Many Israeli politicians have demanded a “second Nakba,” referring to the
catastrophe of 1948, when Zionist militias violently expelled 750,000
Palestinians from their lands, destroyed hundreds of Palestinian villages,
and massacred about 15,000 Palestinians.

A member of Prime Minister Netanyahu’s cabinet said: “We are now rolling
out the Gaza Nakba.”

Some survivors of 1948’s Nakba fled to Gaza. Along with Palestinians in
exile outside of Palestine, they were denied the right to return home. Now
they and their descendants have become refugees once more, forced to flee
multiple locations in just three months.

Dropping tens of thousands of U.S. bombs on the tiny Gaza Strip, the
Israeli military has already forcibly displaced 2 million Palestinians—90%
of Gaza’s population.

[ https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-now-to-president-biden-stop-the-ethnic-cleansing-of-palestinians-dont-allow-israels-government-to-force-the-palestinian-people-out-of-their-historic-homeland/?source=group-justice-democrats&referrer=group-justice-democrats&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-20240117?refcode=em20240117&akid=32856%2E1203867%2E-Lgb7j ]Sign the petition to the Biden administration: End this campaign of
ethnic cleansing now. No more forced displacement of Palestinians, and no
forced migration out of Palestine!

[ https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-now-to-president-biden-stop-the-ethnic-cleansing-of-palestinians-dont-allow-israels-government-to-force-the-palestinian-people-out-of-their-historic-homeland/?source=group-justice-democrats&referrer=group-justice-democrats&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-20240117?refcode=em20240117&akid=32856%2E1203867%2E-Lgb7j ]SIGN THE PETITION

Razing entire neighborhoods to the ground and destroying a majority of
buildings, Israel’s government has rapidly made much of Gaza
uninhabitable.

Meanwhile, the Israeli military continues to bomb areas it designated as
“safe” for Palestinian civilians.

Along with this brutal destruction, Israel’s government is depriving
Palestinians in Gaza of food, water, shelter, medical assistance, and
other basic needs.

What’s happening now is ethnic cleansing, which is a war crime.

But many Israeli politicians want to go even further, openly calling to
permanently expel all Palestinians from Gaza.

Prime Minister Netanyahu’s Intelligence Minister has openly recommended
the transfer of all Palestinians in Gaza to Egypt. Other senior officials
in Netanyahu’s cabinet have made it clear that forced expulsion and
resettlement is their goal.

Netanyahu has been trying to push countries to take displaced
Palestinians, calling his plan “voluntary migration.” Of course, there’s
nothing “voluntary” about bombing people to make them flee.

Biden and leaders in his administration say they reject forced
displacement of Palestinians.

But their actions show otherwise: They are continuing to arm and fund
Israel’s military as it commits these war crimes, while shielding Israel’s
government from accountability.

[ https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-now-to-president-biden-stop-the-ethnic-cleansing-of-palestinians-dont-allow-israels-government-to-force-the-palestinian-people-out-of-their-historic-homeland/?source=group-justice-democrats&referrer=group-justice-democrats&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-20240117?refcode=em20240117&akid=32856%2E1203867%2E-Lgb7j ]Sign to Biden and leaders in his administration: Don't let Israel’s
government expel Palestinians from their ancestral homeland or move
Israeli settlers into Gaza. Stop supporting ethnic cleansing and war
crimes!

[ https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-now-to-president-biden-stop-the-ethnic-cleansing-of-palestinians-dont-allow-israels-government-to-force-the-palestinian-people-out-of-their-historic-homeland/?source=group-justice-democrats&referrer=group-justice-democrats&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-20240117?refcode=em20240117&akid=32856%2E1203867%2E-Lgb7j ]SIGN NOW

We cannot allow our government to continue enabling the bombing or the
blockade on Gaza, which has already killed at least 24,000 Palestinians.
That’s more than 1 in every 100 people in Gaza!

Thank you for speaking up against our government’s complicity in
oppression. May we continue building a better world together.

In solidarity,

Rep. Rashida Tlaib

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240117-32856-footer&t=1001&refcode2=32856_1203867_-Lgb7j&akid=32856%2E1203867%2E-Lgb7j

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=32856%2E1203867%2E-Lgb7j

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Maxwell Frost
subject: my birthday wish
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/eOSXadVRQdIuf3EG5npDXg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnio4fP0TKaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDExN19lbV9mcl9iMV9iaXJ0aGRheV9lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yYjVnQldWemlnY3BtRW0wUjNISGZidnBRRlkmcmVmY29kZTI9MmI1Z0JXVnppZ2NwbUVtMFIzSEhmYnZwUUZZJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJiNWdCV1Z6aWdjcG1FbTBSM0hIZmJ2cFFGWVcDc3BjQgploh8JqGUblH_eUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)
---
**Peter, today is my 27th birthday!** I was 24 when I launched my campaign for Congress. As I reflect on these past few years, I’m grateful for my supporters across the country who believed in me and our youth-powered movement. Since then, we’ve made so much progress in the fight for a just, more equitable future. But I know we still have so much we can achieve together, Peter. With you by my side, we _will_ continue to make our country a better place. [**_My birthday wish is that our movement grows stronger than ever in 2024, so I’m asking everyone reading this to make that happen. Can you donate $27 for my 27th birthday? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/eOSXadVRQdIuf3EG5npDXg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnio4fP0TKaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDExN19lbV9mcl9iMV9iaXJ0aGRheV9lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yYjVnQldWemlnY3BtRW0wUjNISGZidnBRRlkmcmVmY29kZTI9MmI1Z0JXVnppZ2NwbUVtMFIzSEhmYnZwUUZZJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJiNWdCV1Z6aWdjcG1FbTBSM0hIZmJ2cFFGWVcDc3BjQgploh8JqGUblH_eUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) We are at a _critical_ moment for our movement. We can either sit back and let the far-right agenda defeat us, or we can _come together as one_ and bring bold progress to our communities. I’m not taking a day off for my birthday, because our movement is fighting 24/7, 365 days a year. But to keep up the work, I need YOU in my corner. clean_body: | ~~ Peter, today is my 27th birthday! I was 24 when I launched my campaign for Congress. As I reflect on these past few years, I’m grateful for my supporters across the country who believed in me and our youth-powered movement. Since then, we’ve made so much progress in the fight for a just, more equitable future. But I know we still have so much we can achieve together, Peter. With you by my side, we will continue to make our country a better place. ~~ We are at a critical moment for our movement. We can either sit back and let the far-right agenda defeat us, or we can come together as one and bring bold progress to our communities. I’m not taking a day off for my birthday, because our movement is fighting 24/7, 365 days a year. But to keep up the work, I need YOU in my corner. So for my 27th birthday, I’m counting on your grassroots support to raise $10,000 today so we can keep our campaign firing on all cylinders in 2024. That’s how we show EVERYONE that our youth-powered movement is only getting stronger by the day. ~~ | | | ~~ ~~ | ~~ ~ | ~ ~ Thanks for celebrating with me, Maxwell Frost ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th District in Congress. As our ad makes clear, Kyrsten Sinema took MILLIONS from Wall Street while protecting BILLIONS in special tax loopholes for them — and then she used their campaign contributions to foot the bill for luxury travel, fancy meals, and visits to wineries.

Meanwhile, she stood in the way of things that would actually help working Arizonans, like the minimum wage, the expanded Child Tax Credit, and lower drug prices. She also blocked abortion rights, voting rights, and more as part of “dealmaking” efforts with Republicans.

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.
