name: John Pierce
subject: J6: “Thousands more” to be arrested . . .
body:
So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), I'm currently representing 30 of these defendants.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b8c69a2c7ab9401782d71a6b370b10d0&_e=IP7FN0TiWh6yMgxrX-9LyiQLR3j50UCdfm-4JLMNslTSC0qnh9bqJ3M8rnPFBgdfpMXAb5bTG7A6GWYFW5kcNlGffXKO1VPrXtskWqMeI0994ZanKAbjimhSAA0RlStRvKWwrjNhZfaakZS9oB5eloC7eOZoNCW8qN4inD3kiVBLIasuHnDsQw93DOnxlZLjQ5uI6SOZQDNdUADLfc35FDU_2Xg3wKhPYOb78Rmu7yS728H__a0Zwxu1hMy4yVIrX2LEC5-TMzSOy0JcjTmFUrp9Ely-dfA0YvnPL-4ARoj2leijCy5jo_E3g33NRcmaO7Jj1b_A5mjvAFODO3jmLU1kNSI3y2TKur8Uel-DsU5ova7Ea3JfQJw3Gdovl0Y1OXPQCv-cB8Dw-HUgOFunnw%3D%3D)
Dear Patriot,

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b8c69a2c7ab9401782d71a6b370b10d0&_e=IP7FN0TiWh6yMgxrX-9LyiQLR3j50UCdfm-4JLMNslTSC0qnh9bqJ3M8rnPFBgdfpMXAb5bTG7A6GWYFW5kcNlGffXKO1VPrXtskWqMeI0994ZanKAbjimhSAA0RlStRvKWwrjNhZfaakZS9oB5eloC7eOZoNCW8qN4inD3kiVBLIasuHnDsQw93DOnxlZLjQ5uI6SOZQDNdUADLfc35FDU_2Xg3wKhPYOb78Rmu7yS728H__a0Zwxu1hMy4yVIrgYZFpo803tcISiYjEGoAUP79X4Me0rrke7xnpOrf8ylx_vwLMvvCV6aJkeLL_N8oYhR_TCPditnoRtzWJm_1hrnXNqhBLTDpBe_SU22PICgw70ipOHGzBOrpOKz40b10XlSz8eCEuj8c4i7LF4Ucuw%3D%3D) The U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia recently stood behind a podium and announced the DOJ planned to charge "thousands" more Americans who were present during the January 6th protests.

So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), **I 'm currently representing 30 of these defendants.**

My trial schedule is PACKED, and **[I need your continued support](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b8c69a2c7ab9401782d71a6b370b10d0&_e=IP7FN0TiWh6yMgxrX-9LyiQLR3j50UCdfm-4JLMNslTSC0qnh9bqJ3M8rnPFBgdfpMXAb5bTG7A6GWYFW5kcNlGffXKO1VPrXtskWqMeI0994ZanKAbjimhSAA0RlStRvKWwrjNhZfaakZS9oB5eloC7eOZoNCW8qN4inD3kiVBLIasuHnDsQw93DOnxlZLjQ5uI6SOZQDNdUADLfc35FDU_2Xg3wKhPYOb78Rmu7yS728H__a0Zwxu1hMy4yVIrrClvlR2Vz6AzvfiWEbkaiPFAgS9u-MffEuEQgTAWkRrbipRMFQFfWm1XtqQrinmgD8ACJDMLvtXifdyxui8raTlkXmjzmiESR4DCK1138iaH93SfhTZ-YEqRGU-xEglI3isiVFHOloRA-EUSRj3JcQ%3D%3D).**

My name is John Pierce. After my tour in the United States Army, I pursued a law degree at Harvard University. I was also one of the few conservative editors of the _Harvard Law Review_ (after Obama served in that role).

We need TOUGH and relentless warriors who defend the Constitution, and that's why I gave up my lucrative law practice to pursue Constitutional Law. I never expected this to happen.

In my wildest dreams, I could not have imagined our government rounding up and arresting Americans who attended a political protest.

**During the BLM riots, federal buildings were BURNED, police were assaulted _en masse,_ and God knows how many Americans were hurt. And what happened? The Department of Justice dropped all charges against anyone involved. **

But for the January 6th protesters, our government wants to send a clear message: **Stand up to your masters and pay the price!**

I just returned to D.C. for a hearing, and my funds are running low. The cost of airfare and hotels alone for myself, the defendants, and their families are burning through funds.

Criminal litigation is EXPENSIVE, and I'm pushing the limits of my Harvard Law degree to represent these Americans who need our help.

**[Will you help keep us going?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b8c69a2c7ab9401782d71a6b370b10d0&_e=IP7FN0TiWh6yMgxrX-9LyiQLR3j50UCdfm-4JLMNslTSC0qnh9bqJ3M8rnPFBgdfpMXAb5bTG7A6GWYFW5kcNlGffXKO1VPrXtskWqMeI0994ZanKAbjimhSAA0RlStRvKWwrjNhZfaakZS9oB5eloC7eOZoNCW8qN4inD3kiVBLIasuHnDsQw93DOnxlZLjQ5uI6SOZQDNdUADLfc35FDU_2Xg3wKhPYOb78Rmu7yS728H__a0Zwxu1hMy4yVIrpQ_bTiuUQEH5r6GjtqkR-lFQ6yWQIy3zTEYVJej9DSfOs0ljzfUpHDgV2ADC4XqrDf8u1r4lvxV9bPLvFBu3fZxS5BhtjCpJCRv42MbwqdL2jYncuaXZ7n3E0XNrAr5qrQfC80-CGhc8dHW8Z2IGcQ%3D%3D)**

I have spent countless hours with these defendants and their families. Jobs and homes have been lost. Families have been destroyed. **The DOJ's goal is to terrorize these people to set an example for us all.**

What we see today are the same tactics King George III used before the Revolutionary War started. The British Crown used "writs of assistance" to carry out wide-ranging searches and arrests of anyone for anything. The tactic inspired James Madison to write the Fourth Amendment to our Constitution to protect our privacy.

Today, our government uses high-tech methods to do the same, tracking down anyone who stepped foot on Capitol grounds on January 6th and then using "anonymous" tips to determine their crimes.

Just as King George III abused his power to quell a rebellion among the colonists, our government is abusing its power to do the same.

It's 1776 all over again, and the defendants I represent are the last, best hope that our nation can continue to trust in our Constitution to keep our government in check.

My fight for these men and women isn't just about keeping them out of jail; it's about preserving the framework of our Republic. **[Please help me keep fighting](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b8c69a2c7ab9401782d71a6b370b10d0&_e=IP7FN0TiWh6yMgxrX-9LyiQLR3j50UCdfm-4JLMNslTSC0qnh9bqJ3M8rnPFBgdfpMXAb5bTG7A6GWYFW5kcNlGffXKO1VPrXtskWqMeI0994ZanKAbjimhSAA0RlStRvKWwrjNhZfaakZS9oB5eloC7eOZoNCW8qN4inD3kiVBLIasuHnDsQw93DOnxlZLjQ5uI6SOZQDNdUADLfc35FDU_2Xg3wKhPYOb78Rmu7yS728H__a0Zwxu1hMy4yVIr6P79_8RGgGV6oXKjfcwisOqlCsVzwq5gFMSdTEtunsXv2N8BT6n73cWLyqTQK25MBgthdMLUH5aumXZp4iHAGR2mqibgja9kk9H9BSoIz_Pffnz6WS--3itb9wVXuPRBzMeILTb-A5w1gGBjKpNafg%3D%3D).**

Over the next three weeks, I must raise $58,000 to cover our expenses. Travel, hotels, paralegals, researchers, and assisting attorneys all need to be paid. My credit cards are MAXED out, and I'm relying on you and a handful of other patriots to help. **[Will you chip in today?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b8c69a2c7ab9401782d71a6b370b10d0&_e=IP7FN0TiWh6yMgxrX-9LyiQLR3j50UCdfm-4JLMNslTSC0qnh9bqJ3M8rnPFBgdfpMXAb5bTG7A6GWYFW5kcNlGffXKO1VPrXtskWqMeI0994ZanKAbjimhSAA0RlStRvKWwrjNhZfaakZS9oB5eloC7eOZoNCW8qN4inD3kiVBLIasuHnDsQw93DOnxlZLjQ5uI6SOZQDNdUADLfc35FDU_2Xg3wKhPYOb78Rmu7yS728H__a0Zwxu1hMy4yVIrh-HhH2VZ37_F53YdWfUSt7OvWiyjr8CMdkO-ffrPw_CmvafPpxVyTOzqcj-XyYJcv8-cOHgk5W8DyZEmD1BhyAbCLCBP8mf2_5ZedoyckXR3176nrhopknUlGsQBuS1HHoVzYjZT9n6Yezq2zKSEmA%3D%3D)**

Every dollar helps and is greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your time, support, and prayers.

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Chairman and Founder
National Constitutional Law Union

name: The proud son of immigrants
subject: Re: Trump’s comments about immigrants
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Jirair Ratevosian for Congress
body:
Jirair is running for Congress because there is so much at stake to ensure everyone in our community has equal opportunities and a fair shot to chase their own dream. I'm running to represent Los Angeles in Congress because this isn't just politics. This is personal.
When Donald Trump claimed immigrants are "poisoning the blood of our country," I wasn't surprised. But hearing House Speaker Mike Johnson say he "understands the urgency of Trump's admonition" confirms what we already know.
**Anti-immigrant racism didn't start with Trump. He just gave permission to bask in it.**
My parents and grandparents immigrated here from Armenia and Lebanon to escape war and oppression. They left everything behind and found themselves in a new country, new home, and new life. Growing up in Los Angeles, I met other families with similar stories. Their bravery and determination made it possible to get me where I am today — running for Congress.
I am a proud American and the result of the American dream. If Mike Johnson thinks my parents were "poisoning the blood of our country" when they arrived here, he can say it to me directly on the House floor. **I'll see you in Congress, Mike.**
If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

name: Team Cori
subject: Call on President Biden to invest in human needs and cut the Pentagon budget now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
To influence policymakers in the White House and make a real impact, the time to act is NOW. | |
---
Peter, **** **** The president is putting the final touches on next year’s budget now, and with global tensions on a razor’s edge, “security” is certain to be a top priority. But for decades,**the U.S. government has spent more on weapons and war than any other country on earth** \-- and it didn’t make anyone, anywhere, any safer. It’s time to rethink this broken approach. This year, we could pour even more bombs and bullets into a world where violence is increasing by the second --**unless activists like us speak up to demand something different.** This moment marks the start of a legislative marathon to press the White House and Congress to reject the misguided notion that BILLIONS for weapons and war are the only way to keep us safe and help us thrive. The President’s budget proposal is due in the next few weeks and that means the clock is already ticking. To influence policymakers in the White House and make a real impact, the time to act is NOW.
Budgets are moral documents that should reflect our values and priorities.****[**Can you call on President Biden to invest in human needs and cut the Pentagon budget clean_body: To influence policymakers in the White House and make a real impact, the time to act is NOW. | | Peter, ** The president is putting the final touches on next year’s budget now, and with global tensions on a razor’s edge, “security” is certain to be a top priority. But for decades,the U.S. government has spent more on weapons and war than any other country on earth \-- and it didn’t make anyone, anywhere, any safer. It’s time to rethink this broken approach. This year, we could pour even more bombs and bullets into a world where violence is increasing by the second --unless activists like us speak up to demand something different. This moment marks the start of a legislative marathon to press the White House and Congress to reject the misguided notion that BILLIONS for weapons and war are the only way to keep us safe and help us thrive. The President’s budget proposal is due in the next few weeks and that means the clock is already ticking. To influence policymakers in the White House and make a real impact, the time to act is NOW. Budgets are moral documents that should reflect our values and priorities. ** We will win a pro-peace, pro-humanity future together. With love and humanity, Team Cori Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress | | Sent via . | More about Russell Prescott: A New Hampshire native of the Seacoast, Russell Prescott grew up in Exeter and currently lives in Kingston. For several decades, he was the co-owner and vice-president of R.E. Prescott Company, a wholesale distributor and manufacturer of water treatment systems. He purchased the business in 2020 and is now the president and sole owner.
Russell practiced Professional Engineering for 30 years and designs many of the products his company manufactures. As a result, he holds several patents for removing arsenic and radon from water. The company, founded in 1954 by his father, employs approximately 50 people and has operated in the same Exeter building since 1963.
Wanting to give back to his community, Prescott served five terms as a New Hampshire State Senator, being first elected in 2000 for two terms. He was re-elected in 2010, 2012, and again in 2014. As Senator, he represented Senate Districts 19 and 23, including towns from Newmarket to Plaistow and Derry to Seabrook.
Prescott was then twice elected to the Executive Council, once in 2016 and again in 2018. He decided to retire from the Executive Council in 2021 after purchasing his company.
Russell enjoys home restoration and recently finished a restoration of a 1737 colonial barn and grist mill in his town. His community service included Exeter Rotary Club, Kingston Lions Club, and the board of directors for the Exeter Area Chamber of Commerce.
He and his wife, Susan, have been married for 41 years, and they have five grown children and seven grandchildren. Following in their grandfather's and father's footsteps, his oldest three children are heavily involved with the daily operation and vision of the family business.

subject: Rob for PA Weekly Update

body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/13dacc76f3df/rob-for-pa-weekly-update?e=131e83a3c2)
---
Good Afternoon,
It's been an eventful and productive week for us at the Bresnahan campaign! We're thrilled to announce that two more members of the Pennsylvania Congressional Delegation, Congressmen GT Thompson and Mike Kelly have endorsed Rob as he runs for Pennsylvania's 8th Congressional District. We are excited to have these two hardworking Congressmen on our team and look forward to Rob fighting alongside them, in the swamp, to make Pennsylvania a better place to live and work.
[](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=80081962c3&e=131e83a3c2)
|
---
We are excited to start Petition Season! Rob will need YOUR help to get on the ballot. There will be several events during the petition period throughout the district, with the first one on Tuesday, January 23rd, the first day of petitions! We are hosting a pizza and petitions party at Grotto Pizza in Wilkes-Barre Twp. It will run from 6:00 to 8:00 PM and we look forward to seeing you there!
|
---
On Saturday, Rob ran in the Shiver by the River in Scranton and met a multitude of hardworking Northeast Pennsylvanians who need a member of Congress who actually represents them. We look forward to meeting as many Northeast PA residents as possible, on the campaign trail.
Rob recently participated in White Haven Borough's bicentennial celebration. The residents of small towns, such as White Haven, make up Pennsylvania's 8th Congressional District. When elected, Rob will bring the values and principles of Northeast Pennsylvania's small-town communities to the halls of the Capitol.

Northeast PA is full of generous and compassionate people, and this has been on display since the courageous Scranton Police Detective Kyle Gilmartin was senselessly shot in the line of duty. Folks across our region have come together to support Detective Gilmartin and his family, hosting benefits and fundraisers throughout the week. We invite you to join us in supporting and praying for him and his family during these trying times.
We look forward to hitting the campaign trail and working hard to get Northeast PA the representation in Congress they deserve.
Best Regards,Team Rob

| [Donate Now](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=2f5aa63418&e=131e83a3c2)
---

clean_body: | | | | | Good Afternoon, It's been an eventful and productive week for us at the Bresnahan campaign! We're thrilled to announce that two more members of the Pennsylvania Congressional Delegation, Congressmen GT Thompson and Mike Kelly have endorsed Rob as he runs for Pennsylvania's 8th Congressional District. We are excited to have these two hardworking Congressmen on our team and look forward to Rob fighting alongside them, in the swamp, to make Pennsylvania a better place to live and work. | We are excited to start Petition Season! Rob will need YOUR help to get on the ballot. There will be several events during the petition period throughout the district, with the first one on Tuesday, January 23rd, the first day of petitions! We are hosting a pizza and petitions party at Grotto Pizza in Wilkes-Barre Twp. It will run from 6:00 to 8:00 PM and we look forward to seeing you there! | On Saturday, Rob ran in the Shiver by the River in Scranton and met a multitude of hardworking Northeast Pennsylvanians who need a member of Congress who actually represents them. We look forward to meeting as many Northeast PA residents as possible, on the campaign trail. Rob recently participated in White Haven Borough's bicentennial celebration. The residents of small towns, such as White Haven, make up Pennsylvania's 8th Congressional District. When elected, Rob will bring the values and principles of Northeast Pennsylvania's small-town communities to the halls of the Capitol. Northeast PA is full of generous and compassionate people, and this has been on display since the courageous Scranton Police Detective Kyle Gilmartin was senselessly shot in the line of duty. Folks across our region have come together to support Detective Gilmartin and his family, hosting benefits and fundraisers throughout the week. We invite you to join us in supporting and praying for him and his family during these trying times. We look forward to hitting the campaign trail and working hard to get Northeast PA the representation in Congress they deserve. Best Regards,Team Rob | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | [Paid for by Rob for PA]() | | | Copyright (C) 2024 Rob for PA. All rights reserved.

name: Madeleine Dean
subject: Peter, we need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
**** Peter, now that 2024 is officially here, my team and I are getting ready for the first big step of this campaign – getting my name on the ballot.

We call this part of the process the petition period, and my team and I really enjoy it. Despite the cold, it’s a great chance to connect with voters across PA-04 as we collect the 1,000 signatures required to place my name on the ballot.

But in order to get the number of signatures we need on time, we need to make sure we have the resources for collection drives, mailing signature packets to volunteers, and run an intentional volunteer recruitment campaign digitally and on the phones.

**To help us get our ballot access program up and running, my team has set a goal to raise $5,000 by this Friday (petitions start the following Tuesday!).[Only if you’re able, would you consider donating $5 so we’re as prepared as possible for this critical part of the election cycle? You can support our ballot access program right now by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77242274/449816860/-887486310?amount=5&refcode=01172024_MD_MMFR_FR_1&refcode2=ba7fb820-60b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTdmYjgyMC02MGI1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dfS3NZ2VEiVS0JBoNiSqv1ThvCopDEF5Lk14TQZ5ODI=)** | | [ **DONATE NOW** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77242275/449816861/-887486310?amount=5&refcode=01172024_MD_MMFR_FR_1&refcode2=ba7fb820-60b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTdmYjgyMC02MGI1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dfS3NZ2VEiVS0JBoNiSqv1ThvCopDEF5Lk14TQZ5ODI=)

I know that the Presidential election will run right through the Philadelphia suburbs, and I’m determined to help deliver a strong Democratic showing here in PA-04 – and that all starts with making sure my name appears on the ballot.

**[Your help today is greatly appreciated](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77242276/449816862/-887486310?amount=25&refcode=01172024_MD_MMFR_FR_1&refcode2=ba7fb820-60b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTdmYjgyMC02MGI1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dfS3NZ2VEiVS0JBoNiSqv1ThvCopDEF5Lk14TQZ5ODI=)** and will directly support our ballot access program.

Madeleine
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77242277/449816863/-887486310?amount=25&refcode=01172024_MD_MMFR_FR_1&refcode2=ba7fb820-60b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTdmYjgyMC02MGI1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dfS3NZ2VEiVS0JBoNiSqv1ThvCopDEF5Lk14TQZ5ODI=)

* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1729%2E552475%2EM2mqFM)
Hi Peter,
In the last fundraising quarter of 2024, our ultra-wealthy opponent David McCormick outraised us by millions of dollars.
[**Now, we’re asking for just $5 to fight back in Pennsylvania’s U.S. Senate race.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240117-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240117-1&refcode2=1729_552475_M2mqFM&akid=1729%2E552475%2EM2mqFM)
$5 to take on the tsunami of GOP money heading our way.
$5 to re-elect Bob Casey, a real Pennsylvanian who has spent his career fighting for working families from every part of our Commonwealth.
$5 to stop a hedge fund executive from Connecticut from parachuting in and buying his way into a Senate seat.
**$5 to defend our critical Senate majority, which could come down to our race.**
[**What do you say, Peter? Will you pitch in just $5 today? If everyone reading this gives $5, our grassroots support will add up in no time, and we’ll be able to fight back against our mega-millionaire opponent. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: This is the most tragic lie in America today
body:
Planned Parenthood is lying to itself, to vulnerable women and young girls

| [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a78aefa5d27a4d3c9e47a60dd2923027&_e=jlIusd1yTZk1fqDfEaxmUYg8TWubH-hN61fqPx8bbgHsaQp4Asq8gYDJJOi8N0uPbLHj0GBCVHVMw92WQv_Y513r2lSr5YGDnkO7OQ6AKtwnSc8k5JUkyi-vqowwGB8iCsR1qVd9MMLMMgm1OGPP0KcBObbODYmYROqQksWbSRVXdDOjJK2D5ok58yq139M810-J3xWaiNgjDSpEO62sYYDk4vUEYbu2rLoHzQh7DgtxxSRS7_5133q2jhUbxJmWJpWewD_e6xjmyI2kb9CTLWHgQ0QhueKIpOUzR0FIxztoFGkdosCurv_YyM_NJH-a6oVqIaKPTo7FUgAI8DwehuoYr2-z0b82qx7lQxfYoydQ1aUliajQb9mTxGnJlMyW3vrDU1vmU0rVDjiX1iKNBuwPpIhe_VMNu-JsNZ64zME%3D)
---
Fellow American,

Care, no matter what.

This is the motto of Planned Parenthood. While it sounds great on the surface, Planned Parenthood is lying to itself, to vulnerable women and young girls, and to the American people through manipulative and dangerously subtle language.

While they claim to provide healthcare services to women no matter who they are or where they live, abortion can never be healthcare. Further, while they claim to provide numerous services to women, 97.2% of Planned Parenthood's pregnancy resolution services are devoted to abortions, the purposeful ending of an unborn baby's life.

**[Does 97.2% of cases brought to Planned Parenthood that end in the death of an innocent child sound like"care" to you?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a78aefa5d27a4d3c9e47a60dd2923027&_e=jlIusd1yTZk1fqDfEaxmUYg8TWubH-hN61fqPx8bbgHsaQp4Asq8gYDJJOi8N0uPbLHj0GBCVHVMw92WQv_Y513r2lSr5YGDnkO7OQ6AKtwnSc8k5JUkyi-vqowwGB8iCsR1qVd9MMLMMgm1OGPP0KcBObbODYmYROqQksWbSRVXdDOjJK2D5ok58yq139M810-J3xWaiNgjDSpEO62sYYDk4vUEYbu2rLoHzQh7DgtxxSRS7_5133q2jhUbxJmWJpWewD_e6xjmyI2kb9CTLR1ahnTJpxO9HqAEBJX9expPGenW6HaFk5l6qcyzt9IFd73NV0B8rg19AayG8ByHkfxuYpBHHkVgO56MvuagRlK6clfIpBjsBSp3fo2PGmLnb3Lo_biBCP-EXBVZNrZgClWZWrJFzM8MAw7YI_XEMJI%3D)**

Planned Parenthood cares only about the business. It preys on the vulnerable, thrives on women's fear, and fuels itself on greed. When a woman arrives seeking answers to an unexpected pregnancy, the clock to gain a profit starts ticking. They will do whatever they can to make a woman agree to an abortion because each abortion completed is more profit in their pockets.

At SBA Pro-Life America, we are committed to stopping the manipulation and the gruesome deaths of innocent babies. In the last 10 years, Planned Parenthood has the lifeblood of 3.4 million babies on their hands.

[We cannot be the only voice fighting for these precious children and exposing the lies of Planned Parenthood.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a78aefa5d27a4d3c9e47a60dd2923027&_e=jlIusd1yTZk1fqDfEaxmUYg8TWubH-hN61fqPx8bbgHsaQp4Asq8gYDJJOi8N0uPbLHj0GBCVHVMw92WQv_Y513r2lSr5YGDnkO7OQ6AKtwnSc8k5JUkyi-vqowwGB8iCsR1qVd9MMLMMgm1OGPP0KcBObbODYmYROqQksWbSRVXdDOjJK2D5ok58yq139M810-J3xWaiNgjDSpEO62sYYDk4vUEYbu2rLoHzQh7DgtxxSRS7_5133q2jhUbxJmWJpWewD_e6xjmyI2kb9CTLXHlwcB-7D-Xj524G5Ozy5n9c143Q0HZCsCCO5sza9G7K9AHkGgfyypvYhgaT8aqezWhcwB83i57oUlaZeMsoEBBjW3nFO5EsPdp8vglc8xHqArL0gxSiJRDYBadYoVguVEAgIHP--j5bzhcJiMjSuo%3D) Would you stand with us and commit to protecting women and unborn babies from the dangers of Planned Parenthood? By signing our pledge to stop Planned Parenthood, you are helping SBA Pro-Life America fight this "_David vs Goliath_ " battle.

Whether you know it or not, Planned Parenthood is impacting YOUR community and YOUR family by taking your hard-earned tax dollars to fund abortions and devaluing the unborn in our country.

**The lies, manipulation, and millions of deaths must come to an end now.**

Help us fight for the vulnerable by standing up against Planned Parenthood by signing our pledge at the link below:

[SIGN YOUR NAME](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a78aefa5d27a4d3c9e47a60dd2923027&_e=jlIusd1yTZk1fqDfEaxmUYg8TWubH-hN61fqPx8bbgHsaQp4Asq8gYDJJOi8N0uPbLHj0GBCVHVMw92WQv_Y513r2lSr5YGDnkO7OQ6AKtwnSc8k5JUkyi-vqowwGB8iCsR1qVd9MMLMMgm1OGPP0KcBObbODYmYROqQksWbSRVXdDOjJK2D5ok58yq139M810-J3xWaiNgjDSpEO62sYYDk4vUEYbu2rLoHzQh7DgtxxSRS7_5133q2jhUbxJmWJpWewD_e6xjmyI2kb9CTLSVqyWAsfeW9jzSoiwGYiZbbQDgwLhEjTtCXjwLqg7exQ1-kmO3WBGU4MHHg28NmUy2d27MP85yRJvW6ZgPqR4w_2dL13OHhW6r8TN20ZmAidxqEl6hy1AeWQhSbKTiivBwoh7Pnx95cMZbruekVsMo%3D)
| I can't tell you how important your commitment is today to the pro-life movement and the generations to come tomorrow.
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206

Freedom Nation Today

# Trump’s historic victory in Iowa...
President Trump won the Iowa Caucuses in a historic landslide on Monday night. I discuss the ground game, why I take issue with the media calling the race so early, the path forward for other candidates and more with Hogan Gidley who has been on TWO presidential campaigns that won the Iowa caucus.
We also have brand new exclusive polling from Brent Buchanan at Cygnal on the state of the race and how American’s are really feeling.
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=ddd98aeee3&e=f6564bbe3b)

You’re hearing this straight from me, Rob Bresnahan – the Republican Candidate set to flip one of the MOST IMPORTANT House Seats in November. We missed a MAJOR fundraising deadline and are way behind on our next goal. These are REAL goals and REAL deadlines. So I’m doing something I haven’t done before: I’m activating a | This offer is only here for a LIMITED TIME, so take advantage while you can. This may not come back around before November 5th. This race is one of our ONLY CHANCES to flip a seat RED and EXPAND our House Majority. We cannot afford to miss these deadlines; we really can’t. Thank you SO MUCH!! Rob Bresnahan Candidate for Congress (PA-08) PAID FOR BY ROB FOR PA PO Box 971, Pittston, PA 18640 Copyright (C) 2024 Rob Bresnahan for Congress, All rights reserved.

On Saturday, the Dauphin County Democratic Committee held the first debate for the Democratic candidates running to defeat Scott Perry in PA-10. I'm thrilled to tell you that energy is high among Democrats in PA-10, and the event was packed with a standing room only crowd!
Here's the truth about the race for Congress in PA-10. If we are going to defeat former Freedom Caucus Chair and insurrection ringleader, Scott Perry in November, we need our Democratic nominee to be the strongest candidate.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/99379/images/Untitled%20design%20%2820%29.png] At Saturday's debate, I clearly demonstrated that I AM THE STRONGEST CANDIDATE because I don't just talk the Democratic talk, I walk the Democratic walk.
Will you make a donation to support a Democratic candidate in PA-10 who will fight for the things we stand for as Democrats?
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
I am an elected official now in my third term on City Council. That means I am the only Democrat in the race with significant legislative and governing experience. As a council member, I have fought to protect a woman's right to choose, advocated for equity and inclusion, and advanced economic and social justice.
I have a record that clearly shows that I will fight for our Democratic priorities. Why is that important? Turning out younger voters, voters from marginalized communities, and voters from economically disadvantaged communities is the key to defeating Scott Perry. Getting those voters to the polls means giving them a candidate that they can be excited about, a candidate they know will fight for them, and my record demonstrates not only that I will fight for those voters and for our Democratic values, but that I am already doing so.
If you agree that we need a candidate who "walks the walk" in order to defeat Scott Perry, AND to promote the change we want to see in our country, then please support our campaign with a contribution
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]

name: Gloria Johnson
subject: re: the upcoming SCOTUS abortion case
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
It’s up to us to protect pregnant patients.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77243881/449822705/-849459103?refcode=ea.3523d422-63b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.3523d422-63b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTIzZDQyMi02M2I1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jZCnrOpc17T6druVOzUOwEJp-qtvXS4AH6pLkt2Gsqc=&emci=2423d422-63b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=3523d422-63b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=46764483)
---
Peter — the state of Idaho is headed to the Supreme Court to try to give states the right to ban abortion care even in life-threatening emergencies. **Extremist GOP lawmakers would rather let women die than allow doctors to perform life- and health-saving abortion care.** The Biden Administration tried to protect patients by ordering medical providers to grant abortion care in medically necessary situations regardless of state laws. Now, if the Supreme Court approves of Idaho’s challenge to that federal order, _women could die._ I believe that every woman should have the freedom and access to care to make the choice that’s best for her health. This is personal to me, Peter. As someone whose life was saved by abortion care, I’m _terrified_ at the prospect of what happens next. We’ve already seen the harm done here in Tennessee and across the country by the Court’s disastrous ruling overturning _Roe_. We know we can’t depend on the Supreme Court to safeguard our lives or health. We have to protect them for ourselves by defeating anti-abortion radicals like Marsha Blackburn. As your next Senator, I will use my vote to RESTORE and DEFEND reproductive health care access — but I can’t do it alone. We need to elect legislators across this country who share our belief that the freedom to choose is a fundamental right. Will you commit to voting for pro-choice candidates, Peter? Take my pledge 👇 **_[I PLEDGE TO VOTE FOR PRO-CHOICE CANDIDATES>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77243882/449822706/883354823?refcode=ea.3523d422-63b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.3523d422-63b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTIzZDQyMi02M2I1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jZCnrOpc17T6druVOzUOwEJp-qtvXS4AH6pLkt2Gsqc=&emci=2423d422-63b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=3523d422-63b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=46764483)_** I couldn’t do this without you, Gloria Johnson [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77243883/449822707/883354823?refcode=ea.3523d422-63b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.3523d422-63b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTIzZDQyMi02M2I1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jZCnrOpc17T6druVOzUOwEJp-qtvXS4AH6pLkt2Gsqc=&emci=2423d422-63b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=3523d422-63b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=46764483)
| Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

[There’s a movement afoot for change — join us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77243884/449822708/-849459103?refcode=ea.3523d422-63b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.3523d422-63b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTIzZDQyMi02M2I1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jZCnrOpc17T6druVOzUOwEJp-qtvXS4AH6pLkt2Gsqc=&emci=2423d422-63b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=3523d422-63b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=46764483) | [**DONATE TODAY**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77243885/449822709/209297649?amount=25&refcode=ea.3523d422-63b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.3523d422-63b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTIzZDQyMi02M2I1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jZCnrOpc17T6druVOzUOwEJp-qtvXS4AH6pLkt2Gsqc=)

name: The Flyover
subject: Fighter Jets Hit Yemen, Staying Happy in Winter, and Air Force Officer Wins Miss America Crown
body:
The U.S. and Britain carried out a third airstrike in Yemen Tuesday, destroying four anti-ship ballistic missiles ready to be launched by Houthi rebels. You can see British [video of the fighter-jet attack here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8z7FuhSAUxvGngU0DBxAZGLq43a4dDcLxehqUGyXavn1jH-Cu35f8kv_XY3wEyrQ9P8OKvs5lDLHSiWOmE2f6gVE20jagR82TnxEBFUcvrTAGhHaWL15rM0nXaRXN5AyiSiDQxajAhSmIwMmDAC2ktLKXwqgW4twn7KMSaDvrDNMCE9Wyt9-FtrrgnH_LiXsby8qzX2p9HUx9MBgYDNd1tdMU74_BsOF13GPZc2pWSiljg-Goze0aC5bvPr0uypmOzjItnmug_A_X971_AQAA___o_Fl1)

# WEDNESDAY, JANUARY 17, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning**! On this day in 1950, 11 thieves pulled off the Great Brinks Robbery, stealing $2.7 million in the biggest armed robbery of its time. Police caught them years later, just days before the statute of limitations ran out. ## U.S., Britain Launch 3rd Strike in Yemen
The U.S. and Britain carried out a third airstrike in Yemen Tuesday, destroying four anti-ship ballistic missiles ready to be launched by Houthi rebels. You can see British [video of the fighter-jet attack here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8z7FuhSAUxvGngU0DBxAZGLq43a4dDcLxehqUGyXavn1jH-Cu35f8kv_XY3wEyrQ9P8OKvs5lDLHSiWOmE2f6gVE20jagR82TnxEBFUcvrTAGhHaWL15rM0nXaRXN5AyiSiDQxajAhSmIwMmDAC2ktLKXwqgW4twn7KMSaDvrDNMCE9Wyt9-FtrrgnH_LiXsby8qzX2p9HUx9MBgYDNd1tdMU74_BsOF13GPZc2pWSiljg-Goze0aC5bvPr0uypmOzjItnmug_A_X971_AQAA___o_Fl1) The rebels have hit a U.S. container ship and damaged a Maltese freighter as the naval conflict in the Mideast [continues to escalate.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LHOpCAUBeCnwQ4DiKKFxTR2s-2WhoGL3F2EiZcZZ95-4z7AX558ycnJ-X1f7xYT5u2X3WGuoazWVXzDmvANAT9qlVwarvSqGz8HAAVdA7M0ou-V0JNp4hxGo-UwhanTppuCEw5UZwFk752fhkeDsxJKCymNHKXou1a5MHoYXSfADGbqmRbgsZaj_VMw1wghfcsbjtaVvUlzrPVJrLsxtTC1nOfZ7pQvY2qBzLcHU0uGky4sR_JMLTUCfxGneuBfIH7FL-yQ-cMSeB7Lq0YkbjeLmUesFfPGba7IKeKT70iECejqKCGgQ5uIk_0ytdiD324ya_ERzTH754kpIQ2GabHtFtP_0fXnL_8FAAD__18ze94) This week, the Houthi promised to retaliate directly against the U.S. Meanwhile, the Navy has mobilized ships and aircraft to continue searching for two Navy SEALs who went missing during a nighttime mission that confiscated Iranian missile parts. ## Haley Vetoes Debating Without Trump
ABC canceled a planned Thursday night GOP primary debate in New Hampshire after Nikki Haley said [she wouldn't participate](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80L1uwyAUxfGnwRsWXGNwBoYu3tK1o4XhEt8GfwhI3Lx9lT5A5590dPT_uk5XR4m226db0da4T85XeuKU6ImRfmCSXBoOalJNsBERsGvQSiP6HoS6mGaxWmg9QJjdEIUPajZayyBnBUPnVR9VQxYEKCGlkYMUfdeCj0PAwXcCjTaXnimBgeqe2--dtrpgTK_9ibn1-9oku9R6FNZ9MBgZjOd5tn6b_RsZjO9pBqOQDEapGYwb3e_EF5fwxTPGR8HC1z0jPzIWCrhVcokHnF3Fwh9bwlJ4zY_14IfLlTwdb2mXuqYm23CclBIVbZgSt9VR-ntV_4_1GwAA___AHW_5) unless Donald Trump took part. For his part, Ron DeSantis said he wouldn't snub the voters, even if it meant debating with two empty podiums. The New Hampshire primary is set for Jan. 23. An [average of state polls](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LFuhSAYBeCnwU0DvygyMHRxu107Ggo_179BIUi19-0b-wCdTk5yhi_n47E8LEXan-92Q1NDWqyrdOIS6cRAP7CIVqgW5CIbbwIiYN-gEYoPA3CpVbMaBKm1d34MWmocnPbjZN3EVS-4lrJvyAAHyYVQYhJ86DtwYfI4uZ6jGpUemOToqabSfSXa64ohvtKJpXNpa6JZa80H698YzAzm67q6gja6iLbkFG_9PWQw3-24s-BBHvfKYC6Yvz8jObu3udBmy4vBfHsYzDte7Wq3fKxUsCnG54tipGNUTPLnZin-Cer_x_wGAAD__xrlaXA) show Donald Trump leading Haley by 14 points, 43% to 29%, with DeSantis lagging at 6.5%. All the polls were taken before Monday's Iowa primary. For the Democratic Party, President Biden isn't on the ballot but is running a write-in campaign against Rep. Dean Phillips. The [polling average](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LFuhDAQBNCvMR3IXpszV7hIQ3dpU6I9ezk2sjEyFuT-PiIfkGo00hRP8_WYHsiR19cnJnJ1zhP6ygdNkQ-a-Qcm1SrbgplME9xMBKQbcsrKvgdp7rZZXEAYglXaGATpcVbaB23sUz6fpG6gGnYgwUilrBqU7HUHfh4CDV5Lsjd774WRFLjm0n1nXutCc3zng0rnc2qiW2rddqE_BIwCxvM8u0IYfSQsW46X_hoKGK-2X1lo50BrFTAGStkXrOzbrXDC8hYwXh4B40pnu2Da9oULNcWF7eQYeb9ZYeQrIcc_Qf3_mN8AAAD__166abo) shows Biden at 58% to Phillips' 9.8%.
## Chicago Weather Freezes Teslas Dead
Many of Chicago's Tesla owners were frozen out of their cars by sub-zero temperatures, leaving them to wrestle [with dead batteries](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LGSqyAUgOGn0e44gChaWNzGLrfd0kE4yNkhkAESk336nez223_FP__HZbtoChSP__qKS3Vp06bSA7dAD3T0FBsHrkDITbZ2cYgC-xYXrtgwCCZn1fplZqPr5ThPu5oHo3vJ9K4m3ju0-2hn1tIimJCMc8Unzoa-E8ZNFifTM1SjmodGMrRUU-4-E8Xq0YVXemDuTLq2YfG13krT_2vE2oj1PM_Oped-LxSxlLdpxFrR-JhCOl6NWI0no48EOqOGiiVoMF7ng-IBpepKKRYIFNHCSdWDRW3B6FyAIriM-PWWJgULGvZ7NB6S-1U57akWSPcKHjO2ebG3k0KgMqpGsuOqKfxk179vfgcAAP__Dbd-Xw) and charging stations unable to function in the cold. In Skokie, a Chicago suburb, a station with 20 supercharging stations was [packed all day](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LGOtCAUBeCn0e4aQBCnoJjGbv72T7YxDF71bhAmgLo7T79xH2CrrzjJycn5_xgfljyF5Z_d0JQ5jtYVOnD0dOBMX2LkwDUIOcp6MjOiwLZGwzVTSjB50_VqmOLSOdd1WvNJtU-ptGS850KKrsObq8kIJiTjXPOeM9U2ws39hL1rGepO31QlGU5UYmo-I4Wy4uy_44GpcXGrvVlLeeWqvVdiqMRwnmez5XBllRgwwJ4rMdi9xMuA50XB7C3EM2DKkEval8UjlAhutWlBKCtSAjwyUIC8P-GNKcKcEN94tSW433mQ60euk5leJ3lPudOVZMtmyf8OK3__9RMAAP__-ZNwfA) as drivers waited to plug in. One owner said he landed at Chicago's O'Hare airport and had to hire a tow truck to haul his Tesla away. Some owners simply left their cars at non-working charging stations and got other rides. _" You've got a bunch of dead robots out here,"_ one owner said.

Today's edition is sponsored by . | U.S., Britain Launch 3rd Strike in Yemen The U.S. and Britain carried out a third airstrike in Yemen Tuesday, destroying four anti-ship ballistic missiles ready to be launched by Houthi rebels. You can see British The rebels have hit a U.S. container ship and damaged a Maltese freighter as the naval conflict in the Mideast This week, the Houthi promised to retaliate directly against the U.S. Meanwhile, the Navy has mobilized ships and aircraft to continue searching for two Navy SEALs who went missing during a nighttime mission that confiscated Iranian missile parts. Here are Haley Vetoes Debating Without Trump ABC canceled a planned Thursday night GOP primary debate in New Hampshire after Nikki Haley said unless Donald Trump took part. For his part, Ron DeSantis said he wouldn't snub the voters, even if it meant debating with two empty podiums. The New Hampshire primary is set for Jan. 23. An show Donald Trump leading Haley by 14 points, 43% to 29%, with DeSantis lagging at 6.5%. All the polls were taken before Monday's Iowa primary. For the Democratic Party, President Biden isn't on the ballot but is running a write-in campaign against Rep. Dean Phillips. The shows Biden at 58% to Phillips' 9.8%. Chicago Weather Freezes Teslas Dead Many of Chicago's Tesla owners were frozen out of their cars by sub-zero temperatures, leaving them to wrestle and charging stations unable to function in the cold. In Skokie, a Chicago suburb, a station with 20 supercharging stations was as drivers waited to plug in. One owner said he landed at Chicago's O'Hare airport and had to hire a tow truck to haul his Tesla away. Some owners simply left their cars at non-working charging stations and got other rides. " You've got a bunch of dead robots out here," one owner said. Fellow Conservative, Joe Biden isn’t just bad at his job. He’s openly DEFYING federal law by letting people into our country illegally. Thanks to his lawless administration, 9.6 MILLION illegal migrants have crossed our borders in fewer than three years! That’s the HIGHEST rate of illegal immigration in our nation’s history. Make no mistake – this isn’t just an economic or humanitarian problem; it’s one of the worst national security crises we’ve ever faced. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: This is the most tragic lie in America today
body:
Planned Parenthood is lying to itself, to vulnerable women and young girls

| [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=19da85010e224e9781c153c3367ff66e&_e=ZA_SJ3u6QOlGPeLbKORW0ZoEPhb_eFDank8w45v3O27VQztX5gqF9KlKggkJ5zJ2YS7tcxm7PAjStpi9H1mduU4Aa9a8bU8pmNSPwIbVOZUu3nsqbwdAS4Pzuw5NwJ1q1tS_RG1HMXsg70U0FjIViq94bammTHl7Nnb6tWyOZnhjD1dCIsrd7-BESroE0mIeWkBci0Ni3li-ToUWq0coKMgJUvFWzjh4iDxoDvGi54-61r637ZX4d-1Ani7B7rZzx4V2tc--uMiqCFeR5evFL9E838aTqn9TPNnpsWNIgbgdX9afekZpJ_ckbJNJmRz0EJI64mxKlN1VhELAuuXp2tEe1CewF6vNmErGuKmbSqIFcx2ai1QzkXJodlwlnzwE1AU84KfkmlU_actUogHLulTtds79CKTNAb7Nxicphxg%3D)
---
Fellow American,

Care, no matter what.

This is the motto of Planned Parenthood. While it sounds great on the surface, Planned Parenthood is lying to itself, to vulnerable women and young girls, and to the American people through manipulative and dangerously subtle language.

While they claim to provide healthcare services to women no matter who they are or where they live, abortion can never be healthcare. Further, while they claim to provide numerous services to women, 97.2% of Planned Parenthood's pregnancy resolution services are devoted to abortions, the purposeful ending of an unborn baby's life.

**[Does 97.2% of cases brought to Planned Parenthood that end in the death of an innocent child sound like"care" to you?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=19da85010e224e9781c153c3367ff66e&_e=ZA_SJ3u6QOlGPeLbKORW0ZoEPhb_eFDank8w45v3O27VQztX5gqF9KlKggkJ5zJ2YS7tcxm7PAjStpi9H1mduU4Aa9a8bU8pmNSPwIbVOZUu3nsqbwdAS4Pzuw5NwJ1q1tS_RG1HMXsg70U0FjIViq94bammTHl7Nnb6tWyOZnhjD1dCIsrd7-BESroE0mIeWkBci0Ni3li-ToUWq0coKMgJUvFWzjh4iDxoDvGi54-61r637ZX4d-1Ani7B7rZzx4V2tc--uMiqCFeR5evFL6eIJ0QItalRxzZ2J7KHyp-Ri2mvJDqpGiz087elXSUg-yt7uPNtXgana6jgBersATcOM_GgdOnsc5UXaoMgM4Lq5L6kX_juWb9y4hJzQql9dXOYeZGyY2NGHiqYVnnKnxE3ccBqHUznklUkBi-1iGc%3D)**

Planned Parenthood cares only about the business. It preys on the vulnerable, thrives on women's fear, and fuels itself on greed. When a woman arrives seeking answers to an unexpected pregnancy, the clock to gain a profit starts ticking. They will do whatever they can to make a woman agree to an abortion because each abortion completed is more profit in their pockets.

At SBA Pro-Life America, we are committed to stopping the manipulation and the gruesome deaths of innocent babies. In the last 10 years, Planned Parenthood has the lifeblood of 3.4 million babies on their hands.

[We cannot be the only voice fighting for these precious children and exposing the lies of Planned Parenthood.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=19da85010e224e9781c153c3367ff66e&_e=ZA_SJ3u6QOlGPeLbKORW0ZoEPhb_eFDank8w45v3O27VQztX5gqF9KlKggkJ5zJ2YS7tcxm7PAjStpi9H1mduU4Aa9a8bU8pmNSPwIbVOZUu3nsqbwdAS4Pzuw5NwJ1q1tS_RG1HMXsg70U0FjIViq94bammTHl7Nnb6tWyOZnhjD1dCIsrd7-BESroE0mIeWkBci0Ni3li-ToUWq0coKMgJUvFWzjh4iDxoDvGi54-61r637ZX4d-1Ani7B7rZzx4V2tc--uMiqCFeR5evFL31AzooSoI51VASWOeXLywf1Q0CZ6SVo6GemVKuApmSOoogwD8t8d7M8E-4Ez325PCB3K-8lKj-GtiF0LFsb8QsGLFirnCdRAEi0CyQfF6GjCaiMNPpNUR9t8B8iKZrR83aLak3vVe6yPnm_SwaJIww%3D) Would you stand with us and commit to protecting women and unborn babies from the dangers of Planned Parenthood? By signing our pledge to stop Planned Parenthood, you are helping SBA Pro-Life America fight this "_David vs Goliath_ " battle.

Whether you know it or not, Planned Parenthood is impacting YOUR community and YOUR family by taking your hard-earned tax dollars to fund abortions and devaluing the unborn in our country.

**The lies, manipulation, and millions of deaths must come to an end now.**

Help us fight for the vulnerable by standing up against Planned Parenthood by signing our pledge at the link below:
[SIGN YOUR NAME](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=19da85010e224e9781c153c3367ff66e&_e=ZA_SJ3u6QOlGPeLbKORW0ZoEPhb_eFDank8w45v3O27VQztX5gqF9KlKggkJ5zJ2YS7tcxm7PAjStpi9H1mduU4Aa9a8bU8pmNSPwIbVOZUu3nsqbwdAS4Pzuw5NwJ1q1tS_RG1HMXsg70U0FjIViq94bammTHl7Nnb6tWyOZnhjD1dCIsrd7-BESroE0mIeWkBci0Ni3li-ToUWq0coKMgJUvFWzjh4iDxoDvGi54-61r637ZX4d-1Ani7B7rZzx4V2tc--uMiqCFeR5evFL8iPWX_Swm4XZBPscYaNXM7R35N9ZOTqPoSHaVTpcO6r7g26kzAneCC9vn1Y1NGFATU7hb5-aAxzUdh9TSwB8VPXkswVSjSwYLKb1YVCDMXIk5fMUDtZBQEakKuXL7HPyW8v9uz8OXt1dbtHNH5sVYs%3D)
| I can't tell you how important your commitment is today to the pro-life movement and the generations to come tomorrow.
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206

Reclaiming American Freedom

name: Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: FBI arrests Babylon Bee actor, terrifies his pregnant wife
body:
Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

| [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e4308612569e44119d38c9d628bd7a06&_e=7LW8m9-1sRjynQU1ygyXzyLHg5Y6R_rfcyANGtheQcS8dcnxmHccCO7ro8N5aYnwWCxId1OBznu3ixCFxrpwrP__HhO0er3czrCyZ_I3gL2BdZzq6Sz0GPSQ8Ogfb5xOab6r22otwvBl0THVxPdWSsp_Nr_rWiPBvf9rxijgv6QQ1-iSNM-_CcPtCNudVvRqwYK96bbUKzymYReRSp6P-rYY_-d3rzUPrspFKtPON6VAFAxwuDSvZRAzqPlGvjQwJa4JZeZdi0e2Oxt7MU4sQegOpqD7duiWXUVhCVxdV2MRJAIw2uL3QtGPKVa4Bcqw6VjGFXbXRorGtgP2sbTszIEKqK0-kfznwQENhrj1cZQ%3D)
---
| |
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e4308612569e44119d38c9d628bd7a06&_e=7LW8m9-1sRjynQU1ygyXzyLHg5Y6R_rfcyANGtheQcS8dcnxmHccCO7ro8N5aYnwWCxId1OBznu3ixCFxrpwrP__HhO0er3czrCyZ_I3gL2BdZzq6Sz0GPSQ8Ogfb5xOab6r22otwvBl0THVxPdWSsp_Nr_rWiPBvf9rxijgv6QQ1-iSNM-_CcPtCNudVvRqwYK96bbUKzymYReRSp6P-gzU3I3N0JSFiUPloU-N1HUEUEGFD55qe9YHnk-Op7wOx5-Pkzg7bnIF5MeoJPXJOP3j-kY-XhR2BOZyz6L58xhG2KQoiCON7tTD4vx9rf9Mo_weXIwWi7x8RwA2-VcOhfxpIsVZUGKqJ_OVgk-5DdA%3D)Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100 or more right now to help Babylon Bee actor and patriot, Siaka Massaquoi, fight back against Joe Biden's FBI.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e4308612569e44119d38c9d628bd7a06&_e=7LW8m9-1sRjynQU1ygyXzyLHg5Y6R_rfcyANGtheQcS8dcnxmHccCO7ro8N5aYnwWCxId1OBznu3ixCFxrpwrP__HhO0er3czrCyZ_I3gL2BdZzq6Sz0GPSQ8Ogfb5xOab6r22otwvBl0THVxPdWSsp_Nr_rWiPBvf9rxijgv6QQ1-iSNM-_CcPtCNudVvRqwYK96bbUKzymYReRSp6P-nrO3XWzfs83w21ACxbIyj5j_UXgAVj1SMlTQE25pEQNG8zZF8Qb45iLXSf8FP47cUDWUqm25s7aKsn9qoBgmQCDo7Pkc6489vFjWGTpdDyaWs4RqEWgW8X5XVOHl3BsOurxqn8Z_IXQtVfxWgGZYq0%3D)**

Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

He was traveling home with his wife, Charlotte, and their unborn baby, after they attended an event hosted by the conservative news site, Daily Wire.

The FBI refused to show Charlotte the arrest warrant.

**Siaka was arrested because he 's a black patriot who can persuade many Democrat voters to vote against Joe Biden on Election Day. **

You see, not only is Siaka a gifted actor (he's starred in Babylon Bee's funny series, "Californians Adjust to New Life In Texas") ...

... He's also the Vice Chair of the Los Angeles County GOP and a peaceful patriot who briefly appeared at the peaceful protest the stolen presidential election at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021.

Siaka is also bold as a lion about his faith in Jesus Christ, his love for his family, and his deep concern for our country.

Of course, all that makes him an enemy of Joe Biden's lawless administration.

**So the FBI arrested Siaka for spending 76 seconds inside the U.S. Capitol. And charged him with four misdemeanors! That 's right, MISDEMEANORS!**

What's more, this isn't the first time the FBI has stomped on Siaka's rights, either.

**Over twenty FBI agents raided Siaka 's home with drawn guns on June 10, 2021 at 5:45 AM, and handcuffed him, his best friend, and two other roommates. **

As you can imagine, his best friend's two little children, just three and seven years old, were _terrified._

And here's what happened next:

* The FBI agents refused to let Siaka speak to his lawyer
* The FBI agents refused to show him the arrest warrant
* The FBI agents grilled him and his friends for FIVE HOURS with no lawyers present!
* The FBI confiscated his cell phone, computer and his MAGA hat and has refused ever since to give them back!
* And we have reason to believe that Siaka and the other peaceful J-6 protesters were illegally and unconstitutionally surveilled!

**And because the FBI didn 't arrest or charge Siaka, he had no legal grounds to find out why they raided his home...terrorized him, his friends, his friend's little children... abused his Constitutionally protected rights...and stole his property.**

Can you imagine being abused like this... _as an American citizen in your own country?_

What the FBI did to my peaceful, innocent client in 2021 and just a short time ago is a CRIME.

**That 's why I've filed a crucial lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I'm Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 46 years.

You've seen me on Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

I'm proud to say I won a court ruling that President Bill Clinton committed a crime when he illegally the White House files of Kathleen Willey. (I'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime)

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers during the impeachment of criminal Bill Clinton.

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Peter, few moments are more inspiring than the first few weeks of the New Year. It's a time for both reflection and looking forward, a time to weigh the ultimate question: "_How can we do better this year?_ "
And that's exactly why I'm reaching out to you now.
You see, we had a few wins for progress in 2023: States like Ohio and Minnesota moved to definitively defend reproductive rights, in California, lifesaving prescription drugs like insulin were made more affordable, and state leaders across the nation fought to protect and codify transgender rights.
But 2023 came with a series of devastating setbacks to our fight for justice too: More than a dozen states have banned abortions, book bans in schools and libraries in Republican-led states soared, our nation suffered from over 600 mass shootings, the conservative Supreme Court handed down a ruling that further striped away the rights and protections of the LGBTQ+ community, and we experienced the hottest year ever recorded.
**And 2024 is not going to be _any_ easier.

This year, we're facing another defining presidential election and a decisive year for our fight for progress. That's why I'm working tirelessly to ensure that regardless of who wins the White House, the Senate, or the House of Representatives, _your_ life gets better. But to do that, I need to know which fights you want to see prioritized.**

**[That's why I'm counting on _you_ and [500] other Fearless Fighters to share your top priorities of 2024. Your response will help me shape my fight for you this year, so please: Will you take my 2024 Priorities Survey before midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77245161/449827619/316244704?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1299-su-nd&refcode=jtk1299-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjBiZmY2Yi02NmI1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0oFYUEFPbS-Qvb5ZoeYSwXwh2_AwtRx1IZ0ze9bYwQ=&emci=0acdf80f-94b4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=df0bff6b-66b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=25369504)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77245262/449828033/-1885908431?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjQwZGNiMi02NmI1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HMGQr4kaTKWOPu28jAy9gf80GwpV-b3kTETAvbFZcHE=&emci=83288d08-5cb1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=0240dcb2-66b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=25681160) This was taken on election night of our first Congressional win in 2018. It's been six years since I first stood on stage and promised you that you could count on me to fight for the issues that matter most to you. From pushing for common sense gun safety measures to tackling tough challenges like climate change and post-pandemic economic recovery, I couldn't be more proud of the work we've accomplished together. But the thing that really keeps me going is your support. clean_body: It’s Dems first test for the 2024 cycle. | | | = = = Let me explain why this is urgent: In 2024, we have the opportunity to restore sanity and order to the People’s House. The special election in New York's Third Congressional District (NY-03) will be on February 13 and = Tom puts People Over Politics to get big things done for the people he represents. Tom works with both sides of the aisle to deliver common-sense solutions for Long Island and Queens. That's who he is. While extreme Republicans bring nothing but crisis, chaos and confusion to Congress, Tom will bring integrity, commitment and experience back to NY-03. It’s imperative that we help Tom win. We can’t do that without your help, Peter. = = | = = | = = | = = Right now, Team Extreme is gearing up to flood the airwaves with attacks. That’s why I’m counting on your support to make sure Tom can fight back and retake NY-03. Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. I call them corporate jagoffs because they've been selling out communities like Western PA for their own profits – and extremist right-wing politicians aren't doing anything to stop them. name: Travis Nembhard
subject: Help Make History in Northern Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Nembhard for Congress
body:
image of ... [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105170/images/TN_social-share.jpg]
Friend,
Our communities are a crucial turning point as the 2024 election approaches. We have a choice to make and I need your support to break a trend in Northern Virginia.
Northern Virginia has never had an African American represent it in Congress’ 235-year history, and I want to break that cycle. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/breakbarriers]
I'm Travis Nembhard, and I'm running for Virginia's 10th Congressional District to usher in a new generation of leadership. As a son of Jamaican immigrants, I've dedicated my career to standing up for those forgotten by people in power. I’ve grown from my experiences serving in the Obama White House, fighting for civil rights as an assistant attorney general - all while working the overnight shift at Dunkin Donuts to pay for my bills , and more recently as an administrative law judge ruling on consumer protection cases. And, growing up as a member of one of the few African American families in my hometown, which ran conservative, I learned how to navigate opposing views, dispel stereotypes, and build friendships through it all.
These are the lessons that served me well throughout life. Today, I need your help [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/breakbarriers] to further combat injustice, inequality, and misinformation, and ensure we begin to build the pipeline of new generational leaders in Congress, while inspiring our diverse and younger communities in Virginia to step up to join the movement of change.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/breakbarriers [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/breakbarriers]
Here's why your urgent support is vital:
Representation Matters: I aim to break barriers and be the voice our community needs in Congress. Northern Virginia has never seen an African American represent it in Congress. Your support will help us change that.
Urgent Issues: we need to adopt universal childcare and paid family leave, codify Roe, tackle climate change and gun violence, solve transit and infrastructure issues, and ensure responsible oversight of technology development. My experience touches all three branches of government, which has prepared me to solve these complex issues and your contribution will help me get there.
Combating Extremism: Donald Trump just won the Iowa Caucus. Today, another Youngkin aligned Republican has announced their run for this seat. [https://www.foxnews.com/politics/virginia-veteran-aims-first-female-marine-elected-congress-joins-race-flip-coveted-dem-held-seat] In November, control of the U.S. House hinges on VA-10. I am committed to defending our community from hate and disinformation perpetuated by extremist groups. Your support will help build a diverse, grassroots coalition to counter these threats.
Immediate Action: The Democratic primary election is fast approaching on June 18, 2024 and we have thousands of signatures to collect over the next few weeks. Your immediate support will help us hit our benchmarks and deliver a campaign you can be proud of.
Pitch in $5 (or whatever you can afford) here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/breakbarriers]
Northern Virginia deserves a representative who the next generation can look up to, working tirelessly to create positive change. With your support, we can make this vision a reality.
Thank you for standing with me in this critical moment. Together, we can shape the future of not only Virginia, but our nation.
Sincerely,
Travis Nembhard
Contribute [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/breakbarriers]
Paid for By Nembhard for Congress
Nembhard for Congress
P.O. Box 4302
Manassas, VA 20108
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/rM1ehsCb-U-aYQ3G1oubpQ2?unsubscribedata=2zkyeLHvQ3Wu3Tpa5fHtqOdzkDggDwqgim23IbhU5vtYH4z2OMoiCi%2FLQ%2BmOxDl6mzc30naQ%2BIlxW6hk%2FKd%2FbukuggRR69tkHF%2FELN4vPPEkfEr1OC0X8JQfv1PyR71xOjW9u9v7uN05VMkhwK%2BRwfpQ4gqS2TPqbZQN%2F%2FJ4jcsNn62tlBY8C5xk4HXDyhhsrB81qPhLuFOEXOorNS%2BHSkuyB%2F53%2B1mHXWCKFArDtMMZG55QlC1c46I2xOxtGrHnppejmIGNEPvuPBj3f%2FdbtLlhSaWIWgcLT8Mllc7R2yYtQtI3oWPk2%2FQq3Hx95rMpHlTeW5PiCc8dnvnMcSQq9J7z8WPwlg6QupvDUIgygdZdBWSle%2F3SitrO%2Fa507UY%2BygQEgcsOleNeVpt9DAl3nLxb41dQb%2BaXHi%2BfQ2GvR1TXuHxaQuxbrZ5RVcoC%2FIpJ .

Hi there,

I have a number of updates on our campaign to share with you, so I’m personally reaching out today to make sure you have the latest. Here’s where we stand:
* **Political experts continue to rank AZ-01 as one of the most competitive races in the nation.** _Inside Elections_ just reported last week that AZ-01 is “in-play.” We could very well decide the House Majority.

* **Rep. David Schweikert has never been more vulnerable.** Arizonans are realizing that Schweikert is a gaslighter – more concerned with appealing to far-right extremists than getting work done for Arizona families. It’s time to replace him with truthful courageous leadership.

* **I’m the only woman and Latina in this race.** With abortion rights on the line in Arizona and across the country, it’s my top priority to defend reproductive rights and ensure that my daughter has the same rights over her body that I did at her age.

* **Democracy is at stake.** No one will fight like me to ensure that every American has equal and safe access to the ballot box.

I know we can defeat Schweikert, but I can’t do it alone.

**[This is a perfect moment to give your first donation – whether it’s $1, $25, $100, or any amount – toward my campaign. Together, we can flip AZ-01 from red to blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77245854/449830342/-401216107?refcode=em-1.17.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGZjN2Q2NmUtNjhiNS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Bpy1NV_8c5N0agPs3C1UfzX-_Wb86R5V6fnZNRt_tvQ=)**

With abortion rights on the line in Arizona and across the country, it’s my top priority to defend reproductive rights and ensure that my daughter has the same rights over her body that I did at her age. Democracy is at stake. No one will fight like me to ensure that every American has equal and safe access to the ballot box. I know we can defeat Schweikert, but I can’t do it alone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Marlene =** | Marlene's campaign to flip AZ-01 is being built from the ground up with grassroots support! = To learn more about Marlene and how she's fighting for Arizona families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Marlene for Congress 7904 E. Chaparral Road, Suite A110-472 Scottsdale, AZ 85250 United States

subject: You drive this campaign

body:

https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=fdc13d16db996c4e53cb09cef5eec7bd71383f9de0774baaef9bac548ef549f8180bcfa22b33332a9fce3aa985045bc8b4baea7745cebb1436c4c1931dd4203ab7476d35bf1d74fd5d4750237c425ccb

Friend,

When Governor DeSantis says he is going to fight, he means it. And our team showed up this week to prove that.

The media, the establishment, and the Left are all terrified of Ron DeSantis and are doing everything they can to pull the strings so you don't get a say in this election. Why?

-
Because Ron DeSantis is a CHANGE-AGENT.
-
Because Ron DeSantis isn't scared to fight back.
-
Because Ron DeSantis will upend Washington, DC.
-
Because Ron DeSantis will not lose the battles that mean the most to the American people.

We've let the radical Left win for far too long, and it has crippled our country. Ron DeSantis is the only candidate in this race who can crush Joe Biden next November (and has the record doing precisely that). That's why we need you to finish the work that our supporters in Iowa brought to their caucuses when they stood up for the best candidate in this race.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0eeb921a107f945b60fac909867c7b2626a86e78fe5257f49d77e69727963cab7da90f8f0698b739649ea07f6bf00004d1020fa4918d6302f3c0cea3ea46fda9
Support DeSantis with $20.24 today!

We're asking you to contribute to help our team put an END to America's nightmare under Joe Biden's administration. Ron DeSantis is the ONLY candidate in this election with a winning record against Faucism, radicalism, corporate control, and the establishment's ploy against the American people.

We're ready to see our Great American Comeback come to life. Gov. DeSantis has the energy to kick this campaign into overdrive, our supporters have the fight to back him up... and with your help, we're going to get this done.

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0eeb921a107f945b881f05763934fbaecf9c4f13ba38ac13d7a7a8cef98e5bd2ce048fe8bae01eb60a5a4f1383eff91a63f33c265b455a9de122b00b6e711f55

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0eeb921a107f945b6f43c8d11d2bf8903e04abc930900a5835b7e54658988e2f21530e0e7f46a45f6739c15e102193dee1928d565f617789defac03e048a504a
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0eeb921a107f945ba5f2e8fe95bb21e575c248cc1918aa80aa40073725f93c573261866084f5f58df93f098781a53a73d911be495bd088890c429023b0e3213a
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0eeb921a107f945b881f05763934fbaecf9c4f13ba38ac13d7a7a8cef98e5bd2ce048fe8bae01eb60a5a4f1383eff91a63f33c265b455a9de122b00b6e711f55

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0eeb921a107f945b881f05763934fbaecf9c4f13ba38ac13d7a7a8cef98e5bd2ce048fe8bae01eb60a5a4f1383eff91a63f33c265b455a9de122b00b6e711f55

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contribution rules

- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.

name: Tom Suozzi
subject: In just 27 days, we can change America’s course for the better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-suozzi [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-suozzi]
Hi there, it’s Tom Suozzi. Seth Moulton asked me to reach out to you with an important message.
When George Santos became a member of Congress one year ago, we knew his lies made him unqualified for office. In December, he was finally held accountable and expelled. Now, in just 27 days, we can replace him in the toss-up special election on February 13.
In a time of ever increasing polarization and division, now is our chance to make a change for the better. The eyes of the nation will be on NY-03, and it’s up to us what they see. Will we elect a unifier or a divider? Will we finally break through our crippling gridlock or will we continue to fail to solve big problems like climate change, a broken immigration system, rising costs, and gun violence? All that and more is at stake in this election.
Team, this is a critical moment for our nation, and I need you by my side.
Will you rush a split donation right away between Seth Moulton and my campaign to help win this crucial special election? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-suozzi]
Thank you,
Tom
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-suozzi]

name: Katie Porter
subject: I’m used to the cold, but this isn’t normal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=36601%2E3422442%2El5Y7j9)
Derek,
I grew up on my family’s farm in Iowa, so I’m used to cold, winter weather. But the cold snaps we're seeing across the country are far from normal...**and they’re another reminder of how urgently we must address climate change.**
[****](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-tackle-climate-change/?source=em20240117-36601&t=2&akid=36601%2E3422442%2El5Y7j9)
**Washington has been slow to act because of the influence Big Oil and other polluters have on politicians. I don’t take money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil executives, so you can know I’ll actually fight for our planet. If I’m elected to the Senate, here’s the plan:**
* ****Invest in Clean Energy:** As we move to clean energy, I’ll fight for those high-paying union jobs to be right here in California. That starts with the $1.2 billion I’ve secured to build a hydrogen hub in our state, generating 220,000 jobs.**
* ****Hold polluters accountable for the damage they’ve done:** I successfully implemented a new law to charge Big Oil more to drill on our public lands, but we must do more.**
* ****Invest in mass transit and workforce housing across California:** Californians are often commuting hours by car because they can’t afford to live where they work—a system in which nobody benefits.**
* **Prioritize environmental justice:** Big Polluters have deliberately dumped pollution in marginalized communities, and now we must prioritize cleaning up and protecting these communities.
* **Improve disaster preparedness and build more resilient communities:** I’ve written legislation that would create a Natural Disaster Safety Board to conduct comprehensive research and keep communities safe.

Derek, can you **[add your name](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-tackle-climate-change/?source=em20240117-36601&t=3&akid=36601%2E3422442%2El5Y7j9)** in support of my plan to address the climate crisis? And if you’re able,**[can you pitch in so that I can win this race and fight for a better future?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240117-1?refcode=em20240117-36601&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36601_3422442_l5Y7j9&akid=36601%2E3422442%2El5Y7j9)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240117-1?refcode=em20240117-36601&refcode2=36601_3422442_l5Y7j9&akid=36601%2E3422442%2El5Y7j9)
[Petition ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-tackle-climate-change/?source=em20240117-36601&t=4&akid=36601%2E3422442%2El5Y7j9)
I can’t do this without grassroots supporters behind me. Thanks for your support—and for those of you in a cold part of the country—stay safe and warm!
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240117-36601&amounts=&t=5&refcode2=36601_3422442_l5Y7j9&akid=36601%2E3422442%2El5Y7j9)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=6&akid=36601%2E3422442%2El5Y7j9)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=36601%2E3422442%2El5Y7j9)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Courier
subject: This project will be game-changing
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77246573/449833398/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTM2N2FmOTgtNmFiNS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-nXyrwnFodRbTX9oAErtXYHINquXK_VDH1ZB5XK6oTI=&emci=e84e8f1c-51b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=e367af98-6ab5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=14016711)
**Peter — 2024 is here, and the mainstream media is already failing to be the check our democracy needs against bad information and right-wing propaganda.**
Despite inciting an insurrection, facing trial on a number of criminal charges, and repeatedly claiming he wants to be a “dictator on day one,” Donald Trump remains the overwhelming favorite to win the Republican presidential nomination.
And just as it did when Trump won in 2016, the media is giving Trump wall-to-wall coverage, failing to correct the firehose of misinformation that he spreads.
**So Peter, given the circumstances, can we really be surprised that right-wing misinformation continues to spread far and wide?**
That’s why we started Courier in the first place. Right now our journalists are reporting in our newsrooms across 10 battleground states, working tirelessly to correct bad information and provide high-quality, reliable journalism to communities they serve.
And _none_ of our stories are locked behind subscription fees — every single one of our stories is free to read online. But in order to continue operating this way, we rely on the generous support of folks like you.
**One of the best ways you can support Courier’s mission is by pitching in to our Sponsor a Newsroom Project:**
Peter, you've been chosen to sponsor our local news teams! Your donation will go towards supporting each of our newsrooms located across 10 battleground states — including Arizona, Florida, Iowa, Michigan, Nevada, New Hampshire, North Carolina, Pennsylvania, Virginia, and Wisconsin. And that's not all. Courier is making plans to open a newsroom in Texas ahead of the November election. **We set a mid-month fundraising goal of $7,500 and we're hoping to close the gap before midnight tonight, so can we count on you to chip in $5 now and help our newsrooms keep up the fight against bad information?** ****[Chip in $5 ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77246576/449833404/1793931022?refcode=em20240117&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTM2N2FmOTgtNmFiNS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-nXyrwnFodRbTX9oAErtXYHINquXK_VDH1ZB5XK6oTI=)****

Our **Sponsor a Newsroom Project** is set to be a game-changer for our newsrooms as the presidential election takes off. Just last year, our journalists in states like Pennsylvania and Virginia have already shown what a powerful role trustworthy local reporting can have in their recent state elections.
**The stakes will be even higher this November,** and it's crucial that we can raise enough money to help outfit our newsrooms with the staff, technology, and resources they need.
**[So Peter, will you pitch in $5 so we can hit our $7,500 mid-month goal and keep bringing reliable, left-leaning journalism to communities that need it?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77246578/449833407/1793931022?refcode=em20240117&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTM2N2FmOTgtNmFiNS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-nXyrwnFodRbTX9oAErtXYHINquXK_VDH1ZB5XK6oTI=)**
