body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77246745/449833644/38783913?refcode=em-1.17.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjY3YWY5OC02YWI1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MKHzI87cV0nS8PNfHnK1qYffz3HqUNm8eIhJTKnQAjs=) Hi friend, This is Illinois Secretary of State Alexi Giannoulias. For as long as I can remember, I’ve loved to read. Growing up, a book was an escape from the confines of reality, and a source of endless inspiration. It truly shaped who I was and who I’d become. Little did I know as a kid, I’d later be elected as Illinois Secretary of State - and in that role, the state’s chief librarian. Listen, our kids deserve the same opportunities to grow through books as I did. But today’s GOP is waging an all out assault on knowledge. In 2022, book bans led by extreme Republicans surged to a **21 year high.** And our librarians are facing daily threats and disparaging labels, being called everything from 'groomers' and 'pedophiles' to ‘communists’. **Republicans are blatantly trying to silence the discourse primarily around our LGBTQ and minority communities.** Friend, these attacks undermine the very foundations of our democratic society. That’s why earlier this year, I signed legislation prohibiting book bans -- making Illinois the first state in the country to do so. Team—On Monday, Donald Trump won the Iowa caucus in a landslide.

Donald Trump's path to the Republican nomination just got a lot closer. And the danger to our democracy just increased.

While these are the results I expected, it is a clear sign the extreme MAGA agenda isn’t going anywhere. Every day that Trump gets closer to becoming President is another day we must work overtime to stop him.

With the very real possibility of another Trump presidency—even more dangerous and authoritarian than the first—retaking our House majority is more urgent than ever. **A Democratic House majority would be the last line of defense against Trump’s extreme agenda.**

_Politico, The Cook Political Report,_ and others are calling our race to flip NY-17 a true “toss-up” and a key race that will determine control of the House.

Let me be clear: defeating Donald Trump alone is insufficient. We must defeat the entire MAGA Republican Party that has elevated him to power. What’s more dangerous than one man aspiring to be a tyrant is an entire political party that cheers him on in the process.

My opponent Mike Lawler has paved the way for another Trump presidency. Lawler worked to elect Donald Trump in his last two campaigns. Now, by refusing to hold Trump accountable for his role in January 6, voting for insurrectionist Mike Johnson as House Speaker, supporting a baseless impeachment inquiry against President Joe Biden, and recently saying he will support Trump in the general election, Mike Lawler remains nothing but a Trump and MAGA enabler.

Republican Texas Sen. Ted Cruz endorsed former President Donald Trump for 2024 on Tuesday evening after his massive win in the Iowa caucus Monday. Trump ended the night with a 30-point lead in the Hawkeye state, followed by Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis at 21.2%, former U.N. Ambassador Nikki Haley at 19.1% and conservative businessman Vivek Ramaswamy at 7.7%, according to The Associated Press.

clean_body: | | | ** We’re printing huge, highly visible Derek Marshall for Congress road signs. In the more rural parts of the High Desert, supporters have told me they see big signs for MAGA Republicans like my opponent, and think they’re the only Democrats around. It couldn’t be further from the truth - but it is true that Democrats have under-invested in rural organizing for years. We need to show that pro-equality, pro-democracy voters are EVERYWHERE. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. We’ve already lined up dozens of volunteers with stake pounders and pickup trucks to post huge 4’x8’ signs all across the district. We’ve got supporters willing to keep them on their land near highly trafficked roads until the election. Now, all we need are the signs and metal stakes to post them - and we need your help to fund it. ** ****Thanks for your support, Derek Marshall is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. subject: Stand Up for Progress:
body:
Support Alfonso For Congress Today! | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/alfonsoforcongress.com/stand-up-for-progress?e=16d812e81c)
---
|
---
# Support Alfonso For Congress Today!

**Dear Friend,**
**In the face of the recent challenges our nation is grappling with, it has become increasingly clear that we need leaders who are dedicated to moving our country forward. The GOP, unfortunately, seems to be doing everything but passing laws to keep our nation on the path to progress.**
**This is why I am reaching out to you today with an urgent appeal to support Alfonso For Congress – a candidate who is committed to bringing about positive change and actively working towards the betterment of our great nation.**
**Alfonso embodies the values we need in a representative. His dedication to inclusivity, fairness, and progress sets him apart in these times of political uncertainty. By supporting Alfonso For Congress, you are not just endorsing a candidate; you are becoming an integral part of the governmental process, ensuring that your voice is heard and your ideals are represented.**
**Your contribution can make a significant impact on Alfonso's campaign, allowing him to reach more voters, amplify his message, and work towards policies that truly benefit the people. Every dollar you donate brings us one step closer to a government that actively works for the betterment of all.**

| | | | | |
## How can you help?
---
| Use the link below to participate in our campaign to help in our efforts.
---
| [I am In!](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=ea45ac3fd1&e=16d812e81c)
---
|
---
| | | | | |

**Here's how your donation can make a difference:**
**1\. Campaign Outreach: Your support helps us reach more voters, spreading Alfonso's message of progress and positive change.**
**2\. Advertising: With your contribution, we can invest in advertising campaigns to raise awareness aboutAlfonso's stance on crucial issues that matter to you.**
**3\. Community Engagement: Alfonso is committed to engaging with communities, understanding their concerns, and working towards practical solutions. Your donation supports these initiatives.**
|
---
|
---
|
---

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Comprehensive Security Survey enclosed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
As we kick off the election year, we need to know where you stand on some critical national security issues. Please complete your personally assigned survey as soon as possible. | | | We need your help to answer these critical questions, Peter. **[**Your personally assigned Survey to Secure America is available at this link.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=dbff6146710646f6b87dbe5816cacba4&_e=6T6we3P7yJO85tvr9_BmVU_3tTnmaoGD3Q3DVfs2NECYh0pd9dYyYMdwt4vqOh_xlUqlfJYbQCwP1-d8Fwilvt9qgBIFpLFfkBmiTNQXlwhAA5mkXwu8muJiIepqEmQdI1w9ROmeVIO4bzrN3OW-B9fJoq6DbYqxkvhtASHFrJY9qYUpJ_2zr_eM6hjthIKLMJnSrOlElyQxJxbG1pAJKEsIf0WyLkhAxwBoCoMJDlMZtWTsCVpxxkIzTUj9tieexATUy1DH1N7zYn41nk2PRx1m4wmTaW1v8a-VKQ3hExKNexipoPbZ6O_aOs0ZlmsPe5p2izZxugTcdP3O-elWhBidvukLqjK3AjgNVanRpjsArw5CYMT0FVenxPr7PTUWKbqVJFsaK8E01gZYePuDZZDV6oViicTTvxYapAtZ3FB1Za424UdRfR1C88zHofCDRD3Fd1ylu_F6vO2d6qinHg%3D%3D)** Please complete your Survey to Secure America today so we can tabulate results and act on the critical information we gain from your time taking the survey. We can’t do this alone, Peter. We need your help to ensure our efforts align with the current Republican Party, and we will never know where you stand if you don’t tell us. So please be as accurate as possible when selecting your answers to our essential Survey to Secure America questions. Your answers will inform our efforts as we campaign to take back the Senate Majority for Republicans. We need to know where you stand so we can campaign on the issues that matter most to our loyal supporters. **[**Please complete your personally assigned Survey to Secure America today.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=dbff6146710646f6b87dbe5816cacba4&_e=6T6we3P7yJO85tvr9_BmVU_3tTnmaoGD3Q3DVfs2NECYh0pd9dYyYMdwt4vqOh_xlUqlfJYbQCwP1-d8Fwilvt9qgBIFpLFfkBmiTNQXlwhAA5mkXwu8muJiIepqEmQdI1w9ROmeVIO4bzrN3OW-B9fJoq6DbYqxkvhtASHFrJY9qYUpJ_2zr_eM6hjthIKLMJnSrOlElyQxJxbG1pAJKEsIf0WyLkhAxwBoCoMJDlMZtWTsCVpxxkIzTUj9tieexATUy1DH1N7zYn41nk2PRx1m4wmTaW1v8a-VKQ3hExKNexipoPbZ6O_aOs0ZlmsP3Rv2xUMhcw0pw3MSX8J1NrokDVDvYEghePXH-4teLidDXpi8KciG3ecZ6oKyzfEH2yQQvS60Z9m7ujajSSoHK0xh10PflITi9d3NO9hxpeFfILnrAbFgKKEkEAAgopJtcSvoXDxZZi731DQY89VHNQ%3D%3D)** Thank you,

| | Alaska is under assault by the Washington Democrats. As they enact their agenda to shut down oil, gas, and mining, it's Alaskans who are feeling the pinch—[and unfortunately, the Democrat destruction has just begun.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=796c7cbb71784885b9d9760024a84aae&_e=Gk0SklMh8kR1MLeh6QuyQq_D1yUeQC8LhkQToJsYwBr2BIR5fe_UyM7DZtoCENQe3iJI9d7TQblN_2bt85RvERz_WzR2tSxH0UsunQJBTrumf_FbV6jtPDyJo17mQ8s1deT_cOUn86u-AMdjF1v7sNHGdGVIwhbQ6QOXjtLpEZ9HUqZevzGpjjc4YW2RuRFRRpEa7iAokI1u-CtzIO9f4JYgB-qAyq0ImUZ5YRnW1WC5J95ucmaUdukbiKBF1QwB) **👉 From day one of the Biden administration, their disastrous agenda has included killing the Keystone XL pipeline, rejoining the Paris Climate Accord, revoking ANWR oil & gas leases, and reinstating Obama-era crushing energy regulations.** All the while, Biden has also depleted more than 45% of our Strategic Petroleum Reserve and gas prices rose to unaffordable levels. [We've got to get America back on track to protect American families from the onslaught.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=796c7cbb71784885b9d9760024a84aae&_e=Gk0SklMh8kR1MLeh6QuyQq_D1yUeQC8LhkQToJsYwBr2BIR5fe_UyM7DZtoCENQe3iJI9d7TQblN_2bt85RvERz_WzR2tSxH0UsunQJBTrt2zC16uNLXsagLfAlNAV_jSRCb3rOFdjiCV02Zboqwts4j0lKIMPpK4n0hkP1Bdhssa92G7f8ept6NPYL0bAxe08Z6vblK1VRGbsO34Xtn6CCcY_roacevuSJ5p7zc9LBCgm8hMUOAnuBbyZoZnQPU) In order to get the job done, I'm counting on supporters like you to step forward and help send me to Congress in 2024. Campaigns are expensive, and we must build a formidable operation now. [Will you contribute $20.24 or any amount to show Biden we mean business—energy business–in Alaska?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=796c7cbb71784885b9d9760024a84aae&_e=Gk0SklMh8kR1MLeh6QuyQq_D1yUeQC8LhkQToJsYwBr2BIR5fe_UyM7DZtoCENQe3iJI9d7TQblN_2bt85RvERz_WzR2tSxH0UsunQJBTrt8ai5-7KjWfD2r8X584-j3RMKi3cLN-90OU5QI4GtCFecg-nbvm2LlimBw6MbW8son5A8L0-44VspPFxzrNNxDkYmDZbcb5clijPlX_P0DsHwMERqq08kX8EDmonJeOHH2E-YrKsN8gCO9cHBTS0xF) Thanks for doing your part, **Nancy Dahlstrom**
Candidate for Congress, Alaska At-large

As they enact their agenda to shut down oil, gas, and mining, it's Alaskans who are feeling the pinch— 👉 From day one of the Biden administration, their disastrous agenda has included killing the Keystone XL pipeline, rejoining the Paris Climate Accord, revoking ANWR oil & gas leases, and reinstating Obama-era crushing energy regulations. All the while, Biden has also depleted more than 45% of our Strategic Petroleum Reserve and gas prices rose to unaffordable levels. In order to get the job done, I'm counting on supporters like you to step forward and help send me to Congress in 2024. Campaigns are expensive, and we must build a formidable operation now. Thanks for doing your part, Nancy Dahlstrom Candidate for Congress, Alaska At-large | | | | | | | -| ---|--- | | | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Valerie=20Stiles?=
subject: Our new Republican initiative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands
body:
Join us on Tuesday, January 23

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/5a9a8e23a411/re-hey-9341049?e=d30db4cde8)
Republicans,

It's my honor to announce that Republican Chairman Gordon Ackley has appointed me to lead the Women’s Leadership Committee, the only official women’s organization of the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands.

The Women’s Leadership Committee isn’t going to be a social club that meets and never does anything. Instead, it's going to be a voice for the ladies in our party to advocate Republicanism. Of course, you gentlemen are also welcome to support this initiative.

The committee will advance our mission of growing the party to give fellow Virgin Islanders the political alternative that is so desperately needed on St. Croix, St. John, and St. Thomas.

The first event is on St. Croix. We’re gathering at 7 p.m. Tuesday, January 23 to watch the New Hampshire results. To attend, please REPLY to this email to get information on the venue.

Helping me as co-chair is Barbara De la Portill. Together, we not only look forward to the caucus and the rest of the 2024 cycle, right through victory in November. After all, we must elect Republican senators and Republican delegates to the territorial constitutional convention.

Thanks, and I look forward to serving you on the Women’s Leadership Committee.

Valerie Stiles
Chairman, Republican Women's Leadership Committee

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

[**That 's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](http://links.freeliberty.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c43c8af9c8b54d5c8ec57e75b7ec3d78&_e=aUVClhyVX4Ig13Sfo8bxyWU5nsQEFP0GGSLosrUNwPYAfEXp3tQTgBTOQwN7iegcRlCurHR4yeM6rkrY4ro3K0NSpT0mEkR_hSLFoUWZU1RcbJpCcmahXw5Ecbw49dOblRgqV_iDh2xepLRt8sH9zx6740NMKMMee3zATHUTWkeMT45rsG1RyDavoQW357QGqGr_193_ZwegC7j5GTvhPvqlpn3JfRRmgqkmyG7MS_qB9_4OnZ-pPpHYrLnWVBiA1kGktgHffJFH517l98gfgkVNwEkbAwzhWHAskLuF22w9A5bcCqXox0yzT1yUziVF1WVCJWdK-Hiv-AnLbClHlpWvDw3e440XmpCnBh26MO1u-VpiH71Zeb-NvhIFIdBlWOzIsFSMEHl5lEnu2bKNEg%3D%3D)
The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative.

I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

[**So please help me out this one time, Friend:**](http://links.freeliberty.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c43c8af9c8b54d5c8ec57e75b7ec3d78&_e=aUVClhyVX4Ig13Sfo8bxyWU5nsQEFP0GGSLosrUNwPYAfEXp3tQTgBTOQwN7iegcRlCurHR4yeM6rkrY4ro3K0NSpT0mEkR_hSLFoUWZU1RcbJpCcmahXw5Ecbw49dOblRgqV_iDh2xepLRt8sH9zx6740NMKMMee3zATHUTWkeMT45rsG1RyDavoQW357QGqGr_193_ZwegC7j5GTvhPvqlpn3JfRRmgqkmyG7MS_qB9_4OnZ-pPpHYrLnWVBiALBtDDP-OstETeRrbFe7FsVB39nMN1odXO7t62kMAFwaD7TbujfrGEasVEuu_yHmeqJezMrmf3KUl8XGG-QbWv3eOaZ-J524pY-4N3VwrjhKJlMLb7v81rw9pKdchF21dXrmTbnctgampNhXDYGPohA%3D%3D)

Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today.

I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals.

I intend to make you proud.

God Bless,

Jim Banks

clean_body: Friend... | Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today. I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

Peter,

We made promises we didn’t keep.

Every day, it got worse.

Every day, it was a disaster.

The adult in the room never materialized.

On August 26th, 2021, Joe Biden carelessly washed away the sacrifices made by my wife, me, our families, our closest friends, and countless others.

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: This is the most tragic lie in America today
body:
Planned Parenthood is lying to itself, to vulnerable women and young girls

| [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d50eba4b2f644ab29a6b363b0c80ad2e&_e=Ir6fOcGslIvU7TqswScgV7b_b_ZNAyMHQNlkMlVn6f3Pq5s8nRSAWaEfkkmgQeKk6TGHwt-4iC5Gr9sw2kKS-HuLZZQOOS-sVptWtfVQxarGy8wE50K-xSaCL53YxZ__9Kw8-aLUkWj560xKfQSjlIAoCM7ivBsYixLHQOCB6mfnGMeEJgI5nj-QYCorT5taDiYx5MeCZxaOmkWvx8p-5svs_bW9UIiEQvOFDhTwdsaTOBKeIBostWekE3svwnohZKuF0Ju6LVg6PTvC6ixZLSrXIv_vbjMMlZ0h83_YpdKAfyntrOSyenopxWkx4p7QT2KXmiMk0SytcP0FHlLLw5AapJxi1PgEJzaFAAEtYRJc3RFf6je-Ux9iSxhpeIDpEhrMYSbjb4LX3K7ULyrR7H89i6HubemDGRI4w3JNzWc%3D)
---
Fellow American,

Care, no matter what.

This is the motto of Planned Parenthood. While it sounds great on the surface, Planned Parenthood is lying to itself, to vulnerable women and young girls, and to the American people through manipulative and dangerously subtle language.

While they claim to provide healthcare services to women no matter who they are or where they live, abortion can never be healthcare. Further, while they claim to provide numerous services to women, 97.2% of Planned Parenthood's pregnancy resolution services are devoted to abortions, the purposeful ending of an unborn baby's life.

**[Does 97.2% of cases brought to Planned Parenthood that end in the death of an innocent child sound like"care" to you?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d50eba4b2f644ab29a6b363b0c80ad2e&_e=Ir6fOcGslIvU7TqswScgV7b_b_ZNAyMHQNlkMlVn6f3Pq5s8nRSAWaEfkkmgQeKk6TGHwt-4iC5Gr9sw2kKS-HuLZZQOOS-sVptWtfVQxarGy8wE50K-xSaCL53YxZ__9Kw8-aLUkWj560xKfQSjlIAoCM7ivBsYixLHQOCB6mfnGMeEJgI5nj-QYCorT5taDiYx5MeCZxaOmkWvx8p-5svs_bW9UIiEQvOFDhTwdsaTOBKeIBostWekE3svwnohZKuF0Ju6LVg6PTvC6ixZLZ5GxaYFpDb2rQz-EArIbjFZCxJPgK6LNgrMGE5zMr4a3fwibLuc80aXa14IM3sUCcA-8M5baEqUs6lMo1DjfJCbyplm-UT1UF_CCVAuIRU0TQhDnyCIaTo2IBGRmCPHc2TPuaU5A_gP34fZUj4I6Gc%3D)**

Planned Parenthood cares only about the business. It preys on the vulnerable, thrives on women's fear, and fuels itself on greed. When a woman arrives seeking answers to an unexpected pregnancy, the clock to gain a profit starts ticking. They will do whatever they can to make a woman agree to an abortion because each abortion completed is more profit in their pockets.

At SBA Pro-Life America, we are committed to stopping the manipulation and the gruesome deaths of innocent babies. In the last 10 years, Planned Parenthood has the lifeblood of 3.4 million babies on their hands.

[We cannot be the only voice fighting for these precious children and exposing the lies of Planned Parenthood.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d50eba4b2f644ab29a6b363b0c80ad2e&_e=Ir6fOcGslIvU7TqswScgV7b_b_ZNAyMHQNlkMlVn6f3Pq5s8nRSAWaEfkkmgQeKk6TGHwt-4iC5Gr9sw2kKS-HuLZZQOOS-sVptWtfVQxarGy8wE50K-xSaCL53YxZ__9Kw8-aLUkWj560xKfQSjlIAoCM7ivBsYixLHQOCB6mfnGMeEJgI5nj-QYCorT5taDiYx5MeCZxaOmkWvx8p-5svs_bW9UIiEQvOFDhTwdsaTOBKeIBostWekE3svwnohZKuF0Ju6LVg6PTvC6ixZLZSofH8ViUzCizj3ZvWl-htED2PH5R-M35NyJbUcHwm4InT5fqlZmOCJVw3Y6DVrfzZ1k73jrmoPbMpO9mDdlEp4jmLDdaXNvDNmS8dCI4B7NgNgSztsoGkBJlnWnxgjUjOn_G9IRre473YD7bKgYgc%3D) Would you stand with us and commit to protecting women and unborn babies from the dangers of Planned Parenthood? By signing our pledge to stop Planned Parenthood, you are helping SBA Pro-Life America fight this "_David vs Goliath_ " battle.

Whether you know it or not, Planned Parenthood is impacting YOUR community and YOUR family by taking your hard-earned tax dollars to fund abortions and devaluing the unborn in our country.

**The lies, manipulation, and millions of deaths must come to an end now.**

Help us fight for the vulnerable by standing up against Planned Parenthood by signing our pledge at the link below:

[SIGN YOUR NAME](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d50eba4b2f644ab29a6b363b0c80ad2e&_e=Ir6fOcGslIvU7TqswScgV7b_b_ZNAyMHQNlkMlVn6f3Pq5s8nRSAWaEfkkmgQeKk6TGHwt-4iC5Gr9sw2kKS-HuLZZQOOS-sVptWtfVQxarGy8wE50K-xSaCL53YxZ__9Kw8-aLUkWj560xKfQSjlIAoCM7ivBsYixLHQOCB6mfnGMeEJgI5nj-QYCorT5taDiYx5MeCZxaOmkWvx8p-5svs_bW9UIiEQvOFDhTwdsaTOBKeIBostWekE3svwnohZKuF0Ju6LVg6PTvC6ixZLThWdyPL3FFblurP4cjEGZo7IJzi0hIrUozNi6ZDTU3SygCmOF109-dxR0OYLw21SmgwRhvyVvR9Vt0OPEjfSEqmRpawUb_1K8AITxls6SkB0qf0MDNnBFSETo156_JJTc_faLmWBwyW6bAKiiZmseo%3D)
| I can't tell you how important your commitment is today to the pro-life movement and the generations to come tomorrow.
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206

Defend the Constitution

**Should Donald Trump be held accountable for his actions?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/17193?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240117-AnswerMissing-TrumpImmunity1QSv1-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240117-AnswerMissing-TrumpImmunity1QSv1-ETG-sl1&akid=13246%2E9716520%2ENrUg8N)

Donald Trump’s legal team just made a _terrifying_ statement, team: They just claimed Trump should be immune from prosecution for almost _anything_ he did while in office -- just because he was the president!

**No one is above the law. Not Donald Trump, not Rudy Giuliani, not the MAGA fanatics who desecrated the Capitol. But Trump is trying to claim special privileges _even after America kicked him out of office._**

This cannot stand. We must fight back, which is why we’ve launched an urgent Live Poll to prove Americans won’t let Trump escape accountability. **But we haven’t heard from you yet, and the deadline is midnight!**

**Tell us before the poll closes:****Should Donald Trump be held accountable for his actions?**

| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/17193?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240117-AnswerMissing-TrumpImmunity1QSv1-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240117-AnswerMissing-TrumpImmunity1QSv1-ETG-sl1&akid=13246%2E9716520%2ENrUg8N)

Team DSCC

subject: Re: Sign to Biden: Don’t allow Israel’sgovernment to force the Palestinian people out of their homes and historic land!

body:
Israeli leaders want to permanently expel all Palestinians from Gaza. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvc90t-_wYH4XsmTPh4ojcRYKQKlcP_LWecB1hC7gy1-sH0pl3vPVW3U0h1nksqndle9VuCMhhPjJpGXC1C9KwQxEMhdoTYatEvHZv73sdjDxKGDrLLgQvT8qFcan2LwZLTnaobEpOa6r4VegwBt3URf0hcp9zQXMYQ_FXfTlKIKIjaGrsnvuVBpm8a0iIUlZWBR7tHQNgoX_NrIO0co6SbGjip3SeNFI_gvLefIpe5AcFaL881abofeuDgMkpQQ8-q-W3IxBEwHO9rVcjFzoQZ2WmOmXY-5x5_oy7Si1Eh6dHDVZl5MGECsTG8DDwlUgNh2M00e7ILm9jp2jXOVlD9GYmAzUm9kM-m8TDWJpY849KvMOVXLX5vwSJRaAjPs3o/432/X1j0K916SLykZHwMGZr1uA/h0/5507Qvl0ENAgVsbVo9Sa4WBDvFGaASTce210FZd8HNU)
---
Friend, Prominent Israeli political leaders are openly calling to mass displace Palestinians from Gaza to other countries. **The forcible transfer of civilians is ethnic cleansing. Under international law it’s considered a war crime and a crime against humanity. And it’s already happening.** Already, 2 million Palestinians have been displaced due to the Israeli military’s relentless bombing, which has destroyed most of Gaza’s civilian infrastructure. At the same time, the military is continuing to bomb civilians as they travel along routes the Israeli military has designated as “safe,” and bombing them in areas designated as “safe zones.” By blocking UN motions to stop the bombing and blockade of Gaza, and bypassing Congress twice to send more bombs to Israel’s military, President Biden is enabling this ethnic cleansing to continue with impunity. **Biden and leaders in his administration say they reject the forced displacement of Palestinians outside of Palestine. If that’s true, they must act to stop this ethnic cleansing, rather than enabling it!** [**Sign now to tell Biden and his administration: No more! Do not allow Israel’s government to forcibly displace Palestinians, or to expel Palestinians out of historic Palestine.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QA9BJBpadG4kQx10lcYsQunpI5jk71L4LaETxXPrxPeyv5W2DBAT502anVip7YrD6c9Wr75evhi_2-0DFU4-tqkMIvCxbTo4Oq7gewiL_1nmijR5WpMba_pRDm74itCCeOjq7Y9xTh96Er1H1Clm0458Sbzj9ue95AaUYXVnO8YRCBgwW7at9t7WYvg2SOOcT783q5WzlZDcKyBlrFxN1k4klyh5cVdu7JrjWY-xQgmjuHRgL-yRBGdTYFtbDBFS0ULrVY210qDe0oS-kn4U_4qobfCsHnXOmsdrACi5k1BHI4gVKLaQ0_UG8ZnYIuFoUWmwOXJ9iCqTInCiJ-bIWzc2dUhBMw6nNBdPujL968a9VkDi-Als1SoT5VwBfDNXGaDuOeTbAhJRMLEbtNeyr4kAdalckZ6dz5Uq-z0f_r9PqpXWQHQMaNQ-iv7dUZheemgH5dC_gJpHUK1o7RQp-39Wad5HGcu8L17qyevV9l7wh8fiI3PzFoKXTxhMDSZmdk1KASEH6BeB7dm7zec5g-FCD7AcgT6llZ7HBMOPwF-ZDb0MKgVQG_Hqanx3Bq_4Gy7eGW6nQxpEWj4oCYOdX5A/432/X1j0K916SLykZHwMGZr1uA/h1/crMk_2taIypbbIdvZGg4E_oS7HWMMhR2KqgcriXTyKQ) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QA9BJBpadG4kQx10lcYsQunpI5jk71L4LaETxXPrxPeyv5W2DBAT502anVip7YrD6c9Wr75evhi_2-0DFU4-tqkMIvCxbTo4Oq7gewiL_1nmijR5WpMba_pRDm74itCCeOjq7Y9xTh96Er1H1Clm0458Sbzj9ue95AaUYXVnO8YRCBgwW7at9t7WYvg2SOOcT783q5WzlZDcKyBlrFxN1k4klyh5cVdu7JrjWY-xQgmjuHRgL-yRBGdTYFtbDBFS0ULrVY210qDe0oS-kn4U_4qobfCsHnXOmsdrACi5k1BHI4gVKLaQ0_UG8ZnYIuFoUWH9G88NA2qknUUFpM8F10CPNDJ5h3jdvbyPpBwQ1UQtQS-r_OWeCl2TyTAWX7UjKkHQ5YQpnp7uGiW5h3DlaTQ5VqB3OxhoAm0JfI1GBhdAQG_yrYXSUXzetkzoqmdVFygXexGOgr13wqyUSoBwWHmp2OzTYFUJzwRf_XCd6fGmt0z8La3GVznr5EerqxvlCNEIrbPoYyBSmokXVgJVJcaW32XjRWZPUpLKcwo0Elk6XZ6R4xxA4docLTZ-Y6E6Ip5gWGN86KAnMyhI7FoZPVg/432/X1j0K916SLykZHwMGZr1uA/h2/2eUiQTBnvm-1ORC_MTLGmo61OfYGp8pvwyoErUFc9iY)
---
Seeing this widespread devastation, a UN expert noted that _“the only logical conclusion is that Israel’s military operation in Gaza aims to deport the majority of the civilian population en masse.”_
Indeed, that’s what many Israeli military and political leaders are calling for.
**Senior Israeli officials are explicitly aiming for “another Nakba,” when most Palestinians were violently expelled from their homes in 1948.**
They’re proposing not only the mass expulsion of Palestinians, but also calling for the Israeli government to take over and occupy Gaza with Israeli settlers.
Biden and leaders of his administration claim that they will not allow mass displacement of Palestinians to other countries. Let’s hold them to their words!
[**Sign to Biden and leaders in his administration: No more ethnic cleansing! Don't let Israel’s government expel Palestinians from their ancestral homeland or move Israeli settlers into Gaza.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QA9BJBpadG4kQx10lcYsQunpI5jk71L4LaETxXPrxPeyv5W2DBAT502anVip7YrD6c9Wr75evhi_2-0DFU4-tqkMIvCxbTo4Oq7gewiL_1nmijR5WpMba_pRDm74itCCeOjq7Y9xTh96Er1H1Clm0458Sbzj9ue95AaUYXVnO8YRCBgwW7at9t7WYvg2SOOcT783q5WzlZDcKyBlrFxN1k4klyh5cVdu7JrjWY-xQgmjuHRgL-yRBGdTYFtbDBFS0ULrVY210qDe0oS-kn4U_4qobfCsHnXOmsdrACi5k1BHI4gVKLaQ0_UG8ZnYIuFoUa8YHKoZal5mM6wvg08MLNeWvMfRk0iBk3AzsHD-PTc5UaGUcIDGHXZYkncY3txBTqZ_upekttR9zBK39oS207S-Xc5elTjDgX3aAT8Zl2QZoMblhoCp2ewwG1wSwqjSKvrm27YLTqwkrnYFS9kCHvQtqsYblrn6s_UvMhmd3_W51AC7uEcTl4BnA4520DGhs1ftrDlVfaxgqamPx1fNKnxBCJ9bYffJwpdnv2vMvUAE-BmovWI_cMD4tGaO_lSMQBhW9ErOfQMaCYDIPZgtGxA/432/X1j0K916SLykZHwMGZr1uA/h3/ebtsx9uc58s9NJTJ0BxKLqF24F1_vPmet67wq4ZDq7g)
Together, we will continue to push back against oppression and push toward liberation.
In solidarity,
Rashida
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Tue, Jan 16, 2024
Subject: Sign to Biden: Don’t allow Israel’s government to force the Palestinian people out of their homes and historic land!
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
In a clear example of ethnic cleansing, top Israeli officials are openly calling to push millions of Palestinians out of Gaza—and advocating for replacing them with Israeli settlers.
Many Israeli politicians have demanded a “second Nakba,” referring to the catastrophe of 1948, when Zionist militias violently expelled 750,000 Palestinians from their lands, destroyed hundreds of Palestinian villages, and massacred about 15,000 Palestinians.
A member of Prime Minister Netanyahu’s cabinet said: _“We are now rolling out the Gaza Nakba.”_
Some survivors of 1948’s Nakba fled to Gaza. Along with Palestinians in exile outside of Palestine, they were denied the right to return home. Now they and their descendants have become refugees once more, forced to flee multiple locations in just three months.
Dropping tens of thousands of U.S. bombs on the tiny Gaza Strip, the Israeli military has already forcibly displaced 2 million Palestinians—90% of Gaza’s population.
[**Sign the petition to the Biden administration: End this campaign of ethnic cleansing now. clean_body: Israeli leaders want to permanently expel all Palestinians from Gaza. | | | Friend, Prominent Israeli political leaders are openly calling to mass displace Palestinians from Gaza to other countries. The forcible transfer of civilians is ethnic cleansing. Under international law it’s considered a war crime and a crime against humanity. And it’s already happening. Already, 2 million Palestinians have been displaced due to the Israeli military’s relentless bombing, which has destroyed most of Gaza’s civilian infrastructure. At the same time, the military is continuing to bomb civilians as they travel along routes the Israeli military has designated as “safe,” and bombing them in areas designated as “safe zones.” By blocking UN motions to stop the bombing and blockade of Gaza, and bypassing Congress twice to send more bombs to Israel’s military, President Biden is enabling this ethnic cleansing to continue with impunity. Biden and leaders in his administration say they reject the forced displacement of Palestinians outside of Palestine. If that’s true, they must act to stop this ethnic cleansing, rather than enabling it! | Seeing this widespread devastation, a UN expert noted that “the only logical conclusion is that Israel’s military operation in Gaza aims to deport the majority of the civilian population en masse.” Indeed, that’s what many Israeli military and political leaders are calling for. Senior Israeli officials are explicitly aiming for “another Nakba,” when most Palestinians were violently expelled from their homes in 1948. They’re proposing not only the mass expulsion of Palestinians, but also calling for the Israeli government to take over and occupy Gaza with Israeli settlers. Biden and leaders of his administration claim that they will not allow mass displacement of Palestinians to other countries. Let’s hold them to their words! Together, we will continue to push back against oppression and push toward liberation. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Tue, Jan 16, 2024 Subject: Sign to Biden: Don’t allow Israel’s government to force the Palestinian people out of their homes and historic land! To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, In a clear example of ethnic cleansing, top Israeli officials are openly calling to push millions of Palestinians out of Gaza—and advocating for replacing them with Israeli settlers. Many Israeli politicians have demanded a “second Nakba,” referring to the catastrophe of 1948, when Zionist militias violently expelled 750,000 Palestinians from their lands, destroyed hundreds of Palestinian villages, and massacred about 15,000 Palestinians. A member of Prime Minister Netanyahu’s cabinet said: “We are now rolling out the Gaza Nakba.” Some survivors of 1948’s Nakba fled to Gaza. Along with Palestinians in exile outside of Palestine, they were denied the right to return home. Now they and their descendants have become refugees once more, forced to flee multiple locations in just three months. Dropping tens of thousands of U.S. bombs on the tiny Gaza Strip, the Israeli military has already forcibly displaced 2 million Palestinians—90% of Gaza’s population. Razing entire neighborhoods to the ground and destroying a majority of buildings, Israel’s government has rapidly made much of Gaza uninhabitable. Meanwhile, the Israeli military continues to bomb areas it designated as “safe” for Palestinian civilians. Along with this brutal destruction, Israel’s government is depriving Palestinians in Gaza of food, water, shelter, medical assistance, and other basic needs. What’s happening now is ethnic cleansing, which is a war crime. But many Israeli politicians want to go even further, openly calling to permanently expel all Palestinians from Gaza. Prime Minister Netanyahu’s Intelligence Minister has openly recommended the transfer of all Palestinians in Gaza to Egypt. Other senior officials in Netanyahu’s cabinet have made it clear that forced expulsion and resettlement is their goal. Netanyahu has been trying to push countries to take displaced Palestinians, calling his plan “voluntary migration.” Of course, there’s nothing “voluntary” about bombing people to make them flee. Biden and leaders in his administration say they reject forced displacement of Palestinians. But their actions show otherwise: They are continuing to arm and fund Israel’s military as it commits these war crimes, while shielding Israel’s government from accountability. We cannot allow our government to continue enabling the bombing or the blockade on Gaza, which has already killed at least 23,000 Palestinians. That’s 1 in every 100 people in Gaza! Thank you for speaking up against our government’s complicity in oppression. May we continue building a better world together. In solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . Look, I know it may seem odd to ask for _just_ $1. In the grand scheme of things, it can be hard to see how a dollar can even make a difference.

**But here’s the difference, team:** My campaign doesn’t run on dark money contributions or wealthy mega-donors. **It’s built by hard-working folks like you.**

Supporters who come from families like mine. Families who want to leave their communities better than they found it. Everyday people coming together to build something greater than themselves.

And though $1 may seem symbolic, the movement it grows will be able to move mountains. **And it all starts with $1.**

[**So can I count on you to chip in $1, friend? Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

It’s imperative that we help Tom win. We can’t do that without your help, Peter. Our path to victory in 2024 includes retaking New York's Third Congressional District. I know this is the team to help us defeat the odds and bring Tom Suozzi back to Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Tom Suozzi and Ritchie Torres will go through immediately: = = = Right now, Team Extreme is gearing up to flood the airwaves with attacks. That’s why I’m counting on your support to make sure Tom can fight back and retake NY-03. Keep the faith, Hakeem | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =. name: Dr. Paul Gosar
subject: dismantling woke marxist ideologies
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | Dismantling Woke Marxist Ideologies | [](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-23-42-34-9d6b31efdc-9r5928756f)
---
**Dear Fellow Patriot,**

In these times that try men's souls, we stand at the crossroads. I recently addressed the Natural Resources Subcommittee on National Security, the Border, and Foreign Affairs, confronting a peril that threatens the very fabric of our military institution **\- the infiltration of marxist ideologies.**

_Like a creeping shadow, these doctrines have sapped our Army's vitality, leading to dwindling ranks and dispirited hearts._

As we face this encroaching tide, let us remember the solemn warnings of our forefathers. President Washington spoke of _"cunning, ambitious, and unprincipled men"_ seizing the reins of power. President Eisenhower, too, cautioned us against the rise of misplaced power.

_These admonitions ring true today as we confront a world teetering on the brink of instability_.

**[_Our military, that great bulwark of liberty, must not become a plaything for social ideologies. It is our shield and sword, not to be dulled by political machinations_](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-23-42-34-9d6b31efdc-9r5928756f)**.

[](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-23-42-34-9d6b31efdc-9r5928756f)

The call of duty is clear - our armed forces must remain a bastion of merit, unyielding in its pursuit of combat readiness and effectiveness.

As we forge ahead, our mission is twofold: to safeguard our borders and uphold the unyielding values upon which our great nation was built. The current administration, alas, seems to have strayed from this noble path, weakening our stance through misguided policies on foreign aid and border security.**[It is upon us, the true guardians of liberty, to right this course](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-23-42-34-9d6b31efdc-9r5928756f)**.

In this noble endeavor, your support is our bulwark. The alarming trend in our Army's recruitment, highlighted by recent reports, underscores the urgency of our task.
_
The number of White recruits has plummeted, a casualty of this cultural skirmish that has left our Army beleaguered and besieged by 'woke' ideologies. This is not merely a crisis of numbers; it is a crisis of spirit._

**[Thus, I call upon you, the stout-hearted and the brave, to stand with me](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-23-42-34-9d6b31efdc-9r5928756f). [

Your generous support, whether monetary, vocal, or through active participation, are the lifeblood of this cause](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-23-42-34-9d6b31efdc-9r5928756f)**.

Together, we shall strive to ensure that our military remains a formidable force, unswayed by the winds of political expediency.

[](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-23-42-34-9d6b31efdc-9r5928756f)
Join me in this pivotal battle for the soul of our nation. **[_Together, we shall prevail_](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-23-42-34-9d6b31efdc-9r5928756f). **

With deepest gratitude and unyielding resolve,

Congressman Paul A. Gosar, D.D.S. | [ DONATE >> ](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-23-42-34-9d6b31efdc-9r5928756f)
---

They suggest that challenges at the southern border are part of a plot to register migrants as voters in the 2024 election. This outrageous claim is not only false but poses a serious risk to the integrity of our electoral system. This unfounded narrative is gaining traction, exploiting concerns about border security, and manipulating them into a weapon to erode confidence in our elections. It's a new low, even for those who have been critical of immigration policies. There is zero evidence for this outlandish theory. clean_body: | = In recent days, prominent figures have been spreading a baseless and dangerous conspiracy theory. They suggest that challenges at the southern border are part of a plot to register migrants as voters in the 2024 election. This outrageous claim is not only false but poses a serious risk to the integrity of our electoral system. This unfounded narrative is gaining traction, exploiting concerns about border security, and manipulating them into a weapon to erode confidence in our elections. It's a new low, even for those who have been critical of immigration policies. body:
Today, we are able to share the news about the history our campaign has made |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77251034/449848396/-1448738720?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240117_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjczNDFmYTctNzRiNS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UB97HkpIsRY1wmhvt6hbXWXa3YXBAWSu87MgIaJ9Vyk=)
---
Peter — today is an exciting day for Andrei’s campaign as we’re able to share with you a big announcement: Thanks to the hard work and help of so many of you, Andrei’s campaign ended 2023 setting the **record for the most fundraising success in the year before the election of any Congressional candidate in all of Arizona history.** And what’s just as important is _**how**_ we did it: with the support of people ready to elect a Congressperson who can make a real difference. Most of David Schweikert’s campaign funds come from corporate PACs and special interests. Andrei’s campaign is funded by people pitching in what they can to build our movement. [**Chip in now to help us keep up this momentum in 2024 →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77251036/449848400/-677050522?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240117_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjczNDFmYTctNzRiNS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UB97HkpIsRY1wmhvt6hbXWXa3YXBAWSu87MgIaJ9Vyk=) Here’s what we know: Andrei has the momentum in the campaign to replace David Schweikert and bring new leadership. It’s why Andrei has earned the support of so many change-making Arizona leaders and incredible organizations like the League of Conservation Voters, VoteVets, Serve America, and New Politics. **Andrei is also one of only _five_ candidates for Congress in America to be endorsed by the Brady PAC for his commitment and track record in the fight to end gun violence!** Today, the real work of defeating David Schweikert is just beginning. We’re going to have to organize and campaign even harder to take on Republican dark money and corporate PAC supporters. The fight won’t be easy, _but it’s not impossible._ **Last year, we broke records, and with the election year just getting started with your help, we can do it again in 2024.** So that’s why we’re asking today: [**Peter, will you chip in $15, $25, or whatever you can afford today to help us grow our momentum even more this election year and flip AZ-01 blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77251039/449848402/-677050522?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240117_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjczNDFmYTctNzRiNS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UB97HkpIsRY1wmhvt6hbXWXa3YXBAWSu87MgIaJ9Vyk=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $15 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77251041/449848405/-677050522?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240117_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjczNDFmYTctNzRiNS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UB97HkpIsRY1wmhvt6hbXWXa3YXBAWSu87MgIaJ9Vyk=)

clean_body: Today, we are able to share the news about the history our campaign has made | = Peter — today is an exciting day for Andrei’s campaign as we’re able to share with you a big announcement: Thanks to the hard work and help of so many of you, Andrei’s campaign ended 2023 setting the record for the most fundraising success in the year before the election of any Congressional candidate in all of Arizona history. And what’s just as important is how we did it: with the support of people ready to elect a Congressperson who can make a real difference. Most of David Schweikert’s campaign funds come from corporate PACs and special interests. Andrei’s campaign is funded by people pitching in what they can to build our movement. = Here’s what we know: Andrei has the momentum in the campaign to replace David Schweikert and bring new leadership. It’s why Andrei has earned the support of so many change-making Arizona leaders and incredible organizations like the League of Conservation Voters, VoteVets, Serve America, and New Politics. Andrei is also one of only five candidates for Congress in America to be endorsed by the Brady PAC for his commitment and track record in the fight to end gun violence! Today, the real work of defeating David Schweikert is just beginning. We’re going to have to organize and campaign even harder to take on Republican dark money and corporate PAC supporters. The fight won’t be easy, but it’s not impossible. Last year, we broke records, and with the election year just getting started with your help, we can do it again in 2024. name: Powered By People
subject: We’re taking things to the next level
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
**FIRST:** Beto O’Rourke founded Powered by People in late 2019 with the goal of fighting GOP voter suppression, registering and turning out voters in historic numbers, and helping Democrats win elections in Texas.
**THEN:** We made history. In 2020, we organized over 20,000 volunteers who registered 250,000 voters, called and texted every Democrat in the state voter file to encourage them to participate in the election, and ultimately helped drive the highest voter turnout that Texas has seen in nearly 30 years.
**NOW:** We’re putting in the work to build on that progress and make an even bigger impact in 2024. We’re holding multiple volunteer trainings _every single week_ to build a volunteer army big enough to beat our previous registration and turnout records.
[**Can you chip in $3 today to support this work?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240117.f0blWe&refcode=ema20240117-238034&t=1&akid=238034%2E444211%2EorVp4f)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240117.f0blWe&refcode=ema20240117-238034&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=238034%2E444211%2EorVp4f)**
Powered by People is in this for the long-haul. We know that if we keep our eyes on the prize and continue this work year-round, we will continue to produce historic voter turnout and ultimately deliver Texas’ 40 electoral college votes to the Democratic nominee for president for the first time since 1976.
Your support makes this possible, so thank you for being in this fight with us.
Powered by People

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20240117-238034-footer&t=21&refcode2=238034_444211_orVp4f&akid=238034%2E444211%2EorVp4f)**
Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=238034%2E444211%2EorVp4f), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=238034%2E444211%2EorVp4f).

**Peter, Trump winning the White House is dangerous for all of us.**

Trump’s victory Monday night just reinforced what we already know: the entire GOP has been taken over by MAGA extremism. Instead of American values like democracy and the rule of law, Republicans put one thing before everything else: the opinion of Trump himself.

[**_Monday's win for Trump was a loss for all Americans, and it just shows that we need to be ready to stop him this November. We need to work together to defeat Donald Trump and his MAGA allies. name: Sean Feucht
subject: FWD: URGENT PRAYER FOR OUR IRAQ MEDICAL MISSION 🙏🏽🇮🇶
body:
| | | Sean Feucht here-- we're still raising funds for our medical mission to Iraq. My team and I leave this week, and we will be providing food, clothing, and basic necessities, as well as medical care to Syrian refugees housed at a camp in Northern Iraq. We meet the physical needs first, then minister to their spiritual needs by sharing the Gospel. We've seen radical life transformations occur in years past, and I am expectant to see God move in power again! If you would like to contribute, follow the link here: _**www.letusworship.us/iraq**_.

God Bless,
Sean
---
\-------Forwarded message-------From: Sean Feucht
Date: Tuesday, January 16, 2024
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com[](mailto:tyler@onmessageinc.com)Subject: We're headed to Iraq 🇮🇶🙏🏻
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=4e4c375b9998463f8923d50075d918a6&_e=GsvhYRY0GzPLpDtPIXcalUQ-J83TlLArKdVmT5VcijvMnxRA1YkyfPPSeRv4ocGdWU26GFYBOWNh_3paks-ChopfxryBlgJlKt8xPqODS_AHUO4g63kL8fDBBbqXx_NJMn7jhYQbA75cPsrs5xClkWb3ox-MSAVpnjBkAi8-0AFSmVaszBf_EMAGtmdB38pi1RYUrlTpi9LzK9PBpHZBvqyqrf5zemNM1GwBwcyuUci2hdXDRwx2NTfq7emeYi2mjhYhEnwF0B_SK9puF8RALTtsCo1ANsTUtQ5vCURd2T1PM06zpWgVq7kfpn4c2ZhK)
---
Dear Friend,
---
I'm headed to Iraq! In just a few days, I leave for a refugee camp in Northern Iraq to serve Syrian refugees with our team of doctors, nurses, medical personnel and other professionals. Despite Iran's recent bombing attacks in the region, _we still feel God calling us to GO and**we will obey**_! This will be my 10th year in a row traveling to the Middle East and a nation that means so much to me! _God has opened a _**MASSIVE**_ door to a bigger camp _than we had originally planned as they are desperately asking us to help them! Right now, we are scrambling to purchase more supplies to make sure we have enough for this bigger camp— “The heart of man plans his way, but the Lord establishes his steps.” _We need to raise just over**$9,000 in the next 4 days**_ to purchase blankets, food and other supplies to arrive in time for our team to distribute! name: Heinrich HQ
subject: BREAKING: A Republican multi-millionaire is running against Martin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Moments ago, a wealthy, well-connected Republican announced her campaign to defeat Martin in New Mexico’s U.S. Senate race.
#
Derek -- Moments ago, a Republican multi-millionaire announced her campaign to defeat Martin in New Mexico’s U.S. Senate race.
**Martin’s new challenger is a longtime hedge fund executive who has already poured half a million dollars into her own campaign.** As the daughter of New Mexico’s last Republican Senator, she is all but certain to have GOP mega-donors lining up to support her bid. She already has the full backing of the National Republican Senatorial Committee.
**While Martin’s opponent may have a personal fortune and the GOP establishment behind her, what we have is far more valuable: a grassroots movement that comes together to fight for our shared values time and time again.**
**[That’s why we’re reaching out today: We need to raise as much as possible in these first 48 hours to prepare for the spending Republicans are about to pour into New Mexico. Will you rush in a split contribution of $5 or any amount between our campaign and John Fetterman to help keep Martin in the Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240117-1?refcode=em20240117-1-8752&refcode2=8752_434096_sVwYX7&akid=8752%2E434096%2EsVwYX7)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240117-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240117-8752&refcode2=8752_434096_sVwYX7&akid=8752%2E434096%2EsVwYX7)**
We can’t afford to lose Martin’s voice in the Senate. The issues that matter most to our movement are at stake, from preserving our public lands and waters to protecting critical benefits like Medicare and Social Security.
But this race is officially competitive, and we need to build up our grassroots resources immediately to win. Between Martin’s new opponent jumping in and Donald Trump planning to ramp up his campaign in New Mexico, it’s clear Republicans are making the Land of Enchantment a top target this year.
**[We have our work cut out for us in the months ahead. Please help us defend Martin’s seat in New Mexico from his new challenger by splitting a grassroots contribution of $5 or any amount now between our campaign and John Fetterman >>](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240117-1?refcode=em20240117-1-8752&refcode2=8752_434096_sVwYX7&akid=8752%2E434096%2EsVwYX7)**
Thank you for helping keep Martin where he belongs — in the U.S. Senate fighting for a brighter future for New Mexico.
-- Heinrich HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240117-8752-footer&t=1&refcode2=8752_434096_sVwYX7&akid=8752%2E434096%2EsVwYX7)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8752%2E434096%2EsVwYX7)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8752%2E434096%2EsVwYX7)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: government shutdowns
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5108%2E5257348%2EX1h-gf)
Derek, Republicans’ incompetence should not be the reason Americans lose critical housing assistance that helps keep a roof over their heads.
But today, that threat is hanging over all of our heads. As we face yet another government funding deadline, zealots in the House Freedom Caucus are jeopardizing low-income Americans, seniors, people with disabilities, and families with children.
[**I’m calling on you to join me in saying enough is enough. Add your name as a citizen cosponsor of the legislation I introduced, the _Affordable Housing Stability During Shutdowns Act_ , to exempt federal rental assistance from the impact of a government shutdown._**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20240117-Affordable-Housing.AVpvI0&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240117_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=5108%2E5257348%2EX1h-gf)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20240117-Affordable-Housing.AVpvI0&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240117_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=5108%2E5257348%2EX1h-gf)
---
Far-right MAGA Republicans don’t compromise. They don’t negotiate. They don’t even agree among themselves.
**Their last fight over a government funding bill culminated in the ousting of Speaker Kevin McCarthy — and now, the new GOP Speaker Mike Johnson’s job is on the line.**
The MAGA Republican Party is no longer a governing party. It is a havoc-wreaking cult of personality of the former president.
Losing housing assistance during a government shutdown could cause severe harm — even economic ruin — for:
* **_2 million people_ in low-income households**
* **_400,000_ low-income seniors**
* _**1.1 million people with long-term disabilities**_
* **Nearly _300,000_ rural Americans**

No matter what the outcome of this most recent MAGA-driven government funding fight may be, this must be the _last time_ we allow them to throw millions of vulnerable Americans under the bus in service of their incoherent political aims.
[**Add your name as a citizen cosponsor of my _Affordable Housing Stability During Shutdowns Act_ today._**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20240117-Affordable-Housing.AVpvI0&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240117_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=5108%2E5257348%2EX1h-gf)
Thanks for joining me in speaking up for this important issue at such a critical time. Your voice makes a real difference.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3421?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240117_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=5108%2E5257348%2EX1h-gf)

Losing housing assistance during a government shutdown could cause severe harm — even economic ruin — for: 2 million people in low-income households 400,000 low-income seniors 1.1 million people with long-term disabilities Nearly 300,000 rural Americans No matter what the outcome of this most recent MAGA-driven government funding fight may be, this must be the last time we allow them to throw millions of vulnerable Americans under the bus in service of their incoherent political aims. Thanks for joining me in speaking up for this important issue at such a critical time. Your voice makes a real difference. — Adam | | 135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502 | mailto:contact@adamschiff.com | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE Sign up to receive or . Text JOIN to 724433. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please

name: Trump Ballot Alert via Our Revolution
subject: There's still time to remove Trump from the ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13436?t=1011?refcode=email-20240117&akid=5199%2E5885482%2EsrGZES ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Two things remain true (and urgent) after Donald Trump won the Iowa
caucuses by a giant margin:

1. We can’t let Trump return to the White House.
2. Trump shouldn’t even be on the ballot, because he’s an
insurrectionist.

Maine and Colorado have already kicked Trump off the ballot because the
U.S. Constitution is crystal clear: officials who’ve taken the oath of
office and engaged in insurrection are barred from holding office. When
Trump tried to overturn the 2020 election results and destroy our
democracy, he made himself ineligible to run for any political office —
especially president!

Our Revolution has been central to the work to kick Trump off the 2024
ballot, including early meetings with Maine’s Secretary of State Shenna
Bellows, who removed Trump from the ballot just two weeks ago.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13436?t=1048?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240117&akid=5199%2E5885482%2EsrGZES ]We’re relying on your grassroots support to ramp up our campaign to
pressure Secretaries of State to kick Trump off the 2024 ballot. Can you
contribute today and help us mobilize to ensure Trump can’t reach the
White House again?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13436?t=1035?express_lane=true&amount=12&refcode=email-20240117&akid=5199%2E5885482%2EsrGZES ]CHIP IN $12 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13436?t=1036?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240117&akid=5199%2E5885482%2EsrGZES ]CHIP IN $27
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13436?t=1037?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=email-20240117&akid=5199%2E5885482%2EsrGZES ]CHIP IN $35 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13436?t=1038?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=email-20240117&akid=5199%2E5885482%2EsrGZES ]CHIP IN $50
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13436?t=1039?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=email-20240117&akid=5199%2E5885482%2EsrGZES ]CHIP IN $100 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13436?t=1040?&amount=12&refcode=email-20240117&akid=5199%2E5885482%2EsrGZES ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Working to get Trump off the ballot in more states isn’t the only work
we’re doing to make sure 2024 is an election year where democracy and
progressivism prevails.

Trump voters are clearly energized. But we’re mobilizing progressives to
get out and get active in this battle for democracy. Organizing in 2024 is
about exciting folks around what we can accomplish by electing, and
re-electing, progressive champions at every level of government and
getting active about our issues in the streets and in our communities.

We’ll bring voters to the polls to elect advocates for urgent action on
peace, corruption, climate change, worker empowerment, Medicare for All,
and so many more progressive priorities. This swell of progressive energy
is a major part of what can lift the top of the ticket — President Biden —
to defeat the extreme GOP’s choice, whether it’s Trump or someone else.

This is a lot of work over the next few months and every day is critical.
The more states that bar Trump from the ballot before the Supreme Court
hears his February 8th appeal, the harder it will be for the right-wing
judges on the Court to save him.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13436?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240117&akid=5199%2E5885482%2EsrGZES ]Chip in today to help fuel our 2024 work to stop Trump and elect
progressives. As the largest grassroots-funded progressive political
organization in the country, we rely on your support! Our average donation
is just $16.46, so when you donate, you’re making a big impact on our
work.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=5199%2E5885482%2EsrGZES ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=5199%2E5885482%2EsrGZES ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=5199%2E5885482%2EsrGZES ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=5199%2E5885482%2EsrGZES ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=5199%2E5885482%2EsrGZES ]Website |

name: Jane Fonda
subject: We read through your survey responses, and here's what we found.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Hey there! It’s Jane Fonda.

I’ve always said – nothing beats a good old heart-to-heart, especially when it's about our planet.

I really appreciate everyone who took the time to fill out our 2024 Priorities Survey earlier this month. My team and I just finished reading through your responses, and here’s a glimpse of what we've learned together:

1️⃣ The majority of respondents are most concerned about a warming ocean, loss of species, and the increase of excessive heat that threatens our planet’s existence.

At Jane Fonda Climate PAC, we're committed to using your support to challenge the influence of the fossil fuel industry and tackle these issues head-on. We're determined to hold those politicians accountable who pander to Big Oil and Gas, ensuring they feel the heat as intensely as we do about the climate emergency.

2️⃣ A resounding call for action was clear, with over 54.3% of respondents advocating to focus our efforts on challenging the fossil fuel industry's political influence, supporting more climate champions for office, and uplifting pro-climate policies this year.

We're focused on supporting bold leaders who prioritize our planet's health over financial gain. Our victories in 2023, including significant gains in local and state governments, have set the stage for an even more impactful 2024. We're ready to keep this momentum going!

3️⃣ And the best part? Many of you responded that you are ready to engage in activism or volunteer work — with 38.4% likely and 26.6% very likely to participate.

We’re ready to turn your enthusiasm into tangible action with phone banking opportunities and grassroots campaigns for candidates who will push for the green transition we desperately need. Stay tuned for more information!

Your voice is our compass, friend, and I truly mean it when I say thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts with me.

Now, if you haven't had a chance to express your views, don’t sweat it. The conversation is still open. Your insights will help us steer the direction of the Jane Fonda Climate PAC as we gear up for the critical battles ahead. [https://secure.everyaction.com/wfY38ne3BUiH-zUCkL3gLg2]

TAKE THE SURVEY [https://secure.everyaction.com/wfY38ne3BUiH-zUCkL3gLg2]

2024 is not just another year, folks. It's our next chapter in the fight for our planet.

Thanks again,

Jane Fonda

----------------------
Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Jane Fonda Climate PAC
600 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#15180
Washington, DC 20003
United States

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Trump’s coming to Arizona later this month to prop up his favorite candidate in the country: Kari Lake.
#

Peter, we made an extended push to our mid-month deadline yesterday. This team always steps up when I need them to, and we made some great progress to our goal. So thank you for that.
We set goals because they add up to what we need to raise to run a campaign that can win. So we can be ready for anything that comes our way. So we can beat Kari Lake.
And something big is coming our way.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240117-1-45&t=1&akid=1744%2E734936%2EvNw6Zb)
Trump’s coming to Arizona later this month to prop up his favorite candidate in the country: Kari Lake. And as much as we’d like to take a break today, this is an all hands on deck moment.
We have to be ready. Trump knows how important this state is, how important this race is.
And if we don’t have the resources we need, both Kari Lake and Donald Trump will take advantage of it. They will attack us with everything they’ve got. They could win.
Sorry to put that thought in your head, but it’s true.
That’s why we’re asking you to make your first contribution before he gets here. Because when he does, he’s going to generate a lot of attention for Kari Lake and a lot of MAGA fanatics are going to be even more fired up to beat us.
So we’re asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution and help me take back Arizona’s Senate seat? It’s going to add up fast if everybody chips in. And that’s how we’ll win this race.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240117-1-45&t=2&akid=1744%2E734936%2EvNw6Zb)

We’ve got to win in Arizona. We have to take back this seat. And the only way that will happen is if we stick together.

Ruben

The GOP wasted our time again and again in 2023. From baseless impeachment inquiries to potential government shutdowns, House Republicans put their petty politics above the people last year.

Let’s make sure that they can’t keep doing this by putting the House back under the control of reasonable leadership. With your support, we can make sure that we get back to governing.

**[We’re going to need to hit every fundraising goal from now until Election Day. Can I count on you to help us reach our goal before the end of this week?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77252174/449852149/1045260035?source=EM_NBI_ZL_20240117_FR_MMFR_0_3MO_ZoeLofgren_NA_NA_MMFR1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWY0MmVkYy03OGI1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FceQ08l04qyocYGhnGt_d61MRPgYNZgKJUeiDVEf6QA=)**

Thank you for stepping up,

Zoe

subject: We survived the attack
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/migop.org/we-survived-the-attack?e=a2af77507c)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Republicans,

The Michigan Republican Party is under attack by a band of “rogue Republicans” colluding with democrat media operatives. On January 6, 2024, they held an illegitimate gathering to try to usurp Chairwoman Kristina Karamo and key members of her administration.

Here are the facts:

Fact 1 – Chairwoman Karamo was duly elected by a majority of the MI GOP Precinct Delegates on February 18, 2023.
Fact 2 – Chairwoman Karamo was reaffirmed by MI GOP State Committee members by a nearly unanimous vote of 59 – 1 during a special State Committee meeting held on January 13, 2024.
Fact 3 – The RNC **_officially_** recognizes Kristina Karamo as the Michigan Republican Party State Chairwoman ([https://gop.com/about-our-party/rnc-members/](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=01ef67f208&e=a2af77507c)).
Fact 4 – There is irrefutable evidence that spotlights how members of the “rogue Republicans” **singled out** Chairwoman Karamo and plotted to eliminate her as Chairwoman of the Michigan Republican Party. They created an imposter website (mi –gop.org) and used a bogus email handle (@mi-gop.org) to disseminate fraudulent email correspondence to confuse and deceive Michigan Republican voters.
Fact 5 – Michigan Republican Party State Committee members voted to remove Malinda Pego (rogue republican) as Co-Chairwoman and six members (rogue republicans) from the State Committee for plotting and partaking in actions that violate MI GOP Conflict of Interest bylaws.

The Michigan Republican Party has its Good Neighbor Program and Urban Engagement and Energization Framework to win more elections in 2024, but we need your support to be victorious.

**[We are asking every Righteous Republican reading this email to chip in and help us put hard-working middle-class Michiganders back in charge of their government.](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=fbdcb52c97&e=a2af77507c)**

In Liberty,

Michigan Republican Party

Fact 3 – The RNC officially recognizes Kristina Karamo as the Michigan Republican Party State Chairwoman (). Fact 4 – There is irrefutable evidence that spotlights how members of the “rogue Republicans” singled out Chairwoman Karamo and plotted to eliminate her as Chairwoman of the Michigan Republican Party. They created an imposter website (mi –gop.org) and used a bogus email handle (@mi-gop.org) to disseminate fraudulent email correspondence to confuse and deceive Michigan Republican voters. Fact 5 – Michigan Republican Party State Committee members voted to remove Malinda Pego (rogue republican) as Co-Chairwoman and six members (rogue republicans) from the State Committee for plotting and partaking in actions that violate MI GOP Conflict of Interest bylaws. The Michigan Republican Party has its Good Neighbor Program and Urban Engagement and Energization Framework to win more elections in 2024, but we need your support to be victorious. name: Team ECU/LAV Action
subject: Who is Leonard Leo?
body:
We’ve been emailing you a lot recently about the corruption in our government. From Congress to the Supreme Court, corruption is a major problem that needs to be addressed.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77252333/449852814/444630146?refcode=1-17-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4YTc5ZDQzLTc5YjUtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RvTQFX9Xd1DFPASJP7CsG8OJl4ZDW6p2CG17vZYqHq0=)
---
| | Friend, We’ve been emailing you a lot recently about the corruption in our government. From Congress to the Supreme Court, corruption is a major problem that needs to be addressed. No individual better showcases the dangers of corruption and Big Money in politics than Leonard Leo. Between his massive Dark Money network and his inappropriate and unethical relationships with Justices Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito, Leonard Leo is the kind of individual who poses a huge danger to our democracy. His network of conservative mega donors and judges have paved the way for the destruction of _Roe v. Wade_ and the Voting Rights Act. His work has single-handedly taken our country back decades. **[**If you agree that mega donors and Dark Money puppet masters like Leonard Leo should not be buying our Supreme Court Justices, can you chip in $10 so we can keep up our work on passing Supreme Court ethics reform?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77252334/449852816/444630146?refcode=1-17-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4YTc5ZDQzLTc5YjUtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RvTQFX9Xd1DFPASJP7CsG8OJl4ZDW6p2CG17vZYqHq0=)** Leonard Leo has been influential in the appointment of anti-democracy judges to courts all across the country. For a judiciary that is supposed to be above petty partisan politics, Leo’s work is exactly the opposite. **[**Politicians and judges across the country are in the pocket of Leonard Leo and his mega-donor friends. If you also understand that this is unethical behavior that needs to stop, please contribute $10 so we can keep up our work.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77252335/449852817/444630146?refcode=1-17-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4YTc5ZDQzLTc5YjUtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RvTQFX9Xd1DFPASJP7CsG8OJl4ZDW6p2CG17vZYqHq0=)** With Leonard Leo’s power and Justices like Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito still on the Court, we need to pass the _Supreme Court Ethics, Recusal, and Transparency (SCERT) Act_ as soon as possible. This would go a long way to prevent further corruption in our Supreme Court by improving the financial disclosure process and creating an enforceable code of conduct for the Court, something that is sorely lacking right now. [**Congress needs to pass the**** _SCERT_********_Act_****, but without the help of every single person reading this, we can’t make that happen. The**** _SCERT Act_****is necessary so we can prevent any more judicial interference by Leonard Leo and his ilk. Can you chip in $10 so we can keep working together to destroy Leo’s influence on the Supreme Court?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77252336/449852818/444630146?refcode=1-17-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4YTc5ZDQzLTc5YjUtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RvTQFX9Xd1DFPASJP7CsG8OJl4ZDW6p2CG17vZYqHq0=) Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action

name: Nikki HQ
subject: This isn’t the end of the world
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Friends, We just reviewed our fundraising numbers after our mid-month fundraising deadline, and we missed our mid-month goal by just 53 contributions. We’re not going to claim that this is the end of the world, but with the GOP raising record-breaking amounts of money, Nikki could be vulnerable to attacks from her two Republican opponents as they target her seat and work to flip this district red. This grassroots team has always shown up when we’ve needed you the most. It’s how we were able to help Nikki win this seat and flip her district from red to blue for the first time in decades, and it’s how we’re going to protect her seat and flip the House in November. clean_body: | Friends, We just reviewed our fundraising numbers after our mid-month fundraising deadline, and we missed our mid-month goal by just 53 contributions. We’re not going to claim that this is the end of the world, but with the GOP raising record-breaking amounts of money, Nikki could be vulnerable to attacks from her two Republican opponents as they target her seat and work to flip this district red. This grassroots team has always shown up when we’ve needed you the most. It’s how we were able to help Nikki win this seat and flip her district from red to blue for the first time in decades, and it’s how we’re going to protect her seat and flip the House in November.
