name: Gov. Gavin Newsom
subject: What just happened in Iowa…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
This is the biggest moment of Joe Biden’s reelection campaign so far. | | |
---
Peter, after Monday night's performance in Iowa it’s safe to say that Donald Trump is the frontrunner for the 2024 Republican presidential nomination. This is the biggest moment of Joe Biden’s reelection campaign so far, and we’ve got to hit the ground running to grow the grassroots team that will defeat Trump -- the most dangerous president in modern American history. [**If that’s all you need to hear, can you please contribute $25 for the first time to support Joe and Kamala and ensure Donald Trump never steps foot in the White House again?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZwoXyfdeOmPkS0xvMaP_0yinS7VRZEPR9b0s9RJvnvvj5O9P-rx6cjywwN8CSVIjqYTIZiQipqawQKDeraec3vyj9lly2NUY5vuY2hB1ok3cKm-rDmS02e2EGyAh79twJdTdDy9suITBJyAGjYuTjU-oa1Ve--REDZm3DsOyCGc2bCmsv47zIiasNYlUBKbrlCIyCm-juWSaOJdT_vYWjpiMMxbQxWLr6ateKXo7aN3hvbNx0wlR92DlegDjEhf2l970YVZSOPmXNg0YgLugzj2M7XUFqNjpFWqkJxdWH0RMTItKu31jASIx33mvaBGDslHT6oh_QPLSgaUqjUddlKw/432/GmMaHYS-QNO9cEIlIpHWBw/h0/MExas297r-V6UXmsiaPterMndx7e98b9VjNHD-DgQ4E) | | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE2z9I3KlofRvG7PtPUh-EgHdjnxgpJ6wcBqBxhebh-XcosycgiEj1YNoiF1ebiON5h9kYdgVx1bqm3Ke_umKppTzlvtFua5nwcKUxniOw5u2arh8r-nNqN1Py1jTSAiigPDkwNTm8bhQyQL_w4_58ptXj9RjBDSwK0Zxe33n7KEs94RcJhJtEY66T2r8uRJsKIru0SAUCErzmhNwtNmd68S7D4S86BAtTT19SxD7knqlf8Gcn17Iw_pcQuCMqtNy83qWxKX9tbCfUXxXI_IhDUGIGHjOgAq1QUgVOM3Ucw-aewaFBwJ3dppab0vbXhjTo_Mw_zWm29uXHvgk-xeZqpsgPzV6mRrKPbxdGC7QtFOj2c_cDWJnwDZt3mfBHVanyXLV_V0a0lU19cil0k6Cb-Zebf67kkegB3eimlk2V89BtG1lyGrG1GSieW1oGV1V8tWP6fMbI-v24kV-eDZkTD-3OIT2oCIdPKGWRbPj1ExEw/432/GmMaHYS-QNO9cEIlIpHWBw/h1/kaeqgQWrGGcRIZib6tdVtPjzODFblxmGovXUli6Hbpk)

To no one’s surprise, Donald Trump was the runaway winner of the Iowa Caucuses Monday night. He’s the Republican favorite, Peter, which means this election is shaping up to be a rematch. So I wanted to remind you of the stark differences between Joe Biden and Trump (it’s daylight vs. darkness):
Trump talks about freedom, but let’s not forget he appointed the justices who ended _Roe v. Wade_ and stripped reproductive freedom from millions of women.
Trump talks about democracy, but we can’t forget that he attempted to overturn the 2020 election and prevent the peaceful transfer of power.
And most recently, Trump talked about being a dictator “on Day One.”
**That’s Trump’s America.**
Joe Biden on the other hand, has created 10 times more jobs than the previous three Republican presidents, _combined._
Joe Biden passed the largest infrastructure bill since President Eisenhower and the largest investment in climate action in our nation’s history. And he took on Big Pharma and won.
**That’s Joe Biden’s America.**
Those are the facts. And those are the stakes in this election. But Joe Biden alone cannot stop Trump. He needs all of us -- together. So, I am asking.
[**Can you use this link to contribute $25 directly to Joe Biden's campaign for president and make sure Donald Trump doesn’t become president ever again?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZwoXyfdeOmPkS0xvMaP_0yinS7VRZEPR9b0s9RJvnvvj5O9P-rx6cjywwN8CSVIjqYTIZiQipqawQKDeraec3v73vAZWFfSbjrVwKFdlselwj21PbZb7gVJXAWjwBcDdXdIl12dL_gB3j4dxHiWd7iEkQ9iKcK3nwLuJq9PHCXrQvkMhFTutVHWZBykY0lWMalasABtzHzagPETLlLVzcUO-jokhPytmqlaJRoHjJnlXEMAHjqyYs-HBarViFUxToy9TTryE-hO47HkFwAK67fQsXNNxDXu-JIDGiaiY4_kiOo6xN8qZXM2SPlUmMOxINwr-CCguyFOZxPvLWTNhLfg/432/GmMaHYS-QNO9cEIlIpHWBw/h2/3TvX0DctF5KT-wkH76tzy-WpUL1VG97MC8z99ln0Zq8)

clean_body: This is the biggest moment of Joe Biden’s reelection campaign so far. | | | Peter, after Monday night's performance in Iowa it’s safe to say that Donald Trump is the frontrunner for the 2024 Republican presidential nomination. This is the biggest moment of Joe Biden’s reelection campaign so far, and we’ve got to hit the ground running to grow the grassroots team that will defeat Trump -- the most dangerous president in modern American history. | | | To no one’s surprise, Donald Trump was the runaway winner of the Iowa Caucuses Monday night. He’s the Republican favorite, Peter, which means this election is shaping up to be a rematch. So I wanted to remind you of the stark differences between Joe Biden and Trump (it’s daylight vs. darkness): Trump talks about freedom, but let’s not forget he appointed the justices who ended Roe v. Wade and stripped reproductive freedom from millions of women. Trump talks about democracy, but we can’t forget that he attempted to overturn the 2020 election and prevent the peaceful transfer of power. And most recently, Trump talked about being a dictator “on Day One.” That’s Trump’s America. Joe Biden on the other hand, has created 10 times more jobs than the previous three Republican presidents, combined. Joe Biden passed the largest infrastructure bill since President Eisenhower and the largest investment in climate action in our nation’s history. And he took on Big Pharma and won. That’s Joe Biden’s America. Those are the facts. And those are the stakes in this election. But Joe Biden alone cannot stop Trump. He needs all of us -- together. So, I am asking. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | The future of this great country is not something we can just experience. We all have the responsibility to act. Thank you, Gavin Newsom Governor, California

body:
https://engelforarizona.com [https://engelforarizona.com]
Peter, you need to see this.
Republicans have controlled the House for the last year and have nothing to show for it.
Instead of working on solutions for the American people, they focused on chaos and in-fighting. That included holding countless votes for Speaker of the House — where my opponent helped elect Mike Johnson, an extremist election denier.
Over the weekend, Johnson announced that he will DO NOTHING to help the crisis at the border until a Republican is elected President.

| It has been my honor to serve as your Congressman. I've spent that time listening, learning and fighting for you.

But there's lots of work still to be done.

I see and hear it every day from Upstate New Yorkers.

Our border is in chaos. New York leads the nation in population loss. Inflation is still out of control...

We need a government and policies that reflects our people. So as long as I am fortunate enough to represent Upstate NY in Congress, I will continue listening, learning and leading.
---
|
---
|
---
The Biden Administration and the Secretary of Homeland Security have neglected the border, created chaos and put communities in Upstate NY at risk.

In my trip to the border, it couldn't have been more obvious - Secretary Mayorkas has failed his oath of office and failed the American people. That's why I've called for Mayorkas to be removed from office.

- [Molinaro echoes House Republicans' call for impeachment of Homeland Security secretary](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=1786f8cf2a&e=a39a20e5dd)
\- [GOP Lawmakers visit Southern Border](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=3bbbb122dc&e=a39a20e5dd)
|
---
|
---
I'm continuing to work to show America what it means to #ThinkDIFFERENTLY.

My bipartisan bill will ensure families that receive a Down Syndrome diagnosis aren't left on their own to navigate complex support and treatment options.

Through legislation like this and more, we can help to create more stories of success like Maeve's Place in Phoenicia.

- [Helping families navigate Down syndrome diagnosis](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=ff65b6d038&e=a39a20e5dd)

We're finalizing our 2024 strategy, but we want to hear from you before finalizing our campaign plans. | | Thank you, Team Grothman Surveys [[RESPONSE REQUESTED]]() | | | | Follow Glenn Grothman on Social Media! | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Glenn Grothman for Congress P.O. Box 1215 Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman.

| Hey - I'm Byron Donalds.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.

_**[I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024- here's the gist:](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=298e7194f31f402a9b0de8b152092eff&_e=_ERvNpgyenQ-TWL_-k-eekSrziZsaYEazkeieG-wpuelntzAHTHEI8EFV_mbQv5yF-ysYJTmUrB64M_kkX_uBez5UmQOh71GQSqCJJuRLidb4PAfZJ5E86Ynwg-6eups7jjrxReuKfTUwIbAqaLZFvsBH13jtJQPMb4V4V_ybeHTSAsSG57n5Lp0iPrI7scqMAlXcMBvO_xlkwhQkquEgT0Ht3ocenjAchiS6X347knf8laO2S312ubA085UjYd4NrBoi5joMZQ5FModShJ_c3Vyp_hu8Rogkth4CVU1Y6QsrQlE3VaNNbG2iffiVlQNOFxjX_xr9YrcqN2h9RUipFD0K77Rm35NFaHYa4D3GYC-iKihsC91KtNimVrf8Dcs-eKis30jF9qGLXImkxCLuQ%3D%3D "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:")**_
* If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too
* If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
* Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected
* Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact
* Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives
* **Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat**

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

_**[That's why I'm coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=298e7194f31f402a9b0de8b152092eff&_e=_ERvNpgyenQ-TWL_-k-eekSrziZsaYEazkeieG-wpuelntzAHTHEI8EFV_mbQv5yF-ysYJTmUrB64M_kkX_uBez5UmQOh71GQSqCJJuRLidb4PAfZJ5E86Ynwg-6eups7jjrxReuKfTUwIbAqaLZFvsBH13jtJQPMb4V4V_ybeHTSAsSG57n5Lp0iPrI7scqMAlXcMBvO_xlkwhQkquEgT0Ht3ocenjAchiS6X347knf8laO2S312ubA085UjYd4w8e2MJIdJHikqEr47hBu0fT58JdEahgp4H-JnMT9luRujlk1wtCaZZivXk5_PR7yt3h9BiOv039nAOVyyMLRWbQNXgntsmPiJabaz3Wwjw2U48WJDSUXIhxNYMbu8VHsX7AkkD52sa4CniqHNTlfXQ%3D%3D "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?")**_ I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have **1)** a Conservative House Majority, **2)** a Conservative Senate, and **3)** a Conservative in the White House.

_If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in?_

This is a non-negotiable if we want to win.

Democrats are early voting in record numbers. Democrats have a sophisticated ballot harvesting operation in deep blue cities. And Democrats are all over social media platforms getting young Liberal voters to register.

**If we don 't do it too, we will lose.**

But make no mistake: We will ONLY be successful with the support of our grassroots team. No matter where you live in the country, this is your chance to directly impact whether Conservative WIN or LOSE the next election.

Will you do your part?

I look forward to seeing your name.

Thank you,

I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist: | | | | | | Hey - I'm Byron Donalds. The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election. "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:" If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents. There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts. "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?" I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have 1) a Conservative House Majority, 2) a Conservative Senate, and 3) a Conservative in the White House. If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! And Democrats are all over social media platforms getting young Liberal voters to register. If we don 't do it too, we will lose. But make no mistake: We will ONLY be successful with the support of our grassroots team. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Josh Hawley could never understand the values of working Missourians.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Please let me explain.
#
Peter — on January 6, 2021, Josh Hawley abandoned his duty, betrayed our country, and embarrassed our state. That’s the day he proved to all of us that he’s nothing more than a fraud and a coward.
As a born-and-raised Missourian who joined the Marines to honor and serve the community that took care of my family after we went bankrupt from medical bills, I know those aren’t the values of working people across our state.
But Josh Hawley could never understand those values. **Please let me explain:**
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42669?refcode=em20240117-4628&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4628%2E614464%2EXMCC2Z)**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42669?refcode=em20240117-4628&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4628%2E614464%2EXMCC2Z)
On the right is Joshua Hawley. While his banker daddy was sending him to a fancy prep school miles from his hometown, my family and I were relying on our friends and neighbors to survive bankruptcy and medical bills in mid-Missouri — in a community where people took care of each other. That’s us on the left.
When Hawley graduated from law school, he joined one of the world’s most elite corporate law firms. I joined the Marine Corps to pay back the community in Missouri that took care of me and my family. And when he was climbing the ladder to become another corrupt politician, I was serving my country — and then working to prevent the pointless overseas wars that make us less safe.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42669?refcode=em20240117-4628&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4628%2E614464%2EXMCC2Z)
While Josh Hawley aligned himself with the same giant corporations who’ve spent decades attacking Missouri workers and shipping away our jobs, I’ve been fighting to take back power for American workers and small businesses.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42669?refcode=em20240117-4628&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4628%2E614464%2EXMCC2Z)
And when Hawley voted against relief for veterans like me who were exposed to toxic burn pits, I stood up alongside thousands of veterans to hold him accountable.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42669?refcode=em20240117-4628&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4628%2E614464%2EXMCC2Z)
**The Missouri I grew up in taught us to take care of one another.** To do your duty. To serve and sacrifice for your fellow Missourians.
**Josh Hawley doesn’t know that Missouri — and three years ago, he showed us the only thing he’s learned is how to be a fraud and a coward.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42669?refcode=em20240117-4628&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=4628%2E614464%2EXMCC2Z)
**Missourians deserve a U.S. Senator who will stand up and fight for them — and unlike Josh, I'm ready to serve.** If you’re ready to help us make sure every Missouri voter knows it before they vote on Election Day, I need your help:
**[Will you chip in any amount you can afford to our campaign right now so we can get our message in front of voters? The only way we’ll be able to flip this Senate seat is if we build a powerful grassroots movement, and support from real people like you is the best way we can do it.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42669?refcode=em20240117-4628&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=4628%2E614464%2EXMCC2Z)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42670?refcode=em20240117-4628&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=8&akid=4628%2E614464%2EXMCC2Z) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42670?refcode=em20240117-4628&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=9&akid=4628%2E614464%2EXMCC2Z) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42670?refcode=em20240117-4628&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=10&akid=4628%2E614464%2EXMCC2Z) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42670?refcode=em20240117-4628&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=11&akid=4628%2E614464%2EXMCC2Z) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42670?refcode=em20240117-4628&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=12&akid=4628%2E614464%2EXMCC2Z) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42670?refcode=em20240117-4628&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=13&akid=4628%2E614464%2EXMCC2Z) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42669?refcode=em20240117-4628&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=14&akid=4628%2E614464%2EXMCC2Z)
---
If we keep working together, we can take back power for working Missourians and everyday people all across the country.
Thanks for all your help,
— Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240117-4628-footer&t=15&refcode2=4628_614464_XMCC2Z&akid=4628%2E614464%2EXMCC2Z)**

Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Help us get 10,000 responses to these questions!
body:
%%previewtext%%
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb

| [ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_7isl_kevSxXT9wSnJK7RA~~/AARclAA~~)
---
Fellow American,

It's nearly election season. We hear promises from both sides of the aisle and commitments made to causes the American people rarely agree on.

Surprisingly, however, 7 in 10 Americans agree on this one thing:

**Across our nation, unborn babies should be protected by at least the point when they can feel pain. The latest science proves that unborn babies can feel pain by as early as 15 weeks.**

72% of voters agree on this issue but the American people are still being bombarded with lies and misinformation from Big Abortion and its allies. These "pro-choice" organizations are committed to using misleading information to manipulate women and destroy innocent children for their own gain in this billion-dollar industry.

In their own materials, Planned Parenthood states abortion is "one of the safest medical procedures performed in the United States" and "abortion has over a 99 percent safety record."

But how can this be true when a child's life is snatched from its mother's womb because it's purposefully put to death? Who is telling the American people the truth here?

_**What do you think about this?**_

[My team and I would love to know your opinion about abortion in America.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_7isl_kevSxXT9wSnJK7RA~~/AARclAA~~) We want to know your answers to questions like these:

Do you believe life begins at conception?

Do you believe abortion is harmful to women?

Do you believe that unborn babies have a right to life?

We want to hear what the American people think and invite you to take our [**Abortion in America Survey**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_7isl_kevSxXT9wSnJK7RA~~/AARclAA~~) so we know where you stand.

Take the survey today and let us know if the majority of Americans are being lied to by a deadly industry. Help us find the truth by taking the survey today at the link below. We really want to get 10,000 responses from people just like you!

[https://action.sbaprolife.org/abortion-in-america](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_7isl_kevSxXT9wSnJK7RA~~/AARclAA~~)

For _LIFE,
_ Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

Easy access to deadly drugs combined with no accountability for using drugs in public has turned our streets, parks, and neighborhoods into open air drug markets. At the same time, addiction and overdose deaths are skyrocketing.| | |

Again.

On Friday, right after talking to the _New York Times_ about how she supports exceptions to abortion restrictions, **Michelle signed onto a national abortion ban with no exceptions.**

**We know the truth: Michelle will do and say anything to stay in Congress, and we deserve better.**

[What do you think: Do Orange County families deserve a lifelong pro-choice representative who won’t change her mind just to win political points?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77253761/449857781/1104749995?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_90DO_240117_1_1&refcode2=a8cd4c74-7db5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&contactdata=3avpMAqn9fxxHZoZIwe7gR753E6HBYLVwDZjhbwzRLK2LSNcUjjRY0W9cubg95Wg&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYThjZDRjNzQtN2RiNS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xQxB7-L0ZHPf8EcrwvBkl03mnAzuMe-VCHAtjutaQv4=&emci=900f30c6-7ab5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=a8cd4c74-7db5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=9674971)

| ****[NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77253770/449857798/1104749995?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_90DO_240117_1_1&refcode2=a8cd4c74-7db5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&contactdata=3avpMAqn9fxxHZoZIwe7gR753E6HBYLVwDZjhbwzRLK2LSNcUjjRY0W9cubg95Wg&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYThjZDRjNzQtN2RiNS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xQxB7-L0ZHPf8EcrwvBkl03mnAzuMe-VCHAtjutaQv4=&emci=900f30c6-7ab5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=a8cd4c74-7db5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=9674971)****
---

Steel has publicly changed her stance on reproductive rights repeatedly, and honestly, we’re getting whiplash. It’s time for her to be honest and just admit that she supports a full federal ban on abortion.

But she can’t do that because she _knows_ it’s a losing position with voters.

We need a representative who truly identifies with what we want, and who wants to protect our right to make decisions about our bodies (we’re talking about Kim):
**In the race for Rep. Michelle Steel’s seat, how abortion is shaping up to be a key issue**

“I’m infinity percent pro-choice. I am someone who is a survivor of rape and had a miscarriage last year ... and is 14 days postpartum,” said Garden Grove Councilmember Kim Nguyen-Penaloza.

_The Orange County Register_
---

[Let us know: Do we deserve Kim – someone who’s never waivered on her stance on choice – as our next representative?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77253772/449857800/1104749995?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_90DO_240117_1_1&refcode2=a8cd4c74-7db5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&contactdata=3avpMAqn9fxxHZoZIwe7gR753E6HBYLVwDZjhbwzRLK2LSNcUjjRY0W9cubg95Wg&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYThjZDRjNzQtN2RiNS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xQxB7-L0ZHPf8EcrwvBkl03mnAzuMe-VCHAtjutaQv4=&emci=900f30c6-7ab5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=a8cd4c74-7db5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=9674971)

clean_body: | = Team — I had to reach out today. While I’m an Arizonan by choice, I’m a born-and-raised Iowan at heart and this week Republicans made it clear where their party is headed this year at the Iowa caucuses on Monday. In case you were watching Ayo Edebiri clean house at the Emmys or Jason Kelce’s last football game, here’s what you might have missed: | | "Iowa caucus 2024: Trump cements frontrunner status to face Biden" — Reuters, January 16, 2024 “Nearly two-thirds of Iowa caucus-goers embraced his false claims about voter fraud in the 2020 presidential election, saying they did not think Biden legitimately beat Trump. More than 60% said Trump would still be fit to serve as president even if convicted of a crime.” | = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Donald Trump brought his favorite MAGA mouthpiece with him, Kari Lake (who, unfortunately, is also an Iowan), and she went from city to city, repeating claims of stolen elections and stoking the flames of a baseless culture war that targets LGBTQ+ folks and marginalized communities. Kari called it “an honor of a lifetime” to be Trump’s surrogate for his extreme agenda, and we know for certain she’d work to satisfy HIS agenda in the Senate, not an agenda that works for Arizonans. = = Thank you! — Benjamin Nelson = Arizona Democratic Party PO Box 36123 Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123 United States mailto:info@azdem.org | Paid for by Arizona Democrats

name: Susan Wild
subject: Here’s the deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
We can’t afford another 2 years of Republican dysfunction. We must protect vulnerable seats like mine and flip the House in November.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77254761/449860801/-1109429436?refcode=BLU_EM_SWC_2024-01-17_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWY4YjhhYy04MGI1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OAQStx_RBZqnfQgY6XXcEm4yaCENANhb_TgE8kLQMyE=)
---
| Peter, here’s the deal –

**🔴 ****PA-07 has been rated a toss-up district** again this cycle, and Republicans have it at the top of their list to flip from blue to red.

**🔴 **In 2022, this race came down to _**just 2% points**_ , and it was one of the most expensive House races in the country.

**🔴 **Republicans’ House majority is hanging on by a thread, and **Democrats only need to flip a handful of seats to take it back in November.**

We can’t afford another 2 years of Republican dysfunction. We must protect vulnerable seats like mine and flip the House in November.

**Unlike Republicans, we’re relying on grassroots support to fuel this campaign to victory.[_So, can I count on you to contribute $5 or $10 to be a 2024 Founding Donor to this campaign?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77254762/449860802/-1109429436?refcode=BLU_EM_SWC_2024-01-17_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWY4YjhhYy04MGI1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OAQStx_RBZqnfQgY6XXcEm4yaCENANhb_TgE8kLQMyE=)**

subject: $25 won’t create world peace.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
But here’s what it can do...| | |
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=1cf9726b0f79482d90a5690221545173&_e=QV6tFUXR-THfLiNIY2Y8nN3fhJO_uJoSsHogHpU7USOZzkYWMoyg-V31mLl_aFF8CWMROMzK3IeC2hb-w3CV3dY4ZdyDPrognQkwsk2iujwIMVCKdYOmjUPAaFocBooEjbCZJK9BXDECoz5HTWTB5LVMZmpSSJHVXs96mkqjaKZyVs5n9dDSBYGkJgDsYfpgx-kUeCg611feYOu3bbnmbwax7PoXiqn0D8alqCS555uLK13g5EO_5e3h6zrpEzF2e3g9NoK1I4I83xLfY_qSRs2Zzv_kE2KewqY8OQfLv2sL1IRLz-aX319EyT477f0LNOSEYKQ1av0EaSTQuvSpTwKL1duppEMlN8MimhcMNaEIzT1zBQd-E5YdpSxQ90fsdhPVDmOCqFIK5GYALzu694VEEyPtJr6aTPhDE84ijLs%3D)

Friend, A $25 donation won’t bring about world peace. I’m sick and tired of politicians lying to you in an attempt to get you to part with your hard-earned cash. You’ve probably gotten at least a few emails from politicians making promises they can’t keep. But I’m going to try something that politicians never do: **[tell you the truth.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=1cf9726b0f79482d90a5690221545173&_e=QV6tFUXR-THfLiNIY2Y8nN3fhJO_uJoSsHogHpU7USOZzkYWMoyg-V31mLl_aFF8CWMROMzK3IeC2hb-w3CV3dY4ZdyDPrognQkwsk2iujwIMVCKdYOmjUPAaFocBooEjbCZJK9BXDECoz5HTWTB5LVMZmpSSJHVXs96mkqjaKZyVs5n9dDSBYGkJgDsYfpgx-kUeCg611feYOu3bbnmbwax7PoXiqn0D8alqCS555uLK13g5EO_5e3h6zrpEzF2qw24feoYT3cXX5ytIHSwlOz-P-j-vnbcApDby0KbSZ1W7aYXzBPuPK_T5u8w1Xf1a31FoFu-8I1CfTV4Sp9URkk7IO6rcCK5MfOduRwD40cFBb8HoXrwYKPi6O9PJ_1ZM6IjcY1ewubFMgXjPBnwbs-K5q1vGSZPEn4BatnSJIQ%3D)** My name is Mike Rogers. I’m an Army veteran, former FBI special agent, and candidate for U.S. Senate in Michigan — a state where elections could be decided by just **HUNDREDS** of votes. And to make the stakes even higher, the result of my race could very well determine which party wins the Senate — and chart our country’s path for a generation. That’s not a lie. It’s not an exaggeration. It’s the straight truth. Friend, your donation isn’t going to bring about world peace. I can’t even guarantee your donation will ensure I win in November. **[But what I can tell you with 100% certainty is that your donation WILL go toward helping me reverse America’s decline.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=1cf9726b0f79482d90a5690221545173&_e=QV6tFUXR-THfLiNIY2Y8nN3fhJO_uJoSsHogHpU7USOZzkYWMoyg-V31mLl_aFF8CWMROMzK3IeC2hb-w3CV3dY4ZdyDPrognQkwsk2iujwIMVCKdYOmjUPAaFocBooEjbCZJK9BXDECoz5HTWTB5LVMZmpSSJHVXs96mkqjaKZyVs5n9dDSBYGkJgDsYfpgx-kUeCg611feYOu3bbnmbwax7PoXiqn0D8alqCS555uLK13g5EO_5e3h6zrpEzF2bYDVj3CBB-RGkITihcXMzyEAIRWLxq63KVaV71RCmDnHKwyZ3mK8sIbHjAdohP8mNZjpGxcJoMfBkDXKP-P-OKTbhP4bG-xJwQzvN4_BkVBtUTGyuGEDjKmitvkuLEQp_EuExvhEn5KtPtR4pqNW6wU8vHp1pC66qqj4c7-yajo%3D)** So, Friend, **[**can you contribute any amount so that I can put my best foot forward as we move toward November?**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=1cf9726b0f79482d90a5690221545173&_e=QV6tFUXR-THfLiNIY2Y8nN3fhJO_uJoSsHogHpU7USOZzkYWMoyg-V31mLl_aFF8CWMROMzK3IeC2hb-w3CV3dY4ZdyDPrognQkwsk2iujwIMVCKdYOmjUPAaFocBooEjbCZJK9BXDECoz5HTWTB5LVMZmpSSJHVXs96mkqjaKZyVs5n9dDSBYGkJgDsYfpgx-kUeCg611feYOu3bbnmbwax7PoXiqn0D8alqCS555uLK13g5EO_5e3h6zrpEzF2X02ERpikov7LjuCbisYDj8V_N9r6souEQj67ocH5QlM_5F0WOlHbknVdSDMr7IhFTpj3y7czlDpr_iMLtBiRYi4s3MXc95zkjMEvi2KONpLDkTUdkECSxxTrAKNde1pstS5GMzLe5N2RGw1R6ecksuB_vHPfhVh_BVX2JI8B3Ho%3D)** Anything you can give will be monumental in helping me get my message out. Can I count on your support? Sincerely, Mike Rogers

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: URGENT: House prepares vote to strip protections from 13 MILLION acres in the Arctic. We need to respond:
body:
Because this fight is so important, every contribution is being TRIPLE MATCHEDMEMBERSHIP DRIVE 2024
TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVE ? ? ? Peter, with just days until the federal government is set to shut down, Congress is barreling towards a vote that would devastate the Arctic.

Republicans' extreme legislation would undermine protections for 13 million acres of the Western Arctic, lease Arctic waters to oil and gas companies, and threaten species like caribou.

We need to move quickly to stop these extreme attacks on our climate and environment - but we need your support.

To oppose this bill, we need resources that we just don't have right now. We're calling on LCV members to help us bridge the gap and power our campaign.

subject: CORRECTION -- My new book 📖 is out next week! 😁
body:
Dr. Mansharamani's new book is available for pre-order; please consider ordering your copy now!

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/mansharamani/my-new-book-is-out-next-week-17305701?e=93b2c2b824)
https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=5f4fb04c92&e=93b2c2b824

APOLOGIES - THE PREVIOUS VERSION OF THIS EMAIL HAD BROKEN LINKS WHICH HAVE BEEN CORRECTED BELOW! THANKS FOR UNDERSTANDING!

** THE MAKING OF A
------------------------------------------------------------

** GENERALIST
An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional
------------------------------------------------------------

** Success in an Uncertain World
------------------------------------------------------------
Image of Vikram' book

Dear Friends,

As you may have heard, I have a new book coming out next week. The book is part memoir, part non-fiction, and part social / political commentary. It’s titled “The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World (https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=0c065f02b1&e=93b2c2b824) ” and is available for purchase on Amazon and Barnes & Noble, as well as other outlets.

After my unsuccessful campaign for the US Senate in 2022, I spent time reflecting on my life experiences and lessons learned. Writing (when not skiing or hiking at Loon Mountain) became my “therapy” and helped me better understand my first 50 years on this planet. The book is a deeply personal reflection on failures, challenges, and successes along the path to who I am today.

The book also takes lessons acquired from my entry into politics and puts them into the context of my prior work. My first book, Boombustology (https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=a0cadc90c1&e=93b2c2b824) , suggested the use of multiple lenses offered a path to unique insights when it came to spotting financial bubbles. My next book, Think for Yourself (https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=94a2265711&e=93b2c2b824) , suggested every perspective was limited, biased, and incomplete and the best way to navigate uncertainty was to triangulate multiple views. When I entered the world of politics, however, I found most people were quick to label folks on a single dimension of Right to Left. The Making of a Generalist suggests we could all be better off by adding dimensions to our political discourse: what about open-minded versus closed-minded? or process-oriented versus outcome-oriented? I’m calling for more civil civic engagement.

At this point, I really need your help. While I would of course appreciate it if you could purchase a copy (Incidentally, the Kindle book is currently available for a short period of time for $2.99! (https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=a96dc60583&e=93b2c2b824) ), I’m also looking for assistance in getting the book noticed. I would really appreciate it if you might

1. Host a (virtual) book party.
(My team can assist with invitation design, setting up a virtual meeting, and setting a date. I’m of course happy to attend!)
2. Purchase books for your team, clients, children and/or friends.
(I have relationships with bulk book buying organizations who can send to individual addresses; they can even provide codes to give out at events if preferred.)
3. Mention the book on social media.
(Please consider posting something like “I’m looking forward to receiving my copy of @mansharamani’s new book, The Making of a Generalist. Can’t wait to read it!” with a link to the book’s Amazon page (https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=84287a1a55&e=93b2c2b824) on X/twitter). I’m also on Facebook, Instagram, Linkedin, and Threads.
4. Help me get the book mentioned or discussed in the media.
(I’m super passionate about getting the book’s main message — that we should all be broader when the world is getting narrower — to the widest audience possible. Any help would be appreciated!)
5. Suggest me as a potential speaker to discuss the book.
(Although I do a fair amount of professional keynote speaking, I’m eager to also share the message of the book with non-conference audiences, whether they are high schoolers, a retirement community book club, or mid-career networking organizations)

Please reach out to me directly at vikram@mansharamani.com (mailto:vikram@mansharamani.com) or via my cell 603-290-9595 if you think you might able to help.

Thank you in advance for your continued support and friendship.

Best,
CLICK HERE TO ORDER! (https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=7ee5439bc7&e=93b2c2b824)
https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=5f51e4546a&e=93b2c2b824 https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=c0f8727688&e=93b2c2b824 https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=82ada74952&e=93b2c2b824 https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=977d8248dc&e=93b2c2b824 https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=cef61a1a89&e=93b2c2b824 https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=8d251b069c&e=93b2c2b824

| | Peter — We need to talk about this. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77255303/449863059/1183499175?refcode=2024-01-17-iowa&recurring=&amount=16&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=3a9256c3-83b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2E5MjU2YzMtODNiNS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sa2InAk9R_3d8tOGLEBjkK8FUyHuJFaYMpSrSrqcWdU=) **Donald Trump is now one step closer to winning the GOP presidential nomination — and returning to the White House.** Trump's overwhelming victory in Iowa highlights how important this upcoming election will be, and we need to be clear about what's at stake. [**But first, we'd be grateful if you could give $16 or whatever you can afford to help us sustain our campaign and build a strong coalition ready to win our primary.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77255304/449863060/1183499175?refcode=2024-01-17-iowa&recurring=&amount=16&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=3a9256c3-83b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2E5MjU2YzMtODNiNS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sa2InAk9R_3d8tOGLEBjkK8FUyHuJFaYMpSrSrqcWdU=) **Since Day 1 of his campaign, Donald Trump has made it clear that his only priority is himself.** Since leaving office, Trump has:
* Made nonstop attacks on elections across the country, **spreading the lie that the 2020 election was stolen and putting election workers lives in danger thanks to his conspiracies**
* Leaned on radical, right-wing extremists to help bring him back to power — **even going as far as meeting with a well-known white supremacist**
* **Claimed immunity from prosecution for the 91 criminal charges he faces, while talking about being a 'dictator' if re-elected**

Trump is continuing to lean into division and cruelty — and the GOP is beginning to fall in line. Here in California, we've seen our communities become the target of Trump's ire. **We've also produced leaders who have been willing to stand up to the chaos and lies, and get things done for working families.** That's why I'm running — so we can look forward and build a government that works for every American, instead of looking back at the same old grievances and lies. [**Give $16 today so we can put our campaign on a solid path to victory this March. It is more important than ever that we elect principled, balanced leaders who will go to Washington to work for you. Not the extremists. Not the well-connected. For you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77255306/449863061/1183499175?refcode=2024-01-17-iowa&recurring=&amount=16&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=3a9256c3-83b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2E5MjU2YzMtODNiNS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sa2InAk9R_3d8tOGLEBjkK8FUyHuJFaYMpSrSrqcWdU=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77255307/449863063/1183499175?refcode=2024-01-17-iowa&recurring=&amount=16&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=3a9256c3-83b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2E5MjU2YzMtODNiNS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sa2InAk9R_3d8tOGLEBjkK8FUyHuJFaYMpSrSrqcWdU=) More soon, _Nick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: What the results from this week can tell us about 2024. | | | | Peter — We need to talk about this. = Donald Trump is now one step closer to winning the GOP presidential nomination — and returning to the White House. Trump's overwhelming victory in Iowa highlights how important this upcoming election will be, and we need to be clear about what's at stake. = Since Day 1 of his campaign, Donald Trump has made it clear that his only priority is himself. Since leaving office, Trump has: Made nonstop attacks on elections across the country, spreading the lie that the 2020 election was stolen and putting election workers lives in danger thanks to his conspiracies Leaned on radical, right-wing extremists to help bring him back to power — even going as far as meeting with a well-known white supremacist Claimed immunity from prosecution for the 91 criminal charges he faces, while talking about being a 'dictator' if re-elected Trump is continuing to lean into division and cruelty — and the GOP is beginning to fall in line. Here in California, we've seen our communities become the target of Trump's ire. We've also produced leaders who have been willing to stand up to the chaos and lies, and get things done for working families. That's why I'm running — so we can look forward and build a government that works for every American, instead of looking back at the same old grievances and lies. = = More soon, Nick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289 |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20for=20Congress?=
subject: California Environmental Voters Endorses Dave Min
body:
The Golden State’s Leading Environmental Group Backs Min For CA-47 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/02e7885d3a25/california-environmental-voters-endorses-dave-min-15668708?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** January 17, 2024
**Contact:**[press@davemin.com](mailto:press@davemin.com)
**California Environmental Voters
Endorses Dave Min**
_The Golden State’s Leading Environmental Group
Backs Min For CA-47_
**IRVINE, CA** —California Environmental Voters, perhaps the leading environmental advocacy organization in the state, endorsed Dave Min today, recognizing his leadership and advocacy for bold climate action and record of stepping up for our planet and spurring a green energy transition. California EnviroVoters is an educational organization which focuses on environmental issues affecting California and an affiliate of the national League of Conservation Voters. The announcement comes on the heels of the [Los Angeles Times editorial board’s endorsement of Min’s campaign](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=9ea5dd0e14&e=7017cc100e) earlier this week.

**"Dave Min is the clear environmental choice in this race,"** said Mike Young, Political & Organizing Director. **"He has not only been a good vote but has worked relentlessly to pass strong legislation to ensure that our children inherit a livable world. Whether it's accelerating our transition to clean energy, preserving our biodiversity and open spaces, or ending offshore oil and gas drilling, Dave has been a champion for our issues in the State Senate, and we know he will continue to be a leader in Congress in these areas. We're excited to continue our work with Dave in the US House of Representatives."**

CA EnviroVoters’ stated mission is to protect California's environmental quality by increasing public awareness of the environmental performance of all elected officials, working to elect environmentally responsible candidates, and holding them accountable to the environmental agenda once elected.

This endorsement builds on Senator Min’s incredible momentum in his campaign to keep this seat Blue. Earlier this week, [Min received the coveted endorsement of the Los Angeles Times](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=6218d786a4&e=7017cc100e). He is also endorsed by outgoing Rep. Katie Porter, as well as the California Democratic Party, Service Employees International Union (SEIU), the National Education Association, the American Federation of Teachers, and over 150 local, state, and federal officials. Min is the unanimous choice of organized labor in this race, as he is the only candidate to receive support from national, statewide, and local unions, and received the backing of the California Labor Federation. A full endorsement list is available [here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=e134005fa3&e=7017cc100e). ###

_California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15% in this area. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country. _
---
| | **Our mailing address is:**
PO Box 5959, Irvine, CA 92616
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/about?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=8a1cc84eb1) [unsubscribe from this list](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=8a1cc84eb1) [update subscription preferences](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/profile?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=8a1cc84eb1)
Dave Min For Senate * PO Box 5959 * Irvine, CA 92616-5959 * USA

**" Please do not think we think you are not important, but..."**
With Monday's Martin Luther King Jr. Day celebration in Howardville postponed by weather, I took a look at photos from last year's. The first is me and my friend Vannessa Frazier -- the second is a letter telling voters their polling place is closing.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/33c6bcfe-d093-45b1-a8b6-19fa5fd9bc42?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The letter reads: "Please do not think we think you are not important, but with only 263 registered voters in the precinct, **it is just not fiscally responsible to set up a polling place** ..." A third of polling places were closed in New Madrid County, a county that stretches across 700 square miles.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/22950e30-c81f-4854-97e5-64668453e04a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It was another reminder that Dr. King's fight for the democratic _AND_ economic empowerment of everyday people is far from over. With zero public input, people were told they'd need to travel miles and miles further just to vote -- as would hundreds of Vannessa's neighbors and friends in nearby towns. Some there said that they or their neighbors don't drive.
Howardville is a Black town in the Bootheel, with fewer than 300 people. Vannessa told me these polling place closures impacted people in nearby communities too, Republican and Democrat. Black and white. People from all around showed up at the Howardville MLK Day event to talk about how they were blindsided by this.
It reminded me of Hayti Heights, a nearby town in southeast Missouri that can't afford to repair their damaged water treatment plant. Or Noel in southwest Missouri, a town whose existence is threatened because Tyson Foods -- a company that made billions in profits last year -- is closing down its local plant. Or Newtown in northern Missouri, where 13 farms are getting closed by Smithfield, a company that's already helped put 90% of Missouri hog producers out of business. Or even the working-class communities and forgotten neighborhoods in and around our cities.
While leaders from both parties spent the last two decades wasting trillions of dollars on corporate handouts + sending us out to fight and die in Iraq and Afghanistan... States like Missouri have been getting gutted by corrupt politicians who restrict our voting rights + giant corporations who buy our elections.
Those same politicians and corporations spent all day telling us how much they admire Dr. King's message. So here's a quote of his I'll leave you with:
**" Now, when I say questioning the whole society, it means ultimately coming to see that the problem of racism, the problem of economic exploitation, and the problem of war are all tied together. These are the triple evils that are interrelated."**
_###_
Thank you for subscribing to my Substack! If you would like to further support my campaign to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri's U.S. Senate seat, please consider chipping in $5 or whatever you can afford today:

name: Bob Casey
subject: One of America’s greatest Founding Fathers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1728%2E552475%2EvZRc4e)
Peter — I’m sure you’re probably getting a lot of political emails these days, so I thought I’d break it up with some history (my favorite topic) today.
Did you know that today is Benjamin Franklin’s birthday?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240117-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240117-2&refcode2=1728_552475_vZRc4e&akid=1728%2E552475%2EvZRc4e)
[**Something not a lot of people may know is that before Thomas Mifflin became Pennsylvania’s first governor in 1790, our Commonwealth had presidents, and Benjamin Franklin was the 6th. To celebrate the former President of Pennsylvania, will you chip in $17.06?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240117-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240117-2&amount=17.06&refcode2=1728_552475_vZRc4e&akid=1728%2E552475%2EvZRc4e)
Benjamin Franklin made significant contributions to not only our Commonwealth but also our Nation – and as a history buff, I would be remiss not to share a few facts about one of our greatest Founding Fathers:
— In 1730, Franklin helped create the first public library in the U.S. when he founded the Library Company of Philadelphia.
— He held numerous positions throughout his lifetime, one of them being the first Postmaster General of the United States.
— Franklin is the only Founding Father to have signed all three documents that helped form this country: the Declaration of Independence, the U.S. Constitution, and the Treaty of Paris.
While I could go on and _on_ as my daughters would say, I also need to share an important update from the present: **My mega-millionaire opponent outraised us last quarter, and a super PAC supporting him announced an $18 million haul.**
We can’t compete with the wall of GOP money headed our way without your help, but together, we can make history of our own this November.
[**Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can right now to help us build a winning campaign?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240117-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240117-2&refcode2=1728_552475_vZRc4e&akid=1728%2E552475%2EvZRc4e)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240117-2?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240117-2-el&refcode2=1728_552475_vZRc4e&akid=1728%2E552475%2EvZRc4e) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240117-2?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240117-2-el&refcode2=1728_552475_vZRc4e&akid=1728%2E552475%2EvZRc4e) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240117-2?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240117-2-el&refcode2=1728_552475_vZRc4e&akid=1728%2E552475%2EvZRc4e) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240117-2?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240117-2-el&refcode2=1728_552475_vZRc4e&akid=1728%2E552475%2EvZRc4e) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240117-2?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240117-2-el&refcode2=1728_552475_vZRc4e&akid=1728%2E552475%2EvZRc4e) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240117-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240117-2&refcode2=1728_552475_vZRc4e&akid=1728%2E552475%2EvZRc4e)
---
Pennsylvania is a Commonwealth in name as well as in life. As Pennsylvanians, we look out for each other and know that we’re stronger when we work together, so thank you.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1728%2E552475%2EvZRc4e)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1728%2E552475%2EvZRc4e)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

clean_body: a personal ask for friend | = Friend, it’s Greg. Yesterday, my team told you we were in a race against the clock for our first mid-month fundraising deadline of the election year. My finance director just gave me a quick update — and as of this morning, we’re still running $3,780 short of where we need to be before we close the books on Friday. That’s why I wanted to reach out before time runs out with a personal request. This is going to be one the most competitive districts in one of the most important election years in recent history. That means we can’t afford to play it safe — or fall short of our fundraising goals. So if you can spare= before Friday, I’d be so grateful. You can chip in at the secure link below: = Appreciate you, Greg | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. subject: A threat to Democracy

body:
| | | [](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=4f45f6e61c564a05bb18256d6ed6d2a8&_e=1yJG_AUqBxO8ePInurbWtFMSl3mpRqNJmDZ1uzlYDLgcN8G30m5Shx5MjeDkJ1_ulAVf-OTuce9mC1PmjSAcQI2cXQTnPr_oFRrkxz6sWSnZ6NtiIp3XFw_aoPwPjAQYzjFFJdOAHrZXjAHwH3AcGsYWKd47Wv2ZPelPH1rSBZuM5RrqeXev1NRgEQ6RvN9uFlvQndJtBvoHCEa07tanYGvLWs7X_nIf91n_2JJU0NPpwWjhbp2kBPKT1fAigy-6lOh4DINV6OYQKFl4iVroVJtqiXxMXEiVaYTt4Y3Ps-6FYavsHbqZByGPy2ft9J3fHfg2seVG8EosNW-PoJvh8bU_wLT6mO0wTpdeSub4xczCeRzU-rejYSrICS4QkSsWtEebA6e2Y8msfEKE9D6MUQ%3D%3D)

Fellow American, Democracy. It’s a word we’ve seen thrown around a lot lately, but too many politicians don’t know what it really means. Democracy means the people decide who they want to lead, not elitists in Washington DC. Democracy means every American gets a fair chance at running for the office they seek. **Right now, our democracy is under attack, and it’s all thanks to Joe Biden and the radical Left.** Joe Biden and the Democrats have empowered radical politicians and bureaucrats to target their political opponents in ways never seen before in America. _It’s absolutely TERRIFYING, and in Congress, I’ll make sure it never happens again._ **[**Fellow American, can you join me today to fight back against the tyrannical Biden Administration?**](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=4f45f6e61c564a05bb18256d6ed6d2a8&_e=1yJG_AUqBxO8ePInurbWtFMSl3mpRqNJmDZ1uzlYDLgcN8G30m5Shx5MjeDkJ1_ulAVf-OTuce9mC1PmjSAcQI2cXQTnPr_oFRrkxz6sWSnZ6NtiIp3XFw_aoPwPjAQYzjFFJdOAHrZXjAHwH3AcGsYWKd47Wv2ZPelPH1rSBZuM5RrqeXev1NRgEQ6RvN9uFlvQndJtBvoHCEa07tanYGvLWs7X_nIf91n_2JJU0NOsCUgiTlfEgU-jAaFbQe-WCRz9t2xNBLj7R1-laMhfiPTVSVkGYTo_JKWpkpGxduCdySbFatN-Cwcfto1afts4qnR5cEWU5BJ7wvc6mtpNUduj21vlhinOVVJ_hUMXjUnKcS5xFKHe5lGdh9AOrafweoQV6fN67hiTQqa89iDAFw%3D%3D)**

Joe Biden can talk about “saving democracy” all he wants, but his actions speaks louder than words. The vision of democracy that his administration and radical Democrats across he country have offered is nothing more than a manipulative distortion of reality. Instead of picking up the pieces from their failures, they turn around and make everyday, law-abiding Americans like YOU the villain. _And while they side with the criminals terrorizing our streets, they’re taking law-abiding citizens off of the ballot._ Enough is enough. It’s time to take a stand for REAL democracy, and I want you on my team. **[**Please, pitch in now to PROTECT our democracy before Joe Biden and the democrats destroy it forever!**](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=4f45f6e61c564a05bb18256d6ed6d2a8&_e=1yJG_AUqBxO8ePInurbWtFMSl3mpRqNJmDZ1uzlYDLgcN8G30m5Shx5MjeDkJ1_ulAVf-OTuce9mC1PmjSAcQI2cXQTnPr_oFRrkxz6sWSnZ6NtiIp3XFw_aoPwPjAQYzjFFJdOAHrZXjAHwH3AcGsYWKd47Wv2ZPelPH1rSBZuM5RrqeXev1NRgEQ6RvN9uFlvQndJtBvoHCEa07tanYGvLWs7X_nIf91n_2JJU0NOlT541eLJFCxE4Ip9Q9eaRbgr95n6c0uZvb31lui4c-tNw_Wo07LQ9EIcLZm2EDyK785BqOyEFXVFzZ3dBDn45OiVeqMeN6MfHMoP5yLeEO8D-AAv4RgwEUp7sjVAmvvrSC8oWPxREfinjQdM-4Giz6BbC__lpqQL-DFRmbHwrXA%3D%3D)**

| | Peter, On behalf of Team Cao, I wanted to send you a quick note about our first goal of 2024.

We have good news: we are **extending** our mid-month cutoff until **midnight tonight.**
Tim Kaine has a HUGE advantage with billionaires and the mainstream media ready to do all of his biddings, and we’re counting on our grassroots team to help us catch up.

We won’t go down without a fight, but we can’t win without your support.

| | Peter, radical liberal Katie Porter is abandoning her Orange County seat in Congress this year to run for Senate.

What's the best way for Orange County Republicans to say goodbye to Katie Porter and her Leftist, tax-and-spend, open border, war on energy, pro-crime legacy?

**_By voting to replace her with America First, Constitutional conservative Republican Max Ukropina!_**
[**Say GOODBYE to Katie Porter by endorsing Max Ukropina for Congress TODAY and join our movement to elect a principled America First Republican to represent Orange County!**](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=28d6b3e81e&e=86e91e802d)

Peter,

* They fabricated accusations that Pres. Trump colluded with Russia
* They launched a fake investigation against him for political gain
* They pursued bogus efforts to impeach him
* They squashed any effort to bring forth evidence of election interference
* They conspired to spread false information about Jan. 6th
* They pushed to stack the Supreme Court with liberal justices who would vote their way
* They want to turn Washington D.C. and Puerto Rico into states to add 4 permanent Democrat Senators to the U.S. Senate in order to control the Senate forever
* They removed Pres. Trump from the ballot in multiple states
* They want to lower to the voting age to 16 to add millions more Democrat voters
* They are turning illegal immigrants into Democrat voters

This is far from an exhaustive list of the Democrats’ attacks on our freedom and democracy, _yet they have the gall to claim they’re the protectors of democracy?!_

**The reality is the Left is the greatest threat to American democracy in our nation’s history.**

The latest instance is my opponent **Adam Schiff’s** new policy push to end the Electoral College, which is enshrined in our Constitution, to guarantee that all future Presidential voting is completely controlled by big city Democrat voters.

Make no mistake – this is yet ANOTHER instance of employing corrupt abuse of power, system-rigging, and rule-changing in order to get the outcome they want.

Adam Schiff is one of the ringleaders of the Democrats’ attack on our democracy and our republic, **and he must be stopped.**

The difference, though, is that we’re going to defeat him fair and square – at the ballot box!

[**But it’s going to take far more support from you in order to make that happen.**](http://links.ericearly.com/u/click?_t=ad21af4bbba74273abaf5a1183f945ac&_m=79791d76705749c293646f73475e4f4e&_e=LaIpc7XP759khqGM__AKuCDLygaqxrJAmL2bqnO8O1GhU6K8DD2KHu4VrP1gzBI1E4goDw16LUw61fcWqu2T-FO6JX3J25DCpN15LqrlSP-4hyzXBoHxaTIs77WwZAPKm4O2dKggk1A120WfkG8B01mp3nKsqT1PEEGVfwT1thT89REnBczqDBGgtxk6Aua7mKX1wX1aMzbJh-FWDot_iUleduSFqWRSJEuAg43FQVRADRgaoiLTv061ugTesN-3FnjuI0lp0rFvMMe_2NCeBdyPgvIg4imB-Meqq34x9ueA2GV913ZPiGog-K05heDQnJ25knUYlkiE3pJJBpXtI1sYfrZ7JpVAJrAgldOgxlxWimS4X6BNVFzO22900DNVP-7YGuUGkro-xUb-SOTF2g%3D%3D)

[** Help Eric DEFEAT Adam Schiff » **](http://links.ericearly.com/u/click?_t=ad21af4bbba74273abaf5a1183f945ac&_m=79791d76705749c293646f73475e4f4e&_e=LaIpc7XP759khqGM__AKuCDLygaqxrJAmL2bqnO8O1GhU6K8DD2KHu4VrP1gzBI1E4goDw16LUw61fcWqu2T-FO6JX3J25DCpN15LqrlSP-4hyzXBoHxaTIs77WwZAPKm4O2dKggk1A120WfkG8B01mp3nKsqT1PEEGVfwT1thT89REnBczqDBGgtxk6Aua7mKX1wX1aMzbJh-FWDot_iUleduSFqWRSJEuAg43FQVTGZLGoAgkaICymOYZT8mpDe2vnc_lzinoEoB4g8_IqtuATw8lQIoOE3gDKXbkn5h7KGsLEyxM_fxxV7F22EuPCvIrC7zVxz8CerjBuG61bUseWnjdOkmFzjozsV4ozfkNSvFCQuglkvscb6QWy08bluBWGrj-w7WlZsfsriiU7GQ%3D%3D)
**We have less than a month** until voting begins in our open primary for California’s U.S. Senate seat, and if the election were held today, Adam Schiff would advance to November, where his chances of being elected become greater.

We can’t let Schiff get the chance to run in the general election – _we must defeat him right out in the open primary._

I am the only Conservative candidate in this race. There’s another Republican running who has yet to articulate one single position on any of the major issues threatening our Republic.

[**Will you help me end Adam Schiff's perennial threat to our democracy, our constitution, and our freedoms by rushing your support to my campaign today?**](http://links.ericearly.com/u/click?_t=ad21af4bbba74273abaf5a1183f945ac&_m=79791d76705749c293646f73475e4f4e&_e=LaIpc7XP759khqGM__AKuCDLygaqxrJAmL2bqnO8O1GhU6K8DD2KHu4VrP1gzBI1E4goDw16LUw61fcWqu2T-FO6JX3J25DCpN15LqrlSP-4hyzXBoHxaTIs77WwZAPKm4O2dKggk1A120WfkG8B01mp3nKsqT1PEEGVfwT1thT89REnBczqDBGgtxk6Aua7mKX1wX1aMzbJh-FWDot_iUleduSFqWRSJEuAg43FQVQ0OIuYBWfn5RpD4QoPgf45faYNAmbOGm_VSHOOskat5igxJORRmjOyf6O5VPd52gWSVbHQq3MrlI3txMMQLaJffoUnvkSk79u612obGi3sTcpjmC4zDyMFM08GUtBnV0o_xJzUavF8HIHPbnbhgRVhXnjV1-gV5ibyXVwyDupdyw%3D%3D)

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

body:

# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=36609%2E3422442%2E_mPRsP)
Derek,
$10 million dollars. That’s how much money our opponent just dropped on TV ads that will run in the weeks before Primary Day. ⬇️
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240117-2?refcode=em20240117-36609&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36609_3422442__mPRsP&akid=36609%2E3422442%2E_mPRsP)
**We’ll be frank: we don’t have that type of money.** Our opponent is sitting on more than $35 million, more than any other Democrat running for the House or Senate.
Even though we’re behind financially, the polls show a close race that will shift as voters hear from the candidates. Right now, we’re running TV ads in the Bay Area, and just launched digital ads statewide. **Our next step is going live in the LA media market, the biggest and most expensive in the state.[Can you help us compete with this influx of spending and expand our ad to the LA media market by making a donation of $5 today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240117-2?refcode=em20240117-36609&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36609_3422442__mPRsP&akid=36609%2E3422442%2E_mPRsP)**
Derek, Katie is the only candidate in this race who has **never** taken money from corporate PACs, and doesn’t have that cash stashed away after decades in Washington. We truly, truly count on supporters like you.
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240117-2?refcode=em20240117-36609&refcode2=36609_3422442__mPRsP&akid=36609%2E3422442%2E_mPRsP)
Thanks for the help,
Team KP

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240117-36609&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=36609_3422442__mPRsP&akid=36609%2E3422442%2E_mPRsP)**

Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

clean_body: Derek, $10 million dollars. That’s how much money our opponent just dropped on TV ads that will run in the weeks before Primary Day. ⬇️ We’ll be frank: we don’t have that type of money. Our opponent is sitting on more than $35 million, more than any other Democrat running for the House or Senate. Even though we’re behind financially, the polls show a close race that will shift as voters hear from the candidates. Right now, we’re running TV ads in the Bay Area, and just launched digital ads statewide. Our next step is going live in the LA media market, the biggest and most expensive in the state. Derek, Katie is the only candidate in this race who has never taken money from corporate PACs, and doesn’t have that cash stashed away after decades in Washington. We truly, truly count on supporters like you. Thanks for the help, Team KP Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

clean_body: We know that Donald Trump, Jim Jordan, and all their radical Republican allies will be watching our fundraising numbers extremely closely. = Peter – we’re just a few weeks into the year, but our work to win this race and push back against MAGA extremism has already started. Our finance team just crunched the numbers — and unfortunately, we’re falling short of where we need to be to start off 2024 in a strong position. = | = In 2022, this was one of the closest elections in the country – and it’s already shaping up to be just as close this November. We know that Donald Trump, Jim Jordan, and all their radical Republican allies will be watching our fundraising numbers extremely closely. If we fall short now, they’ll take it as a sign that this seat is up for grabs — and that their MAGA Majority is safe for another two years. Under no circumstances can we let that happen, Peter. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you, Team Emilia A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change. In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country.Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results. = | = | Emilia Sykes is running for re-election in Ohio's 13th Congressional District. clean_body: | | | | Donate by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT | Peter, Mike told me he reached out to you about his mid-month January deadline – but I haven’t seen your contribution come in yet. Is this a mistake? If you haven’t contributed yet, please send in your BEST contribution before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT. Unlike his radical far-left extremist opponent, Mondaire Jones, Mike will always put PEOPLE over POLITICS. In fact, The Examiner News recently stated that Mike Lawler has a common-sense approach, whereas Mondaire Jones was the third most progressive member of the House of Representatives during his term. We are long overdue for leadership that focuses on putting our community first. Mike is a proven leader that will put YOU first. | | | | | | Thank you, | | Ciro, Team Lawler Sent from my iPhone | | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York!_ Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 = \- =

name: John Fetterman
subject: WE NEED TO HELP BOB
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I have some BIG news in the PA Senate race:
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1865%2E35263%2E9lrXAX)
Peter, I have some BIG news in the PA Senate race: **🚨 David McCormick is running against my friend + fellow PA Senator Bob Casey 🚨** Mitch McConnell hand-picked this guy. We can’t let this hedge fund executive who lives in CONNECTICUT and who made his fortune selling out PA and American workers to China win. We need to step up for Bob. Like, *big* time. [**So please, please, please 🙏 Will you split a donation right now to support my friend Bob + Tammy Baldwin + defend this seat from Mitch McConnell and David McCormick?**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-casey.PWALcl&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240117_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1865%2E35263%2E9lrXAX) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Bob Casey and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-casey.kD9PQC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240117_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1865%2E35263%2E9lrXAX)
---
[SPLIT $25 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-casey.uSnJn8&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240117_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=1865%2E35263%2E9lrXAX)
---
| [SPLIT $50 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-casey.aSK4ar&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240117_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=1865%2E35263%2E9lrXAX)
---
[SPLIT $100 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-casey.jjqwt_&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240117_PM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=1865%2E35263%2E9lrXAX)
---
| [SPLIT $250 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2158?c0=tbe-em-casey.mxtR8S&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240117_PM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=1865%2E35263%2E9lrXAX)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-casey.PWALcl&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240117_PM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=1865%2E35263%2E9lrXAX)
---
Just like in 2022, an out-of-state millionaire is swooping in to try to buy Pennsylvania’s Senate seat. And CNN is rating Pennsylvania one of the closest Senate races in the country yet again.
Mitch McConnell and the GOP are going to do everything they can to defeat Bob and flip PA red, because saving our razor-thin Democratic majority could all come down to re-electing Bob Casey.
Not only that, but this guy has a massive personal fortune that he could use to self-fund the race – he put _$14 MILLION_ 😧 into his failed run for Senate in 2022 AND he’s got the national Republican establishment standing behind him.
[**If we’re going to keep the Senate blue, we need to come together to help Bob win this race. We built a people-powered team that made history in 2022 – let’s build something even bigger to win again this year.**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-casey.PWALcl&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240117_PM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=1865%2E35263%2E9lrXAX)
Thanks to folks like you, Pennsylvania is represented by TWO Democrats in the Senate who are fighting for working families. We’re going to need your help to keep it that way.
Appreciate you all!!
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=1865%2E35263%2E9lrXAX) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=1865%2E35263%2E9lrXAX)**

Fellow Conservative,

We hope this email finds you well. Thank you for your dedication to the Conservative cause and for standing up for America.

As you know, the midterm elections did not go as planned. We did not see the red wave we expected. We did take back the House majority, but we did not flip the Senate.

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: I Refused to Recant
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Dr. Fauci's testimony is validating everything I said, every word I wrote.

|
---
| | | **Dr. Fauci's testimony is validating everything I said, every word I wrote.
**
---
|
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_1_17_24_email_1_1_nd&n=1)
