[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_1_17_24_email_1_1_nd&n=2)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_1_17_24_email_1_1_nd&n=3)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,
Ever since I wrote _The Real Anthony Fauci_ , I have had a target on my back.
In that book, I dared speak the truth about who Dr. Fauci really is, and what Dr. Fauci is responsible for.
Now, nearly a year later and thanks to Congressional Hearings, everything I wrote about Dr. Fauci is spilling out into the open for the whole world to see — and the news networks, social media platforms, politicians, and world leaders now know I was right.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_1_17_24_email_1_1_nd&n=4)
Dr. Fauci's testimony is validating everything I said, _every word I wrote_.
I refused to recant in the face of unprecedented censorship.
I refused to recant as I withered blistering personal attacks on my integrity.
I refused to recant as Social Media Giants deplatformed and throttled me down.
I refused to recant as my free speech rights were violated time and time and time again.
My book _The Real Anthony Fauci_ faced a total blackout from every major book reviewer in the country. No one dared review the book.
But millions of Americans did.
_And their reviews made it the #1 Bestseller for months_.
Today Anthony Fauci's lack of transparency, his deceit, his complete and utter failure to "trust the science" were on full display.
Dr. Fauci's duplicity speaks directly to the urgent need to clean up and clean out the corrupt health agencies in Washington. We must hold the Anthony Fauci's of the world accountable for what they did, and for what they did not do.
But accomplishing this is up to the citizens of this country, it is up to us.
**We can bow down and comply, take the jabs, wear face coverings, etc.,_or we can say No_.**
We have a choice, it is not too late. We can hold Anthony Fauci accountable. We can course correct.
**But I need your help today to do so.**
[**Please chip in today to help us restore honesty and integrity in our institutions and in Washington today.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_1_17_24_email_1_1_nd&n=5)

name: Heinrich HQ
subject: A multi-millionaire hedge fund executive just jumped into the race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Moments ago, a wealthy, well-connected Republican announced her campaign to defeat Martin in New Mexico’s U.S. Senate race. |
#
_Hi there, this is Tina. My friend and colleague, Senator Martin Heinrich from New Mexico, has some breaking news in his Senate race, and his campaign asked to reach out to this team._
* * *
Team — Moments ago, a Republican multi-millionaire announced her campaign to defeat Martin in New Mexico’s U.S. Senate race. **Martin’s new challenger is a longtime hedge fund executive who has already poured half a million dollars into her own campaign.** As the daughter of New Mexico’s last Republican Senator, she is all but certain to have GOP mega-donors lining up to support her bid. She already has the full backing of the National Republican Senatorial Committee. **While Martin’s opponent may have a personal fortune and the GOP establishment behind her, what we have is far more valuable: a grassroots movement that comes together to fight for our shared values time and time again.** **[That’s why we’re reaching out today: We need to raise as much as possible in these first 48 hours to prepare for the spending Republicans are about to pour into New Mexico. Will you rush in a split contribution of $10 or any amount between our campaign and Tina Smith to help keep Martin in the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77257811/449871413/-429749455?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=10&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20240117_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDc0YzYyOS04ZWI1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jQ3vhX-1MbnSDETZc6XDvJCV3s8_CxBw7kPeKWToTp4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tina Smith and Martin Heinrich will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77257812/449871414/-429749455?express_lane=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20240117_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDc0YzYyOS04ZWI1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jQ3vhX-1MbnSDETZc6XDvJCV3s8_CxBw7kPeKWToTp4=)

We can’t afford to lose Martin’s voice in the Senate. The issues that matter most to our movement are at stake, from preserving our public lands and waters to protecting critical benefits like Medicare and Social Security.
But this race is officially competitive, and we need to build up our grassroots resources immediately to win. Between Martin’s new opponent jumping in and Donald Trump planning to ramp up his campaign in New Mexico, it’s clear Republicans are making the Land of Enchantment a top target this year.
**[We have our work cut out for us in the months ahead. name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: At U.N. Request Biden Removed Houthis from U.S. Terrorist List for Humanitarian Reasons
body:
The violent Yemeni militant group that keeps attacking commercial
ships—including American vessels—in the Red Sea and Suez Canal was
removed from the U.S. terrorist list by President Biden at the request
of the famously corrupt United Nations and other leftist humanitarian
groups.

[alt_text]

[*****]
January 17, 2024

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66612&L=31132&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tcmVtb3ZlZC1ob3V0aGlzLWZyb20tdGVycm9yaXN0LWxpc3QvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=3b93aa3fd2ed8cd7276333f4b4f1c9289f3a8214c18c292f8cb98fab56540636]

The violent Yemeni militant group that keeps attacking commercial
ships—including American vessels—in the Red Sea and Suez Canal was
removed from the U.S. terrorist list by President Biden at the request
of the famously corrupt United Nations and other leftist humanitarian
groups. The revocation, announced on February 12, 2021, of the
terrorist designation stood even after the Treasury Department’s
Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) sanctioned two key militants
of the group, which lately is best known as Houthis but is also
officially identified as Ansarallah or Partisans of God.

clean_body: The violent Yemeni militant group that keeps attacking commercial ships—including American vessels—in the Red Sea and Suez Canal was removed from the U.S. terrorist list by President Biden at the request of the famously corrupt United Nations and other leftist humanitarian groups. [alt_text] [*****] January 17, 2024 [article-image] [] The violent Yemeni militant group that keeps attacking commercial ships—including American vessels—in the Red Sea and Suez Canal was removed from the U.S. terrorist list by President Biden at the request of the famously corrupt United Nations and other leftist humanitarian groups. The revocation, announced on February 12, 2021, of the terrorist designation stood even after the Treasury Department’s Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) sanctioned two key militants of the group, which lately is best known as Houthis but is also officially identified as Ansarallah or Partisans of God. Fellow Conservative,

We made promises we didn’t keep.

Every day, it got worse.

Every day, it was a disaster.

The adult in the room never materialized.

On August 26th, 2021, Joe Biden carelessly washed away the sacrifices made by my wife, me, our families, our closest friends, and countless others.

body:
Moments ago, a wealthy, well-connected Republican just announced her campaign to defeat Martin in New Mexico’s U.S. Senate race. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77258469/449873666/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_RES_NO_20240117_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjc3MjFmOC05MWI1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A6boJmUMLIE2oVlr0fZ_OcetEc_8BjNIe6_ar1N-tCU=&emci=b496d7fc-90b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=127721f8-91b5-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=252045)

She already has the full backing of the National Republican Senatorial Committee. **While Martin’s opponent may have a personal fortune and the GOP establishment behind her, what we have is far more valuable: a grassroots movement that comes together to fight for our shared values time and time again.** **[That’s why we’re reaching out today: We need to raise as much as possible in these first 48 hours to prepare for the spending Republicans are about to pour into New Mexico. We can’t afford to lose Martin’s voice in the Senate. The issues that matter most to our movement are at stake, from preserving our public lands and waters to protecting critical benefits like Medicare and Social Security.

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: It could all come down to Bob’s re-election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Holding Pennsylvania might be our only chance to stop the GOP from flipping the Senate.

| Hi Peter, Governor Josh Shapiro here.

Extremist Republicans are ready to spend millions upon millions to replace our senior Senator Bob Casey with Mitch McConnell’s hand-picked candidate.

If they succeed, Democrats could lose the Senate majority, paving the way for McConnell’s extreme agenda. **That’s not a risk our country can afford.**

The risk just keeps going up. **Holding Pennsylvania might be our only chance to stop the GOP from flipping the Senate.**

[_**We have to do all that we can to defend this seat and our Democratic majority in the Senate. Help Bob’s team defend this seat by splitting a donation between his campaign and Fight for Progress, Peter.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77258609/449874212/-887798292?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-01-17_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3Mzc4MmFjLTkyYjUtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kNBROThf-UNZHt_WJYqKmTLIDCfnX_v7UHOOX1tL4s8=)

With so much on the line, we need to have Bob’s back – just like he had mine in 2022.

[_**Your split donation, no matter how big or small, will make a difference.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77258611/449874214/-887798292?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-01-17_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3Mzc4MmFjLTkyYjUtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kNBROThf-UNZHt_WJYqKmTLIDCfnX_v7UHOOX1tL4s8=)

Josh Shapiro

clean_body: Holding Pennsylvania might be our only chance to stop the GOP from flipping the Senate. | Hi Peter, Governor Josh Shapiro here. Extremist Republicans are ready to spend millions upon millions to replace our senior Senator Bob Casey with Mitch McConnell’s hand-picked candidate. If they succeed, Democrats could lose the Senate majority, paving the way for McConnell’s extreme agenda. That’s not a risk our country can afford. The risk just keeps going up. Holding Pennsylvania might be our only chance to stop the GOP from flipping the Senate. = | = With so much on the line, we need to have Bob’s back – just like he had mine in 2022. body:
As we kick off the election year, we need to know where you stand on some critical national security issues. Please complete your personally assigned survey as soon as possible.
We need your help to answer these critical questions Peter.

[**Your personally assigned Survey to Secure America is available at this link.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3dda5b4e61964cbe8f5c30d57ff41213&_e=itATrANq9HMgdTGo3A8muPQq3Vxo139T6ZvreRVSrxyhgsTAXlG89xgI7dzvsa4Bfb25u98KtMsa3McRbs8-Zfo4Yivj7i727FAdxI2zKPNr8mgd-qNCW66lC8SMBfPdv6XIEY9l6nlzL3XGpwJKxi35W0VOanU7pBehPXZ_cdR8MMeVeakc0e-BPPLYryiKPzsQR7ddqAitzPHCC7tBB_ojR2GOH3LTI-QAEUnaDWafy6YXVQcyBL_vbgHtDxE-Nl3PxgZ3EUG4yAkWUAeQ3BMH5WTNggXxmEcoV8ZPrK60Fobnd3TkN4MbO8tzGQU4TVnYbSvsmZG1Pzk5yMTCev1w9NMys4rZsShIIUsGaOQIzCIgAu101gy2UBDRKu-FpD9C6590J84j_4arx6eTO6mx-_StywAOwkvLQcBPbzYMNiOwSVVeclqDHGhl33guj-0ou960OoNkiU81rerVXoqTjjUFQAYX7CmFRW9Vnhw%3D)

Please complete your Survey to Secure America today so we can tabulate results and act on the critical information we gain from your time taking the survey.

We can’t do this alone, Peter. We need your help to ensure our efforts align with the current Republican Party, and we will never know where you stand if you don’t tell us.

So please be as accurate as possible when selecting your answers to our essential Survey to Secure America questions.

Your answers will inform our efforts as we campaign to take back the Senate Majority for Republicans. We need to know where you stand so we can campaign on the issues that matter most to our loyal supporters.

[**Please complete your personally assigned Survey to Secure America today.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3dda5b4e61964cbe8f5c30d57ff41213&_e=itATrANq9HMgdTGo3A8muPQq3Vxo139T6ZvreRVSrxyhgsTAXlG89xgI7dzvsa4Bfb25u98KtMsa3McRbs8-Zfo4Yivj7i727FAdxI2zKPNr8mgd-qNCW66lC8SMBfPdv6XIEY9l6nlzL3XGpwJKxi35W0VOanU7pBehPXZ_cdR8MMeVeakc0e-BPPLYryiKPzsQR7ddqAitzPHCC7tBB_ojR2GOH3LTI-QAEUnaDWafy6YXVQcyBL_vbgHtDxE-Nl3PxgZ3EUG4yAkWUAeQ3BMH5WTNggXxmEcoV8ZPrK60Fobnd3TkN4MbO8tzGQU4RzQ6WZFtNQgiOdeyMK5tRSR3j9XLqUIA_O0Rz21f66xlE0oITsnJURbi2EE3SSt8qENOLMmVqCIT7XlppmT7YSIxYSKlyMFyTkaCO2EBlChYbu4NU5ajn3IDPjgAsMBHoFo0lFXq4o7stG0OvmY5puwr53ixZX5ZssxSlHUqDkQ%3D)
